31:Tbeb2,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Corpus spine (000)</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>This repository is a comparative research corpus for coding agents and harnesses. Use this map to decide where to read first without physically moving existing data.</li>
<li>For reversible old-to-new bucket proposals, see <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/02_corpus_move_candidates.md</code>.</li>
<li>For the canonical relationship between <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/</code> and <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/</code>, see <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/03_overview_canonical_map.md</code>.</li>
<li>| Purpose | Path | Classification |</li>

    CLI["CLI (yargs)"] --> Server["Hono HTTP Server"]
    Server --> Instance["Instance Context&#x3C;br/>(per-project)"]
    Instance --> Session["Session Manager"]
    Instance --> Agent["Agent Service"]
    Instance --> Config["Config Loader"]
    Instance --> Snapshot["Snapshot (git)"]
    Session --> Processor["SessionProcessor&#x3C;br/>(agent loop)"]
    Processor --> LLM["LLM Module&#x3C;br/>(Vercel AI SDK)"]
    Processor --> ToolRegistry["Tool Registry"]
    Processor --> PermSvc["Permission Service"]
    LLM --> Provider["Provider Service&#x3C;br/>(21+ providers)"]
    ToolRegistry --> BuiltinTools["24 Built-in Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> MCPTools["MCP Bridge Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> PluginTools["Plugin Tools"]
    MCPTools --> MCPClient["MCP Client&#x3C;br/>(stdio/SSE/HTTP)"]
    Instance --> Bus["Event Bus"]
    Bus --> GlobalBus["GlobalBus&#x3C;br/>(EventEmitter)"]
    GlobalBus --> SSE["SSE to Frontend"]
    SSE --> AppFE["SolidJS App"]
    SSE --> ConsoleFE["SolidStart Console"]
    Agent --> SkillSvc["Skill Service"]
    Config --> PluginSvc["Plugin Service&#x3C;br/>(25+ hooks)"]
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant Server as Hono Server
    participant Session as Session Manager
    participant Processor as SessionProcessor
    participant LLM as LLM (streamText)
    participant Tools as Tool Registry
    participant Perm as Permission Service
    participant Bus as Event Bus

    User->>Server: POST /session/:id/chat
    Server->>Session: chat(sessionID, input)
    Session->>Processor: create + process
    Processor->>LLM: stream(system + messages + tools)
    LLM-->>Processor: streaming chunks
    Processor->>Bus: publish(message.updated)
    Bus-->>User: SSE event

    loop tool calls
        LLM-->>Processor: tool-call event
        Processor->>Perm: evaluate(tool, pattern)
        alt needs approval
            Perm-->>Bus: permission.asked
            Bus-->>User: SSE → approval UI
            User-->>Perm: permission.replied
        end
        Processor->>Tools: execute(tool, args)
        Tools-->>Processor: tool output
        Processor->>LLM: continue with tool result
    end
    Processor->>Session: finalize message
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)
</code></pre>

// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make&#x3C;State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)

<h3><code>000/03_overview_canonical_map.md</code></h3>
<h1>Overview Canonical Map</h1>
<p>This map resolves the apparent duplication between <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/</code> and <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/</code> without deleting or moving files.</p>
<h2>Canonical Rule</h2>
<ul>
<li><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/</code> is the root overview index and short-entry reading spine.</li>
<li><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/</code> is the deep overview source set.</li>
<li>If the same filename exists in both folders and content differs, keep both:
<ul>
<li>read <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/&#x3C;name></code> first for orientation,</li>
<li>read <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/&#x3C;name></code> for detailed analysis.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>If content is identical, treat <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/&#x3C;name></code> as the navigation copy and <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/&#x3C;name></code> as the deep-overview location until a later link audit decides whether deduplication is safe.</li>
</ul>

<h3><code>000/00_oc_overview.md</code></h3>
<h1>OpenCode Agent Engine Review Overview</h1>
<p>This document analyzes the internal architecture of the <code>opencode</code> repository. OpenCode is an open source AI coding agent based on TypeScript + Bun, and is a server-client separate agent engine built on the Effect-TS layer. The purpose of this analysis, the same as the Codex analysis, is to organize prompt assembly, tool runtime, skills, agent loops, permissions, and plug-in layers <strong>where and how they can be ripped out</strong> on a code basis.</p>
<p>One-sentence conclusion: OpenCode is a full-stack agent platform that organically combines <code>Effect-TS service layer + Hono HTTP server + Vercel AI SDK + Zod-typed event bus + SolidJS frontend</code>. Rather than a single CLI tool, it manages multiple project instances simultaneously on a server process and connects desktop, web, and TUI clients through SDK.</p>
<p>The core is six-pronged. First, all services are dependency injected using the <code>Layer</code>/<code>Service</code>/<code>Effect</code> pattern of Effect-TS. Second, the <code>BusEvent.define()</code> + <code>GlobalBus</code> event system simultaneously solves server internal communication and SSE-based client real-time synchronization. Third, the Vercel AI SDK abstracts more than 21 LLM providers into a single <code>streamText</code> interface. Fourth, the <code>Snapshot</code> system implements session-level undo/revert using a separate git repository. Fifth, the <code>Plugin</code> system allows authentication, tools, prompts, and permissions to be expanded externally with more than 25 hook points. Sixth, the <code>Permission</code> system performs detailed access control for each tool and agent using wildcard pattern-based <code>allow/deny/ask</code> rules.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    CLI["CLI (yargs)"] --> Server["Hono HTTP Server"]
    Server --> Instance["Instance Context&#x3C;br/>(per-project)"]
    Instance --> Session["Session Manager"]
    Instance --> Agent["Agent Service"]
    Instance --> Config["Config Loader"]
    Instance --> Snapshot["Snapshot (git)"]
    Session --> Processor["SessionProcessor&#x3C;br/>(agent loop)"]
    Processor --> LLM["LLM Module&#x3C;br/>(Vercel AI SDK)"]
    Processor --> ToolRegistry["Tool Registry"]
    Processor --> PermSvc["Permission Service"]
    LLM --> Provider["Provider Service&#x3C;br/>(21+ providers)"]
    ToolRegistry --> BuiltinTools["24 Built-in Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> MCPTools["MCP Bridge Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> PluginTools["Plugin Tools"]
    MCPTools --> MCPClient["MCP Client&#x3C;br/>(stdio/SSE/HTTP)"]
    Instance --> Bus["Event Bus"]
    Bus --> GlobalBus["GlobalBus&#x3C;br/>(EventEmitter)"]
    GlobalBus --> SSE["SSE to Frontend"]
    SSE --> AppFE["SolidJS App"]
    SSE --> ConsoleFE["SolidStart Console"]
    Agent --> SkillSvc["Skill Service"]
    Config --> PluginSvc["Plugin Service&#x3C;br/>(25+ hooks)"]
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant Server as Hono Server
    participant Session as Session Manager
    participant Processor as SessionProcessor
    participant LLM as LLM (streamText)
    participant Tools as Tool Registry
    participant Perm as Permission Service
    participant Bus as Event Bus

    User->>Server: POST /session/:id/chat
    Server->>Session: chat(sessionID, input)
    Session->>Processor: create + process
    Processor->>LLM: stream(system + messages + tools)
    LLM-->>Processor: streaming chunks
    Processor->>Bus: publish(message.updated)
    Bus-->>User: SSE event

    loop tool calls
        LLM-->>Processor: tool-call event
        Processor->>Perm: evaluate(tool, pattern)
        alt needs approval
            Perm-->>Bus: permission.asked
            Bus-->>User: SSE → approval UI
            User-->>Perm: permission.replied
        end
        Processor->>Tools: execute(tool, args)
        Tools-->>Processor: tool output
        Processor->>LLM: continue with tool result
    end
    Processor->>Session: finalize message
</code></pre>

<hr>
<h2>2. Effect-TS based service architecture</h2>
<p>The biggest structural feature of OpenCode is that all core modules are built with the <code>Service → Layer → Effect</code> pattern of Effect-TS. This pattern handles dependency injection, error handling, and concurrency control in a type-safe manner.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)
</code></pre>
<p><code>InstanceState</code> is a key mechanism for isolating state per project instance. When managing multiple projects simultaneously on the same server, the settings, sessions, and tools for each project are initialized independently.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/effect/instance-state.ts
// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make&#x3C;State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. Agent system</h2>
<h3>3.1 Agent definition</h3>
<p>An agent is defined by the Zod schema and includes name, mode, permissions, model, and prompt.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export const Info = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]),
  native: z.boolean().optional(),
  hidden: z.boolean().optional(),
  permission: Permission.Ruleset,
  model: z.object({
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
    providerID: Provid

<h3><code>000/03_overview_canonical_map.md</code></h3>
<h1>Overview Canonical Map</h1>
<p>This map resolves the apparent duplication between <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/</code> and <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/</code> without deleting or moving files.</p>
<h2>Canonical Rule</h2>
<ul>
<li><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/</code> is the root overview index and short-entry reading spine.</li>
<li><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/</code> is the deep overview source set.</li>
<li>If the same filename exists in both folders and content differs, keep both:
<ul>
<li>read <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/&#x3C;name></code> first for orientation,</li>
<li>read <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/&#x3C;name></code> for detailed analysis.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>If content is identical, treat <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/&#x3C;name></code> as the navigation copy and <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/&#x3C;name></code> as the deep-overview location until a later link audit decides whether deduplication is safe.</li>

<h3><code>000/00_oc_overview.md</code></h3>
<h1>OpenCode 에이전트 엔진 검토 개요</h1>
<p>이 문서는 <code>opencode</code> 저장소의 내부 아키텍처를 분석한다. OpenCode는 TypeScript + Bun 기반의 오픈소스 AI 코딩 에이전트로, Effect-TS 계층 위에 구축된 서버-클라이언트 분리형 에이전트 엔진이다. 이번 분석의 목적은 Codex 분석과 동일하게, 프롬프트 조립, 툴 런타임, 스킬, 에이전트 루프, 권한, 플러그인 계층을 <strong>어디서 어떻게 뜯어낼 수 있는지</strong>를 코드 기준으로 정리하는 것이다.</p>
<p>한 문장 결론: OpenCode는 <code>Effect-TS service layer + Hono HTTP server + Vercel AI SDK + Zod-typed event bus + SolidJS frontend</code>가 유기적으로 엮인 풀스택 에이전트 플랫폼이다. 단일 CLI 도구가 아니라, 서버 프로세스 위에서 다수의 프로젝트 인스턴스를 동시에 관리하고, 데스크톱·웹·TUI 클라이언트가 SDK를 통해 접속하는 구조다.</p>
<p>핵심은 여섯 갈래다. 첫째, 모든 서비스가 Effect-TS의 <code>Layer</code>/<code>Service</code>/<code>Effect</code> 패턴으로 의존성 주입된다. 둘째, <code>BusEvent.define()</code> + <code>GlobalBus</code> 이벤트 시스템이 서버 내부 통신과 SSE 기반 클라이언트 실시간 동기화를 동시에 해결한다. 셋째, Vercel AI SDK가 21개 이상의 LLM 프로바이더를 단일 <code>streamText</code> 인터페이스로 추상화한다. 넷째, <code>Snapshot</code> 시스템이 별도 git 저장소를 이용해 세션 단위 undo/revert를 구현한다. 다섯째, <code>Plugin</code> 시스템이 25개 이상의 hook 포인트로 인증·도구·프롬프트·권한을 외부에서 확장 가능하게 한다. 여섯째, <code>Permission</code> 시스템이 wildcard 패턴 기반 <code>allow/deny/ask</code> 규칙으로 도구별·에이전트별 세밀한 접근 제어를 수행한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    CLI["CLI (yargs)"] --> Server["Hono HTTP Server"]
    Server --> Instance["Instance Context&#x3C;br/>(per-project)"]
    Instance --> Session["Session Manager"]
    Instance --> Agent["Agent Service"]
    Instance --> Config["Config Loader"]
    Instance --> Snapshot["Snapshot (git)"]
    Session --> Processor["SessionProcessor&#x3C;br/>(agent loop)"]
    Processor --> LLM["LLM Module&#x3C;br/>(Vercel AI SDK)"]
    Processor --> ToolRegistry["Tool Registry"]
    Processor --> PermSvc["Permission Service"]
    LLM --> Provider["Provider Service&#x3C;br/>(21+ providers)"]
    ToolRegistry --> BuiltinTools["24 Built-in Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> MCPTools["MCP Bridge Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> PluginTools["Plugin Tools"]
    MCPTools --> MCPClient["MCP Client&#x3C;br/>(stdio/SSE/HTTP)"]
    Instance --> Bus["Event Bus"]
    Bus --> GlobalBus["GlobalBus&#x3C;br/>(EventEmitter)"]
    GlobalBus --> SSE["SSE to Frontend"]
    SSE --> AppFE["SolidJS App"]
    SSE --> ConsoleFE["SolidStart Console"]
    Agent --> SkillSvc["Skill Service"]
    Config --> PluginSvc["Plugin Service&#x3C;br/>(25+ hooks)"]
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant Server as Hono Server
    participant Session as Session Manager
    participant Processor as SessionProcessor
    participant LLM as LLM (streamText)
    participant Tools as Tool Registry
    participant Perm as Permission Service
    participant Bus as Event Bus

    User->>Server: POST /session/:id/chat
    Server->>Session: chat(sessionID, input)
    Session->>Processor: create + process
    Processor->>LLM: stream(system + messages + tools)
    LLM-->>Processor: streaming chunks
    Processor->>Bus: publish(message.updated)
    Bus-->>User: SSE event

    loop tool calls
        LLM-->>Processor: tool-call event
        Processor->>Perm: evaluate(tool, pattern)
        alt needs approval
            Perm-->>Bus: permission.asked
            Bus-->>User: SSE → approval UI
            User-->>Perm: permission.replied
        end
        Processor->>Tools: execute(tool, args)
        Tools-->>Processor: tool output
        Processor->>LLM: continue with tool result
    end
    Processor->>Session: finalize message
</code></pre>

<hr>
<h2>2. Effect-TS 기반 서비스 아키텍처</h2>
<p>OpenCode의 가장 큰 구조적 특징은 모든 핵심 모듈이 Effect-TS의 <code>Service → Layer → Effect</code> 패턴으로 구축된다는 점이다. 이 패턴은 의존성 주입, 에러 핸들링, 동시성 제어를 타입 안전하게 처리한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)
</code></pre>
<p><code>InstanceState</code>는 프로젝트 인스턴스별로 상태를 격리하는 핵심 메커니즘이다. 같은 서버에서 여러 프로젝트를 동시에 관리할 때, 각 프로젝트의 설정·세션·도구가 독립적으로 초기화된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/effect/instance-state.ts
// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make&#x3C;State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. 에이전트 시스템</h2>
<h3>3.1 에이전트 정의</h3>
<p>에이전트는 Zod 스키마로 정의되며, 이름·모드·권한·모델·프롬프트를 포함한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export const Info = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]),
  native: z.boolean().optional(),
  hidden: z.boolean().optional(),
  permission: Permission.Ruleset,
  model: z.object({
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
    providerID: Provid
</code></pre>

## Corpus note

# OpenCode 에이전트 엔진 검토 개요

이 문서는 `opencode` 저장소의 내부 아키텍처를 분석한다. OpenCode는 TypeScript + Bun 기반의 오픈소스 AI 코딩 에이전트로, Effect-TS 계층 위에 구축된 서버-클라이언트 분리형 에이전트 엔진이다. 이번 분석의 목적은 Codex 분석과 동일하게, 프롬프트 조립, 툴 런타임, 스킬, 에이전트 루프, 권한, 플러그인 계층을 **어디서 어떻게 뜯어낼 수 있는지**를 코드 기준으로 정리하는 것이다.

한 문장 결론: OpenCode는 `Effect-TS service layer + Hono HTTP server + Vercel AI SDK + Zod-typed event bus + SolidJS frontend`가 유기적으로 엮인 풀스택 에이전트 플랫폼이다. 단일 CLI 도구가 아니라, 서버 프로세스 위에서 다수의 프로젝트 인스턴스를 동시에 관리하고, 데스크톱·웹·TUI 클라이언트가 SDK를 통해 접속하는 구조다.

핵심은 여섯 갈래다. 첫째, 모든 서비스가 Effect-TS의 `Layer`/`Service`/`Effect` 패턴으로 의존성 주입된다. 둘째, `BusEvent.define()` + `GlobalBus` 이벤트 시스템이 서버 내부 통신과 SSE 기반 클라이언트 실시간 동기화를 동시에 해결한다. 셋째, Vercel AI SDK가 21개 이상의 LLM 프로바이더를 단일 `streamText` 인터페이스로 추상화한다. 넷째, `Snapshot` 시스템이 별도 git 저장소를 이용해 세션 단위 undo/revert를 구현한다. 다섯째, `Plugin` 시스템이 25개 이상의 hook 포인트로 인증·도구·프롬프트·권한을 외부에서 확장 가능하게 한다. 여섯째, `Permission` 시스템이 wildcard 패턴 기반 `allow/deny/ask` 규칙으로 도구별·에이전트별 세밀한 접근 제어를 수행한다.

```mermaid
graph TD
    CLI["CLI (yargs)"] --> Server["Hono HTTP Server"]

## Main analysis

The daily edit/tool/commit loop for this harness.

> `140_opencode/README.md`

## Features

- **Interactive TUI**: Built with [Bubble Tea](https://github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea) for a smooth terminal experience
- **Multiple AI Providers**: Support for OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, AWS Bedrock, Groq, Azure OpenAI, and OpenRouter
- **Session Management**: Save and manage multiple conversation sessions
- **Tool Integration**: AI can execute commands, search files, and modify code
- **Vim-like Editor**: Integrated editor with text input capabilities
- **Persistent Storage**: SQLite database for storing conversations and sessions
- **LSP Integration**: Language Server Protocol support for code intelligence
- **File Change Tracking**: Track and visualize file changes during sessions
- **External Editor Support**: Open your preferred editor for composing messages
- **Named Arguments for Custom Commands**: Create powerful custom commands with multiple named placeholders

## OpenCode session loop

SessionProcessor → plugin hooks → GlobalBus.

> `000_overview/00_oc_overview.md`

## Korean corpus (reference)

## 에이전트 루프

이 하네스의 일상적인 편집·도구·커밋 루프.

> `140_opencode/README.md`

- **Multiple AI Providers**: Support for OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, AWS Bedrock, Groq, Azure OpenAI, and OpenRouter
- **Session Management**: Save and manage multiple conversation sessions
- **Tool Integration**: AI can execute commands, search files, and modify code
- **Vim-like Editor**: Integrated editor with text input capabilities

<li><code>./.opencode.json</code> (local directory)</li>
<li>OpenCode includes an auto compact feature that automatically summarizes your conversation when it approaches the model's context window limit. When enabled (default setting), this feature:</li>
<li>Monitors token usage during your conversation</li>
<li>Automatically triggers summarization when usage reaches 95% of the model's context window</li>
<li>Creates a new session with the summary, allowing you to continue your work without losing context</li>
<li>Helps prevent "out of context" errors that can occur with long conversations</li>
<li>You can enable or disable this feature in your configuration file:</li>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<p>CLI/env/project settings file hierarchy.</p>
<blockquote>
<p><code>140_opencode/README.md</code></p>
</blockquote>
<h2>Configuration</h2>
<p>OpenCode looks for configuration in the following locations:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>$HOME/.opencode.json</code></li>
<li><code>$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/opencode/.opencode.json</code></li>
<li><code>./.opencode.json</code> (local directory)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Auto Compact Feature</h3>
<p>OpenCode includes an auto compact feature that automatically summarizes your conversation when it approaches the model's context window limit. When enabled (default setting), this feature:</p>
<ul>
<li>Monitors token usage during your conversation</li>
<li>Automatically triggers summarization when usage reaches 95% of the model's context window</li>
<li>Creates a new session with the summary, allowing you to continue your work without losing context</li>
<li>Helps prevent "out of context" errors that can occur with long conversations</li>
</ul>
<p>You can enable or disable this feature in your configuration file:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">{
  "autoCompact": true // default is true
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Environment Variables</h3>
<p>You can configure OpenCode using environment variables:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Environment Variable</th>
<th>Purpose</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>ANTHROPIC_API_KEY</code></td>
<td>For Claude models</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>OPENAI_API_KEY</code></td>
<td>For OpenAI models</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GEMINI_API_KEY</code></td>
<td>For Google Gemini models</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GITHUB_TOKEN</code></td>
<td>For Github Copilot models (see <a href="#using-github-copilot">Using Github Copilot</a>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>VERTEXAI_PROJECT</code></td>
<td>For Google Cloud VertexAI (Gemini)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>VERTEXAI_LOCATION</code></td>
<td>For Google Cloud VertexAI (Gemini)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GROQ_API_KEY</code></td>
<td>For Groq models</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID</code></td>
<td>For AWS Bedrock (Claude)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY</code></td>
<td>For AWS Bedrock (Claude)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>AWS_REGION</code></td>
<td>For AWS Bedrock (Claude)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT</code></td>
<td>For Azure OpenAI models</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY</code></td>
<td>For Azure OpenAI models (optional when using Entra ID)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION</code></td>
<td>For Azure OpenAI models</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>LOCAL_ENDPOINT</code></td>
<td>For self-hosted models</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SHELL</code></td>
<td>Default shell to use (if not specified in config)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Shell Configuration</h3>
<p>OpenCode allows you to configure the shell used by the bash tool. By default, it uses the shell specified in the <code>SHELL</code> environment variable, or falls back to <code>/bin/bash</code> if not set.</p>
<p>You can override this in your configuration file:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">{
  "shell": {
    "path": "/bin/zsh",
    "args": ["-l"]
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>This is useful if you want to use a different shell than your default system shell, or if you need to pass specific arguments to the shell.</p>
<h3>Configuration File Structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-json">{
  "data": {
    "directory": ".opencode"
  },
  "providers": {
    "openai": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    },
    "anthropic": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    },
    "copilot": {
      "disabled": false
    },
    "groq": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    },
    "openrouter": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    }
  },
  "agents": {
    "coder": {
      "model": "claude-3.7-sonnet",
      "maxTokens": 5000
    },
    "task": {
      "model": "claude-3.7-sonnet",
      "maxTokens": 5000

      "maxTokens": 80

  "debugLSP": false,
  "autoCompact": true
}
</code></pre>

36:T141b,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Overview §1</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>OpenCode는 Bun workspaces 기반 모노레포로 구성된다.</li>
<li>| 패키지 | 역할 | 기술 |</li>
<li>| <code>packages/140_opencode/</code> | 핵심 에이전트 엔진 (45+ 모듈) | Bun, Effect-TS, Hono, Vercel AI SDK |</li>
<li>| <code>packages/app/</code> | 웹/데스크톱 프론트엔드 | SolidJS, Vite, TailwindCSS |</li>
<li>| <code>packages/console/</code> | 클라우드 대시보드 (SaaS) | SolidStart, Nitro, Cloudflare Workers |</li>
<li>| <code>packages/desktop/</code> | Tauri 데스크톱 셸 | Tauri, Rust |</li>
<li>| <code>packages/plugin/</code> | 플러그인 타입 정의 | TypeScript |</li>
<li>| <code>packages/sdk/</code> | 외부 연동 SDK | Generated from OpenAPI |</li>
<li>| <code>packages/ui/</code> | 공유 UI 컴포넌트 | SolidJS |</li>
<li>| <code>packages/util/</code> | 공유 유틸리티 | TypeScript |</li>
<li>핵심 엔진 <code>packages/140_opencode/src/</code>의 주요 모듈:</li>
<li>| 모듈 | 파일 | 역할 |</li>
</ul>
<h2>Topics covered</h2>

<li>
<ol>
<li>패키지 구조 개요</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol>
<li>패키지 구조 개요</li>

<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3><code>140_opencode/README.md</code></h3>
<h2>Installation</h2>
<h3>Using the Install Script</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash">

## Main analysis

## 1. Package structure overview

## 1. Package structure overview

OpenCode consists of a monorepo based on Bun workspaces.

| package | Role | Technology |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `packages/140_opencode/` | Core Agent Engine (45+ modules) | Bun, Effect-TS, Hono, Vercel AI SDK |
| `packages/app/` | Web/Desktop Frontend | SolidJS, Vite, TailwindCSS |
| `packages/console/` | Cloud Dashboard (SaaS) | SolidStart, Nitro, Cloudflare Workers |
| `packages/desktop/` | Tauri desktop shell | Tauri, Rust |
| `packages/plugin/` | Plugin type definition | TypeScript |
| `packages/sdk/` | External integration SDK | Generated from OpenAPI |
| `packages/ui/` | Shared UI Components | SolidJS |
| `packages/util/` | Shared Utility | TypeScript |

Main modules in the core engine `packages/140_opencode/src/`:

| module | file | Role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `agent/` | `agent.ts`, prompts | Agent definition, 4 types of built-in agents |
| `tool/` | 26 files | Tool definitions, registry, 24 built-in tools |
| `session/` | 17 files | Session Management, Processor Loops, Prompt Assembly |
| `provider/` | 7 files + SDK | LLM Provider Abstraction, 21 Providers |
| `server/` | 14 routes | Hono HTTP/WebSocket Server |
| `bus/` | 3 files | Zod type event bus |
| `config/` | 6 files | 6 level setup hierarchy |
| `permission/` | 4 files | Pattern matching permission system |
| `skill/` | 2 files | SKILL.md navigation/loading |
| `mcp/` | 4 files | MCP Client + OAuth |
| `plugin/` | 3 files | Plugin Loader + Built-in Authentication |
| `snapshot/` | 1 file | git-based snapshot/revert |
| `worktree/` | 1 file | git worktree isolation |
| `lsp/` | 5 files | Language Server Protocol Integration |

---

## Korean corpus (reference)

> Verbatim KO corpus `000_overview/00_oc_overview.md` for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

## 1. 패키지 구조 개요

## 1. 패키지 구조 개요

OpenCode는 Bun workspaces 기반 모노레포로 구성된다.

| 패키지 | 역할 | 기술 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `packages/140_opencode/` | 핵심 에이전트 엔진 (45+ 모듈) | Bun, Effect-TS, Hono, Vercel AI SDK |
| `packages/app/` | 웹/데스크톱 프론트엔드 | SolidJS, Vite, TailwindCSS |
| `packages/console/` | 클라우드 대시보드 (SaaS) | SolidStart, Nitro, Cloudflare Workers |
| `packages/desktop/` | Tauri 데스크톱 셸 | Tauri, Rust |
| `packages/plugin/` | 플러그인 타입 정의 | TypeScript |
| `packages/sdk/` | 외부 연동 SDK | Generated from OpenAPI |
| `packages/ui/` | 공유 UI 컴포넌트 | SolidJS |
| `packages/util/` | 공유 유틸리티 | TypeScript |

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>2. Effect-TS based service architecture</h2>
<h2>2. Effect-TS based service architecture</h2>
<p>The biggest structural feature of OpenCode is that all core modules are built with the <code>Service → Layer → Effect</code> pattern of Effect-TS. This pattern handles dependency injection, error handling, and concurrency control in a type-safe manner.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)
</code></pre>
<p><code>InstanceState</code> is a key mechanism for isolating state per project instance. When managing multiple projects simultaneously on the same server, the settings, sessions, and tools for each project are initialized independently.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/effect/instance-state.ts
// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make&#x3C;State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)
</code></pre>

<h2>2. Effect-TS 기반 서비스 아키텍처</h2>
<h2>2. Effect-TS 기반 서비스 아키텍처</h2>
<p>OpenCode의 가장 큰 구조적 특징은 모든 핵심 모듈이 Effect-TS의 <code>Service → Layer → Effect</code> 패턴으로 구축된다는 점이다. 이 패턴은 의존성 주입, 에러 핸들링, 동시성 제어를 타입 안전하게 처리한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)
</code></pre>
<p><code>InstanceState</code>는 프로젝트 인스턴스별로 상태를 격리하는 핵심 메커니즘이다. 같은 서버에서 여러 프로젝트를 동시에 관리할 때, 각 프로젝트의 설정·세션·도구가 독립적으로 초기화된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/effect/instance-state.ts
// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make&#x3C;State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)
</code></pre>

for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(cfg.agent ?? {})) {
  if (value.disable) { delete agents[key]; continue }
  let item = agents[key] ?? {
    name: key, mode: "all",
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, user),
    options: {}, native: false,
  }
  item.model = Provider.parseModel(value.model)
  item.prompt = value.prompt ?? item.prompt
}

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>3. Agent system</h2>
<h2>3. Agent system</h2>
<h3>3.1 Agent definition</h3>
<p>An agent is defined by the Zod schema and includes name, mode, permissions, model, and prompt.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export const Info = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]),
  native: z.boolean().optional(),
  hidden: z.boolean().optional(),
  permission: Permission.Ruleset,
  model: z.object({
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
    providerID: ProviderID.zod,
  }).optional(),
  prompt: z.string().optional(),
  steps: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
})
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 4 types of built-in agents</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>agent</th>
<th>mode</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>build</code></td>
<td>primary</td>
<td>Default execution agent. All tools available</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>plan</code></td>
<td>primary</td>
<td>Read-only planning agent. Block editing tools</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>general</code></td>
<td>subagent</td>
<td>Versatile parallel operations. Excluding only the todo tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>explore</code></td>
<td>subagent</td>
<td>Specialized in code navigation. Only grep/glob/read/bash allowed</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>The permission settings for the <code>plan</code> agent are interesting. <code>deny</code> all editing, with the exception of <code>.opencode/plans/*.md</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
{
  name: "plan",
  mode: "primary",
  permission: Permission.merge(defaults, Permission.fromConfig({
    question: "allow",
    plan_exit: "allow",
    edit: { "*": "deny", ".opencode/plans/*.md": "allow" },
  }), user),
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 Custom Agent</h3>
<p>You can add agents or override existing agents in the configuration file:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts — 사용자 설정 병합
for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(cfg.agent ?? {})) {
  if (value.disable) { delete agents[key]; continue }
  let item = agents[key] ?? {
    name: key, mode: "all",
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, user),
    options: {}, native: false,
  }
  item.model = Provider.parseModel(value.model)
  item.prompt = value.prompt ?? item.prompt
}
</code></pre>

39:T177c,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Overview §4</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>SessionProcessor</code>가 에이전트 실행 루프의 핵심이다. <code>while(true)</code> 루프 안에서 LLM 스트림을 받아 도구 호출을 처리하고, 도구 결과를 다시 LLM에 넘기는 사이클을 반복한다.</li>
<li>// packages/140_opencode/src/session/processor.ts</li>
<li>export function create(input: {</li>
<li>assistantMessage: MessageV2.Assistant</li>
<li>sessionID: SessionID</li>
<li>model: Provider.Model</li>
<li>abort: AbortSignal</li>
<li>}) {</li>
<li>const toolcalls: Record&#x3C;string, MessageV2.ToolPart> = {}</li>
<li>let attempt = 0</li>
<li>return {</li>
<li>async process(streamInput: LLM.StreamInput) {</li>
</ul>
<h2>Topics covered</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<ol start="4">
<li>세션 프로세서와 Agent Loop</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="4">
<li>세션 프로세서와 Agent Loop</li>
</ol>
</li>
</ul>
<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/session/processor.ts
export function create(input: {
  assistantMessage: MessageV2.Assistant
  sessionID: SessionID
  model: Provider.Model
  abort: AbortSignal
}) {
  const toolcalls: Record&#x3C;string, MessageV2.ToolPart> = {}
  let attempt = 0

  return {
    async process(streamInput: LLM.StreamInput) {
      while (true) {  // ← 에이전트 루프
        const stream = await LLM.stream(streamInput)
        for await (const value of stream.fullStream) {
          input.abort.throwIfAborted()
          switch (value.type) {
            case "tool-call":
              // doom loop 감지 (동일 호출 3회 반복 시 차단)
              // 권한 확인 → 도구 실행 → 결과 수집
              break
            case "text-delta":
              // 스트리밍 텍스트 업데이트
              break
            case "reasoning-start":
              // 추론 과정 추적
              break
          }
        }
        // 도구 호출이 있으면 루프 계속, 없으면 종료
        if (noToolCalls) break
      }
    },
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>4. Session processor and agent loop</h2>
<h2>4. Session processor and agent loop</h2>
<p><code>SessionProcessor</code> is the core of the agent execution loop. Inside the <code>while(true)</code> loop, the cycle of receiving the LLM stream, processing the tool call, and passing the tool results back to the LLM is repeated.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/session/processor.ts
export function create(input: {
  assistantMessage: MessageV2.Assistant
  sessionID: SessionID
  model: Provider.Model
  abort: AbortSignal
}) {
  const toolcalls: Record&#x3C;string, MessageV2.ToolPart> = {}
  let attempt = 0

  return {
    async process(streamInput: LLM.StreamInput) {
      while (true) {  // ← 에이전트 루프
        const stream = await LLM.stream(streamInput)
        for await (const value of stream.fullStream) {
          input.abort.throwIfAborted()
          switch (value.type) {
            case "tool-call":
              // doom loop 감지 (동일 호출 3회 반복 시 차단)
              // 권한 확인 → 도구 실행 → 결과 수집
              break
            case "text-delta":
              // 스트리밍 텍스트 업데이트
              break
            case "reasoning-start":
              // 추론 과정 추적
              break
          }
        }
        // 도구 호출이 있으면 루프 계속, 없으면 종료
        if (noToolCalls) break
      }
    },
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Doom loop defense</strong>: Automatically blocks when the same tool call is repeated 3 times (<code>DOOM_LOOP_THRESHOLD = 3</code>).</p>
<p><strong>Context Compression</strong>: <code>SessionCompaction</code> automatically summarizes conversations when token limits are exceeded.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>000_overview/00_oc_overview.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>4. 세션 프로세서와 에이전트 루프</h2>
<h2>4. 세션 프로세서와 에이전트 루프</h2>
<p><code>SessionProcessor</code>가 에이전트 실행 루프의 핵심이다. <code>while(true)</code> 루프 안에서 LLM 스트림을 받아 도구 호출을 처리하고, 도구 결과를 다시 LLM에 넘기는 사이클을 반복한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/session/processor.ts
export function create(input: {
  assistantMessage: MessageV2.Assistant
  sessionID: SessionID
  model: Provider.Model
  abort: AbortSignal
}) {
  const toolcalls: Record&#x3C;string, MessageV2.ToolPart> = {}
  let attempt = 0

  return {
    async process(streamInput: LLM.StreamInput) {
      while (true) {  // ← 에이전트 루프
        const stream = await LLM.stream(streamInput)
        for await (const value of stream.fullStream) {
          input.abort.throwIfAborted()
          switch (value.type) {
            case "tool-call":
              // doom loop 감지 (동일 호출 3회 반복 시 차단)
              // 권한 확인 → 도구 실행 → 결과 수집
              break
            case "text-delta":
              // 스트리밍 텍스트 업데이트
              break
            case "reasoning-start":
              // 추론 과정 추적
              break
          }
        }
        // 도구 호출이 있으면 루프 계속, 없으면 종료
        if (noToolCalls) break
      }
    },
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Doom loop 방어</strong>: 동일한 도구 호출이 3회 반복되면 자동 차단한다 (<code>DOOM_LOOP_THRESHOLD = 3</code>).</p>
<p><strong>컨텍스트 압축</strong>: 토큰 한도 초과 시 <code>SessionCompaction</code>이 자동으로 대화를 요약한다.</p>
<hr>

export namespace SystemPrompt {
  export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
    if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
    return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
  }

  export async function environment(model: Provider.Model) {

      `&#x3C;env>`,
      `  Working directory: ${Instance.directory}`,
      `  Platform: ${process.platform}`,
      `  Today's date: ${new Date().toDateString()}`,
      `&#x3C;/env>`].join("\n")
  }
}

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>5. Prompt assembly structure</h2>
<h2>5. Prompt assembly structure</h2>
<p>System prompts are branched by model, and environmental information and skill lists are added.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/session/system.ts
export namespace SystemPrompt {
  export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
    if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
    return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
  }

  export async function environment(model: Provider.Model) {
    return [`You are powered by ${model.api.id}`,
      `&#x3C;env>`,
      `  Working directory: ${Instance.directory}`,
      `  Platform: ${process.platform}`,
      `  Today's date: ${new Date().toDateString()}`,
      `&#x3C;/env>`].join("\n")
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Prompt assembly sequence:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Default system prompts by model</strong> (<code>prompt/anthropic.txt</code>, <code>prompt/codex.txt</code>, etc.)</li>
<li><strong>Environment information</strong> (working directory, platform, date)</li>
<li><strong>Skill list</strong> (filtered by agent permissions)</li>
<li><strong>User instructions</strong> (configuration file + <code>.opencode/</code> directory)</li>
<li><strong>Plugin Transformation</strong> (<code>experimental.chat.system.transform</code> hook)</li>
</ol>

<p>시스템 프롬프트는 모델별로 분기되며, 환경 정보와 스킬 목록이 추가된다.</p>

export namespace SystemPrompt {
  export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
    if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
    return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]

  export async function environment(model: Provider.Model) {
    return [`You are powered by ${model.api.id}`,
      `&#x3C;env>`,
      `  Working directory: ${Instance.directory}`,

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>6. Tool runtime</h2>
<h2>6. Tool runtime</h2>
<h3>6.1 Tool definition pattern</h3>
<p>All tools are defined with the <code>Tool.define()</code> helper. The <code>init</code> function receives the agent context and returns a parameter schema and execution function.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
export interface Info&#x3C;Parameters extends z.ZodType, M extends Metadata> {
  id: string
  init: (ctx?: InitContext) => Promise&#x3C;{
    description: string
    parameters: Parameters
    execute(args: z.infer&#x3C;Parameters>, ctx: Context): Promise&#x3C;{
      title: string
      metadata: M
      output: string
      attachments?: Omit&#x3C;MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]
    }>
  }>
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.2 Tool Registry</h3>
<p><code>ToolRegistry</code> integrates and manages built-in tools and plug-in tools. The toolset changes dynamically depending on the model (<code>apply_patch</code> for GPT-5+, <code>edit</code>/<code>write</code> for the others).</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts
async function all(custom: Tool.Info[]): Promise&#x3C;Tool.Info[]> {
  return [
    BashTool, ReadTool, GlobTool, GrepTool, EditTool, WriteTool,
    TaskTool, WebFetchTool, TodoWriteTool, WebSearchTool, CodeSearchTool,
    SkillTool, ApplyPatchTool,
    ...(Flag.OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_LSP_TOOL ? [LspTool] : []),
    ...custom,  // 플러그인 도구
  ]
}
</code></pre>

<h3>6.4 Tool execution context</h3>
<p>When running a tool, permission checks (<code>ask</code>), metadata reporting (<code>metadata</code>), and abort signals (<code>abort</code>) are injected into the context:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts — Tool.Context
export type Context = {
  sessionID: SessionID
  messageID: MessageID
  agent: string
  abort: AbortSignal
  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]
  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: any }): void
  ask(input: Omit&#x3C;Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Promise&#x3C;void>
}
</code></pre>

<h2>6. 도구 런타임</h2>
<h3>6.1 도구 정의 패턴</h3>
<p>모든 도구는 <code>Tool.define()</code> 헬퍼로 정의된다. <code>init</code> 함수가 에이전트 컨텍스트를 받아 파라미터 스키마와 실행 함수를 반환한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
export interface Info&#x3C;Parameters extends z.ZodType, M extends Metadata> {
  id: string
  init: (ctx?: InitContext) => Promise&#x3C;{
    description: string
    parameters: Parameters
    execute(args: z.infer&#x3C;Parameters>, ctx: Context): Promise&#x3C;{
      title: string
      metadata: M
      output: string
      attachments?: Omit&#x3C;MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]
    }>
  }>
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.2 도구 레지스트리</h3>
<p><code>ToolRegistry</code>는 빌트인 도구와 플러그인 도구를 통합 관리한다. 모델에 따라 도구 집합이 동적으로 변경된다 (GPT-5+는 <code>apply_patch</code>, 나머지는 <code>edit</code>/<code>write</code>).</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts
async function all(custom: Tool.Info[]): Promise&#x3C;Tool.Info[]> {
  return [
    BashTool, ReadTool, GlobTool, GrepTool, EditTool, WriteTool,
    TaskTool, WebFetchTool, TodoWriteTool, WebSearchTool, CodeSearchTool,
    SkillTool, ApplyPatchTool,
    ...(Flag.OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_LSP_TOOL ? [LspTool] : []),
    ...custom,  // 플러그인 도구
  ]
}
</code></pre>

const BUNDLED_PROVIDERS: Record&#x3C;string, (options: any) => SDK> = {

<h2>7. Provider system</h2>
<h3>7.1 Vercel AI SDK-based abstraction</h3>

<h3>7.2 Model metadata</h3>
<p>Each model explicitly declares its capabilities, costs, and limitations:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts — Model 스키마

<h3>7.3 Authentication resolution order</h3>
<ol>
<li>Environment variables (<code>OPENAI_API_KEY</code>, etc.)</li>
<li>Auth Store (OAuth token)</li>
<li>Plugin authentication loader (Codex OAuth, Copilot OAuth)</li>
<li>Configuration file</li>
<li><code>.well-known/opencode</code> remote configuration</li>
</ol>

<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts
export namespace BusEvent {
  export function define&#x3C;Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
    type: Type, properties: Properties
  ) {
    registry.set(type, { type, properties })
    return { type, properties }
  }

  // discriminated union으로 모든 이벤트의 타입 안전한 union 생성
  export function payloads() {
    return z.discriminatedUnion("type",
      registry.entries().map(([type, def]) =>
        z.object({ type: z.literal(type), properties: def.properties })
      ).toArray()
    )
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/index.ts
export async function publish(def, properties) {
  const payload = { type: def.type, properties }
  // 1. 인스턴스 로컬 구독자에게 전달
  for (const sub of state().subscriptions.get(def.type) ?? []) {
    sub(payload)
  }
  // 2. 글로벌 버스로 전파 → SSE로 프론트엔드에 전달
  GlobalBus.emit("event", { directory: Instance.directory, payload })
}
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>8. Event Bus System</h2>
<h2>8. Event Bus System</h2>
<h3>8.1 Zod type event definition</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts
export namespace BusEvent {
  export function define&#x3C;Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
    type: Type, properties: Properties
  ) {
    registry.set(type, { type, properties })
    return { type, properties }
  }

  // discriminated union으로 모든 이벤트의 타입 안전한 union 생성
  export function payloads() {
    return z.discriminatedUnion("type",
      registry.entries().map(([type, def]) =>
        z.object({ type: z.literal(type), properties: def.properties })
      ).toArray()
    )
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>8.2 Instance local + global propagation</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/index.ts
export async function publish(def, properties) {
  const payload = { type: def.type, properties }
  // 1. 인스턴스 로컬 구독자에게 전달
  for (const sub of state().subscriptions.get(def.type) ?? []) {
    sub(payload)
  }
  // 2. 글로벌 버스로 전파 → SSE로 프론트엔드에 전달
  GlobalBus.emit("event", { directory: Instance.directory, payload })
}
</code></pre>
<p>Event types: <code>session.updated</code>, <code>message.updated</code>, <code>permission.asked</code>, <code>permission.replied</code>, <code>mcp.tools.changed</code>, <code>worktree.ready</code>, <code>server.instance.disposed</code>, etc.</p>

<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts
export namespace BusEvent {
  export function define&#x3C;Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
    type: Type, properties: Properties
  ) {
    registry.set(type, { type, properties })
    return { type, properties }
  }

  // discriminated union으로 모든 이벤트의 타입 안전한 union 생성
  export function payloads() {
    return z.discriminatedUnion("type",
      registry.entries().map(([type, def]) =>
        z.object({ type: z.literal(type), properties: def.properties })
      ).toArray()

export async function publish(def, properties) {
  const payload = { type: def.type, properties }
  // 1. 인스턴스 로컬 구독자에게 전달
  for (const sub of state().subscriptions.get(def.type) ?? []) {
    sub(payload)
  }
  // 2. 글로벌 버스로 전파 → SSE로 프론트엔드에 전달

    c.req.header("x-opencode-directory") || process.cwd()

    directory: Filesystem.resolve(directory),

<li>10.1 6단계 Configuration 계층 (낮은 → 높은 우선순위)</li>
<li>10.2 주요 Configuration 항목</li>

<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — 병합 로직
function mergeConfigConcatArrays(target, source) {
  const merged = mergeDeep(target, source)
  // plugin과 instructions 배열은 교체가 아니라 연결
  if (target.plugin &#x26;&#x26; source.plugin)
    merged.plugin = Array.from(new Set([...target.plugin, ...source.plugin]))
  return merged
}
</code></pre>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>10. Setting system</h2>
<h2>10. Setting system</h2>
<h3>10.1 6-level configuration hierarchy (low → high priority)</h3>
<ol>
<li><strong>Remote <code>.well-known/opencode</code></strong> — Organization default</li>
<li><strong>Global Settings</strong> — <code>~/.config/140_opencode/opencode.json</code></li>
<li><strong>Custom Settings</strong> — <code>OPENCODE_CONFIG</code> environment variable path</li>
<li><strong>Project Settings</strong> — <code>opencode.json</code> (project root)</li>
<li><strong><code>.opencode/</code> directory</strong> — agents, commands, plugins, skills</li>
<li><strong>Inline Settings</strong> — <code>OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT</code> environment variable</li>
<li><strong>Managed Settings</strong> — Enterprise only (<code>/etc/opencode</code>, <code>/Library/Application Support/opencode</code>)</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — 병합 로직
function mergeConfigConcatArrays(target, source) {
  const merged = mergeDeep(target, source)
  // plugin과 instructions 배열은 교체가 아니라 연결
  if (target.plugin &#x26;&#x26; source.plugin)
    merged.plugin = Array.from(new Set([...target.plugin, ...source.plugin]))
  return merged
}
</code></pre>

<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — 병합 로직
function mergeConfigConcatArrays(target, source) {
  const merged = mergeDeep(target, source)
  // plugin과 instructions 배열은 교체가 아니라 연결
  if (target.plugin &#x26;&#x26; source.plugin)
    merged.plugin = Array.from(new Set([...target.plugin, ...source.plugin]))
  return merged
}
</code></pre>

export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {

    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
      &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>11. Permission system</h2>
<h2>11. Permission system</h2>
<h3>11.1 Wildcard pattern matching</h3>
<p>Permission evaluation matches tool names and file patterns with wildcards:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
      &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>11.2 Permission request/response flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/permission/index.ts
export const Request = z.object({
  id: PermissionID.zod,
  sessionID: SessionID.zod,
  permission: z.string(),       // "bash", "edit", "external_directory"
  patterns: z.string().array(), // ["rm *", "*.ts"]
  always: z.string().array(),   // "always" 규칙으로 승격 가능한 패턴
  tool: z.object({ messageID: MessageID.zod, callID: z.string() }).optional(),
})

export const Reply = z.enum(["once", "always", "reject"])
</code></pre>
<p>When <code>ctx.ask()</code> is called when running a tool, a <code>permission.asked</code> event is propagated to the frontend through the bus, and the user responds with <code>once</code>/<code>always</code>/<code>reject</code>.</p>
<h3>11.3 Bash Command Arity</h3>
<p><code>arity.ts</code> provides a command dictionary to determine the risk of bash commands. For each command, it is used to determine “whether this command modifies a file.”</p>

<h2>11. 권한 시스템</h2>
<h2>11. 권한 시스템</h2>
<h3>11.1 Wildcard 패턴 매칭</h3>
<p>권한 평가는 도구 이름과 파일 패턴을 wildcard로 매칭한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
      &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>11.2 권한 요청/응답 플로우</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/permission/index.ts
export const Request = z.object({
  id: PermissionID.zod,
  sessionID: SessionID.zod,
  permission: z.string(),       // "bash", "edit", "external_directory"
  patterns: z.string().array(), // ["rm *", "*.ts"]
  always: z.string().array(),   // "always" 규칙으로 승격 가능한 패턴
  tool: z.object({ messageID: MessageID.zod, callID: z.string() }).optional(),
})

export const Reply = z.enum(["once", "always", "reject"])
</code></pre>
<p>도구 실행 시 <code>ctx.ask()</code>가 호출되면, <code>permission.asked</code> 이벤트가 버스를 통해 프론트엔드로 전파되고, 사용자가 <code>once</code>/<code>always</code>/<code>reject</code>로 응답한다.</p>
<h3>11.3 Bash 명령 Arity</h3>
<p><code>arity.ts</code>는 bash 명령의 위험도를 판단하기 위한 명령어 사전을 제공한다. 각 명령에 대해 "이 명령이 파일을 수정하는가"를 판단하는 데 사용된다.</p>

<h3>12.1 Navigating SKILL.md</h3>

<h3>12.2 Skill Infusion</h3>
<p>The system prompt includes a list of available skills in XML format:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/skill/index.ts
export function fmt(list: Info[], opts: { verbose: boolean }) {
  return [
    "&#x3C;available_skills>",
    ...list.flatMap((skill) => [
      "  &#x3C;skill>",
      `    &#x3C;name>${skill.name}&#x3C;/name>`,
      `    &#x3C;description>${skill.description}&#x3C;/description>`,
      `    &#x3C;location>${pathToFileURL(skill.location).href}&#x3C;/location>`,
      "  &#x3C;/skill>",
    ]),
    "&#x3C;/available_skills>",
  ].join("\n")
}
</code></pre>
<p>When the agent calls the <code>skill</code> tool, the SKILL.md body is injected into the context.</p>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>13. Plug-in system</h2>
<h2>13. Plug-in system</h2>
<h3>13.1 Plugin interface</h3>
<p>A plugin is defined as a function, receives SDK client and project information and returns a set of Hooks:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/plugin/src/index.ts
export type Plugin = (input: PluginInput) => Promise&#x3C;Hooks>

export type PluginInput = {
  client: ReturnType&#x3C;typeof createOpencodeClient>
  project: Project
  directory: string
  serverUrl: URL
  $: BunShell
}
</code></pre>
<h3>13.2 More than 25 Hook points</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Category</th>
<th>Hook</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>life cycle</td>
<td><code>event</code>, <code>config</code></td>
<td>Receive events, modify settings</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tools</td>
<td><code>tool</code>, <code>tool.definition</code>, <code>tool.execute.before/after</code></td>
<td>Registering tools, modifying definitions, post-processing</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Certification</td>
<td><code>auth</code></td>
<td>OAuth/API key settings</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Chat</td>
<td><code>chat.message</code>, <code>chat.params</code>, <code>chat.headers</code></td>
<td>Edit message/parameter/header</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Permissions</td>
<td><code>permission.ask</code></td>
<td>Override authority decision</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>shell</td>
<td><code>shell.env</code></td>
<td>Shell environment variable injection</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>experimental</td>
<td><code>experimental.chat.system.transform</code> etc.</td>
<td>System Prompt Variants, Compressed Custom</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>13.3 Plugin loading</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts
// 1. 내장 플러그인 (Codex OAuth, Copilot OAuth)
for (const plugin of INTERNAL_PLUGINS) {
  hooks.push(await plugin(input))
}

// 2. npm 패키지 플러그인 — Bun으로 설치 후 import
const pkg = plugin.substring(0, idx)
const version = plugin.substring(idx + 1)
plugin = await BunProc.install(pkg, version)
const mod = await import(plugin)
</code></pre>
<h3>13.4 Hook trigger pattern</h3>
<p>All hooks have the form <code>(input, output) => Promise&#x3C;void></code> and modify the output object directly:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 프롬프트 조립 시 플러그인이 시스템 프롬프트를 변형
await Plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.system.transform",
  { sessionID, model },
  { system: systemPromptParts }  // ← 플러그인이 이 배열을 직접 수정
)
</code></pre>

<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/plugin/src/index.ts
export type Plugin = (input: PluginInput) => Promise&#x3C;Hooks>

export type PluginInput = {
  client: ReturnType&#x3C;typeof createOpencodeClient>
  project: Project
  directory: string
  serverUrl: URL
  $: BunShell
}
</code></pre>

)
</code></pre>

<p><strong>Overview §14</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>세 가지 전송을 지원한다: stdio, SSE, Streamable HTTP.</li>
<li>// packages/140_opencode/src/mcp/index.ts</li>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>14. MCP Integration</h2>
<h2>14. MCP Integration</h2>
<h3>14.1 Transport Layer</h3>
<p>Three transports are supported: stdio, SSE, and Streamable HTTP.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/mcp/index.ts
import { StdioClientTransport } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/client/stdio.js"
import { SSEClientTransport } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/client/sse.js"
import { StreamableHTTPClientTransport } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/client/streamableHttp.js"
</code></pre>
<h3>14.2 MCP Certification</h3>
<p>OAuth authentication flow is built-in, and <code>McpOAuthProvider</code> and <code>McpOAuthCallback</code> handle authentication callbacks.</p>
<h3>14.3 Tool Bridge</h3>
<p>The MCP tool is converted to <code>dynamicTool</code> of Vercel AI SDK and registered in <code>ToolRegistry</code>. By subscribing to <code>ToolsChangedNotification</code>, the tools list is updated in real time.</p>

<h2>14. MCP 통합</h2>
<h2>14. MCP 통합</h2>
<h3>14.1 전송 계층</h3>
<p>세 가지 전송을 지원한다: stdio, SSE, Streamable HTTP.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/mcp/index.ts

import { StreamableHTTPClientTransport } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/client/streamableHttp.js"
</code></pre>
<h3>14.2 MCP 인증</h3>
<p>OAuth 인증 플로우를 내장하고 있으며, <code>McpOAuthProvider</code>와 <code>McpOAuthCallback</code>이 인증 콜백을 처리한다.</p>
<h3>14.3 도구 브릿지</h3>
<p>MCP 도구는 Vercel AI SDK의 <code>dynamicTool</code>로 변환되어 <code>ToolRegistry</code>에 등록된다. <code>ToolsChangedNotification</code>을 구독하여 도구 목록이 실시간으로 업데이트된다.</p>

<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/snapshot/index.ts

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>15. Snapshot and revert</h2>
<h2>15. Snapshot and revert</h2>
<h3>15.1 Separate Git repository</h3>
<p>The <code>Snapshot</code> system maintains a dedicated git repository in <code>~/.local/share/140_opencode/snapshot/&#x3C;project-id>/</code>, separate from the project's actual <code>.git</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/snapshot/index.ts
const state = {
  directory: ctx.directory,
  worktree: ctx.worktree,
  gitdir: path.join(Global.Path.data, "snapshot", ctx.project.id),
}
</code></pre>
<h3>15.2 How snapshots work</h3>
<ol>
<li><strong>track</strong>: Records current working directory status with <code>git write-tree</code></li>
<li><strong>patch</strong>: Returns the difference between a specific snapshot and the current state as a list of files.</li>
<li><strong>restore</strong>: <code>git checkout-index -a -f</code> to a specific snapshot</li>
<li><strong>revert</strong>: Restore files of a specific patch to the previous snapshot state.</li>
<li><strong>cleanup</strong>: <code>git gc --prune</code> snapshots older than 7 days every hour</li>
</ol>
<p>Large files larger than 2MB are automatically excluded (<code>limit = 2 * 1024 * 1024</code>).</p>
<hr>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>000_overview/00_oc_overview.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>15. 스냅샷과 되돌리기</h2>
<h2>15. 스냅샷과 되돌리기</h2>
<h3>15.1 별도 Git 저장소</h3>
<p><code>Snapshot</code> 시스템은 프로젝트의 실제 <code>.git</code>과 별도로 <code>~/.local/share/140_opencode/snapshot/&#x3C;project-id>/</code>에 전용 git 저장소를 유지한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/snapshot/index.ts
const state = {
  directory: ctx.directory,
  worktree: ctx.worktree,
  gitdir: path.join(Global.Path.data, "snapshot", ctx.project.id),
}
</code></pre>
<h3>15.2 스냅샷 작동 방식</h3>
<ol>
<li><strong>track</strong>: 현재 작업 디렉토리 상태를 <code>git write-tree</code>로 기록</li>
<li><strong>patch</strong>: 특정 스냅샷과 현재 상태의 차이를 파일 목록으로 반환</li>
<li><strong>restore</strong>: 특정 스냅샷으로 <code>git checkout-index -a -f</code></li>
<li><strong>revert</strong>: 특정 패치의 파일들을 이전 스냅샷 상태로 복원</li>
<li><strong>cleanup</strong>: 1시간마다 7일 이상 된 스냅샷을 <code>git gc --prune</code></li>
</ol>
<p>2MB 이상의 대용량 파일은 자동으로 제외된다 (<code>limit = 2 * 1024 * 1024</code>).</p>
<hr>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>16. Worktree Isolation</h2>
<h2>16. Worktree Isolation</h2>
<p>The <code>Worktree</code> system uses git worktree to create an independent work environment. You can work on a separate branch for each session, and the status is notified through <code>worktree.ready</code>/<code>worktree.failed</code> events.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/worktree/index.ts

  name: z.string(),
  branch: z.string(),
  directory: z.string(),
})
</code></pre>

<h2>16. Worktree 격리</h2>
<h2>16. Worktree 격리</h2>
<p><code>Worktree</code> 시스템은 git worktree를 이용하여 독립된 작업 환경을 생성한다. 세션별로 별도의 브랜치에서 작업할 수 있으며, <code>worktree.ready</code>/<code>worktree.failed</code> 이벤트로 상태를 알린다.</p>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>17. Front-end architecture</h2>
<h2>17. Front-end architecture</h2>
<h3>17.1 App (Desktop/Web Client)</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Framework</strong>: SolidJS + Vite</li>
<li><strong>State Management</strong>: Overlapping 30 or more Context Providers</li>
<li><strong>Server communication</strong>: OpenCode SDK → HTTP request</li>
<li><strong>Real-time synchronization</strong>: SSE event stream (16ms batch coalescing, 15s heartbeat)</li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sdk.tsx — 이벤트 코얼레싱
const flush = () => {
  batch(() => {
    for (const event of events) {
      emitter.emit(event.directory, event.payload)
    }
  })
}
schedule()  // 16ms 배치 윈도우
</code></pre>
<h3>17.2 Console (SaaS dashboard)</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Framework</strong>: SolidStart (SSR + Server Actions)</li>
<li><strong>Deployment</strong>: Cloudflare Workers (Nitro)</li>
<li><strong>Authentication</strong>: OpenAuth</li>
<li><strong>DB</strong>: Direct access to Drizzle ORM</li>
</ul>
<h3>17.3 Desktop</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Framework</strong>: Tauri (Rust shell)</li>
<li>Render app package in Tauri webview</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>000_overview/00_oc_overview.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>17. 프론트엔드 아키텍처</h2>
<h2>17. 프론트엔드 아키텍처</h2>
<h3>17.1 App (데스크톱/웹 클라이언트)</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>프레임워크</strong>: SolidJS + Vite</li>
<li><strong>상태 관리</strong>: 30개 이상의 Context Provider 중첩</li>
<li><strong>서버 통신</strong>: OpenCode SDK → HTTP 요청</li>
<li><strong>실시간 동기화</strong>: SSE 이벤트 스트림 (16ms 배치 코얼레싱, 15초 하트비트)</li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sdk.tsx — 이벤트 코얼레싱
const flush = () => {
  batch(() => {
    for (const event of events) {
      emitter.emit(event.directory, event.payload)
    }
  })
}
schedule()  // 16ms 배치 윈도우
</code></pre>
<h3>17.2 Console (SaaS 대시보드)</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>프레임워크</strong>: SolidStart (SSR + Server Actions)</li>
<li><strong>배포</strong>: Cloudflare Workers (Nitro)</li>
<li><strong>인증</strong>: OpenAuth</li>
<li><strong>DB</strong>: Drizzle ORM 직접 접근</li>
</ul>
<h3>17.3 Desktop</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>프레임워크</strong>: Tauri (Rust 셸)</li>
<li>App 패키지를 Tauri webview에서 렌더링</li>
</ul>

47:Tb47,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Overview §18</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>프로젝트 언어에 맞는 Language Server를 자동 감지·실행하여 diagnostics, hover, goto-definition 등을 도구로 제공한다.</li>
<li><code>OPENCODE_*</code> 환경변수를 통한 기능 플래그 시스템. 실험적 기능을 점진적으로 활성화한다.</li>
<li>Access Control Protocol. 엔터프라이즈 환경에서 조직 수준의 접근 제어를 구현한다.</li>
<li>VS Code 등 IDE와의 연동 지점을 제공한다.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Installation</h2>
<h3>Using the Install Script</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash">

## Main analysis

## 18. Other notable subsystems

## 18. Other notable subsystems

### 18.1 LSP integration (`lsp/`)

It automatically detects and executes the Language Server appropriate for the project language and provides diagnostics, hover, goto-definition, etc. as tools.

### 18.2 Feature Flags (`flag/`)

Feature flag system through `OPENCODE_*` environment variables. Activate experimental features gradually.

### 18.3 ACP (`acp/`)

Access Control Protocol. Implement organization-level access control in an enterprise environment.

### 18.4 PTY (`pty/`)

Pseudo terminal management. A real-time terminal session is operated on the front end through WebSocket.

### 18.5 IDE integration (`ide/`)

Provides an integration point with IDEs such as VS Code.

---

## Korean corpus (reference)

> Verbatim KO corpus `000_overview/00_oc_overview.md` for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

## 18. 기타 주목할 서브시스템

## 18. 기타 주목할 서브시스템

### 18.1 LSP 통합 (`lsp/`)

프로젝트 언어에 맞는 Language Server를 자동 감지·실행하여 diagnostics, hover, goto-definition 등을 도구로 제공한다.

### 18.2 Feature Flags (`flag/`)

`OPENCODE_*` 환경변수를 통한 기능 플래그 시스템. 실험적 기능을 점진적으로 활성화한다.

### 18.3 ACP (`acp/`)

Access Control Protocol. 엔터프라이즈 환경에서 조직 수준의 접근 제어를 구현한다.

### 18.4 PTY (`pty/`)

의사 터미널 관리. WebSocket을 통해 프론트엔드에서 실시간 터미널 세션을 운영한다.

### 18.5 IDE 통합 (`ide/`)

VS Code 등 IDE와의 연동 지점을 제공한다.

---
</code></pre>
1c:["$","$L2f","07-overview-18",{"id":"07-overview-18","order":24,"tier":"developer","title":"Overview §18","description":"000_overview/00_oc_overview.md","lang":"en","badge":"DEV","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$47"}}]}]
48:T14a32,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 01: TUI design</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/141_opencode-current/</code> (readable source). Web/desktop surfaces documented from this checkout.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OpenCode의 UI 계층은 여타 터미널 코딩 에이전트와 달리 SolidJS 기반 풀 웹 애플리케이션이다. <code>packages/app</code>이 핵심 UI 라이브러리이고, <code>packages/desktop</code>이 Tauri v2 래퍼로 같은 코드를 네이티브 데스크톱 앱으로 감싼다. 별도로 <code>packages/console</code>은 SaaS 관리 콘솔(워크스페이스·결제·인증)을 담당하며, 에이전트 UI와는 분리된 표면이다.</li>
<li>핵심 구조는 네 덩어리다. <strong>Provider 타워</strong>가 전역 상태를 주입하고, <strong>라우터</strong>가 Home과 Session 페이지를 전환하며, <strong>세션 뷰</strong>는 MessageTimeline·PromptInput·TerminalPanel·ReviewTab으로 코딩 작업을 조립하고, <strong>Platform 추상화</strong>가 web/desktop 분기를 한 인터페이스 뒤에 숨긴다.</li>
<li>중요한 관찰은 SolidJS를 쓰면서도 React 생태계의 Context 중첩 패턴을 그대로 차용했다는 점이다. Provider가 15개 이상 중첩되며, 이들이 각각 <code>createStore</code>·<code>createEffect</code>를 내부에 품고 있어 사실상 mini state machine 역할을 한다. GlobalSDK → GlobalSync → Sync 체인이 SSE 이벤트 스트림을 소비해 실시간 상태를 유지하는 구조는 일반 SPA보다</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>subgraph "엔트리 분기"</li>
<li>E1["entry.tsx (web)"]</li>
<li>E2["desktop/index.tsx (Tauri)"]</li>
<li>end</li>
<li>E1 --> P["PlatformProvider"]</li>
<li>E2 --> P</li>
<li>P --> ABP["AppBaseProviders"]</li>
</ul>

  commands.awaitInitialization(new Channel&#x3C;InitStep>() as any)

const servers = () => {
  const data = sidecar()
  if (!data) return []
  const server: ServerConnection.Sidecar = {
    displayName: t("desktop.server.local"),
    type: "sidecar",
    variant: "base",
    http: { url: data.url, username: data.username, password: data.password },
  }
  return [server] as ServerConnection.Any[]

import type { FitAddon, Ghostty, Terminal as Term } from "ghostty-web"

let shared: Promise&#x3C;{ mod: typeof import("ghostty-web"); ghostty: Ghostty }> | undefined
const loadGhostty = () => {
  if (shared) return shared
  shared = import("ghostty-web")
    .then(async (mod) => ({ mod, ghostty: await mod.Ghostty.load() }))
    .catch((err) => { shared = undefined; throw err })
  return shared
}

<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (275–317행)
const unsub = globalSDK.event.listen((e) => {
  const directory = e.name
  const event = e.details
  const recent = bootingRoot || Date.now() - bootedAt &#x3C; 1500  // 부트 직후 1.5초 쿨다운

  if (directory === "global") {
    applyGlobalEvent({ event, project, refresh, setGlobalProject })
    // server.connected 또는 global.disposed 시 모든 디렉터리 큐에 push
    if (event.type === "server.connected" || event.type === "global.disposed") {
      if (recent) return  // 쿨다운 중이면 무시
      for (const directory of Object.keys(children.children))
        queue.push(directory)
    }
    return
  }

  // 디렉터리별 이벤트
  const [store, setStore] = children.children[directory]
  applyDirectoryEvent({ event, directory, store, setStore, push: queue.push,
                         setSessionTodo, vcsCache, loadLsp })
})
</code></pre>

const children = createChildStoreManager({
  owner,
  isBooting: (directory) => booting.has(directory),
  isLoadingSessions: (directory) => sessionLoads.has(directory),
  onBootstrap: (directory) => bootstrapInstance(directory),
  onDispose: (directory) => { queue.clear(directory); sdkCache.delete(directory) },
  translate: language.t,
})

<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (173–238행)
async function loadSessions(directory: string) {
  const limit = Math.max(store.limit + SESSION_RECENT_LIMIT, SESSION_RECENT_LIMIT)
  const result = await loadRootSessionsWithFallback({ directory, limit, list })
  const nonArchived = result.data.filter(s => !s.time?.archived)
    .sort((a, b) => a.id &#x3C; b.id ? -1 : 1)
  const sessions = trimSessions([...nonArchived, ...childSessions], {
    limit, permission: store.permission
  })
  cleanupDroppedSessionCaches(store, setStore, sessions, setSessionTodo)
}
</code></pre>

const updateConfig = async (config: Config) => {
  setGlobalStore("reload", "pending")     // 1. "pending" 상태 진입
  return globalSDK.client.global.config
    .update({ config })                    // 2. 서버에 설정 전송
    .then(bootstrap)                       // 3. 글로벌 재부트스트랩
    .then(() => { setGlobalStore("reload", undefined); queue.refresh() })
    .catch((error) => { setGlobalStore("reload", undefined); throw error })

<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/permission.tsx — 핵심 흐름 (추정)
// 1. 서버가 도구 실행 전 permission 이벤트를 SSE로 전송
// 2. SyncProvider가 해당 세션의 store.permission에 기록
// 3. PermissionProvider가 store.permission을 구독
// 4. SessionPermissionDock이 승인/거부 UI 표시
// 5. 사용자 응답 → SDK.permission.respond() → 서버
// 6. 서버가 도구 실행 또는 중단 후 결과를 SSE로 반환

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/components/terminal.tsx — 싱글톤 로딩
let shared: Promise&#x3C;{ mod, ghostty }> | undefined
const loadGhostty = () => {
  if (shared) return shared
  shared = import("ghostty-web")
    .then(async (mod) => ({ mod, ghostty: await mod.Ghostty.load() }))
    .catch((err) => { shared = undefined; throw err })
  return shared
}
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>OpenCode UI design analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/141_opencode-current/</code> (readable source). Web/desktop surfaces documented from this checkout.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode's UI layer, unlike other terminal coding agents, is a SolidJS-based full web application. <code>packages/app</code> is the core UI library, and <code>packages/desktop</code> is a Tauri v2 wrapper that wraps the same code into a native desktop app. Separately, <code>packages/console</code> is responsible for the SaaS management console (workspace, payment, authentication) and is a separate surface from the agent UI.</p>
<p>The core structure is four chunks. The <strong>Provider Tower</strong> injects global state, the <strong>Router</strong> switches between Home and Session pages, the <strong>Session View</strong> assembles the coding work with MessageTimeline·PromptInput·TerminalPanel·ReviewTab, and the <strong>Platform Abstraction</strong> hides the web/desktop branch behind an interface.</p>
<p>An important observation is that while using SolidJS, the Context nesting pattern of the React ecosystem was adopted. More than 15 Providers overlap, and each of them contains <code>createStore</code> and <code>createEffect</code> inside, effectively acting as a mini state machine. The structure in which the GlobalSDK → GlobalSync → Sync chain consumes the SSE event stream to maintain real-time status is closer to the event loop of a game engine than a general SPA.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph "엔트리 분기"
        E1["entry.tsx (web)"]
        E2["desktop/index.tsx (Tauri)"]
    end

    E1 --> P["PlatformProvider"]
    E2 --> P

    P --> ABP["AppBaseProviders"]
    ABP --> AI["AppInterface"]

    AI --> SP["ServerProvider"]
    SP --> CG["ConnectionGate"]
    CG --> GSDK["GlobalSDKProvider"]
    GSDK --> GSY["GlobalSyncProvider"]

    GSY --> ASP["AppShellProviders"]
    ASP --> R["Router"]

    R --> HOME["Home 페이지"]
    R --> DL["DirectoryLayout"]
    DL --> SDK["SDKProvider"]
    SDK --> SYNC["SyncProvider"]
    SYNC --> SR["Session Route"]

    SR --> SPR["SessionProviders"]
    SPR --> SV["Session 뷰"]

    SV --> MT["MessageTimeline"]
    SV --> CR["ComposerRegion"]
    SV --> TP["TerminalPanel"]
    SV --> SSP["SessionSidePanel"]
</code></pre>
<hr>

<h3>Provider Tower Disassembly</h3>
<p>OpenCode hierarchically nests more than 15 providers using SolidJS's <code>createSimpleContext</code> pattern. Each scope is divided into three stages.</p>
<table>

<p>You can see the Provider nested structure directly in the source:</p>
<pre><code class="language-tsx">// 140_opencode/packages/app/src/app.tsx — AppShellProviders
function AppShellProviders(props: ParentProps) {
  return (
    &#x3C;SettingsProvider>
      &#x3C;PermissionProvider>
        &#x3C;LayoutProvider>
          &#x3C;NotificationProvider>
            &#x3C;ModelsProvider>
              &#x3C;CommandProvider>
                &#x3C;HighlightsProvider>
                  &#x3C;Layout>{props.children}&#x3C;/Layout>
                &#x3C;/HighlightsProvider>
              &#x3C;/CommandProvider>
            &#x3C;/ModelsProvider>
          &#x3C;/NotificationProvider>
        &#x3C;/LayoutProvider>
      &#x3C;/PermissionProvider>
    &#x3C;/SettingsProvider>
  )
}

// 140_opencode/packages/app/src/app.tsx — SessionProviders
function SessionProviders(props: ParentProps) {
  return (
    &#x3C;TerminalProvider>
      &#x3C;FileProvider>
        &#x3C;PromptProvider>
          &#x3C;CommentsProvider>{props.children}&#x3C;/CommentsProvider>
        &#x3C;/PromptProvider>
      &#x3C;/FileProvider>
    &#x3C;/TerminalProvider>
  )
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Routing structure</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>path pattern</th>
<th>component</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>/</code></td>
<td><code>HomeRoute</code></td>
<td>Show project list, server status</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>/:dir</code></td>
<td><code>DirectoryLayout</code></td>
<td>project scope (base64 encoding path)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>/:dir/session/:id?</code></td>
<td><code>SessionRoute</code></td>
<td>Main coding session interface</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<pre><code class="language-tsx">// 140_opencode/packages/app/src/app.tsx — 라우트 정의
&#x3C;Route path="/" component={HomeRoute} />
&#x3C;Route path="/:dir" component={DirectoryLayout}>
  &#x3C;Route path="/" component={SessionIndexRoute} />
  &#x3C;Route path="/session/:id?" component={SessionRoute} />
&#x3C;/Route>
</code></pre>
<p><code>DirectoryLayout</code> wraps <code>SDKProvider</code> and <code>SyncProvider</code>, allowing child routes to use SDK clients bound to a specific directory.</p>
