<h3>Platform abstraction — Web vs Desktop</h3>
<p>OpenCode's cleanest seam is the <code>Platform</code> interface. If <code>entry.tsx</code> (web) and <code>desktop/index.tsx</code> (Tauri) each implement Platform and inject it into <code>PlatformProvider</code>, the rest of the app code operates without knowing the platform.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/app/src/context/platform.tsx — Platform 인터페이스 (발췌)
export type Platform = {
  platform: "web" | "desktop"
  os?: "macos" | "windows" | "linux"
  version?: string
  openLink(url: string): void
  openPath?(path: string, app?: string): Promise&#x3C;void>
  restart(): Promise&#x3C;void>
  notify(title: string, description?: string, href?: string): Promise&#x3C;void>
  openDirectoryPickerDialog?(opts?: OpenDirectoryPickerOptions): Promise&#x3C;PickerPaths>
  storage?: (name?: string) => SyncStorage | AsyncStorage
  fetch?: typeof fetch
  parseMarkdown?(markdown: string): Promise&#x3C;string>
  // ...
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Features</th>
<th>Web implementation</th>
<th>Desktop (Tauri) Implementation</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Open link</td>
<td><code>window.open(url, "_blank")</code></td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-shell open</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Select directory</td>
<td>Server side dialog</td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-dialog open</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Notification</td>
<td>Web Notification API</td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-notification</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Storage</td>
<td><code>localStorage</code></td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-store</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>HTTP fetch</td>
<td>browser fetch</td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-http tauriFetch</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Markdown parsing</td>
<td>JS (Marked)</td>
<td>Native Rust parser (Tauri command)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Updater</td>
<td>None</td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-updater</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Restart app</td>
<td><code>location.reload()</code></td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-process relaunch</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>The Desktop entry runs the opencode-cli server in Tauri sidecar, waits for the server to be ready with <code>commands.awaitInitialization()</code>, and then connects with the <code>ServerConnection.Sidecar</code> type.</p>
<pre><code class="language-tsx">// 140_opencode/packages/desktop/src/index.tsx — sidecar 연결 (발췌)
const [sidecar] = createResource(() =>
  commands.awaitInitialization(new Channel&#x3C;InitStep>() as any)
)

const servers = () => {
  const data = sidecar()
  if (!data) return []
  const server: ServerConnection.Sidecar = {
    displayName: t("desktop.server.local"),
    type: "sidecar",
    variant: "base",
    http: { url: data.url, username: data.username, password: data.password },
  }
  return [server] as ServerConnection.Any[]
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Terminal emulator</h3>
<p>The terminal uses <code>ghostty-web</code> (a WebAssembly build of the Ghostty terminal). <code>TerminalProvider</code> manages the PTY session, and the <code>Terminal</code> component is responsible for WebGL rendering.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/app/src/components/terminal.tsx — ghostty-web 로딩 (발췌)
import type { FitAddon, Ghostty, Terminal as Term } from "ghostty-web"

let shared: Promise&#x3C;{ mod: typeof import("ghostty-web"); ghostty: Ghostty }> | undefined
const loadGhostty = () => {
  if (shared) return shared
  shared = import("ghostty-web")
    .then(async (mod) => ({ mod, ghostty: await mod.Ghostty.load() }))
    .catch((err) => { shared = undefined; throw err })
  return shared
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Data flow</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>steps</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>SSE connection</td>
<td><code>GlobalSDKProvider</code> opens an SSE stream to the server and listens for events</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Event coalescing</td>
<td>Combine events of the same key (session state, part update) into 16ms frames</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Global synchronization</td>
<td><code>GlobalSyncProvider</code> reflects project, session, settings, and provider status to the global store</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Directory Synchronization</td>
<td><code>SyncProvider</code> manages messages and parts for each directory and supports optimistic update</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>UI rendering</td>
<td>SolidJS's fine-grained reactivity re-renders only changed store paths</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>user input</td>
<td><code>PromptInput</code> combines text, files, images, and agent mentions and sends them to the SDK</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grant permission</td>
<td><code>PermissionProvider</code> intercepts permission requests before tool execution and delegates them to the UI</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h3>Console — SaaS management surface</h3>
<p><code>packages/console</code> is a SolidStart-based server-rendered web app that is separate from the agent UI. Responsible for operational functions such as workspace management, payment (Stripe), authentication (OAuth), API key management, and benchmarking.</p>

<hr>
<h2>GlobalSyncProvider reverse engineering details</h2>
<p><code>GlobalSyncProvider</code> is OpenCode's most complex Provider. Project, session, settings, and event dispatch are all concentrated in <code>global-sync.tsx</code> at line 407.</p>
<h3>GlobalStore state structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx — GlobalStore (30–42행)
type GlobalStore = {
  ready: boolean
  error?: InitError
  path: Path                          // state/config/worktree/directory/home 경로
  project: Project[]                  // 프로젝트 목록
  session_todo: { [sessionID: string]: Todo[] }
  provider: ProviderListResponse      // 프로바이더 목록 (all/connected/default)
  provider_auth: ProviderAuthResponse // 프로바이더 인증 상태
  config: Config                      // 글로벌 설정
  reload: undefined | "pending" | "complete"  // 리로드 상태 머신
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Internal cache layer</h3>
<p>There are four <code>Map</code> caches in <code>createGlobalSync()</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (50–53행)
const sdkCache = new Map&#x3C;string, OpencodeClient>()   // 디렉터리→SDK 인스턴스
const booting = new Map&#x3C;string, Promise&#x3C;void>>()     // 부트스트랩 중인 디렉터리
const sessionLoads = new Map&#x3C;string, Promise&#x3C;void>>() // 세션 로딩 중인 디렉터리
const sessionMeta = new Map&#x3C;string, { limit: number }>() // 세션 로드 이력
</code></pre>
<p><code>sdkFor(directory)</code> checks the cache first, and if it does not exist, creates a new instance with <code>globalSDK.createClient({ directory, throwOnError: true })</code>.</p>
<h3>Persisting the project cache</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (55–58행)
const [projectCache, setProjectCache, projectInit] = persisted(
  Persist.global("globalSync.project", ["globalSync.project.v1"]),
  createStore({ value: [] as Project[] }),
)
</code></pre>
<p>The project list is persistently cached in localStorage/Tauri store with <code>Persist.global()</code>. When restarting the app, cached projects are displayed first before the server response, but when server data arrives, the <code>projectWritten</code> flag prevents cache overwriting.</p>
<h3>SSE event dispatch loop</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (275–317행)
const unsub = globalSDK.event.listen((e) => {
  const directory = e.name
  const event = e.details
  const recent = bootingRoot || Date.now() - bootedAt &#x3C; 1500  // 부트 직후 1.5초 쿨다운

  if (directory === "global") {
    applyGlobalEvent({ event, project, refresh, setGlobalProject })
    // server.connected 또는 global.disposed 시 모든 디렉터리 큐에 push
    if (event.type === "server.connected" || event.type === "global.disposed") {
      if (recent) return  // 쿨다운 중이면 무시
      for (const directory of Object.keys(children.children))
        queue.push(directory)
    }
    return
  }

  // 디렉터리별 이벤트
  const [store, setStore] = children.children[directory]
  applyDirectoryEvent({ event, directory, store, setStore, push: queue.push,
                         setSessionTodo, vcsCache, loadLsp })
})
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Event Processing Architecture</strong>:</p>
<ol>
<li>SSE events arrive via <code>globalSDK.event.listen()</code></li>
<li><code>e.name === "global"</code> → <code>applyGlobalEvent()</code> (Change project/provider/settings)</li>
<li>Others → <code>applyDirectoryEvent()</code> (session/message/part/VCS change)</li>
<li>Suppress the reboot queue for 1.5 seconds (<code>bootedAt + 1500</code>) immediately after booting (to prevent bootstrap and event conflicts)</li>
</ol>
<h3>Child Store Manager</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (146–160행)
const children = createChildStoreManager({
  owner,
  isBooting: (directory) => booting.has(directory),
  isLoadingSessions: (directory) => sessionLoads.has(directory),
  onBootstrap: (directory) => bootstrapInstance(directory),
  onDispose: (directory) => { queue.clear(directory); sdkCache.delete(directory) },
  translate: language.t,
})
</code></pre>
<p>Each directory (project) has an independent child store. <code>children.child(directory)</code> returns a <code>[store, setStore]</code> tuple, and <code>children.pin(directory)</code>/<code>children.unpin(directory)</code> prevents dispose during asynchronous operations.</p>
<h3>Session loading and trimming</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (173–238행)
async function loadSessions(directory: string) {
  const limit = Math.max(store.limit + SESSION_RECENT_LIMIT, SESSION_RECENT_LIMIT)
  const result = await loadRootSessionsWithFallback({ directory, limit, list })
  const nonArchived = result.data.filter(s => !s.time?.archived)
    .sort((a, b) => a.id &#x3C; b.id ? -1 : 1)
  const sessions = trimSessions([...nonArchived, ...childSessions], {
    limit, permission: store.permission
  })
  cleanupDroppedSessionCaches(store, setStore, sessions, setSessionTodo)
}
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>SESSION_RECENT_LIMIT</code>: Default session display limit.</li>
<li><code>trimSessions()</code>: Trim old sessions that exceed the limit, but keep sessions requesting permission.</li>
<li><code>cleanupDroppedSessionCaches()</code>: Removes the todo and message cache of the cleaned up session as well.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Configuration Update and Reload State Machine</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (359–373행)
const updateConfig = async (config: Config) => {
  setGlobalStore("reload", "pending")     // 1. "pending" 상태 진입
  return globalSDK.client.global.config
    .update({ config })                    // 2. 서버에 설정 전송
    .then(bootstrap)                       // 3. 글로벌 재부트스트랩
    .then(() => { setGlobalStore("reload", undefined); queue.refresh() })
    .catch((error) => { setGlobalStore("reload", undefined); throw error })
}
</code></pre>
<p>3 states in the <code>reload</code> field: <code>undefined</code> (normal) → <code>"pending"</code> (updating) → <code>undefined</code> (complete). The <code>paused()</code> function pauses event queue processing if <code>reload !== undefined</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>PromptInput synthesis pipeline</h2>
<p>Prompt input is a combination of four types: text, file attachment, image, and agent mention.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["텍스트 입력"] --> E["PromptProvider"]
    B["파일 첨부\n(Drag&#x26;Drop/선택)"] --> E
    C["이미지 붙여넣기"] --> E
    D["에이전트 멘션\n(@agent)"] --> E
    E --> F["SDK submit()"]
    F --> G["SSE 이벤트 수신"]
    G --> H["SyncProvider\n메시지/파트 동기화"]
</code></pre>
<h3>PromptProvider internal state</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>status</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Use</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>text</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>Current input text</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>files</code></td>
<td><code>File[]</code></td>
<td>Attachment list</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>images</code></td>
<td><code>Image[]</code></td>
<td>Paste Image</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>agentMention</code></td>
<td><code>string?</code></td>
<td><code>@agent</code> mention target</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>submitting</code></td>
<td><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Submitting status</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Dock transition logic</h3>
<p>The Composer area displays one of five docks depending on its state:</p>
<pre><code>if (activePermission) → SessionPermissionDock
else if (activeQuestion) → SessionQuestionDock
else if (activeFollowup) → SessionFollowupDock
else if (hasRevert) → SessionRevertDock
else if (hasTodo) → SessionTodoDock
else → 기본 PromptInput
</code></pre>
<p>When approved/denied in <code>SessionPermissionDock</code>, <code>PermissionProvider.respond()</code> is called, and the response is delivered to the server via SSE and the session continues.</p>
<hr>
<h2>PermissionProvider approval flow</h2>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/permission.tsx — 핵심 흐름 (추정)
// 1. 서버가 도구 실행 전 permission 이벤트를 SSE로 전송
// 2. SyncProvider가 해당 세션의 store.permission에 기록
// 3. PermissionProvider가 store.permission을 구독
// 4. SessionPermissionDock이 승인/거부 UI 표시
// 5. 사용자 응답 → SDK.permission.respond() → 서버
// 6. 서버가 도구 실행 또는 중단 후 결과를 SSE로 반환
</code></pre>
<p>Sessions waiting for authorization are protected in <code>trimSessions()</code> — they will not be deleted if the limit is exceeded.</p>
<hr>
<h2>ghostty-web terminal emulator details</h2>
<h3>Loading Strategy</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/components/terminal.tsx — 싱글톤 로딩
let shared: Promise&#x3C;{ mod, ghostty }> | undefined
const loadGhostty = () => {
  if (shared) return shared
  shared = import("ghostty-web")
    .then(async (mod) => ({ mod, ghostty: await mod.Ghostty.load() }))
    .catch((err) => { shared = undefined; throw err })
  return shared
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>ghostty-web</code> dynamically imports <strong>WebAssembly binary</strong>, and when loading fails, it resets <code>shared</code> to <code>undefined</code> to enable retry. If successful, it is cached as a singleton.</p>
<h3>PTY session management</h3>
<p><code>TerminalProvider</code> manages PTY per session. Ghostty-web's <code>Terminal</code> instance has a WebGL context and automatically adjusts to the panel size with <code>FitAddon</code>. The terminal panel can be resized up to 60vh.</p>
<h3>Reuse seam</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The <code>Platform</code> interface is the cleanest abstraction boundary — new platforms (e.g. Electron, mobile) can be added just by implementing Platform</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>@opencode-ai/ui</code> is a design system completely separate from the app, so it can be reused independently.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The SSE event coalescing logic of <code>GlobalSDKProvider</code> is portable to other real-time apps.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The Dock pattern of <code>SessionComposerRegion</code> is a good example of state-based input UI transitions.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>session.tsx</code> is over 700 lines, so the session view orchestration is bloated — separation is needed</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Provider towers are so deep that debugging and testing are difficult — some provider mergers are valid</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>GlobalSyncProvider</code> violates the single responsibility principle by containing all projects, sessions, and settings.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Tightly coupled risk</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>risk</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Provider Tower Depth</td>
<td>App initialization path is complicated due to overlapping 15+ providers</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK event type direct dependence</td>
<td>The UI component has deep knowledge of the type <code>@opencode-ai/sdk/v2/client</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>session.tsx</code> non-interactive</td>
<td>Session routes include state management, layout, and helpers</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ghostty-web single dependency</td>
<td>It is difficult to replace the terminal emulator as it relies only on ghostty-web</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Tauri Specialization</td>
<td>Desktop is tightly bound to Tauri v2 (bindings.ts auto-generated code)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SSE single stream</td>
<td>All events come in on one SSE connection and are dispatched by the client</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>001_tui-design/01_oc_tui.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>OpenCode UI 설계 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/141_opencode-current/</code> (readable source). Web/desktop surfaces documented from this checkout.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode의 UI 계층은 여타 터미널 코딩 에이전트와 달리 SolidJS 기반 풀 웹 애플리케이션이다. <code>packages/app</code>이 핵심 UI 라이브러리이고, <code>packages/desktop</code>이 Tauri v2 래퍼로 같은 코드를 네이티브 데스크톱 앱으로 감싼다. 별도로 <code>packages/console</code>은 SaaS 관리 콘솔(워크스페이스·결제·인증)을 담당하며, 에이전트 UI와는 분리된 표면이다.</p>
<p>핵심 구조는 네 덩어리다. <strong>Provider 타워</strong>가 전역 상태를 주입하고, <strong>라우터</strong>가 Home과 Session 페이지를 전환하며, <strong>세션 뷰</strong>는 MessageTimeline·PromptInput·TerminalPanel·ReviewTab으로 코딩 작업을 조립하고, <strong>Platform 추상화</strong>가 web/desktop 분기를 한 인터페이스 뒤에 숨긴다.</p>
<p>중요한 관찰은 SolidJS를 쓰면서도 React 생태계의 Context 중첩 패턴을 그대로 차용했다는 점이다. Provider가 15개 이상 중첩되며, 이들이 각각 <code>createStore</code>·<code>createEffect</code>를 내부에 품고 있어 사실상 mini state machine 역할을 한다. GlobalSDK → GlobalSync → Sync 체인이 SSE 이벤트 스트림을 소비해 실시간 상태를 유지하는 구조는 일반 SPA보다 게임 엔진의 이벤트 루프에 가깝다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph "엔트리 분기"
        E1["entry.tsx (web)"]
        E2["desktop/index.tsx (Tauri)"]
    end

    E1 --> P["PlatformProvider"]
    E2 --> P

    P --> ABP["AppBaseProviders"]
    ABP --> AI["AppInterface"]

    AI --> SP["ServerProvider"]
    SP --> CG["ConnectionGate"]
    CG --> GSDK["GlobalSDKProvider"]
    GSDK --> GSY["GlobalSyncProvider"]

    GSY --> ASP["AppShellProviders"]
    ASP --> R["Router"]

    R --> HOME["Home 페이지"]
    R --> DL["DirectoryLayout"]
    DL --> SDK["SDKProvider"]
    SDK --> SYNC["SyncProvider"]
    SYNC --> SR["Session Route"]

    SR --> SPR["SessionProviders"]
    SPR --> SV["Session 뷰"]

    SV --> MT["MessageTimeline"]
    SV --> CR["ComposerRegion"]
    SV --> TP["TerminalPanel"]
    SV --> SSP["SessionSidePanel"]
</code></pre>
<hr>

<h3>Provider 타워 분해</h3>
<p>OpenCode는 SolidJS의 <code>createSimpleContext</code> 패턴으로 15개 이상의 Provider를 계층적으로 중첩한다. 스코프별로 세 단계로 나뉜다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>스코프</th>
<th>Provider</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>글로벌 기반</td>
<td><code>MetaProvider</code></td>
<td>HTML meta 태그 관리</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>ThemeProvider</code></td>
<td>라이트/다크 테마 전환</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>LanguageProvider</code></td>
<td>i18n 로케일 (en, zh, ko 등)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>QueryProvider</code></td>
<td>TanStack Query 캐시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>DialogProvider</code></td>
<td>모달 다이얼로그 스택</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>MarkedProvider</code></td>
<td>마크다운 렌더 파서</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>FileComponentProvider</code></td>
<td>파일 뷰어 컴포넌트 주입</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>서버 연결</td>
<td><code>ServerProvider</code></td>
<td>서버 목록·활성 서버 관리</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>ConnectionGate</code></td>
<td>서버 헬스체크·재연결 게이트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>GlobalSDKProvider</code></td>
<td>SDK 인스턴스·SSE 이벤트 스트림</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>GlobalSyncProvider</code></td>
<td>프로젝트·세션·설정 글로벌 동기화</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>앱 셸</td>
<td><code>SettingsProvider</code></td>
<td>사용자 설정 (폰트, 키바인드 등)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>PermissionProvider</code></td>
<td>도구 실행 권한 관리</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>LayoutProvider</code></td>
<td>사이드바·패널·탭 레이아웃 상태</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>NotificationProvider</code></td>
<td>시스템 알림</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>ModelsProvider</code></td>
<td>모델 목록·선택</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>CommandProvider</code></td>
<td>커맨드 팔레트·키바인드</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>HighlightsProvider</code></td>
<td>코드 하이라이팅</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>세션</td>
<td><code>TerminalProvider</code></td>
<td>PTY 세션 관리 (ghostty-web)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>FileProvider</code></td>
<td>파일 트리·콘텐츠 캐시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>PromptProvider</code></td>
<td>입력 상태 (텍스트, 첨부, 에이전트 멘션)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>CommentsProvider</code></td>
<td>리뷰 코멘트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>디렉터리</td>
<td><code>SDKProvider</code></td>
<td>디렉터리별 SDK 클라이언트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>SyncProvider</code></td>
<td>디렉터리별 메시지·파트 동기화</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>소스에서 Provider 중첩 구조를 직접 볼 수 있다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-tsx">// 140_opencode/packages/app/src/app.tsx — AppShellProviders
function AppShellProviders(props: ParentProps) {
  return (
    &#x3C;SettingsProvider>
      &#x3C;PermissionProvider>
        &#x3C;LayoutProvider>
          &#x3C;NotificationProvider>
            &#x3C;ModelsProvider>
              &#x3C;CommandProvider>
                &#x3C;HighlightsProvider>
                  &#x3C;Layout>{props.children}&#x3C;/Layout>
                &#x3C;/HighlightsProvider>
              &#x3C;/CommandProvider>
            &#x3C;/ModelsProvider>
          &#x3C;/NotificationProvider>
        &#x3C;/LayoutProvider>
      &#x3C;/PermissionProvider>
    &#x3C;/SettingsProvider>
  )
}

// 140_opencode/packages/app/src/app.tsx — SessionProviders
function SessionProviders(props: ParentProps) {
  return (
    &#x3C;TerminalProvider>
      &#x3C;FileProvider>
        &#x3C;PromptProvider>
          &#x3C;CommentsProvider>{props.children}&#x3C;/CommentsProvider>
        &#x3C;/PromptProvider>
      &#x3C;/FileProvider>
    &#x3C;/TerminalProvider>
  )
}
</code></pre>
<h3>라우팅 구조</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>경로 패턴</th>
<th>컴포넌트</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>/</code></td>
<td><code>HomeRoute</code></td>
<td>프로젝트 목록, 서버 상태 표시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>/:dir</code></td>
<td><code>DirectoryLayout</code></td>
<td>프로젝트 스코프 (base64 인코딩 경로)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>/:dir/session/:id?</code></td>
<td><code>SessionRoute</code></td>
<td>메인 코딩 세션 인터페이스</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<pre><code class="language-tsx">// 140_opencode/packages/app/src/app.tsx — 라우트 정의
&#x3C;Route path="/" component={HomeRoute} />
&#x3C;Route path="/:dir" component={DirectoryLayout}>
  &#x3C;Route path="/" component={SessionIndexRoute} />
  &#x3C;Route path="/session/:id?" component={SessionRoute} />
&#x3C;/Route>
</code></pre>
<p><code>DirectoryLayout</code>은 <code>SDKProvider</code>와 <code>SyncProvider</code>를 감싸서, 하위 라우트가 특정 디렉터리에 바인딩된 SDK 클라이언트를 사용할 수 있게 한다.</p>
<h3>세션 뷰 구성 요소</h3>
<p>세션 페이지는 코딩 에이전트의 핵심 인터페이스다. 네 개의 주요 영역으로 구성된다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>영역</th>

</tr>
<tr>

</tr>

<h3>Platform 추상화 — Web vs Desktop</h3>
<p>OpenCode의 가장 깔끔한 seam은 <code>Platform</code> 인터페이스다. <code>entry.tsx</code>(web)와 <code>desktop/index.tsx</code>(Tauri)가 각각 Platform을 구현해 <code>PlatformProvider</code>에 주입하면, 나머지 앱 코드는 플랫폼을 모른 채 동작한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/app/src/context/platform.tsx — Platform 인터페이스 (발췌)
export type Platform = {
  platform: "web" | "desktop"
  os?: "macos" | "windows" | "linux"
  version?: string
  openLink(url: string): void
  openPath?(path: string, app?: string): Promise&#x3C;void>
  restart(): Promise&#x3C;void>
  notify(title: string, description?: string, href?: string): Promise&#x3C;void>
  openDirectoryPickerDialog?(opts?: OpenDirectoryPickerOptions): Promise&#x3C;PickerPaths>
  storage?: (name?: string) => SyncStorage | AsyncStorage
  fetch?: typeof fetch
  parseMarkdown?(markdown: string): Promise&#x3C;string>
  // ...
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>기능</th>
<th>Web 구현</th>
<th>Desktop (Tauri) 구현</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>링크 열기</td>
<td><code>window.open(url, "_blank")</code></td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-shell open</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>디렉터리 선택</td>
<td>서버 사이드 다이얼로그</td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-dialog open</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>알림</td>
<td>Web Notification API</td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-notification</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>스토리지</td>
<td><code>localStorage</code></td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-store</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>HTTP fetch</td>
<td>브라우저 fetch</td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-http tauriFetch</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>마크다운 파싱</td>
<td>JS (Marked)</td>
<td>네이티브 Rust 파서 (Tauri command)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>업데이터</td>
<td>없음</td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-updater</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>앱 재시작</td>
<td><code>location.reload()</code></td>
<td><code>@tauri-apps/plugin-process relaunch</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Desktop 엔트리는 Tauri sidecar에서 opencode-cli 서버를 실행하고, <code>commands.awaitInitialization()</code>으로 서버 준비를 기다린 뒤 <code>ServerConnection.Sidecar</code> 타입으로 연결한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-tsx">// 140_opencode/packages/desktop/src/index.tsx — sidecar 연결 (발췌)
const [sidecar] = createResource(() =>
  commands.awaitInitialization(new Channel&#x3C;InitStep>() as any)
)

const servers = () => {
  const data = sidecar()
  if (!data) return []
  const server: ServerConnection.Sidecar = {
    displayName: t("desktop.server.local"),
    type: "sidecar",
    variant: "base",
    http: { url: data.url, username: data.username, password: data.password },
  }
  return [server] as ServerConnection.Any[]
}
</code></pre>
<h3>터미널 에뮬레이터</h3>
<p>터미널은 <code>ghostty-web</code> (Ghostty 터미널의 WebAssembly 빌드)을 사용한다. <code>TerminalProvider</code>가 PTY 세션을 관리하고, <code>Terminal</code> 컴포넌트가 WebGL 렌더링을 담당한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/app/src/components/terminal.tsx — ghostty-web 로딩 (발췌)
import type { FitAddon, Ghostty, Terminal as Term } from "ghostty-web"

let shared: Promise&#x3C;{ mod: typeof import("ghostty-web"); ghostty: Ghostty }> | undefined
const loadGhostty = () => {
  if (shared) return shared
  shared = import("ghostty-web")
    .then(async (mod) => ({ mod, ghostty: await mod.Ghostty.load() }))
    .catch((err) => { shared = undefined; throw err })
  return shared
}
</code></pre>
<h3>데이터 흐름</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>단계</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>SSE 연결</td>
<td><code>GlobalSDKProvider</code>가 서버에 SSE 스트림을 열고 이벤트를 수신한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>이벤트 코알레싱</td>
<td>같은 키(세션 상태, 파트 업데이트)의 이벤트를 16ms 프레임 단위로 합친다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>글로벌 동기화</td>
<td><code>GlobalSyncProvider</code>가 프로젝트·세션·설정·프로바이더 상태를 글로벌 스토어에 반영한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>디렉터리 동기화</td>
<td><code>SyncProvider</code>가 디렉터리별 메시지·파트를 관리하고, optimistic update를 지원한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>UI 렌더링</td>
<td>SolidJS의 fine-grained reactivity가 변경된 스토어 경로만 리렌더링한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>사용자 입력</td>
<td><code>PromptInput</code>이 텍스트·파일·이미지·에이전트 멘션을 조합해 SDK로 전송한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>권한 승인</td>
<td><code>PermissionProvider</code>가 도구 실행 전 승인 요청을 가로채고 UI로 위임한다</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h3>Console — SaaS 관리 표면</h3>
<p><code>packages/console</code>은 에이전트 UI와는 별개의 SolidStart 기반 서버 렌더링 웹앱이다. 워크스페이스 관리, 결제(Stripe), 인증(OAuth), API 키 관리, 벤치마크 등 운영 기능을 담당한다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>영역</th>
<th>경로</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>

<h2>GlobalSyncProvider 역공학 상세</h2>
<p><code>GlobalSyncProvider</code>는 OpenCode의 가장 복잡한 Provider다. 407줄의 <code>global-sync.tsx</code>에 프로젝트·세션·설정·이벤트 디스패치가 모두 집중되어 있다.</p>
<h3>GlobalStore 상태 구조</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx — GlobalStore (30–42행)
type GlobalStore = {
  ready: boolean
  error?: InitError
  path: Path                          // state/config/worktree/directory/home 경로
  project: Project[]                  // 프로젝트 목록
  session_todo: { [sessionID: string]: Todo[] }
  provider: ProviderListResponse      // 프로바이더 목록 (all/connected/default)
  provider_auth: ProviderAuthResponse // 프로바이더 인증 상태
  config: Config                      // 글로벌 설정
  reload: undefined | "pending" | "complete"  // 리로드 상태 머신
}
</code></pre>
<h3>내부 캐시 계층</h3>
<p><code>createGlobalSync()</code> 안에 4개의 <code>Map</code> 캐시가 존재한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (50–53행)
const sdkCache = new Map&#x3C;string, OpencodeClient>()   // 디렉터리→SDK 인스턴스
const booting = new Map&#x3C;string, Promise&#x3C;void>>()     // 부트스트랩 중인 디렉터리
const sessionLoads = new Map&#x3C;string, Promise&#x3C;void>>() // 세션 로딩 중인 디렉터리
const sessionMeta = new Map&#x3C;string, { limit: number }>() // 세션 로드 이력
</code></pre>
<p><code>sdkFor(directory)</code>는 캐시를 먼저 확인하고, 없으면 <code>globalSDK.createClient({ directory, throwOnError: true })</code>로 새 인스턴스를 생성한다.</p>
<h3>프로젝트 캐시 영속화</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (55–58행)
const [projectCache, setProjectCache, projectInit] = persisted(
  Persist.global("globalSync.project", ["globalSync.project.v1"]),
  createStore({ value: [] as Project[] }),
)
</code></pre>
<p>프로젝트 목록은 <code>Persist.global()</code>로 localStorage/Tauri store에 영속 캐시된다. 앱 재시작 시 서버 응답 전에 캐시된 프로젝트를 먼저 표시하되, 서버 데이터가 도착하면 <code>projectWritten</code> 플래그로 캐시 덮어쓰기를 방지한다.</p>
<h3>SSE 이벤트 디스패치 루프</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (275–317행)
const unsub = globalSDK.event.listen((e) => {
  const directory = e.name
  const event = e.details
  const recent = bootingRoot || Date.now() - bootedAt &#x3C; 1500  // 부트 직후 1.5초 쿨다운

  if (directory === "global") {
    applyGlobalEvent({ event, project, refresh, setGlobalProject })
    // server.connected 또는 global.disposed 시 모든 디렉터리 큐에 push
    if (event.type === "server.connected" || event.type === "global.disposed") {
      if (recent) return  // 쿨다운 중이면 무시
      for (const directory of Object.keys(children.children))
        queue.push(directory)
    }
    return
  }

  // 디렉터리별 이벤트
  const [store, setStore] = children.children[directory]
  applyDirectoryEvent({ event, directory, store, setStore, push: queue.push,
                         setSessionTodo, vcsCache, loadLsp })
})
</code></pre>
<p><strong>이벤트 처리 아키텍처</strong>:</p>
<ol>
<li>SSE 이벤트가 <code>globalSDK.event.listen()</code>을 통해 도착</li>
<li><code>e.name === "global"</code> → <code>applyGlobalEvent()</code> (프로젝트/프로바이더/설정 변경)</li>
<li>그 외 → <code>applyDirectoryEvent()</code> (세션/메시지/파트/VCS 변경)</li>
<li>부트 직후 1.5초(<code>bootedAt + 1500</code>) 동안은 재부트 큐를 억제 (부트스트랩과 이벤트 충돌 방지)</li>
</ol>
<h3>Child Store Manager</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (146–160행)
const children = createChildStoreManager({
  owner,
  isBooting: (directory) => booting.has(directory),
  isLoadingSessions: (directory) => sessionLoads.has(directory),
  onBootstrap: (directory) => bootstrapInstance(directory),
  onDispose: (directory) => { queue.clear(directory); sdkCache.delete(directory) },
  translate: language.t,
})
</code></pre>
<p>각 디렉터리(프로젝트)는 독립적인 child store를 가진다. <code>children.child(directory)</code>가 <code>[store, setStore]</code> 튜플을 반환하며, <code>children.pin(directory)</code>/<code>children.unpin(directory)</code>으로 비동기 작업 중 dispose를 방지한다.</p>
<h3>세션 로딩과 트리밍</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (173–238행)
async function loadSessions(directory: string) {
  const limit = Math.max(store.limit + SESSION_RECENT_LIMIT, SESSION_RECENT_LIMIT)
  const result = await loadRootSessionsWithFallback({ directory, limit, list })
  const nonArchived = result.data.filter(s => !s.time?.archived)
    .sort((a, b) => a.id &#x3C; b.id ? -1 : 1)
  const sessions = trimSessions([...nonArchived, ...childSessions], {
    limit, permission: store.permission
  })
  cleanupDroppedSessionCaches(store, setStore, sessions, setSessionTodo)
}
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>SESSION_RECENT_LIMIT</code>: 기본 세션 표시 한계</li>
<li><code>trimSessions()</code>: 한계를 초과하는 오래된 세션을 정리하되, 권한 요청 중인 세션은 보존</li>
<li><code>cleanupDroppedSessionCaches()</code>: 정리된 세션의 todo, 메시지 캐시도 함께 제거</li>
</ul>
<h3>설정 업데이트와 Reload 상태 머신</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/global-sync.tsx (359–373행)
const updateConfig = async (config: Config) => {
  setGlobalStore("reload", "pending")     // 1. "pending" 상태 진입
  return globalSDK.client.global.config
    .update({ config })                    // 2. 서버에 설정 전송
    .then(bootstrap)                       // 3. 글로벌 재부트스트랩
    .then(() => { setGlobalStore("reload", undefined); queue.refresh() })
    .catch((error) => { setGlobalStore("reload", undefined); throw error })
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>reload</code> 필드의 3 상태: <code>undefined</code> (정상) → <code>"pending"</code> (업데이트 중) → <code>undefined</code> (완료). <code>paused()</code> 함수는 <code>reload !== undefined</code>이면 이벤트 큐 처리를 일시 중지한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>PromptInput 합성 파이프라인</h2>
<p>프롬프트 입력은 텍스트, 파일 첨부, 이미지, 에이전트 멘션의 4종을 조합한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["텍스트 입력"] --> E["PromptProvider"]
    B["파일 첨부\n(Drag&#x26;Drop/선택)"] --> E
    C["이미지 붙여넣기"] --> E
    D["에이전트 멘션\n(@agent)"] --> E
    E --> F["SDK submit()"]
    F --> G["SSE 이벤트 수신"]
    G --> H["SyncProvider\n메시지/파트 동기화"]
</code></pre>
<h3>PromptProvider 내부 상태</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>상태</th>
<th>타입</th>
<th>용도</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>text</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>현재 입력 텍스트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>files</code></td>
<td><code>File[]</code></td>
<td>첨부 파일 목록</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>images</code></td>
<td><code>Image[]</code></td>
<td>붙여넣기 이미지</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>agentMention</code></td>
<td><code>string?</code></td>
<td><code>@agent</code> 멘션 대상</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>submitting</code></td>
<td><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>제출 중 상태</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Dock 전환 로직</h3>
<p>컴포저 영역은 상태에 따라 5가지 Dock 중 하나를 표시한다:</p>
<pre><code>if (activePermission) → SessionPermissionDock
else if (activeQuestion) → SessionQuestionDock
else if (activeFollowup) → SessionFollowupDock
else if (hasRevert) → SessionRevertDock
else if (hasTodo) → SessionTodoDock
else → 기본 PromptInput
</code></pre>
<p><code>SessionPermissionDock</code>에서 승인/거부 시 <code>PermissionProvider.respond()</code>를 호출하고, 응답이 SSE로 서버에 전달되어 세션이 계속된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>PermissionProvider 승인 흐름</h2>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/context/permission.tsx — 핵심 흐름 (추정)
// 1. 서버가 도구 실행 전 permission 이벤트를 SSE로 전송
// 2. SyncProvider가 해당 세션의 store.permission에 기록
// 3. PermissionProvider가 store.permission을 구독
// 4. SessionPermissionDock이 승인/거부 UI 표시
// 5. 사용자 응답 → SDK.permission.respond() → 서버
// 6. 서버가 도구 실행 또는 중단 후 결과를 SSE로 반환
</code></pre>
<p>승인 대기 중인 세션은 <code>trimSessions()</code>에서 보호된다 — 한계를 초과하더라도 삭제되지 않는다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>ghostty-web 터미널 에뮬레이터 상세</h2>
<h3>로딩 전략</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/app/src/components/terminal.tsx — 싱글톤 로딩
let shared: Promise&#x3C;{ mod, ghostty }> | undefined
const loadGhostty = () => {
  if (shared) return shared
  shared = import("ghostty-web")
    .then(async (mod) => ({ mod, ghostty: await mod.Ghostty.load() }))
    .catch((err) => { shared = undefined; throw err })
  return shared
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>ghostty-web</code>은 <strong>WebAssembly 바이너리</strong>를 동적 import하며, 로딩 실패 시 <code>shared</code>를 <code>undefined</code>로 리셋해 재시도를 가능하게 한다. 성공하면 싱글톤으로 캐싱된다.</p>
<h3>PTY 세션 관리</h3>
<p><code>TerminalProvider</code>가 세션별 PTY를 관리한다. ghostty-web의 <code>Terminal</code> 인스턴스는 WebGL 컨텍스트를 가지며, <code>FitAddon</code>으로 패널 크기에 자동 맞춤한다. 터미널 패널은 최대 60vh까지 리사이즈 가능하다.</p>
<h3>재사용 seam</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>Platform</code> 인터페이스는 가장 깔끔한 추상화 경계다 — 새로운 플랫폼(예: Electron, 모바일)을 Platform 구현만으로 추가할 수 있다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>@opencode-ai/ui</code>는 앱과 완전히 분리된 디자인 시스템이라 독립 재사용이 가능하다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>GlobalSDKProvider</code>의 SSE 이벤트 코알레싱 로직은 다른 실시간 앱에 이식 가능하다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>SessionComposerRegion</code>의 Dock 패턴은 상태 기반 입력 UI 전환의 좋은 예시다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>session.tsx</code>는 700줄이 넘어 세션 뷰 오케스트레이션이 비대하다 — 분리가 필요하다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Provider 타워가 너무 깊어 디버깅과 테스트가 어렵다 — 일부 Provider 합병이 유효하다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>GlobalSyncProvider</code>가 프로젝트·세션·설정을 모두 담아 단일 책임 원칙을 위반한다</li>
</ul>
<h3>강결합 리스크</h3>

</tr>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: GlobalSyncProvider 역공학(상태 구조/4개 캐시/영속화/SSE 디스패치/child store/세션 트리밍/reload 상태 머신), PromptInput 합성 파이프라인(4종 입력/Dock 전환), PermissionProvider 승인 흐름, ghostty-web 터미널(싱글톤 로딩/PTY 관리) 역공학 섹션 추가.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: SolidJS 기반 웹/데스크톱 이중 표면 UI를 패키지·Provider·라우팅·세션 뷰·Platform 추상화 중심으로 분석했다.</li>
</ul>
1d:["$","$L2f","20-axis-01-tui",{"id":"20-axis-01-tui","order":25,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 01: TUI design","description":"001_tui-design/01_oc_tui.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$48"}}]}]
49:T11229,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 02: Prompt &#x26; context</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — <code>system: string[]</code> assembly + cache breakpoints.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OpenCode의 프롬프트 시스템은 Codex의 Rust 단일 바이너리 모놀리스와 근본적으로 다른 구조를 갖는다. TypeScript + Effect-TS 기반이며, <code>models.dev</code> 레지스트리를 통해 21개 이상의 프로바이더를 동적으로 로드하고, 모델 ID 패턴 매칭으로 프로바이더별 시스템 프롬프트를 분기한다. Codex가 developer instructions 채널과 user contextual fragment 채널</li>
<li>이 차이의 실질적 결과는 간결함이다. Codex에서 developer bundle, user fragment, plugin hint가 서로 다른 role 메시지로 들어가야 했던 복잡성이, OpenCode에서는 <code>system: string[]</code> 하나로 축약된다. 그 대신 <strong>cache breakpoint 전략</strong>이 중요해진다. <code>ProviderTransform.applyCaching()</code>은 system 메시지 첫 2개와 대화 마</li>
<li>또 하나의 핵심 차이는 <strong>모델별 프롬프트 분기</strong>다. Codex는 하나의 <code>default.md</code>를 모든 모델에 적용하지만, OpenCode는 <code>SystemPrompt.provider()</code>에서 모델 ID 패턴을 검사해 6가지 프롬프트 중 하나를 선택한다. GPT-4/o1/o3 계열은 <code>beast.txt</code>, GPT-5+ 계열은 <code>codex.txt</code>, Gemini는 <code>gemini.txt</code>, Claude는 `anthropic.txt</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["모델별 base prompt(beast/codex/anthropic/gemini/default/trinity)"] --> F["system: string[]"]</li>
<li>B["environment context(working dir, platform, date)"] --> F</li>
<li>C["skills 목록(Skill.available → Skill.fmt)"] --> F</li>
<li>D["AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / instruction files(InstructionPrompt.system)"] --> F</li>
<li>E["plugin transform hook(experimental.chat.system.transform)"] --> F</li>
<li>F --> G["LLM.stream() → system role messages"]</li>
<li>G --> H["ProviderTransform.message()caching · normalization · modality"]</li>
</ul>

const system: string[] = []
system.push(
  [
    // use agent prompt otherwise provider prompt
    ...(input.agent.prompt ? [input.agent.prompt] : SystemPrompt.provider(input.model)),
    // any custom prompt passed into this call
    ...input.system,
    // any custom prompt from last user message
    ...(input.user.system ? [input.user.system] : []),
  ]
    .filter((x) => x)
    .join("\n"),

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts:18-26
export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt-4") || model.api.id.includes("o1") || model.api.id.includes("o3"))
    return [PROMPT_BEAST]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
  if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
  if (model.api.id.toLowerCase().includes("trinity")) return [PROMPT_TRINITY]
  return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts:28-51
export async function environment(model: Provider.Model) {
  return [
    [
      `You are powered by the model named ${model.api.id}.`,
      `&#x3C;env>`,
      `  Working directory: ${Instance.directory}`,
      `  Workspace root folder: ${Instance.worktree}`,
      `  Is directory a git repo: ${project.vcs === "git" ? "yes" : "no"}`,
      `  Platform: ${process.platform}`,
      `  Today's date: ${new Date().toDateString()}`,
      `&#x3C;/env>`,
    ].join("\n"),
  ]
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts:20-29
function globalFiles() {
  const files = []
  if (Flag.OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR) {
    files.push(path.join(Flag.OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR, "AGENTS.md"))
  }
  files.push(path.join(Global.Path.config, "AGENTS.md"))
  if (!Flag.OPENCODE_DISABLE_CLAUDE_CODE_PROMPT) {
    files.push(path.join(os.homedir(), ".claude", "CLAUDE.md"))
  }
  return files
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts:117-141
export async function system() {
  const config = await Config.get()
  const paths = await systemPaths()
  const files = Array.from(paths).map(async (p) => {
    const content = await Filesystem.readText(p).catch(() => "")
    return content ? "Instructions from: " + p + "\n" + content : ""
  })
  // URL 기반 instruction도 지원
  const urls: string[] = []
  if (config.instructions) {
    for (const instruction of config.instructions) {
      if (instruction.startsWith("https://") || instruction.startsWith("http://")) {
        urls.push(instruction)
      }
    }
  }
  return Promise.all([...files, ...fetches]).then((result) => result.filter(Boolean))
}
</code></pre>

  const result = await Filesystem.readJson(Flag.OPENCODE_MODELS_PATH ?? filepath).catch(() => {})
  if (result) return result
  const snapshot = await import("./models-snapshot.js")
    .then((m) => m.snapshot)

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:31-49
const COMPACTION_BUFFER = 20_000

export async function isOverflow(input: { tokens: ...; model: Provider.Model }) {
  const config = await Config.get()
  if (config.compaction?.auto === false) return false
  const context = input.model.limit.context
  if (context === 0) return false
  const count = input.tokens.total || input.tokens.input + input.tokens.output + ...
  const reserved = config.compaction?.reserved ?? Math.min(COMPACTION_BUFFER, maxOutputTokens)
  const usable = input.model.limit.input
    ? input.model.limit.input - reserved
    : context - maxOutputTokens
  return count >= usable
}
</code></pre>

export const PRUNE_PROTECT = 40_000   // 최근 보호 토큰 범위
const PRUNE_PROTECTED_TOOLS = ["skill"]  // pruning에서 제외되는 tool

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Prompt and context injection pipeline</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — <code>system: string[]</code> assembly + cache breakpoints.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode's prompt system has a fundamentally different structure from Codex's Rust single binary monolith. It is based on TypeScript + Effect-TS, dynamically loads more than 21 providers through the <code>models.dev</code> registry, and branches system prompts for each provider by model ID pattern matching. Unlike Codex, which clearly separates the developer instructions channel and the user contextual fragment channel, OpenCode adopts a single channel structure in which <strong>all instructions are summed into a system role message array</strong> and then delivered to the LLM.</p>
<p>The practical result of this difference is brevity. In Codex, the complexity of developer bundle, user fragment, and plugin hint having to be entered into different role messages is reduced to one <code>system: string[]</code> in OpenCode. Instead, <strong>cache breakpoint strategy</strong> becomes important. <code>ProviderTransform.applyCaching()</code> attaches an <code>ephemeral</code> cache marker to the first two system messages and the last two conversations, absorbing differences in caching API for each provider.</p>
<p>Another key difference is <strong>prompt branching by model</strong>. Codex applies one <code>default.md</code> to all models, but OpenCode selects one of six prompts by examining the model ID pattern in <code>SystemPrompt.provider()</code>. <code>beast.txt</code> is applied to GPT-4/o1/o3 series, <code>codex.txt</code> to GPT-5+ series, <code>gemini.txt</code> to Gemini, <code>anthropic.txt</code> to Claude, <code>trinity.txt</code> to Trinity, and <code>default.txt</code> to others.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["모델별 base prompt&#x3C;br/>(beast/codex/anthropic/gemini/default/trinity)"] --> F["system: string[]"]
    B["environment context&#x3C;br/>(working dir, platform, date)"] --> F
    C["skills 목록&#x3C;br/>(Skill.available → Skill.fmt)"] --> F
    D["AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / instruction files&#x3C;br/>(InstructionPrompt.system)"] --> F
    E["plugin transform hook&#x3C;br/>(experimental.chat.system.transform)"] --> F
    F --> G["LLM.stream() → system role messages"]
    G --> H["ProviderTransform.message()&#x3C;br/>caching · normalization · modality"]
    H --> I["streamText() → AI SDK"]
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant Loop as SessionPrompt.loop
    participant Sys as SystemPrompt
    participant Instr as InstructionPrompt
    participant LLM as LLM.stream
    participant SDK as AI SDK (streamText)

    User->>Loop: prompt(input)
    Loop->>Sys: provider(model) → base prompt 선택
    Loop->>Sys: environment(model) → env 블록
    Loop->>Sys: skills(agent) → 스킬 목록
    Loop->>Instr: system() → AGENTS.md 등
    Loop->>LLM: stream({ system, messages, tools })
    LLM->>LLM: system 배열 조립 (provider + env + skills + instructions + user.system)
    LLM->>LLM: Plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.system.transform")
    LLM->>LLM: system[] → system role ModelMessage[]
    LLM->>SDK: streamText({ model, messages, tools, ... })
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Technical Reference</h2>
<h3>Prompt input channel</h3>
<p>OpenCode, unlike Codex, aggregates all directives into a <strong>single system channel</strong>. The division is determined by <strong>assembly order</strong>, not by channel.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>order</th>
<th>Source</th>
<th>function/file</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Base prompt by model</td>
<td><code>SystemPrompt.provider()</code> → <code>session/prompt/*.txt</code></td>
<td>Select from 6 types through model pattern matching</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>environment context</td>
<td><code>SystemPrompt.environment()</code></td>
<td>working dir, platform, date, model ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>skills list</td>
<td><code>SystemPrompt.skills()</code> → <code>Skill.fmt()</code></td>
<td>Format the skills allowed for the agent as verbose</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>AGENTS.md / instruction files</td>
<td><code>InstructionPrompt.system()</code></td>
<td>Global·project·config designation file</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>structured output prompt</td>
<td>conditional (<code>json_schema</code> mode)</td>
<td><code>STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SYSTEM_PROMPT</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>agent custom prompt</td>
<td><code>agent.prompt</code> (set in config)</td>
<td>Agent-specific prompt overrides</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>user-level system prompt</td>
<td><code>input.user.system</code></td>
<td>system text put directly into the session by the user</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>plugin transform</td>
<td><code>Plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.system.transform")</code></td>
<td>An external plugin changes the system array</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>system array final assembly (<code>LLM.stream</code>)</h3>
<p>The <code>stream()</code> function in <code>session/llm.ts</code> creates the final system array:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/llm.ts:70-82
const system: string[] = []
system.push(
  [
    // use agent prompt otherwise provider prompt
    ...(input.agent.prompt ? [input.agent.prompt] : SystemPrompt.provider(input.model)),
    // any custom prompt passed into this call
    ...input.system,
    // any custom prompt from last user message
    ...(input.user.system ? [input.user.system] : []),
  ]
    .filter((x) => x)
    .join("\n"),
)
</code></pre>
<p>This arrangement is reassembled into a <strong>2-part structure</strong> after going through a plugin hook. If the first part (header) has not changed, combine the rest into one to increase caching efficiency:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/llm.ts:90-95
if (system.length > 2 &#x26;&#x26; system[0] === header) {
  const rest = system.slice(1)
  system.length = 0
  system.push(header, rest.join("\n"))
}
</code></pre>
<p>Finally, each element of the system array is converted to <code>{ role: "system", content: x }</code> ModelMessage and prepended to the conversation messages:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/llm.ts:121-129
const messages = isOpenaiOauth
  ? input.messages
  : [
      ...system.map((x): ModelMessage => ({ role: "system", content: x })),
      ...input.messages,
    ]
</code></pre>
<h3>Base prompt branch by model</h3>
<p>The <code>provider()</code> function in <code>session/system.ts</code> selects a prompt by examining the model ID string:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts:18-26
export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt-4") || model.api.id.includes("o1") || model.api.id.includes("o3"))
    return [PROMPT_BEAST]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
  if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
  if (model.api.id.toLowerCase().includes("trinity")) return [PROMPT_TRINITY]
  return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>prompt file</th>
<th>target model</th>
<th>number of lines</th>
<th>Key Features</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>beast.txt</code></td>
<td>GPT-4, o1, o3</td>
<td>147</td>
<td>"please keep going until the user's query is completely resolved", highlighting autonomous agents, webfetch research loop</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>codex.txt</code></td>
<td>GPT-5+ series</td>
<td>79</td>
<td>"OpenCode, the best coding agent on the planet", Front-end design guide, final answer format rules</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>anthropic.txt</code></td>
<td>Claude series</td>
<td>105</td>
<td>professional objectivity, TodoWrite management, professional code editing workflow</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>gemini.txt</code></td>
<td>Gemini series</td>
<td>155</td>
<td>Detailed conventions·idiomatic changes, emphasis on security/safety rules</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>default.txt</code></td>
<td>All other models</td>
<td>105</td>
<td>Common base, concise CLI output rules, URL creation prohibited</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>trinity.txt</code></td>
<td>Trinity Model</td>
<td>97</td>
<td>Similar to default, but separate branch</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>base prompt common characteristics (excerpted from anthropotic.txt)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-text">// session/prompt/anthropic.txt:1-2
You are OpenCode, the best coding agent on the planet.

You are an interactive CLI tool that helps users with software engineering tasks.
Use the instructions below and the tools available to you to assist the user.
</code></pre>
<p>Key rules repeated in every prompt:</p>
<ul>
<li>URL creation prohibited (only programming-related allowed)</li>
<li>CLI output brevity (within 4 lines)</li>
<li>No use of emojis (only upon user request)</li>
<li>Perform tasks through tools, text is for communication only</li>
</ul>
<h3>environment context block</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts:28-51
export async function environment(model: Provider.Model) {
  return [
    [
      `You are powered by the model named ${model.api.id}.`,
      `&#x3C;env>`,
      `  Working directory: ${Instance.directory}`,
      `  Workspace root folder: ${Instance.worktree}`,
      `  Is directory a git repo: ${project.vcs === "git" ? "yes" : "no"}`,
      `  Platform: ${process.platform}`,
      `  Today's date: ${new Date().toDateString()}`,
      `&#x3C;/env>`,
    ].join("\n"),
  ]
}
</code></pre>
<p>Injects environment information wrapped in <code>&#x3C;env></code> XML tags. It has a similar role to Codex's <code>&#x3C;environment_context></code> wrapper, but is more concise.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Loading AGENTS.md and instruction files</h2>
<h3>Search target file</h3>
<p>Define search rules for instruction files in <code>session/instruction.ts</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts:14-18
const FILES = [
  "AGENTS.md",
  "CLAUDE.md",
  "CONTEXT.md", // deprecated
]
</code></pre>
<p>OpenCode also recognizes <code>CLAUDE.md</code> for compatibility with Claude Code.</p>
<h3>Global instruction file path</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts:20-29
function globalFiles() {
  const files = []
  if (Flag.OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR) {
    files.push(path.join(Flag.OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR, "AGENTS.md"))
  }
  files.push(path.join(Global.Path.config, "AGENTS.md"))
  if (!Flag.OPENCODE_DISABLE_CLAUDE_CODE_PROMPT) {
    files.push(path.join(os.homedir(), ".claude", "CLAUDE.md"))
  }
  return files
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Instruction file navigation order (<code>InstructionPrompt.system()</code>)</h3>
<ol>
<li><strong>Navigate upward in the project directory</strong>: <code>findUp</code> from <code>Instance.directory</code> to <code>Instance.worktree</code> in the order <code>AGENTS.md</code> → <code>CLAUDE.md</code> → <code>CONTEXT.md</code>.</li>
<li><strong>Global file</strong>: <code>OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR/AGENTS.md</code> → <code>~/.config/140_opencode/AGENTS.md</code> → <code>~/.claude/CLAUDE.md</code></li>
<li><strong>config.instructions</strong>: Path/URL specified in the <code>instructions</code> array of <code>opencode.json</code></li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts:117-141
export async function system() {
  const config = await Config.get()
  const paths = await systemPaths()
  const files = Array.from(paths).map(async (p) => {
    const content = await Filesystem.readText(p).catch(() => "")
    return content ? "Instructions from: " + p + "\n" + content : ""
  })
  // URL 기반 instruction도 지원
  const urls: string[] = []
  if (config.instructions) {
    for (const instruction of config.instructions) {
      if (instruction.startsWith("https://") || instruction.startsWith("http://")) {
        urls.push(instruction)
      }
    }
  }
  return Promise.all([...files, ...fetches]).then((result) => result.filter(Boolean))
}
</code></pre>
<p>Each instruction file is added to the system array in the form <code>"Instructions from: " + filepath + "\n" + content</code>. Unlike Codex's <code>&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS></code> XML wrapper method, OpenCode uses plaintext prefixes.</p>
<h3>Automatic resolution of subdirectory instructions (<code>InstructionPrompt.resolve</code>)</h3>
<p>When reading a file, it goes up from the relevant directory to the project root, finds <code>AGENTS.md</code>, and automatically injects it. Files that have already been loaded at the system level or files that have already been loaded in the previous message are skipped to prevent duplication.</p>
<hr>
<h2>opencode.json configuration system</h2>
<h3>Setting priority (low → high)</h3>
<p>Loading order defined by the <code>state()</code> function in <code>config/config.ts</code>:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>order</th>
<th>Source</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>

<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><code>.well-known/opencode</code></td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><code>~/.config/140_opencode/opencode.json{,c}</code></td>
<td>Global User Settings</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><code>OPENCODE_CONFIG</code> environment variable</td>
<td>Custom settings path</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>

<td>Project root settings</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>agents, commands, plugins, opencode.jsonc</td>

<p>Merging is performed with <code>mergeConfigConcatArrays()</code>, and the <code>plugin</code> and <code>instructions</code> arrays are <strong>concat</strong>ed rather than replaced.</p>
<h3>Main configuration fields</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// config/config.ts:1039-1200 (발췌)
export const Info = z.object({
  model: ModelId.optional(),           // "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4"
  small_model: ModelId.optional(),     // 타이틀 생성용 소형 모델
  default_agent: z.string().optional(), // 기본 에이전트 (build, plan 등)
  agent: z.object({...}).catchall(Agent), // 에이전트 설정
  provider: z.record(Provider).optional(), // 프로바이더 커스텀 설정
  mcp: z.record(Mcp).optional(),       // MCP 서버 설정
  instructions: z.array(z.string()).optional(), // 추가 instruction 경로
  permission: Permission.optional(),   // 권한 규칙
  compaction: z.object({
    auto: z.boolean().optional(),
    prune: z.boolean().optional(),
    reserved: z.number().optional(),
  }).optional(),
})
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Provider abstraction system</h2>
<h3>models.dev registry</h3>
<p>OpenCode dynamically loads model metadata from the <code>models.dev</code> external registry:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/models.ts:88-99
export const Data = lazy(async () => {
  const result = await Filesystem.readJson(Flag.OPENCODE_MODELS_PATH ?? filepath).catch(() => {})
  if (result) return result
  const snapshot = await import("./models-snapshot.js")
    .then((m) => m.snapshot)
    .catch(() => undefined)
  if (snapshot) return snapshot
  if (Flag.OPENCODE_DISABLE_MODELS_FETCH) return {}
  const json = await fetch(`${url()}/api.json`).then((x) => x.text())
  return JSON.parse(json)
})
</code></pre>
<p>Fallback order: local cache → bundle snapshot → remote fetch. It automatically refreshes every hour.</p>
<h3>Bundled Provider SDKs (21)</h3>
<p>Providers imported directly from <code>provider/provider.ts</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/provider.ts:112-135
const BUNDLED_PROVIDERS: Record&#x3C;string, (options: any) => SDK> = {
  "@ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock": createAmazonBedrock,
  "@ai-sdk/anthropic": createAnthropic,
  "@ai-sdk/azure": createAzure,
  "@ai-sdk/google": createGoogleGenerativeAI,
  "@ai-sdk/google-vertex": createVertex,
  "@ai-sdk/google-vertex/anthropic": createVertexAnthropic,
  "@ai-sdk/openai": createOpenAI,
  "@ai-sdk/openai-compatible": createOpenAICompatible,
  "@openrouter/ai-sdk-provider": createOpenRouter,
  "@ai-sdk/xai": createXai,
  "@ai-sdk/mistral": createMistral,
  "@ai-sdk/groq": createGroq,
  "@ai-sdk/deepinfra": createDeepInfra,
  "@ai-sdk/cerebras": createCerebras,
  "@ai-sdk/cohere": createCohere,
  "@ai-sdk/gateway": createGateway,
  "@ai-sdk/togetherai": createTogetherAI,
  "@ai-sdk/perplexity": createPerplexity,
  "@ai-sdk/vercel": createVercel,
  "gitlab-ai-provider": createGitLab,
  "@ai-sdk/github-copilot": createGitHubCopilotOpenAICompatible,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Custom loader pattern</h3>
<p>Each provider customizes the SDK initialization logic and model acquisition strategy in <code>CUSTOM_LOADERS</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/provider.ts:152-212 (발췌)
const CUSTOM_LOADERS: Record&#x3C;string, CustomLoader> = {
  async anthropic() {
    return {
      autoload: false,
      options: {
        headers: { "anthropic-beta": "interleaved-thinking-2025-05-14,..." },
      },
    }
  },
  openai: async () => ({
    autoload: false,
    async getModel(sdk, modelID) { return sdk.responses(modelID) },
  }),
  "github-copilot": async () => ({
    autoload: false,
    async getModel(sdk, modelID) {
      if (useLanguageModel(sdk)) return sdk.languageModel(modelID)
      return shouldUseCopilotResponsesApi(modelID) ? sdk.responses(modelID) : sdk.chat(modelID)
    },
  }),
}
</code></pre>
<p>Only providers with <code>autoload: true</code> are activated automatically, and the rest are activated only when authentication information is detected in environment variables or config.</p>
<h3>well-known Provider ID</h3>
<p>Defined as a branded type in <code>provider/schema.ts</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/schema.ts:10-27
export const ProviderID = providerIdSchema.pipe(
  withStatics((schema) => ({
    opencode: schema.makeUnsafe("opencode"),
    anthropic: schema.makeUnsafe("anthropic"),
    openai: schema.makeUnsafe("openai"),
    google: schema.makeUnsafe("google"),
    googleVertex: schema.makeUnsafe("google-vertex"),
    githubCopilot: schema.makeUnsafe("github-copilot"),
    amazonBedrock: schema.makeUnsafe("amazon-bedrock"),
    azure: schema.makeUnsafe("azure"),
    openrouter: schema.makeUnsafe("openrouter"),
    mistral: schema.makeUnsafe("mistral"),
    gitlab: schema.makeUnsafe("gitlab"),
  })),
)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Context window management</h2>
<h3>Overflow detection and automatic compaction</h3>
<p><code>isOverflow()</code> in <code>session/compaction.ts</code> monitors token usage:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:31-49
const COMPACTION_BUFFER = 20_000

export async function isOverflow(input: { tokens: ...; model: Provider.Model }) {
  const config = await Config.get()
  if (config.compaction?.auto === false) return false
  const context = input.model.limit.context
  if (context === 0) return false
  const count = input.tokens.total || input.tokens.input + input.tokens.output + ...
  const reserved = config.compaction?.reserved ?? Math.min(COMPACTION_BUFFER, maxOutputTokens)
  const usable = input.model.limit.input
    ? input.model.limit.input - reserved
    : context - maxOutputTokens
  return count >= usable
}
</code></pre>
<p>When an overflow is detected, <code>SessionCompaction.create()</code> inserts a compaction message, and a separate compaction agent summarizes the conversation.</p>
<h3>pruning strategy</h3>
<p>A pruning mechanism to remove stale tool call results:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:51-54
export const PRUNE_MINIMUM = 20_000   // 최소 pruning 대상 토큰
export const PRUNE_PROTECT = 40_000   // 최근 보호 토큰 범위
const PRUNE_PROTECTED_TOOLS = ["skill"]  // pruning에서 제외되는 tool
</code></pre>
<p>The most recent 40,000 tokens worth of tool calls are preserved, and only the output of previous tool calls is marked compacted and removed. <code>skill</code> tools are always protected.</p>
<h3>compaction prompt</h3>
<p>The default prompt used during compaction follows the Goal / Instructions / Discoveries / Accomplished / Relevant files template:</p>
<pre><code class="language-text">// session/compaction.ts:174-200
Provide a detailed prompt for continuing our conversation above.
Focus on information that would be helpful for continuing the conversation,
including what we did, what we're doing, which files we're working on,
and what we're going to do next.
</code></pre>
<h3>context overflow error pattern matching</h3>
<p>In <code>provider/error.ts</code>, we define 16 provider-specific overflow error patterns:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/error.ts:9-26
const OVERFLOW_PATTERNS = [
  /prompt is too long/i,                    // Anthropic
  /input is too long for requested model/i, // Amazon Bedrock
  /exceeds the context window/i,            // OpenAI
  /input token count.*exceeds the maximum/i, // Google Gemini
  /maximum prompt length is \d+/i,          // xAI Grok
  /reduce the length of the messages/i,     // Groq
  /maximum context length is \d+ tokens/i,  // OpenRouter, DeepSeek
  /exceeds the limit of \d+/i,             // GitHub Copilot
  // ...
]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Message transformation pipeline (<code>ProviderTransform</code>)</h2>
<p>A transformation layer that absorbs provider-specific message format differences:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Provider</th>
<th>Conversion Content</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Anthropic/Bedrock</td>
<td>Empty content filtering, tool call ID normalization (<code>_</code> substitution)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Claude series</td>
<td>Remove non-alphanumeric characters from toolCallId</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Mistral</td>
<td>toolCallId Normalized to 9 alphanumeric characters, insert synthetic assistant between tool→user</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>interleaved reasoning</td>
<td>Move reasoning part to <code>reasoning_content</code>/<code>reasoning_details</code> field</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Caching</td>
<td><code>cacheControl</code>/<code>cachePoint</code> options by Anthropic·OpenRouter·Bedrock·Copilot</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>output token limit</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/transform.ts:21
export const OUTPUT_TOKEN_MAX = Flag.OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_OUTPUT_TOKEN_MAX || 32_000
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Interpretation from fork perspective</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> OpenCode has a single system channel structure, so prompt assembly is simpler than Codex.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Prompt branching for each model (6 types) is a feature not found in Codex and is advantageous for provider optimization.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Claude Code user migration is easy with simultaneous support for <code>AGENTS.md</code> and <code>CLAUDE.md</code></li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Dynamic model loading through the <code>models.dev</code> registry requires no code changes when adding a new model.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The compaction system is integrated into the prompt pipeline, so long-term session management is natural.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Because it is a single system channel, memory exclusion or history separation by instruction type is not currently supported.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Comparison with Codex</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>side</th>
<th>Codex</th>
<th>OpenCode</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>prompt channel</td>
<td>developer / user / plugin 3 channels</td>
<td>system single channel</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>base prompt</td>
<td><code>default.md</code> type 1</td>
<td>6 types of branches by model</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>instruction file</td>
<td><code>AGENTS.md</code> only</td>
<td><code>AGENTS.md</code> + <code>CLAUDE.md</code> + <code>CONTEXT.md</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>instruction wrapper</td>
<td><code>&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS></code> XML</td>
<td><code>"Instructions from: path"</code> prefix</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Provider Support</td>
<td>OpenAI-focused</td>
<td>21+ providers (AI SDK based)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>context overflow</td>
<td>Retry in sandbox</td>
<td>Automatic management of compaction + pruning</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Caching Strategy</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>ephemeral cache breakpoint by provider</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>settings system</td>
<td>CLI option-focused</td>
<td>Step 8 Merge priority config</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>List of core files</h3>

<li><code>140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/session/llm.ts</code> — final assembly of system array, call streamText</li>
<li><code>140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/session/instruction.ts</code> — AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md navigation/loading</li>

<li><code>140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/session/processor.ts</code> — Stream processing, tool call mapping</li>
<li><code>140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts</code> — Provider SDK loading, custom loader</li>

<h2>Change history</h2>
