<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>002_prompt-context/02_oc_prompt.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>프롬프트와 컨텍스트 주입 파이프라인</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — <code>system: string[]</code> assembly + cache breakpoints.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode의 프롬프트 시스템은 Codex의 Rust 단일 바이너리 모놀리스와 근본적으로 다른 구조를 갖는다. TypeScript + Effect-TS 기반이며, <code>models.dev</code> 레지스트리를 통해 21개 이상의 프로바이더를 동적으로 로드하고, 모델 ID 패턴 매칭으로 프로바이더별 시스템 프롬프트를 분기한다. Codex가 developer instructions 채널과 user contextual fragment 채널을 명확히 분리한 것과 달리, OpenCode는 <strong>모든 지시문을 system role 메시지 배열로 합산</strong>한 뒤 LLM에 전달하는 단일 채널 구조를 채택했다.</p>
<p>이 차이의 실질적 결과는 간결함이다. Codex에서 developer bundle, user fragment, plugin hint가 서로 다른 role 메시지로 들어가야 했던 복잡성이, OpenCode에서는 <code>system: string[]</code> 하나로 축약된다. 그 대신 <strong>cache breakpoint 전략</strong>이 중요해진다. <code>ProviderTransform.applyCaching()</code>은 system 메시지 첫 2개와 대화 마지막 2개에 <code>ephemeral</code> 캐시 마커를 붙여서, 프로바이더별 캐싱 API 차이를 흡수한다.</p>
<p>또 하나의 핵심 차이는 <strong>모델별 프롬프트 분기</strong>다. Codex는 하나의 <code>default.md</code>를 모든 모델에 적용하지만, OpenCode는 <code>SystemPrompt.provider()</code>에서 모델 ID 패턴을 검사해 6가지 프롬프트 중 하나를 선택한다. GPT-4/o1/o3 계열은 <code>beast.txt</code>, GPT-5+ 계열은 <code>codex.txt</code>, Gemini는 <code>gemini.txt</code>, Claude는 <code>anthropic.txt</code>, Trinity는 <code>trinity.txt</code>, 그 외는 <code>default.txt</code>가 적용된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["모델별 base prompt&#x3C;br/>(beast/codex/anthropic/gemini/default/trinity)"] --> F["system: string[]"]
    B["environment context&#x3C;br/>(working dir, platform, date)"] --> F
    C["skills 목록&#x3C;br/>(Skill.available → Skill.fmt)"] --> F
    D["AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / instruction files&#x3C;br/>(InstructionPrompt.system)"] --> F
    E["plugin transform hook&#x3C;br/>(experimental.chat.system.transform)"] --> F
    F --> G["LLM.stream() → system role messages"]
    G --> H["ProviderTransform.message()&#x3C;br/>caching · normalization · modality"]
    H --> I["streamText() → AI SDK"]
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant Loop as SessionPrompt.loop
    participant Sys as SystemPrompt
    participant Instr as InstructionPrompt
    participant LLM as LLM.stream
    participant SDK as AI SDK (streamText)

    User->>Loop: prompt(input)
    Loop->>Sys: provider(model) → base prompt 선택
    Loop->>Sys: environment(model) → env 블록
    Loop->>Sys: skills(agent) → 스킬 목록
    Loop->>Instr: system() → AGENTS.md 등
    Loop->>LLM: stream({ system, messages, tools })
    LLM->>LLM: system 배열 조립 (provider + env + skills + instructions + user.system)
    LLM->>LLM: Plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.system.transform")
    LLM->>LLM: system[] → system role ModelMessage[]
    LLM->>SDK: streamText({ model, messages, tools, ... })
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>기술 참조</h2>
<h3>프롬프트 입력 채널</h3>
<p>OpenCode는 Codex와 달리 <strong>단일 system 채널</strong>로 모든 지시문을 합산한다. 구분은 채널이 아니라 <strong>조립 순서</strong>로 결정된다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>순서</th>
<th>소스</th>
<th>함수 / 파일</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>모델별 base prompt</td>
<td><code>SystemPrompt.provider()</code> → <code>session/prompt/*.txt</code></td>
<td>모델 패턴 매칭으로 6종 중 선택</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>environment context</td>
<td><code>SystemPrompt.environment()</code></td>
<td>working dir, platform, date, model ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>skills 목록</td>
<td><code>SystemPrompt.skills()</code> → <code>Skill.fmt()</code></td>
<td>에이전트에 허용된 스킬을 verbose로 포맷</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>AGENTS.md / instruction files</td>
<td><code>InstructionPrompt.system()</code></td>
<td>글로벌·프로젝트·config 지정 파일</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>structured output prompt</td>
<td>조건부 (<code>json_schema</code> 모드)</td>
<td><code>STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SYSTEM_PROMPT</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>agent custom prompt</td>
<td><code>agent.prompt</code> (config에서 설정)</td>
<td>agent별 프롬프트 오버라이드</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>user-level system prompt</td>
<td><code>input.user.system</code></td>
<td>사용자가 세션에 직접 넣은 system 텍스트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>plugin transform</td>
<td><code>Plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.system.transform")</code></td>
<td>외부 플러그인이 system 배열을 변경</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>system 배열 최종 조립 (<code>LLM.stream</code>)</h3>
<p><code>session/llm.ts</code>의 <code>stream()</code> 함수가 최종 system 배열을 만든다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/llm.ts:70-82
const system: string[] = []
system.push(
  [
    // use agent prompt otherwise provider prompt
    ...(input.agent.prompt ? [input.agent.prompt] : SystemPrompt.provider(input.model)),
    // any custom prompt passed into this call
    ...input.system,
    // any custom prompt from last user message
    ...(input.user.system ? [input.user.system] : []),
  ]
    .filter((x) => x)
    .join("\n"),
)
</code></pre>
<p>이 배열은 plugin hook을 거친 뒤, <strong>2-part 구조로 재조립</strong>된다. 첫 번째 part(header)가 변경되지 않았으면 나머지를 하나로 합쳐서 캐싱 효율을 높인다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/llm.ts:90-95
if (system.length > 2 &#x26;&#x26; system[0] === header) {
  const rest = system.slice(1)
  system.length = 0
  system.push(header, rest.join("\n"))
}
</code></pre>
<p>최종적으로 system 배열의 각 요소는 <code>{ role: "system", content: x }</code> ModelMessage로 변환되어 대화 messages 앞에 붙는다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/llm.ts:121-129
const messages = isOpenaiOauth
  ? input.messages
  : [
      ...system.map((x): ModelMessage => ({ role: "system", content: x })),
      ...input.messages,
    ]
</code></pre>
<h3>모델별 base prompt 분기</h3>
<p><code>session/system.ts</code>의 <code>provider()</code> 함수가 모델 ID 문자열을 검사해 프롬프트를 선택한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts:18-26
export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt-4") || model.api.id.includes("o1") || model.api.id.includes("o3"))
    return [PROMPT_BEAST]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
  if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
  if (model.api.id.toLowerCase().includes("trinity")) return [PROMPT_TRINITY]
  return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>프롬프트 파일</th>
<th>대상 모델</th>
<th>줄 수</th>
<th>핵심 특징</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>beast.txt</code></td>
<td>GPT-4, o1, o3</td>
<td>147</td>
<td>"please keep going until the user's query is completely resolved", 자율 에이전트 강조, webfetch 연구 루프</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>codex.txt</code></td>
<td>GPT-5+ 계열</td>
<td>79</td>
<td>"OpenCode, the best coding agent on the planet", 프론트엔드 디자인 가이드, 최종 답변 포맷 규칙</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>anthropic.txt</code></td>
<td>Claude 계열</td>
<td>105</td>
<td>professional objectivity, TodoWrite 관리, 전문적 코드 수정 워크플로우</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>gemini.txt</code></td>
<td>Gemini 계열</td>
<td>155</td>
<td>상세한 conventions·idiomatic changes 규칙, security/safety rules 강조</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>default.txt</code></td>
<td>기타 모든 모델</td>
<td>105</td>
<td>공통 base, 간결한 CLI 출력 규칙, URL 생성 금지</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>trinity.txt</code></td>
<td>Trinity 모델</td>
<td>97</td>
<td>default와 유사하나 별도 분기</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>base prompt 공통 특성 (anthropic.txt에서 발췌)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-text">// session/prompt/anthropic.txt:1-2
You are OpenCode, the best coding agent on the planet.

You are an interactive CLI tool that helps users with software engineering tasks.
Use the instructions below and the tools available to you to assist the user.
</code></pre>
<p>모든 프롬프트에서 반복되는 핵심 규칙:</p>
<ul>
<li>URL 생성 금지 (프로그래밍 관련만 허용)</li>
<li>CLI 출력 간결성 (4줄 이내)</li>
<li>이모지 사용 금지 (사용자 요청시만)</li>
<li>tool을 통한 작업 수행, 텍스트는 커뮤니케이션 전용</li>
</ul>
<h3>environment context 블록</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts:28-51
export async function environment(model: Provider.Model) {
  return [
    [
      `You are powered by the model named ${model.api.id}.`,
      `&#x3C;env>`,
      `  Working directory: ${Instance.directory}`,
      `  Workspace root folder: ${Instance.worktree}`,
      `  Is directory a git repo: ${project.vcs === "git" ? "yes" : "no"}`,
      `  Platform: ${process.platform}`,
      `  Today's date: ${new Date().toDateString()}`,
      `&#x3C;/env>`,
    ].join("\n"),
  ]
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>&#x3C;env></code> XML 태그로 감싼 환경 정보를 주입한다. Codex의 <code>&#x3C;environment_context></code> wrapper와 유사한 역할이지만 더 간결하다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>AGENTS.md와 instruction 파일 로딩</h2>
<h3>탐색 대상 파일</h3>
<p><code>session/instruction.ts</code>에서 instruction 파일의 탐색 규칙을 정의한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts:14-18
const FILES = [
  "AGENTS.md",
  "CLAUDE.md",
  "CONTEXT.md", // deprecated
]
</code></pre>
<p>OpenCode는 Claude Code와의 호환성을 위해 <code>CLAUDE.md</code>도 인식한다.</p>
<h3>글로벌 instruction 파일 경로</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts:20-29
function globalFiles() {
  const files = []
  if (Flag.OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR) {
    files.push(path.join(Flag.OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR, "AGENTS.md"))
  }
  files.push(path.join(Global.Path.config, "AGENTS.md"))
  if (!Flag.OPENCODE_DISABLE_CLAUDE_CODE_PROMPT) {
    files.push(path.join(os.homedir(), ".claude", "CLAUDE.md"))
  }
  return files
}
</code></pre>
<h3>instruction 파일 탐색 순서 (<code>InstructionPrompt.system()</code>)</h3>
<ol>
<li><strong>프로젝트 디렉토리 상향 탐색</strong>: <code>AGENTS.md</code> → <code>CLAUDE.md</code> → <code>CONTEXT.md</code> 순서로 <code>Instance.directory</code>부터 <code>Instance.worktree</code>까지 <code>findUp</code></li>
<li><strong>글로벌 파일</strong>: <code>OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR/AGENTS.md</code> → <code>~/.config/140_opencode/AGENTS.md</code> → <code>~/.claude/CLAUDE.md</code></li>
<li><strong>config.instructions</strong>: <code>opencode.json</code>의 <code>instructions</code> 배열에 지정된 경로/URL</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts:117-141
export async function system() {
  const config = await Config.get()
  const paths = await systemPaths()
  const files = Array.from(paths).map(async (p) => {
    const content = await Filesystem.readText(p).catch(() => "")
    return content ? "Instructions from: " + p + "\n" + content : ""
  })
  // URL 기반 instruction도 지원
  const urls: string[] = []
  if (config.instructions) {
    for (const instruction of config.instructions) {
      if (instruction.startsWith("https://") || instruction.startsWith("http://")) {
        urls.push(instruction)
      }
    }
  }
  return Promise.all([...files, ...fetches]).then((result) => result.filter(Boolean))
}
</code></pre>
<p>각 instruction 파일은 <code>"Instructions from: " + filepath + "\n" + content</code> 형태로 system 배열에 추가된다. Codex의 <code>&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS></code> XML wrapper 방식과 달리, OpenCode는 평문 prefix를 사용한다.</p>
<h3>하위 디렉토리 instruction 자동 해결 (<code>InstructionPrompt.resolve</code>)</h3>
<p>파일을 읽을 때 해당 디렉토리부터 프로젝트 루트까지 올라가면서 <code>AGENTS.md</code>를 찾아 자동으로 주입한다. 이미 system 레벨에서 로드된 파일이나, 이전 메시지에서 이미 로드된 파일은 중복 방지를 위해 건너뛴다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>opencode.json 설정 시스템</h2>
<h3>설정 우선순위 (낮음 → 높음)</h3>
<p><code>config/config.ts</code>의 <code>state()</code> 함수가 정의한 로딩 순서:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>순서</th>
<th>소스</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><code>.well-known/opencode</code></td>
<td>원격 조직 기본 설정</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><code>~/.config/140_opencode/opencode.json{,c}</code></td>
<td>글로벌 사용자 설정</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><code>OPENCODE_CONFIG</code> 환경변수</td>
<td>커스텀 설정 경로</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>프로젝트 <code>opencode.json{,c}</code></td>
<td>프로젝트 루트 설정</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><code>.opencode/</code> 디렉토리</td>
<td>agents, commands, plugins, opencode.jsonc</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><code>OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT</code></td>
<td>인라인 설정 내용</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>원격 계정 설정</td>
<td>Account API 기반</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>managed config dir</td>
<td>엔터프라이즈 관리 설정 (최고 우선순위)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>병합은 <code>mergeConfigConcatArrays()</code>로 수행되며, <code>plugin</code>과 <code>instructions</code> 배열은 교체가 아닌 <strong>연결(concat)</strong> 방식이다.</p>
<h3>주요 설정 필드</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// config/config.ts:1039-1200 (발췌)
export const Info = z.object({
  model: ModelId.optional(),           // "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4"
  small_model: ModelId.optional(),     // 타이틀 생성용 소형 모델
  default_agent: z.string().optional(), // 기본 에이전트 (build, plan 등)
  agent: z.object({...}).catchall(Agent), // 에이전트 설정
  provider: z.record(Provider).optional(), // 프로바이더 커스텀 설정
  mcp: z.record(Mcp).optional(),       // MCP 서버 설정
  instructions: z.array(z.string()).optional(), // 추가 instruction 경로
  permission: Permission.optional(),   // 권한 규칙
  compaction: z.object({
    auto: z.boolean().optional(),
    prune: z.boolean().optional(),
    reserved: z.number().optional(),
  }).optional(),
})
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Provider 추상화 시스템</h2>
<h3>models.dev 레지스트리</h3>
<p>OpenCode는 모델 메타데이터를 <code>models.dev</code> 외부 레지스트리에서 동적으로 로드한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/models.ts:88-99
export const Data = lazy(async () => {
  const result = await Filesystem.readJson(Flag.OPENCODE_MODELS_PATH ?? filepath).catch(() => {})
  if (result) return result
  const snapshot = await import("./models-snapshot.js")
    .then((m) => m.snapshot)
    .catch(() => undefined)
  if (snapshot) return snapshot
  if (Flag.OPENCODE_DISABLE_MODELS_FETCH) return {}
  const json = await fetch(`${url()}/api.json`).then((x) => x.text())
  return JSON.parse(json)
})
</code></pre>
<p>폴백 순서: 로컬 캐시 → 번들 스냅샷 → 원격 fetch. 1시간마다 자동 새로고침된다.</p>
<h3>번들된 프로바이더 SDK (21개)</h3>
<p><code>provider/provider.ts</code>에서 직접 임포트하는 프로바이더:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/provider.ts:112-135
const BUNDLED_PROVIDERS: Record&#x3C;string, (options: any) => SDK> = {
  "@ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock": createAmazonBedrock,
  "@ai-sdk/anthropic": createAnthropic,
  "@ai-sdk/azure": createAzure,
  "@ai-sdk/google": createGoogleGenerativeAI,
  "@ai-sdk/google-vertex": createVertex,
  "@ai-sdk/google-vertex/anthropic": createVertexAnthropic,
  "@ai-sdk/openai": createOpenAI,
  "@ai-sdk/openai-compatible": createOpenAICompatible,
  "@openrouter/ai-sdk-provider": createOpenRouter,
  "@ai-sdk/xai": createXai,
  "@ai-sdk/mistral": createMistral,
  "@ai-sdk/groq": createGroq,
  "@ai-sdk/deepinfra": createDeepInfra,
  "@ai-sdk/cerebras": createCerebras,
  "@ai-sdk/cohere": createCohere,
  "@ai-sdk/gateway": createGateway,
  "@ai-sdk/togetherai": createTogetherAI,
  "@ai-sdk/perplexity": createPerplexity,
  "@ai-sdk/vercel": createVercel,
  "gitlab-ai-provider": createGitLab,
  "@ai-sdk/github-copilot": createGitHubCopilotOpenAICompatible,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>커스텀 로더 패턴</h3>
<p>각 프로바이더는 <code>CUSTOM_LOADERS</code>에서 SDK 초기화 로직과 모델 획득 전략을 커스터마이징한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/provider.ts:152-212 (발췌)
const CUSTOM_LOADERS: Record&#x3C;string, CustomLoader> = {
  async anthropic() {
    return {
      autoload: false,
      options: {
        headers: { "anthropic-beta": "interleaved-thinking-2025-05-14,..." },
      },
    }
  },
  openai: async () => ({
    autoload: false,
    async getModel(sdk, modelID) { return sdk.responses(modelID) },
  }),
  "github-copilot": async () => ({
    autoload: false,
    async getModel(sdk, modelID) {
      if (useLanguageModel(sdk)) return sdk.languageModel(modelID)
      return shouldUseCopilotResponsesApi(modelID) ? sdk.responses(modelID) : sdk.chat(modelID)
    },
  }),
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>autoload: true</code>인 프로바이더만 자동으로 활성화되고, 나머지는 환경변수나 config에서 인증 정보가 감지될 때만 활성화된다.</p>
<h3>well-known Provider ID</h3>
<p><code>provider/schema.ts</code>에서 브랜디드 타입으로 정의:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/schema.ts:10-27
export const ProviderID = providerIdSchema.pipe(
  withStatics((schema) => ({
    opencode: schema.makeUnsafe("opencode"),
    anthropic: schema.makeUnsafe("anthropic"),
    openai: schema.makeUnsafe("openai"),
    google: schema.makeUnsafe("google"),
    googleVertex: schema.makeUnsafe("google-vertex"),
    githubCopilot: schema.makeUnsafe("github-copilot"),
    amazonBedrock: schema.makeUnsafe("amazon-bedrock"),
    azure: schema.makeUnsafe("azure"),
    openrouter: schema.makeUnsafe("openrouter"),
    mistral: schema.makeUnsafe("mistral"),
    gitlab: schema.makeUnsafe("gitlab"),
  })),
)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>컨텍스트 윈도우 관리</h2>
<h3>overflow 감지와 자동 compaction</h3>
<p><code>session/compaction.ts</code>의 <code>isOverflow()</code>가 토큰 사용량을 모니터링한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:31-49
const COMPACTION_BUFFER = 20_000

export async function isOverflow(input: { tokens: ...; model: Provider.Model }) {
  const config = await Config.get()
  if (config.compaction?.auto === false) return false
  const context = input.model.limit.context
  if (context === 0) return false
  const count = input.tokens.total || input.tokens.input + input.tokens.output + ...
  const reserved = config.compaction?.reserved ?? Math.min(COMPACTION_BUFFER, maxOutputTokens)
  const usable = input.model.limit.input
    ? input.model.limit.input - reserved
    : context - maxOutputTokens
  return count >= usable
}
</code></pre>
<p>overflow가 감지되면 <code>SessionCompaction.create()</code>가 compaction 메시지를 삽입하고, 별도 compaction 에이전트가 대화를 요약한다.</p>
<h3>pruning 전략</h3>
<p>오래된 tool call 결과를 제거하는 pruning 메커니즘:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:51-54
export const PRUNE_MINIMUM = 20_000   // 최소 pruning 대상 토큰
export const PRUNE_PROTECT = 40_000   // 최근 보호 토큰 범위
const PRUNE_PROTECTED_TOOLS = ["skill"]  // pruning에서 제외되는 tool
</code></pre>
<p>최근 40,000 토큰 분량의 tool call은 보존하고, 그 이전 tool call의 output만 compacted 마킹하여 제거한다. <code>skill</code> tool은 항상 보호된다.</p>
<h3>compaction prompt</h3>
<p>compaction 시 사용하는 기본 프롬프트는 Goal / Instructions / Discoveries / Accomplished / Relevant files 템플릿을 따른다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-text">// session/compaction.ts:174-200
Provide a detailed prompt for continuing our conversation above.
Focus on information that would be helpful for continuing the conversation,
including what we did, what we're doing, which files we're working on,
and what we're going to do next.
</code></pre>
<h3>context overflow 에러 패턴 매칭</h3>
<p><code>provider/error.ts</code>에서 16개의 프로바이더별 overflow 에러 패턴을 정의한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider/error.ts:9-26
const OVERFLOW_PATTERNS = [
  /prompt is too long/i,                    // Anthropic
  /input is too long for requested model/i, // Amazon Bedrock
  /exceeds the context window/i,            // OpenAI
  /input token count.*exceeds the maximum/i, // Google Gemini
  /maximum prompt length is \d+/i,          // xAI Grok
  /reduce the length of the messages/i,     // Groq
  /maximum context length is \d+ tokens/i,  // OpenRouter, DeepSeek
  /exceeds the limit of \d+/i,             // GitHub Copilot
  // ...
]
</code></pre>

<h2>포크 관점의 해석</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> OpenCode는 단일 system 채널 구조여서, Codex보다 프롬프트 조립이 단순하다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 모델별 프롬프트 분기(6종)는 Codex에 없는 기능으로, 프로바이더 최적화에 유리하다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>AGENTS.md</code>와 <code>CLAUDE.md</code> 동시 지원으로 Claude Code 사용자 마이그레이션이 쉽다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>models.dev</code> 레지스트리를 통한 동적 모델 로딩은 새 모델 추가 시 코드 변경이 불필요하다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> compaction 시스템이 프롬프트 파이프라인에 통합되어 있어 장기 세션 관리가 자연스럽다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 단일 system 채널이므로, instruction 종류별 memory exclusion이나 history 분리는 현재 지원되지 않는다</li>
</ul>

1e:["$","$L2f","20-axis-02-prompt",{"id":"20-axis-02-prompt","order":26,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 02: Prompt & context","description":"002_prompt-context/02_oc_prompt.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$49"}}]}]
4a:T18fe5,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 03: Tool runtime</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — tool registry + MCP tool merge.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OpenCode의 툴 시스템은 Effect-TS 서비스 계층 위에 구축된 정적 레지스트리 + 동적 확장 구조다. Codex-RS가 Rust enum 기반 <code>ToolRouter → ToolRegistry → ToolCallRuntime</code> 삼단 파이프라인을 쓴 것과 달리, OpenCode는 TypeScript의 <code>Tool.define()</code> 팩토리와 Effect <code>ServiceMap</code> 패턴으로 동일한 문제를 해결한다.</li>
<li>핵심 차이점은 세 가지다. 첫째, 모든 도구가 <code>ctx.ask()</code> 를 직접 호출하여 권한을 요청하므로 실행 루프가 아닌 도구 자체에 권한 판정 책임이 있다. 둘째, <code>Truncate</code> 서비스가 모든 도구 출력에 자동 적용되어 LLM 컨텍스트 폭발을 방지한다. 셋째, 플러그인 훅(<code>tool.definition</code>, <code>tool.execute.before</code>, <code>tool.execute.after</code>)이 실행 경로 전체에 걸쳐 있어 외부</li>
<li>모든 빌트인 도구는 <code>Tool.define(id, init)</code> 팩토리를 통해 생성된다. 이 함수는 <code>Tool.Info</code> 인터페이스를 구현하는 객체를 반환하며, 내부적으로 두 가지 래핑을 수행한다.</li>
<li>// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts</li>

<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
export function define&#x3C;Parameters extends z.ZodType, Result extends Metadata>(
  id: string,
  init: Info&#x3C;Parameters, Result>["init"] | Awaited&#x3C;ReturnType&#x3C;Info&#x3C;Parameters, Result>["init"]>>,
): Info&#x3C;Parameters, Result> {
  return {
    id,
    init: async (initCtx) => {
      const toolInfo = init instanceof Function ? await init(initCtx) : init
      const execute = toolInfo.execute
      toolInfo.execute = async (args, ctx) => {
        try {
          toolInfo.parameters.parse(args)           // ① Zod 검증
        } catch (error) {
          if (error instanceof z.ZodError &#x26;&#x26; toolInfo.formatValidationError) {
            throw new Error(toolInfo.formatValidationError(error), { cause: error })
          }
          throw new Error(
            `The ${id} tool was called with invalid arguments: ${error}.`,
            { cause: error },
          )
        }
        const result = await execute(args, ctx)      // ② 원본 실행
        if (result.metadata.truncated !== undefined) return result
        const truncated = await Truncate.output(result.output, {}, initCtx?.agent)
        return { ...result, output: truncated.content, metadata: { ...result.metadata, truncated: truncated.truncated } }
        // ③ 자동 truncation
      }
      return toolInfo
    },
  }
}
</code></pre>

export type Context&#x3C;M extends Metadata = Metadata> = {
  sessionID: SessionID
  messageID: MessageID
  agent: string
  abort: AbortSignal
  callID?: string
  extra?: { [key: string]: any }
  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]
  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: M }): void    // UI 상태 업데이트
  ask(input: Omit&#x3C;Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Promise&#x3C;void>  // 권한 요청
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts (tools 메서드 내부)
.filter((tool) => {
  // 1. websearch/codesearch는 zen 사용자 또는 enable 플래그에만 제공
  if (tool.id === "codesearch" || tool.id === "websearch") {
    return model.providerID === ProviderID.opencode || Flag.OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXA
  }
  // 2. GPT 모델에서만 apply_patch 사용, 나머지는 edit/write 사용
  const usePatch = model.modelID.includes("gpt-") &#x26;&#x26; !model.modelID.includes("oss") &#x26;&#x26; !model.modelID.includes("gpt-4")
  if (tool.id === "apply_patch") return usePatch
  if (tool.id === "edit" || tool.id === "write") return !usePatch
  return true
})

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant LLM as LLM 모델
    participant Prompt as SessionPrompt
    participant Registry as ToolRegistry
    participant Tool as Tool.execute()
    participant Perm as Permission
    participant Plugin as Plugin hooks

    LLM->>Prompt: tool_call (id, args)
    Prompt->>Registry: tools(model, agent)
    Registry-->>Prompt: InitializedTool[]
    Prompt->>Plugin: tool.execute.before
    Prompt->>Tool: execute(args, ctx)
    Tool->>Tool: Zod 파라미터 검증
    Tool->>Perm: ctx.ask({ permission, patterns })
    Perm-->>Perm: evaluate(rules) → allow/deny/ask
    alt deny
        Perm-->>Tool: DeniedError
    else ask
        Perm-->>LLM: UI에 승인 요청 표시
        Note over Perm: Deferred.await() — 사용자 응답 대기
    else allow
        Perm-->>Tool: 통과
    end
    Tool->>Tool: 실제 로직 실행
    Tool->>Tool: Truncate.output() 자동 적용
    Tool-->>Prompt: { title, output, metadata, attachments? }
    Prompt->>Plugin: tool.execute.after
    Prompt-->>LLM: tool result
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/session/prompt.ts
for (const item of await ToolRegistry.tools(
  { modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id), providerID: input.model.providerID },
  input.agent,
)) {
  const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, z.toJSONSchema(item.parameters))
  tools[item.id] = tool({
    id: item.id,
    description: item.description,
    inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),
    async execute(args, options) {
      // ... ctx 구성, Plugin 훅, 실행 ...
    },
  })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/session/prompt.ts
async ask(req) {
  await Permission.ask({
    ...req,
    sessionID: input.session.id,
    tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },
    ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),
  })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission) &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}
</code></pre>

    A["bash command 입력"] --> B["tree-sitter 파싱"]
    B --> C{"외부 디렉터리 접근?"}
    C -->|Yes| D["permission: external_directory"]
    C -->|No| E{"명령 실행?"}
    B --> E
    E -->|Yes| F["permission: bash"]
    D --> G["spawn(command, shell)"]
    F --> G
    G --> H["stdout/stderr 스트리밍"]
    H --> I["ctx.metadata() 실시간 업데이트"]
    I --> J["timeout/abort 처리"]
    J --> K["결과 반환"]
</code></pre>

  // FileTime.assert()로 외부 수정 감지
  // 문자열 치환 수행

  // 파일 쓰기 → LSP 진단 수집

  parentID: ctx.sessionID,

    { permission: "todowrite", pattern: "*", action: "deny" },

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:12-17
export type Stamp = {
  readonly read: Date      // 마지막으로 읽은 시각
  readonly mtime: number | undefined  // 파일 수정 시각 (stat.mtime)
  readonly ctime: number | undefined  // 파일 변경 시각 (stat.ctime)
  readonly size: number | undefined   // 파일 크기
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:39-42
interface State {
  reads: Map&#x3C;SessionID, Map&#x3C;string, Stamp>>  // 세션 → 파일 → 스탬프
  locks: Map&#x3C;string, Semaphore.Semaphore>    // 파일 → 세마포어 (1-permit)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:87-101 — 3중 프로퍼티 비교
const assert = Effect.fn("FileTime.assert")(function* (sessionID, filepath) {
  if (disableCheck) return  // OPENCODE_DISABLE_FILETIME_CHECK 플래그

  const time = reads.get(sessionID)?.get(filepath)
  if (!time) throw new Error(`You must read file ${filepath} before overwriting it.`)

  const next = yield* stamp(filepath)  // 현재 파일 상태 조회
  const changed = next.mtime !== time.mtime    // 수정 시각 비교
                || next.ctime !== time.ctime   // 변경 시각 비교
                || next.size !== time.size     // 크기 비교
  if (!changed) return

  throw new Error(
    `File ${filepath} has been modified since it was last read.\n` +
    `Last modification: ${new Date(next.mtime ?? next.read.getTime()).toISOString()}\n` +
    `Last read: ${time.read.toISOString()}\n\n` +
    `Please read the file again before modifying it.`
  )
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:103-105
const withLock = Effect.fn("FileTime.withLock")(function* &#x3C;T>(filepath: string, fn: () => Promise&#x3C;T>) {
  return yield* Effect.promise(fn).pipe((yield* getLock(filepath)).withPermits(1))
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/edit.ts — FileTime 사용 패턴
await FileTime.withLock(filePath, async () => {
  // 1. 파일 읽기 (FileTime 등록)
  const content = await read(filePath)
  await FileTime.read(ctx.sessionID, filePath)
  
  // 2. 편집 전 충돌 검증
  await FileTime.assert(ctx.sessionID, filePath)
  
  // 3. 파일 쓰기
  await write(filePath, modified)
  
  // 4. 쓰기 후 읽기 기록 갱신
  await FileTime.read(ctx.sessionID, filePath)
})
</code></pre>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Tool registry and execution pipeline</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — tool registry + MCP tool merge.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode's tool system is a static registry + dynamic expansion structure built on top of the Effect-TS service layer. Unlike Codex-RS, which uses a Rust enum-based <code>ToolRouter → ToolRegistry → ToolCallRuntime</code> three-stage pipeline, OpenCode solves the same problem with TypeScript's <code>Tool.define()</code> factory and Effect <code>ServiceMap</code> pattern.</p>
<p>There are three key differences: First, all tools request permission by directly calling <code>ctx.ask()</code>, so the tool itself, not the execution loop, is responsible for determining permission. Second, the <code>Truncate</code> service is automatically applied to all tool output, preventing LLM context explosions. Third, plug-in hooks (<code>tool.definition</code>, <code>tool.execute.before</code>, <code>tool.execute.after</code>) span the entire execution path, allowing external expansion.</p>
<h2>Tool definition layer: <code>Tool.define()</code></h2>
<p>All built-in tools are created through the <code>Tool.define(id, init)</code> factory. This function returns an object that implements the <code>Tool.Info</code> interface and performs two wraps internally.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
export function define&#x3C;Parameters extends z.ZodType, Result extends Metadata>(
  id: string,
  init: Info&#x3C;Parameters, Result>["init"] | Awaited&#x3C;ReturnType&#x3C;Info&#x3C;Parameters, Result>["init"]>>,
): Info&#x3C;Parameters, Result> {
  return {
    id,
    init: async (initCtx) => {
      const toolInfo = init instanceof Function ? await init(initCtx) : init
      const execute = toolInfo.execute
      toolInfo.execute = async (args, ctx) => {
        try {
          toolInfo.parameters.parse(args)           // ① Zod 검증
        } catch (error) {
          if (error instanceof z.ZodError &#x26;&#x26; toolInfo.formatValidationError) {
            throw new Error(toolInfo.formatValidationError(error), { cause: error })
          }
          throw new Error(
            `The ${id} tool was called with invalid arguments: ${error}.`,
            { cause: error },
          )
        }
        const result = await execute(args, ctx)      // ② 원본 실행
        if (result.metadata.truncated !== undefined) return result
        const truncated = await Truncate.output(result.output, {}, initCtx?.agent)
        return { ...result, output: truncated.content, metadata: { ...result.metadata, truncated: truncated.truncated } }
        // ③ 자동 truncation
      }
      return toolInfo
    },
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>The wrapping performed by <code>define()</code>:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Zod parameter verification</strong> — Verifies input with <code>parameters.parse(args)</code> before every tool call. In case of failure, an error message is thrown to the model prompting re-entry.</li>
<li><strong>Automatic Output Truncation</strong> — If <code>metadata.truncated</code> of the result is not already set, a 2000 line / 50KB limit is applied via <code>Truncate.output()</code>. When exceeded, the entire output is saved to a file and the reference path is returned.</li>
</ol>
<p>The <code>init()</code> method of the <code>Tool.Info</code> interface supports dynamic initialization. For example, <code>BashTool</code> detects available shells, <code>TaskTool</code> queries a list of agents, and <code>SkillTool</code> loads a catalog of available skills. This lazy initialization is the core reason for the <code>init: (ctx?: InitContext) => Promise&#x3C;...></code> signature.</p>
<h3><code>Tool.Context</code> — Execution context</h3>
<p>All tools' <code>execute()</code> function takes <code>Tool.Context</code> as a second argument:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
export type Context&#x3C;M extends Metadata = Metadata> = {
  sessionID: SessionID
  messageID: MessageID
  agent: string
  abort: AbortSignal
  callID?: string
  extra?: { [key: string]: any }
  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]
  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: M }): void    // UI 상태 업데이트
  ask(input: Omit&#x3C;Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Promise&#x3C;void>  // 권한 요청
}
</code></pre>
<p>The <code>metadata()</code> callback is used by Bash tools to reflect streaming output to the UI in real time. <code>ask()</code> delegates a request to the Permission service, and if rejected, throws <code>RejectedError</code> and stops tool execution.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Tool Registry: Effect Service</h2>
<p><code>ToolRegistry</code> is implemented with the <code>ServiceMap.Service</code> pattern of Effect-TS. This is not a simple Map, but a service layer that includes instance state management and plugin integration.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts
export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/ToolRegistry") {}
</code></pre>
<p>Three public methods in the registry:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>method</th>
<th>Role</th>
<th>return</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>register(tool)</code></td>
<td>Registering custom tools at runtime</td>
<td><code>Effect&#x3C;void></code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ids()</code></td>
<td>Full list of tool IDs</td>
<td><code>Effect&#x3C;string[]></code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tools(model, agent?)</code></td>
<td>Return a set of tools suitable for the model/agent</td>
<td><code>Effect&#x3C;InitializedTool[]></code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Model-based tool filtering</h3>
<p>The <code>tools()</code> method filters tools based on their model ID. This filtering includes three core rules:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts (tools 메서드 내부)
.filter((tool) => {
  // 1. websearch/codesearch는 zen 사용자 또는 enable 플래그에만 제공
  if (tool.id === "codesearch" || tool.id === "websearch") {
    return model.providerID === ProviderID.opencode || Flag.OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXA
  }
  // 2. GPT 모델에서만 apply_patch 사용, 나머지는 edit/write 사용
  const usePatch = model.modelID.includes("gpt-") &#x26;&#x26; !model.modelID.includes("oss") &#x26;&#x26; !model.modelID.includes("gpt-4")
  if (tool.id === "apply_patch") return usePatch
  if (tool.id === "edit" || tool.id === "write") return !usePatch
  return true
})
</code></pre>
<p>This design is based on the experimental judgment that GPT series models are better suited to the <code>apply_patch</code> format, and other models are better suited to the <code>edit</code> + <code>write</code> combination.</p>
<h3>Loading custom tools</h3>
<p>When initializing the registry, custom tools are loaded through two paths:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>File-based</strong> — Dynamically import modules by scanning the project configuration directory for the pattern <code>{tool,tools}/*.{js,ts}</code>.</li>
<li><strong>Plugin-based</strong> — Extract <code>ToolDefinition</code> from the <code>tool</code> property of the plug-in registered with <code>Plugin.list()</code>.</li>
</ol>
<p>In both cases, it is converted to <code>Tool.Info</code> through the <code>fromPlugin()</code> helper, and Truncate wrapping is applied separately.</p>
<hr>

<hr>
<h2>Execution pipeline</h2>
<p>Tool execution follows the path <code>SessionPrompt.resolveTools()</code> → AI SDK → individual tool <code>execute()</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant LLM as LLM 모델
    participant Prompt as SessionPrompt
    participant Registry as ToolRegistry
    participant Tool as Tool.execute()
    participant Perm as Permission
    participant Plugin as Plugin hooks

    LLM->>Prompt: tool_call (id, args)
    Prompt->>Registry: tools(model, agent)
    Registry-->>Prompt: InitializedTool[]
    Prompt->>Plugin: tool.execute.before
    Prompt->>Tool: execute(args, ctx)
    Tool->>Tool: Zod 파라미터 검증
    Tool->>Perm: ctx.ask({ permission, patterns })
    Perm-->>Perm: evaluate(rules) → allow/deny/ask
    alt deny
        Perm-->>Tool: DeniedError
    else ask
        Perm-->>LLM: UI에 승인 요청 표시
        Note over Perm: Deferred.await() — 사용자 응답 대기
    else allow
        Perm-->>Tool: 통과
    end
    Tool->>Tool: 실제 로직 실행
    Tool->>Tool: Truncate.output() 자동 적용
    Tool-->>Prompt: { title, output, metadata, attachments? }
    Prompt->>Plugin: tool.execute.after
    Prompt-->>LLM: tool result
</code></pre>
<h3>Step-by-step details</h3>
<p><strong>Step 1: Tool Interpretation (SessionPrompt)</strong></p>
<p><code>resolveTools()</code> calls <code>ToolRegistry.tools(model, agent)</code> to retrieve a list of tools matching the current model and agent. Each tool is initialized with <code>init()</code>, converted to JSON Schema, and wrapped in the <code>tool()</code> function of the AI ​​SDK.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/session/prompt.ts
for (const item of await ToolRegistry.tools(
  { modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id), providerID: input.model.providerID },
  input.agent,
)) {
  const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, z.toJSONSchema(item.parameters))
  tools[item.id] = tool({
    id: item.id,
    description: item.description,
    inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),
    async execute(args, options) {
      // ... ctx 구성, Plugin 훅, 실행 ...
    },
  })
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Step 2: Configure Context</strong></p>
<p><code>Tool.Context</code> is created in the <code>context()</code> closure inside <code>resolveTools()</code>. The <code>ask()</code> callback is connected to the session's Permission service, and agent permission rules and session permission rules are combined with <code>Permission.merge()</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/session/prompt.ts
async ask(req) {
  await Permission.ask({
    ...req,
    sessionID: input.session.id,
    tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },
    ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),
  })
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Step 3: Assess permissions</strong></p>
<p><code>Permission.ask()</code> calls <code>evaluate(permission, pattern, ...rulesets)</code> for each pattern. This function searches the rules array in reverse order and applies the last matching rule (last-match-wins):</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission) &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}
</code></pre>
<p>If the result is <code>ask</code>, <code>Deferred</code> is created and the user response is waited for in the UI. <code>once</code> adds only that call, <code>always</code> adds the pattern to the permanent permission list.</p>
<p><strong>Step 4: Run and return results</strong></p>
<p>The result of the tool's <code>execute()</code> is <code>{ title, output, metadata, attachments? It is returned in the form }</code>. The wrapper of <code>Tool.define()</code> automatically applies <code>Truncate.output()</code>, and <code>SessionPrompt</code> calls <code>Plugin.trigger("tool.execute.after")</code> and then delivers the result to the model.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Main tool implementation details</h2>
<h3>Bash tools — command parsing and permissions</h3>
<p>Bash tools have the most complex permission flow. The tree-sitter Bash parser analyzes the command at the AST level and requests two separate permissions:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["bash command 입력"] --> B["tree-sitter 파싱"]
    B --> C{"외부 디렉터리 접근?"}
    C -->|Yes| D["permission: external_directory"]
    C -->|No| E{"명령 실행?"}
    B --> E
    E -->|Yes| F["permission: bash"]
    D --> G["spawn(command, shell)"]
    F --> G
    G --> H["stdout/stderr 스트리밍"]
    H --> I["ctx.metadata() 실시간 업데이트"]
    I --> J["timeout/abort 처리"]
    J --> K["결과 반환"]
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>Path arguments such as <code>cd</code>, <code>rm</code>, and <code>cp</code> are interpreted as <code>fs.realpath()</code> to detect access from outside the project.</li>
<li>Extract the "meaningful prefix" of a command with <code>BashArity.prefix()</code> (e.g. <code>npm run dev</code> → 3 tokens for a command, <code>git checkout</code> → 2 tokens).</li>
<li>Handles process timeout (default 2 minutes), AbortSignal integration, and process tree kill.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Edit tool — string substitution and conflict detection</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/edit.ts
await FileTime.withLock(filePath, async () => {
  // FileTime.assert()로 외부 수정 감지
  // 문자열 치환 수행
  // diff 생성 → ctx.ask({ permission: "edit" })
  // 파일 쓰기 → LSP 진단 수집
})
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>Detects whether a file has been modified externally during a session through <code>FileTime</code>.</li>
<li>Create a diff with <code>createTwoFilesPatch()</code> and include it in the permission request metadata.</li>
<li>After writing, type errors are collected through <code>LSP.touchFile()</code> → <code>LSP.diagnostics()</code> and fed back to the model.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Task Tool — Subagent Isolation</h3>
<p>The Task tool creates a new session and runs the subagent. The key is <strong>Privilege Isolation</strong>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/task.ts
return await Session.create({
  parentID: ctx.sessionID,
  permission: [
    { permission: "todowrite", pattern: "*", action: "deny" },
    { permission: "todoread", pattern: "*", action: "deny" },
    ...(hasTaskPermission ? [] : [{ permission: "task", pattern: "*", action: "deny" }]),
  ],
})
</code></pre>
<p>Subagents are denied <code>todowrite</code> and <code>todoread</code> permissions by default, and if <code>task</code> permission is not given in the agent settings, recursive subagent creation is also blocked. The agent list is also filtered by checking for the presence of a <code>task</code> rule in the calling agent's <code>permission</code> array.</p>
<h3>Batch Tool — Parallel Execution</h3>
<p>The Batch tool executes up to 25 tool calls in parallel with <code>Promise.all()</code>:</p>
<ul>
<li>Calls to self (<code>batch</code>) are blocked.</li>
<li>Track the status with an independent <code>Session.updatePart()</code> for each call.</li>
<li>MCP tools cannot be deployed; only built-in tools are allowed.</li>
<li>If 25 are exceeded, the rest are recorded as errors.</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<h3>Permission evaluation flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["도구 execute()"] --> B["ctx.ask(permission, patterns)"]
    B --> C["Permission.ask()"]
    C --> D["evaluate() — last-match-wins"]
    D --> E{"결과"}
    E -->|allow| F["즉시 반환"]
    E -->|deny| G["DeniedError 던짐"]
    E -->|ask| H["Deferred 생성"]
    H --> I["Bus.publish Event.Asked"]
    I --> J["UI에 승인 다이얼로그 표시"]
    J --> K{"사용자 응답"}
    K -->|once| L["이번만 승인"]
    K -->|always| M["패턴을 approved 목록에 추가"]
    K -->|reject| N["RejectedError 또는 CorrectedError"]
</code></pre>
<p>In the case of an <code>always</code> response, other pending requests for the session are automatically evaluated with the new rule and approved together if they can pass. This batch-approve mechanism reduces repetitive approve clicking when editing multiple files in succession.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Truncation service</h2>
<p><code>Truncate</code> is implemented as an Effect service and is responsible for background cleanup and file management:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/truncate.ts
export const MAX_LINES = 2000
export const MAX_BYTES = 50 * 1024  // 50KB
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>If the output exceeds the limit, the entire text is saved in the <code>$DATA/tool-output/</code> directory.</li>
<li>If the agent has Task tool privileges, a hint is returned: “Delegate to explore agent”. If not, a hint is returned: “Check with Grep/Read.”</li>
<li>Files older than 7 days are automatically deleted every hour.</li>
<li>Since it is automatically applied in the <code>Tool.define()</code> wrapper, individual tools do not need to worry about truncation. However, tools that directly set <code>metadata.truncated</code>, such as Bash tools, prevent double truncation.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>Plugin hook</h2>
<p>There are three plugin hooks in the tool's execution path:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>hook name</th>
<th>point of view</th>
<th>Use</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>tool.definition</code></td>
<td>When initializing <code>ToolRegistry.tools()</code></td>
<td>Dynamically modify the description·parameters of a tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tool.execute.before</code></td>
<td>Just before executing <code>SessionPrompt</code></td>
<td>Argument logging, auditing, transformation</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tool.execute.after</code></td>
<td>Immediately after executing <code>SessionPrompt</code></td>
<td>Results logging, conversion, external notification</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>shell.env</code></td>
<td>When running BashTool</td>
<td>Shell environment variable injection</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>FileTime — Reverse engineering effect-based file conflict detection</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Source Source</strong>: <code>140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/file/time.ts</code> (line 129)</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode's <code>FileTime</code> service is an optimistic concurrency control system that detects whether another process has modified a file before modifying it. Built on top of the Effect library.</p>
<h3>Stamp structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:12-17
export type Stamp = {
  readonly read: Date      // 마지막으로 읽은 시각
  readonly mtime: number | undefined  // 파일 수정 시각 (stat.mtime)
  readonly ctime: number | undefined  // 파일 변경 시각 (stat.ctime)
  readonly size: number | undefined   // 파일 크기
}
</code></pre>
<h3>State Management — Per-session isolation</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:39-42
interface State {
  reads: Map&#x3C;SessionID, Map&#x3C;string, Stamp>>  // 세션 → 파일 → 스탬프
  locks: Map&#x3C;string, Semaphore.Semaphore>    // 파일 → 세마포어 (1-permit)
}
</code></pre>
<p>Since file read records are maintained independently for each session ID, conflict between sessions can be detected even if subagents read the same file.</p>
<h3>Core methods — assert() conflict detection</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:87-101 — 3중 프로퍼티 비교
const assert = Effect.fn("FileTime.assert")(function* (sessionID, filepath) {
  if (disableCheck) return  // OPENCODE_DISABLE_FILETIME_CHECK 플래그

  const time = reads.get(sessionID)?.get(filepath)
  if (!time) throw new Error(`You must read file ${filepath} before overwriting it.`)

  const next = yield* stamp(filepath)  // 현재 파일 상태 조회
  const changed = next.mtime !== time.mtime    // 수정 시각 비교
                || next.ctime !== time.ctime   // 변경 시각 비교
                || next.size !== time.size     // 크기 비교
  if (!changed) return

  throw new Error(
    `File ${filepath} has been modified since it was last read.\n` +
    `Last modification: ${new Date(next.mtime ?? next.read.getTime()).toISOString()}\n` +
    `Last read: ${time.read.toISOString()}\n\n` +
    `Please read the file again before modifying it.`
  )
})
</code></pre>
<h4>assert()’s triple validation strategy</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Properties</th>
<th>Detection target</th>
<th>Standalone City Limits</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>mtime</code></td>
<td>Change file contents</td>
<td>Can be bypassed by touch</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ctime</code></td>
<td>change inode metadata (permissions, owner)</td>
<td>change to rename</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>size</code></td>
<td>change size</td>
<td>Not detected when overwritten with the same size</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>The three are compared using <strong>OR condition</strong>, and if any one is changed, it is judged as a conflict. This provides much more powerful change detection than single property inspection.</p>
<h3>withLock — Per-file concurrency control</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:103-105
const withLock = Effect.fn("FileTime.withLock")(function* &#x3C;T>(filepath: string, fn: () => Promise&#x3C;T>) {
  return yield* Effect.promise(fn).pipe((yield* getLock(filepath)).withPermits(1))
})
</code></pre>
<p>A <code>Semaphore(1)</code>-based mutex that prevents simultaneous writing to the same file. Since each file is independent, editing of different files occurs in parallel.</p>
<h3>Integration in Edit tool</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/edit.ts — FileTime 사용 패턴
await FileTime.withLock(filePath, async () => {
  // 1. 파일 읽기 (FileTime 등록)
  const content = await read(filePath)
  await FileTime.read(ctx.sessionID, filePath)
  
  // 2. 편집 전 충돌 검증
  await FileTime.assert(ctx.sessionID, filePath)
  
  // 3. 파일 쓰기
  await write(filePath, modified)
  
  // 4. 쓰기 후 읽기 기록 갱신
  await FileTime.read(ctx.sessionID, filePath)
})
</code></pre>
<p>This pattern has four steps: <code>withLock → assert → write → re-read</code>, and is a Read-assert-modify-write (RAMW) pattern. This is OpenCode's unique safety mechanism that does not exist in other agents (Aider, Claude Code, Codex).</p>
<hr>

<table>

<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-07-21: Tool.define() factory, ToolRegistry Effect service, 24 built-in tool catalogs, permission integration, Truncation service, Bash tool tree-sitter parsing, and full analysis of the execution pipeline.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Latest update (2026-05-30)</h2>
<p>In the most recent 1522 commits, three structural changes are identified in the tool system.</p>
<h3>1. <code>bash</code> → <code>shell</code> tool rename (cross-platform shell support)</h3>
<p>The existing <code>bash.ts</code> file was renamed to <code>shell.ts</code>, and the shell type determination logic was separated into <code>packages/140_opencode/src/tool/shell/id.ts</code>. <code>id.ts</code> is <code>bash | pwsh | powershell | cmd</code> Defines four <code>Kind</code>s, and normalizes the runtime shell name with <code>toKind()</code>. However, for external compatibility (plugins, stored permission rules), the exposed tool ID and permission key still remain <code>"bash"</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/shell/id.ts
export const ToolID = "bash"  // 2.0에서 rename 예정
</code></pre>
<p>Shell-specific prompt generation has been separated into <code>shell/prompt.ts</code>. The <code>ShellPrompt.render(name, platform, limits, defaultTimeoutMs)</code> function dynamically combines the description text and parameter schema depending on the shell type (bash/pwsh/powershell/cmd) and OS. Each shell profile creates a guide that matches the shell grammar in <code>chainGuidance()</code>, <code>commandSection()</code>, <code>createPrExample</code>, etc. For example, PowerShell 5.1 does not support <code>&#x26;&#x26;</code>, so <code>cmd1; The if ($?) { cmd2 }</code> pattern guides you, and cmd.exe uses the <code>&#x26;</code> and <code>if exist</code> patterns.</p>
<p>In the <code>shell.ts</code> body, the tree-sitter parser has also been extended to cross-platform. <code>tree-sitter-powershell</code> WASM is loaded to parse the PowerShell AST, and the bash parser and PowerShell parser are branched according to the <code>Shell.ps(shell)</code> determination result. For path resolution, logic has been added to convert the <code>/c/Users/...</code> path of the Windows POSIX shell (Git Bash, etc.) to <code>cygpath -w</code> in <code>resolvePath()</code>. The file command set for CMD (<code>CMD_FILES</code>) and PowerShell parameter flags (<code>FLAGS</code>, <code>SWITCHES</code>) are also defined separately and reflected in the permission scan.</p>
<p>In the registry (<code>registry.ts</code>), <code>BashTool</code> import has been replaced with <code>ShellTool</code>, and is registered as <code>tool.shell</code> in the built-in tool initialization list.</p>
<h3>2. Native LLM runtime (<code>packages/llm</code>)</h3>
<p>The new <code>packages/llm</code> package provides an independent LLM execution layer that does not depend on the Vercel AI SDK. There are two core files:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong><code>packages/llm/src/tool.ts</code></strong> — <code>Tool.make()</code> factory. Provides type-safe tool definition based on Effect Schema. Two input methods are supported: Typed mode (<code>parameters</code> + <code>success</code> Schema) and Dynamic mode (directly passing <code>jsonSchema</code>). Each tool internally memoizes <code>_decode</code>, <code>_encode</code>, and <code>_definition</code> to avoid repeated creation at runtime. The <code>toDefinitions(tools)</code> function maps the Record key to the tool name, creating a <code>ToolDefinition[]</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong><code>packages/llm/src/tool-runtime.ts</code></strong> — <code>ToolRuntime.stream()</code>. It is a recursive loop that receives model stream functions and performs tool orchestration. Executes the tool through the <code>dispatch()</code> → <code>decodeAndExecute()</code> path, catches errors with the <code>ToolFailure</code> tag, and returns an error message to the model. The <code>providerExecuted</code> flag excludes tool calls already executed by the provider (e.g. OpenAI's built-in web_search) from client execution. Multi-turn loop control is possible with the <code>stopWhen</code> callback and <code>stepCountIs(n)</code> helper.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>This runtime is integrated into <code>LLMClient</code> in <code>packages/llm/src/route/client.ts</code> and uses <code>ToolRuntime.stream()</code> internally when calling <code>LLMClient.stream(options)</code> or <code>LLMClient.generate(options)</code>. <code>prompt.ts</code> from <code>packages/opencode</code> still imports the <code>tool()</code> wrapper from the Vercel AI SDK, but a gradual migration is in progress to also use <code>LLMEvent</code> from <code>@opencode-ai/llm</code>.</p>
<p>The <code>Protocol</code> interface (<code>route/protocol.ts</code>) standardizes provider-specific request/response conversion. Create a native body with <code>body.from(LLMRequest)</code> and convert the provider event to a common <code>LLMEvent</code> with <code>stream.step(state, event)</code>. OpenAI Chat, OpenAI Responses, Anthropic Messages, Gemini, and Bedrock Converse each implement separate protocols, but share the same route infrastructure.</p>
<h3>3. OpenAI Responses WebSocket Transport</h3>
<p>A WebSocket-based transport has been implemented in <code>packages/llm/src/route/transport/websocket.ts</code>. <code>WebSocketExecutor.Service</code> is defined as the Effect Context service, and the connection is managed using the <code>open(WebSocketRequest) → WebSocketConnection</code> pattern. After connecting, buffer the message with <code>Queue.bounded(128)</code> and distinguish between <code>close</code> event codes (1000/1005 are normal termination, the rest are errors).</p>
<p>The <code>WebSocketTransport.json&#x3C;Body, Message>()</code> factory generalizes the JSON-based WebSocket protocol. Reuse the <code>prepare()</code> logic of HTTP transport, but convert the URL scheme to <code>https→wss</code> / <code>http→ws</code>, send the encoded request as the first message, and receive the response stream.</p>
<p>The OpenAI Responses API actually uses this WebSocket transport (<code>protocols/openai-responses.ts</code>). Remove <code>stream: true</code> from the HTTP body and add <code>type: "response.create"</code> to convert it to a WebSocket message. Both transports (<code>httpTransport</code>, <code>webSocketTransport</code>) share <code>OpenAIResponsesCoreFields</code> to ensure request schema synchronization:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/llm/src/protocols/openai-responses.ts
export const route = Route.make({ id: "openai-responses", transport: httpTransport, ... })
export const webSocketRoute = Route.make({ id: "openai-responses-websocket", transport: webSocketTransport, ... })
</code></pre>
<h3>4. Other tool catalog changes</h3>
<p>The number of built-in tools increased from 24 to 26. Newly added tools:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>tools</th>
<th>file</th>

<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>

<td><code>repo_clone.ts</code></td>

</tr>
<tr>

<td><code>repo_overview.ts</code></td>

</table>
<p><code>RuntimeFlags.Service</code> has been added to the registry's <code>ToolRegistry.layer</code> dependency, and function flags are managed by the Effect service instead of the existing <code>Flag.*</code> global variable. The <code>webSearchEnabled()</code> function has also been changed to accept <code>flags.enableExa</code> and <code>flags.enableParallel</code> parameters. The <code>Tool.Def</code> interface has been refactored to directly receive <code>agent: Agent.Info</code> from the <code>tools()</code> method signature, and agent-specific tool filtering has been integrated based on model+agent pairs.</p>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>003_tool-runtime/03_oc_tool.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>툴 레지스트리와 실행 파이프라인</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — tool registry + MCP tool merge.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode의 툴 시스템은 Effect-TS 서비스 계층 위에 구축된 정적 레지스트리 + 동적 확장 구조다. Codex-RS가 Rust enum 기반 <code>ToolRouter → ToolRegistry → ToolCallRuntime</code> 삼단 파이프라인을 쓴 것과 달리, OpenCode는 TypeScript의 <code>Tool.define()</code> 팩토리와 Effect <code>ServiceMap</code> 패턴으로 동일한 문제를 해결한다.</p>
<p>핵심 차이점은 세 가지다. 첫째, 모든 도구가 <code>ctx.ask()</code> 를 직접 호출하여 권한을 요청하므로 실행 루프가 아닌 도구 자체에 권한 판정 책임이 있다. 둘째, <code>Truncate</code> 서비스가 모든 도구 출력에 자동 적용되어 LLM 컨텍스트 폭발을 방지한다. 셋째, 플러그인 훅(<code>tool.definition</code>, <code>tool.execute.before</code>, <code>tool.execute.after</code>)이 실행 경로 전체에 걸쳐 있어 외부 확장이 가능하다.</p>
<h2>도구 정의 계층: <code>Tool.define()</code></h2>
<p>모든 빌트인 도구는 <code>Tool.define(id, init)</code> 팩토리를 통해 생성된다. 이 함수는 <code>Tool.Info</code> 인터페이스를 구현하는 객체를 반환하며, 내부적으로 두 가지 래핑을 수행한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
export function define&#x3C;Parameters extends z.ZodType, Result extends Metadata>(
  id: string,
  init: Info&#x3C;Parameters, Result>["init"] | Awaited&#x3C;ReturnType&#x3C;Info&#x3C;Parameters, Result>["init"]>>,
): Info&#x3C;Parameters, Result> {
  return {
    id,
    init: async (initCtx) => {
      const toolInfo = init instanceof Function ? await init(initCtx) : init
      const execute = toolInfo.execute
      toolInfo.execute = async (args, ctx) => {
        try {
          toolInfo.parameters.parse(args)           // ① Zod 검증
        } catch (error) {
          if (error instanceof z.ZodError &#x26;&#x26; toolInfo.formatValidationError) {
            throw new Error(toolInfo.formatValidationError(error), { cause: error })
          }
          throw new Error(
            `The ${id} tool was called with invalid arguments: ${error}.`,
            { cause: error },
          )
        }
        const result = await execute(args, ctx)      // ② 원본 실행
        if (result.metadata.truncated !== undefined) return result
        const truncated = await Truncate.output(result.output, {}, initCtx?.agent)
        return { ...result, output: truncated.content, metadata: { ...result.metadata, truncated: truncated.truncated } }
        // ③ 자동 truncation
      }
      return toolInfo
    },
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>define()</code>이 수행하는 래핑:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Zod 파라미터 검증</strong> — 모든 도구 호출 전에 <code>parameters.parse(args)</code>로 입력을 검증한다. 실패 시 모델에게 재입력을 유도하는 에러 메시지를 던진다.</li>
<li><strong>자동 출력 Truncation</strong> — 결과의 <code>metadata.truncated</code>가 이미 설정되지 않은 경우, <code>Truncate.output()</code>을 통해 2000줄 / 50KB 제한을 적용한다. 초과 시 전체 출력을 파일로 저장하고 참조 경로를 반환한다.</li>
</ol>
<p><code>Tool.Info</code> 인터페이스의 <code>init()</code> 메서드는 동적 초기화를 지원한다. 예를 들어 <code>BashTool</code>은 사용 가능한 셸을 탐지하고, <code>TaskTool</code>은 에이전트 목록을 조회하며, <code>SkillTool</code>은 사용 가능한 스킬 카탈로그를 로드한다. 이 지연 초기화가 <code>init: (ctx?: InitContext) => Promise&#x3C;...></code> 시그니처의 핵심 이유다.</p>
<h3><code>Tool.Context</code> — 실행 컨텍스트</h3>
<p>모든 도구의 <code>execute()</code> 함수는 두 번째 인자로 <code>Tool.Context</code>를 받는다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
export type Context&#x3C;M extends Metadata = Metadata> = {
  sessionID: SessionID
  messageID: MessageID
  agent: string
  abort: AbortSignal
  callID?: string
  extra?: { [key: string]: any }
  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]
  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: M }): void    // UI 상태 업데이트
  ask(input: Omit&#x3C;Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Promise&#x3C;void>  // 권한 요청
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>metadata()</code> 콜백은 Bash 도구가 스트리밍 출력을 실시간으로 UI에 반영하는 데 사용된다. <code>ask()</code> 는 Permission 서비스에 요청을 위임하며, 거부 시 <code>RejectedError</code>를 던져 도구 실행을 중단한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>도구 레지스트리: Effect 서비스</h2>
<p><code>ToolRegistry</code>는 Effect-TS의 <code>ServiceMap.Service</code> 패턴으로 구현된다. 이는 단순 Map이 아니라, 인스턴스 상태 관리와 플러그인 통합을 포함한 서비스 계층이다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts
export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/ToolRegistry") {}
</code></pre>
<p>레지스트리의 세 가지 공개 메서드:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>메서드</th>
<th>역할</th>
<th>반환</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>register(tool)</code></td>
<td>커스텀 도구를 런타임에 등록</td>
<td><code>Effect&#x3C;void></code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ids()</code></td>
<td>전체 도구 ID 목록</td>
<td><code>Effect&#x3C;string[]></code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tools(model, agent?)</code></td>
<td>모델·에이전트에 맞는 도구 세트 반환</td>
<td><code>Effect&#x3C;InitializedTool[]></code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>모델 기반 도구 필터링</h3>
<p><code>tools()</code> 메서드는 모델 ID를 기준으로 도구를 필터링한다. 이 필터링은 세 가지 핵심 규칙을 포함한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts (tools 메서드 내부)
.filter((tool) => {
  // 1. websearch/codesearch는 zen 사용자 또는 enable 플래그에만 제공
  if (tool.id === "codesearch" || tool.id === "websearch") {
    return model.providerID === ProviderID.opencode || Flag.OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXA
  }
  // 2. GPT 모델에서만 apply_patch 사용, 나머지는 edit/write 사용
  const usePatch = model.modelID.includes("gpt-") &#x26;&#x26; !model.modelID.includes("oss") &#x26;&#x26; !model.modelID.includes("gpt-4")
  if (tool.id === "apply_patch") return usePatch
  if (tool.id === "edit" || tool.id === "write") return !usePatch
  return true
})
</code></pre>
<p>이 설계는 GPT 계열 모델이 <code>apply_patch</code> 포맷에 더 적합하고, 다른 모델들은 <code>edit</code> + <code>write</code> 조합이 낫다는 실험적 판단에 기반한다.</p>
<h3>커스텀 도구 로딩</h3>
<p>레지스트리 초기화 시 두 가지 경로로 커스텀 도구를 로드한다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>파일 기반</strong> — 프로젝트 설정 디렉터리에서 <code>{tool,tools}/*.{js,ts}</code> 패턴으로 스캔하여 모듈을 동적 import 한다.</li>
<li><strong>플러그인 기반</strong> — <code>Plugin.list()</code>로 등록된 플러그인의 <code>tool</code> 속성에서 <code>ToolDefinition</code>을 추출한다.</li>
</ol>
<p>두 경우 모두 <code>fromPlugin()</code> 헬퍼를 통해 <code>Tool.Info</code>로 변환되며, Truncate 래핑이 별도로 적용된다.</p>
<hr>

<hr>
<h2>실행 파이프라인</h2>
<p>도구 실행은 <code>SessionPrompt.resolveTools()</code> → AI SDK → 개별 도구 <code>execute()</code> 경로를 따른다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant LLM as LLM 모델
    participant Prompt as SessionPrompt
    participant Registry as ToolRegistry
    participant Tool as Tool.execute()
    participant Perm as Permission
    participant Plugin as Plugin hooks

    LLM->>Prompt: tool_call (id, args)
    Prompt->>Registry: tools(model, agent)
    Registry-->>Prompt: InitializedTool[]
    Prompt->>Plugin: tool.execute.before
    Prompt->>Tool: execute(args, ctx)
    Tool->>Tool: Zod 파라미터 검증
    Tool->>Perm: ctx.ask({ permission, patterns })
    Perm-->>Perm: evaluate(rules) → allow/deny/ask
    alt deny
        Perm-->>Tool: DeniedError
    else ask
        Perm-->>LLM: UI에 승인 요청 표시
        Note over Perm: Deferred.await() — 사용자 응답 대기
    else allow
        Perm-->>Tool: 통과
    end
    Tool->>Tool: 실제 로직 실행
    Tool->>Tool: Truncate.output() 자동 적용
    Tool-->>Prompt: { title, output, metadata, attachments? }
    Prompt->>Plugin: tool.execute.after
    Prompt-->>LLM: tool result
</code></pre>
<h3>단계별 상세</h3>
<p><strong>1단계: 도구 해석 (SessionPrompt)</strong></p>
<p><code>resolveTools()</code>가 <code>ToolRegistry.tools(model, agent)</code>를 호출하여 현재 모델과 에이전트에 맞는 도구 목록을 가져온다. 각 도구는 <code>init()</code>으로 초기화되며, JSON Schema로 변환되어 AI SDK의 <code>tool()</code> 함수에 래핑된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/session/prompt.ts
for (const item of await ToolRegistry.tools(
  { modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id), providerID: input.model.providerID },
  input.agent,
)) {
  const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, z.toJSONSchema(item.parameters))
  tools[item.id] = tool({
    id: item.id,
    description: item.description,
    inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),
    async execute(args, options) {
      // ... ctx 구성, Plugin 훅, 실행 ...
    },
  })
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>2단계: 컨텍스트 구성</strong></p>
<p><code>Tool.Context</code>는 <code>resolveTools()</code> 내부의 <code>context()</code> 클로저에서 생성된다. <code>ask()</code> 콜백은 세션의 Permission 서비스에 연결되며, 에이전트 권한 규칙과 세션 권한 규칙을 <code>Permission.merge()</code>로 합산한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/session/prompt.ts
async ask(req) {
  await Permission.ask({
    ...req,
    sessionID: input.session.id,
    tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },
    ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),
  })
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>3단계: 권한 평가</strong></p>
<p><code>Permission.ask()</code>는 각 패턴에 대해 <code>evaluate(permission, pattern, ...rulesets)</code>를 호출한다. 이 함수는 규칙 배열을 역순으로 탐색하여 마지막으로 매칭되는 규칙을 적용한다(last-match-wins):</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission) &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}
</code></pre>
<p>결과가 <code>ask</code>이면 <code>Deferred</code>를 생성하여 UI에서 사용자 응답을 대기한다. <code>once</code>는 해당 호출만, <code>always</code>는 패턴을 영구 승인 목록에 추가한다.</p>
<p><strong>4단계: 실행 및 결과 반환</strong></p>
<p>도구의 <code>execute()</code> 결과는 <code>{ title, output, metadata, attachments? }</code> 형태로 반환된다. <code>Tool.define()</code>의 래퍼가 자동으로 <code>Truncate.output()</code>을 적용하고, <code>SessionPrompt</code>가 <code>Plugin.trigger("tool.execute.after")</code>를 호출한 뒤 모델에 결과를 전달한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>주요 도구 구현 상세</h2>
<h3>Bash 도구 — 명령 파싱과 권한</h3>
<p>Bash 도구는 가장 복잡한 권한 흐름을 가진다. tree-sitter Bash 파서로 명령을 AST 수준에서 분석하여 두 가지 권한을 분리 요청한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["bash command 입력"] --> B["tree-sitter 파싱"]
    B --> C{"외부 디렉터리 접근?"}
    C -->|Yes| D["permission: external_directory"]
    C -->|No| E{"명령 실행?"}
    B --> E
    E -->|Yes| F["permission: bash"]
    D --> G["spawn(command, shell)"]
    F --> G
    G --> H["stdout/stderr 스트리밍"]
    H --> I["ctx.metadata() 실시간 업데이트"]
    I --> J["timeout/abort 처리"]
    J --> K["결과 반환"]
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>cd</code>, <code>rm</code>, <code>cp</code> 등의 경로 인자를 <code>fs.realpath()</code>로 해석하여 프로젝트 외부 접근을 감지한다.</li>
<li><code>BashArity.prefix()</code>로 명령의 "의미 있는 접두사"를 추출한다 (예: <code>npm run dev</code> → 3개 토큰이 명령, <code>git checkout</code> → 2개 토큰).</li>
<li>프로세스 타임아웃 (기본 2분), AbortSignal 연동, 프로세스 트리 킬을 모두 처리한다.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Edit 도구 — 문자열 치환과 충돌 감지</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/edit.ts
await FileTime.withLock(filePath, async () => {
  // FileTime.assert()로 외부 수정 감지
  // 문자열 치환 수행
  // diff 생성 → ctx.ask({ permission: "edit" })
  // 파일 쓰기 → LSP 진단 수집
})
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>FileTime</code>을 통해 세션 도중 외부에서 파일이 수정되었는지 감지한다.</li>
<li><code>createTwoFilesPatch()</code>로 diff를 생성하여 권한 요청 메타데이터에 포함한다.</li>
<li>쓰기 후 <code>LSP.touchFile()</code> → <code>LSP.diagnostics()</code>로 타입 에러를 수집하여 모델에 피드백한다.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Task 도구 — 서브에이전트 격리</h3>
<p>Task 도구는 새 세션을 생성하여 서브에이전트를 실행한다. 핵심은 <strong>권한 격리</strong>다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/task.ts
return await Session.create({
  parentID: ctx.sessionID,
  permission: [
    { permission: "todowrite", pattern: "*", action: "deny" },
    { permission: "todoread", pattern: "*", action: "deny" },
    ...(hasTaskPermission ? [] : [{ permission: "task", pattern: "*", action: "deny" }]),
  ],
})
</code></pre>
<p>서브에이전트는 기본적으로 <code>todowrite</code>, <code>todoread</code> 권한이 거부되며, 에이전트 설정에 <code>task</code> 권한이 없으면 재귀적 서브에이전트 생성도 차단된다. 호출 에이전트의 <code>permission</code> 배열에서 <code>task</code> 규칙이 있는지 확인하여 에이전트 목록도 필터링한다.</p>
<h3>Batch 도구 — 병렬 실행</h3>
<p>Batch 도구는 최대 25개의 도구 호출을 <code>Promise.all()</code>로 병렬 실행한다:</p>
<ul>
<li>자기 자신(<code>batch</code>) 호출은 차단된다.</li>
<li>각 호출마다 독립된 <code>Session.updatePart()</code>로 상태를 추적한다.</li>
<li>MCP 도구는 배치 불가, 빌트인 도구만 허용한다.</li>
<li>25개 초과 시 나머지는 에러로 기록된다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<h3>권한 평가 흐름</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["도구 execute()"] --> B["ctx.ask(permission, patterns)"]
    B --> C["Permission.ask()"]
    C --> D["evaluate() — last-match-wins"]
    D --> E{"결과"}
    E -->|allow| F["즉시 반환"]
    E -->|deny| G["DeniedError 던짐"]
    E -->|ask| H["Deferred 생성"]
    H --> I["Bus.publish Event.Asked"]
    I --> J["UI에 승인 다이얼로그 표시"]
    J --> K{"사용자 응답"}
    K -->|once| L["이번만 승인"]
    K -->|always| M["패턴을 approved 목록에 추가"]
    K -->|reject| N["RejectedError 또는 CorrectedError"]
</code></pre>
<p><code>always</code> 응답의 경우, 해당 세션의 대기 중인 다른 요청도 새로운 규칙으로 자동 평가하여 통과 가능하면 함께 승인한다. 이 batch-approve 메커니즘은 여러 파일을 연속 편집할 때 반복적인 승인 클릭을 줄여준다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Truncation 서비스</h2>
<p><code>Truncate</code>는 Effect 서비스로 구현되어 백그라운드 cleanup과 파일 관리를 담당한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/truncate.ts
export const MAX_LINES = 2000
export const MAX_BYTES = 50 * 1024  // 50KB
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>출력이 제한을 초과하면 <code>$DATA/tool-output/</code> 디렉터리에 전체 텍스트를 저장한다.</li>
<li>에이전트에 Task 도구 권한이 있으면 "explore 에이전트에 위임하라"는 힌트를, 없으면 "Grep/Read로 확인하라"는 힌트를 반환한다.</li>
<li>1시간마다 7일 이상 된 파일을 자동 삭제한다.</li>
<li><code>Tool.define()</code> 래퍼에서 자동 적용되므로 개별 도구는 truncation을 신경 쓸 필요가 없다. 단, Bash 도구처럼 <code>metadata.truncated</code>를 직접 설정하는 도구는 이중 truncation이 방지된다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>플러그인 훅</h2>
<p>도구 실행 경로에 세 가지 플러그인 훅이 걸려 있다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>훅 이름</th>
<th>시점</th>
<th>용도</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>tool.definition</code></td>
<td><code>ToolRegistry.tools()</code> 초기화 시</td>
<td>도구의 description·parameters를 동적 수정</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tool.execute.before</code></td>
<td><code>SessionPrompt</code> 실행 직전</td>
<td>인자 로깅, 감사, 변환</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tool.execute.after</code></td>
<td><code>SessionPrompt</code> 실행 직후</td>
<td>결과 로깅, 변환, 외부 알림</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>shell.env</code></td>
<td>BashTool 실행 시</td>
<td>셸 환경변수 주입</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>FileTime — Effect-기반 파일 충돌 감지 역공학</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>소스 출처</strong>: <code>140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/file/time.ts</code> (129줄)</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode의 <code>FileTime</code> 서비스는 <strong>파일을 수정하기 전에 다른 프로세스가 해당 파일을 변경했는지 감지</strong>하는 낙관적 동시성 제어(optimistic concurrency control) 시스템이다. Effect 라이브러리 위에 구축되었다.</p>
<h3>Stamp 구조</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:12-17
export type Stamp = {
  readonly read: Date      // 마지막으로 읽은 시각
  readonly mtime: number | undefined  // 파일 수정 시각 (stat.mtime)
  readonly ctime: number | undefined  // 파일 변경 시각 (stat.ctime)
  readonly size: number | undefined   // 파일 크기
}
</code></pre>
<h3>상태 관리 — 세션별 격리</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:39-42
interface State {
  reads: Map&#x3C;SessionID, Map&#x3C;string, Stamp>>  // 세션 → 파일 → 스탬프
  locks: Map&#x3C;string, Semaphore.Semaphore>    // 파일 → 세마포어 (1-permit)
}
</code></pre>
<p>세션 ID별로 파일 읽기 기록을 독립적으로 유지하므로, 서브에이전트가 같은 파일을 읽어도 세션 간 충돌 감지가 가능하다.</p>
<h3>핵심 메서드 — assert() 충돌 감지</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:87-101 — 3중 프로퍼티 비교
const assert = Effect.fn("FileTime.assert")(function* (sessionID, filepath) {
  if (disableCheck) return  // OPENCODE_DISABLE_FILETIME_CHECK 플래그

  const time = reads.get(sessionID)?.get(filepath)
  if (!time) throw new Error(`You must read file ${filepath} before overwriting it.`)

  const next = yield* stamp(filepath)  // 현재 파일 상태 조회
  const changed = next.mtime !== time.mtime    // 수정 시각 비교
                || next.ctime !== time.ctime   // 변경 시각 비교
                || next.size !== time.size     // 크기 비교
  if (!changed) return

  throw new Error(
    `File ${filepath} has been modified since it was last read.\n` +
    `Last modification: ${new Date(next.mtime ?? next.read.getTime()).toISOString()}\n` +
    `Last read: ${time.read.toISOString()}\n\n` +
    `Please read the file again before modifying it.`
  )
})
</code></pre>
<h4>assert()의 3중 검증 전략</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>프로퍼티</th>
<th>감지 대상</th>
<th>단독 시 한계</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>mtime</code></td>
<td>파일 내용 변경</td>
<td>touch로 우회 가능</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ctime</code></td>
<td>inode 메타데이터 변경 (권한, 소유자)</td>
<td>rename으로 변경</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>size</code></td>
<td>크기 변경</td>
<td>같은 크기로 덮어쓰기 시 미감지</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>3개를 <strong>OR 조건</strong>으로 비교하여, 어느 하나라도 변경되면 충돌로 판단한다. 이것은 단일 프로퍼티 검사 대비 훨씬 강력한 변경 감지를 제공한다.</p>
<h3>withLock — 파일 단위 동시성 제어</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// file/time.ts:103-105
const withLock = Effect.fn("FileTime.withLock")(function* &#x3C;T>(filepath: string, fn: () => Promise&#x3C;T>) {
  return yield* Effect.promise(fn).pipe((yield* getLock(filepath)).withPermits(1))
})
</code></pre>
<p><code>Semaphore(1)</code> 기반 뮤텍스로, 같은 파일에 대한 동시 쓰기를 방지한다. 파일별로 독립적이므로, 서로 다른 파일에 대한 편집은 병렬로 진행된다.</p>
<h3>Edit 도구에서의 통합</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/edit.ts — FileTime 사용 패턴
await FileTime.withLock(filePath, async () => {
  // 1. 파일 읽기 (FileTime 등록)
  const content = await read(filePath)
  await FileTime.read(ctx.sessionID, filePath)
  
  // 2. 편집 전 충돌 검증
  await FileTime.assert(ctx.sessionID, filePath)
  
  // 3. 파일 쓰기
  await write(filePath, modified)
  
  // 4. 쓰기 후 읽기 기록 갱신
  await FileTime.read(ctx.sessionID, filePath)
})
</code></pre>
<p>이 패턴은 <code>withLock → assert → write → re-read</code>의 4단계로, Read-assert-modify-write(RAMW) 패턴이다. 다른 에이전트(Aider, Claude Code, Codex)에는 없는 OpenCode만의 고유한 안전 메커니즘이다.</p>
<hr>
