<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-07-21: Tool.define() 팩토리, ToolRegistry Effect 서비스, 24개 빌트인 도구 카탈로그, 권한 통합, Truncation 서비스, Bash 도구 tree-sitter 파싱, 실행 파이프라인 전체 분석.</li>
</ul>
<h2>최신 갱신 (2026-05-30)</h2>
<p>최근 1522개 커밋에서 도구 시스템에 세 가지 구조적 변경이 확인된다.</p>
<h3>1. <code>bash</code> → <code>shell</code> 도구 리네임 (크로스 플랫폼 셸 지원)</h3>
<p>기존 <code>bash.ts</code> 파일이 <code>shell.ts</code>로 리네임되었고, 셸 종류 판별 로직이 <code>packages/140_opencode/src/tool/shell/id.ts</code>로 분리되었다. <code>id.ts</code>는 <code>bash | pwsh | powershell | cmd</code> 네 가지 <code>Kind</code>를 정의하며, <code>toKind()</code>로 런타임 셸 이름을 정규화한다. 단, 외부 호환성(플러그인, 저장된 권한 규칙)을 위해 노출되는 도구 ID와 권한 키는 여전히 <code>"bash"</code>를 유지한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/shell/id.ts
export const ToolID = "bash"  // 2.0에서 rename 예정
</code></pre>
<p>셸별 프롬프트 생성이 <code>shell/prompt.ts</code>로 분리되었다. <code>ShellPrompt.render(name, platform, limits, defaultTimeoutMs)</code> 함수가 셸 종류(bash/pwsh/powershell/cmd)와 OS에 따라 description 텍스트와 파라미터 스키마를 동적으로 조합한다. 각 셸 프로파일은 <code>chainGuidance()</code>, <code>commandSection()</code>, <code>createPrExample</code> 등에서 셸 문법에 맞는 가이드를 생성한다. 예를 들어 PowerShell 5.1은 <code>&#x26;&#x26;</code> 미지원이므로 <code>cmd1; if ($?) { cmd2 }</code> 패턴을 안내하고, cmd.exe는 <code>&#x26;</code>와 <code>if exist</code> 패턴을 사용한다.</p>
<p><code>shell.ts</code> 본체에서는 tree-sitter 파서도 크로스 플랫폼으로 확장되었다. <code>tree-sitter-powershell</code> WASM을 로드하여 PowerShell AST를 파싱하며, <code>Shell.ps(shell)</code> 판별 결과에 따라 bash 파서와 PowerShell 파서를 분기한다. 경로 해석도 <code>resolvePath()</code>에서 Windows POSIX 셸(Git Bash 등)의 <code>/c/Users/...</code> 경로를 <code>cygpath -w</code>로 변환하는 로직이 추가되었다. CMD용 파일 명령어 집합(<code>CMD_FILES</code>)과 PowerShell 파라미터 플래그(<code>FLAGS</code>, <code>SWITCHES</code>)도 별도 정의되어 권한 스캔에 반영된다.</p>
<p>레지스트리(<code>registry.ts</code>)에서 <code>BashTool</code> import가 <code>ShellTool</code>로 교체되었으며, 빌트인 도구 초기화 목록에 <code>tool.shell</code>로 등록된다.</p>
<h3>2. 네이티브 LLM 런타임 (<code>packages/llm</code>)</h3>
<p>새로운 <code>packages/llm</code> 패키지가 Vercel AI SDK에 의존하지 않는 독립적 LLM 실행 계층을 제공한다. 핵심 파일은 두 개다:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong><code>packages/llm/src/tool.ts</code></strong> — <code>Tool.make()</code> 팩토리. Effect Schema 기반의 타입 안전 도구 정의를 제공한다. Typed 모드(<code>parameters</code> + <code>success</code> Schema)와 Dynamic 모드(<code>jsonSchema</code> 직접 전달) 두 가지 입력 방식을 지원한다. 각 도구는 내부적으로 <code>_decode</code>, <code>_encode</code>, <code>_definition</code>을 메모이즈하여 런타임에서 반복 생성을 피한다. <code>toDefinitions(tools)</code> 함수가 Record 키를 도구 이름으로 매핑하여 <code>ToolDefinition[]</code>을 생성한다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong><code>packages/llm/src/tool-runtime.ts</code></strong> — <code>ToolRuntime.stream()</code>. 모델 스트림 함수를 받아 도구 오케스트레이션을 수행하는 재귀 루프다. <code>dispatch()</code> → <code>decodeAndExecute()</code> 경로로 도구를 실행하며, <code>ToolFailure</code> 태그로 에러를 잡아 모델에 에러 메시지를 반환한다. <code>providerExecuted</code> 플래그로 프로바이더가 이미 실행한 도구 호출(예: OpenAI의 built-in web_search)을 클라이언트 실행에서 제외한다. <code>stopWhen</code> 콜백과 <code>stepCountIs(n)</code> 헬퍼로 멀티턴 루프 제어가 가능하다.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>이 런타임은 <code>packages/llm/src/route/client.ts</code>의 <code>LLMClient</code>에 통합되어, <code>LLMClient.stream(options)</code> 또는 <code>LLMClient.generate(options)</code> 호출 시 <code>ToolRuntime.stream()</code>을 내부적으로 사용한다. <code>packages/opencode</code>의 <code>prompt.ts</code>는 여전히 Vercel AI SDK의 <code>tool()</code> 래퍼를 import하지만, <code>@opencode-ai/llm</code>의 <code>LLMEvent</code>도 함께 사용하여 점진적 마이그레이션이 진행 중이다.</p>
<p><code>Protocol</code> 인터페이스(<code>route/protocol.ts</code>)가 프로바이더별 요청/응답 변환을 표준화한다. <code>body.from(LLMRequest)</code>으로 네이티브 바디를 생성하고, <code>stream.step(state, event)</code>으로 프로바이더 이벤트를 공통 <code>LLMEvent</code>로 변환한다. OpenAI Chat, OpenAI Responses, Anthropic Messages, Gemini, Bedrock Converse 등이 각각 별도 Protocol을 구현하되, 동일한 Route 인프라를 공유한다.</p>
<h3>3. OpenAI Responses WebSocket 트랜스포트</h3>
<p><code>packages/llm/src/route/transport/websocket.ts</code>에 WebSocket 기반 트랜스포트가 구현되었다. <code>WebSocketExecutor.Service</code>가 Effect Context 서비스로 정의되며, <code>open(WebSocketRequest) → WebSocketConnection</code> 패턴으로 연결을 관리한다. 연결 후 <code>Queue.bounded(128)</code>로 메시지를 버퍼링하고, <code>close</code> 이벤트 코드(1000/1005는 정상 종료, 나머지는 에러)를 구분한다.</p>
<p><code>WebSocketTransport.json&#x3C;Body, Message>()</code> 팩토리가 JSON 기반 WebSocket 프로토콜을 일반화한다. HTTP 트랜스포트의 <code>prepare()</code> 로직을 재사용하되, URL 스킴을 <code>https→wss</code> / <code>http→ws</code>로 변환하고, 첫 메시지로 인코딩된 요청을 전송한 뒤 응답 스트림을 수신한다.</p>
<p>OpenAI Responses API가 이 WebSocket 트랜스포트를 실제로 사용한다(<code>protocols/openai-responses.ts</code>). HTTP 바디의 <code>stream: true</code>를 제거하고 <code>type: "response.create"</code>를 추가하여 WebSocket 메시지로 변환한다. 두 트랜스포트(<code>httpTransport</code>, <code>webSocketTransport</code>)가 <code>OpenAIResponsesCoreFields</code>를 공유하여 요청 스키마 동기화를 보장한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/llm/src/protocols/openai-responses.ts
export const route = Route.make({ id: "openai-responses", transport: httpTransport, ... })
export const webSocketRoute = Route.make({ id: "openai-responses-websocket", transport: webSocketTransport, ... })
</code></pre>
<h3>4. 기타 도구 카탈로그 변경</h3>
<p>빌트인 도구 수가 24개에서 26개로 증가했다. 새로 추가된 도구:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>도구</th>
<th>파일</th>

<td><code>repo_overview.ts</code></td>
<td><code>flags.experimentalScout</code> 활성</td>

<p>레지스트리의 <code>ToolRegistry.layer</code> 의존성에 <code>RuntimeFlags.Service</code>가 추가되어, 기존 <code>Flag.*</code> 전역 변수 대신 Effect 서비스로 기능 플래그를 관리한다. <code>webSearchEnabled()</code> 함수도 <code>flags.enableExa</code>와 <code>flags.enableParallel</code> 파라미터를 받도록 변경되었다. <code>Tool.Def</code> 인터페이스가 <code>tools()</code> 메서드 시그니처에서 <code>agent: Agent.Info</code>를 직접 받도록 리팩토링되어, 에이전트별 도구 필터링이 모델+에이전트 쌍 기준으로 통합되었다.</p>
<h3>참조 파일 (신규/변경)</h3>
<ul>
<li><code>packages/140_opencode/src/tool/shell.ts</code> — 구 <code>bash.ts</code>, 크로스 플랫폼 셸 실행</li>

<li><code>packages/llm/src/route/transport/websocket.ts</code> — WebSocket 트랜스포트, <code>WebSocketExecutor</code></li>

1f:["$","$L2f","20-axis-03-tool",{"id":"20-axis-03-tool","order":27,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 03: Tool runtime","description":"003_tool-runtime/03_oc_tool.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$4a"}}]}]
4b:Tf2a6,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 04: Skill system</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — skill plugin surface.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OpenCode의 skill 시스템은 Codex(Rust)에 비해 훨씬 단순하지만, 그 단순함 안에서도 명확한 계층 구조를 갖추고 있다. <code>SKILL.md</code> 파일을 디스크에서 찾아 파싱하고, 도구(tool)로 노출하며, 시스템 프롬프트에 카탈로그를 주입하고, 에이전트별 퍼미션으로 접근을 제어하는 4단계 파이프라인이다.</li>
<li>| 파일 | 역할 |</li>
<li>| <code>skill/index.ts</code> | 스킬 로딩, 캐싱, 조회, 포매팅, Effect 서비스 레이어 |</li>
<li>| <code>skill/discovery.ts</code> | 원격 URL에서 스킬 인덱스 fetch → 파일 다운로드 → 로컬 캐시 저장 |</li>
<li>Codex가 <code>SkillsManager</code>, <code>loader</code>, <code>model</code>, <code>injection</code>, <code>render</code>, <code>invocation_utils</code> 등 여러 모듈로 나뉜 것과 달리, OpenCode는 이 모든 책임을 <code>index.ts</code> 한 파일에 응축했다. 이는 "implicit invocation" 같은 복잡한 경로가 아예 존재하지 않기 때문이다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>subgraph 로딩 단계</li>
<li>A1["~/.claude/skills/**"] -->|external| SCAN</li>
<li>A2["~/.agents/skills/**"] -->|external| SCAN</li>
<li>A3["프로젝트/.claude/skills/**"] -->|project external| SCAN</li>
</ul>
<h2>Topics covered</h2>
<ul>
<li>Architecture 전체 흐름</li>
<li>스킬 정의 (Skill.Info)</li>
<li>스킬 로딩 파이프라인</li>
<li>1단계: 스캔 루트 결정</li>
<li>2단계: 파싱과 중복 처리</li>
<li>3단계: 원격 스킬 Discovery</li>
<li>4단계: 캐시와 지연 로딩</li>
<li>스킬 소비 경로</li>
<li>소비 경로 1: SkillTool — LLM이 직접 호출하는 Tool</li>
<li>소비 경로 2: 시스템 Prompt 카탈로그</li>
<li>소비 경로 3: Command 등록</li>
<li>소비 경로 4: Agent 디렉터리 화이트리스팅</li>
<li>소비 경로 5: REST API와 CLI</li>
<li>퍼미션 시스템과의 연동</li>
</ul>

export async function parse(filePath: string) {
  const template = await Filesystem.readText(filePath)
  try {
    return matter(template)
  } catch {
    return matter(fallbackSanitization(template))
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts — 외부 스킬 로딩
const EXTERNAL_DIRS = [".claude", ".agents"]
const EXTERNAL_SKILL_PATTERN = "skills/**/SKILL.md"

if (!Flag.OPENCODE_DISABLE_EXTERNAL_SKILLS) {
  for (const dir of EXTERNAL_DIRS) {
    const root = path.join(Global.Path.home, dir)
    if (!(await Filesystem.isDir(root))) continue
    await scan(state, root, EXTERNAL_SKILL_PATTERN, { dot: true, scope: "global" })
  }
  // 프로젝트 디렉터리에서 worktree까지 상위 탐색
  for await (const root of Filesystem.up({
    targets: EXTERNAL_DIRS,
    start: directory,
    stop: worktree,
  })) {
    await scan(state, root, EXTERNAL_SKILL_PATTERN, { dot: true, scope: "project" })
  }
}
</code></pre>

const parsed = Info.pick({ name: true, description: true }).safeParse(md.data)
if (!parsed.success) return  // frontmatter 검증 실패 → 무시

if (state.skills[parsed.data.name]) {
  log.warn("duplicate skill name", { ... })  // 경고만, 덮어쓰기
}

state.dirs.add(path.dirname(match))
state.skills[parsed.data.name] = {
  name: parsed.data.name,
  description: parsed.data.description,
  location: match,
  content: md.content,

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/discovery.ts — pull() 핵심 로직
const index = new URL("index.json", base).href
const data = yield* HttpClientRequest.get(index).pipe(
  HttpClientRequest.acceptJson,
  http.execute,
  Effect.flatMap(HttpClientResponse.schemaBodyJson(Index)),
)

// Index 스키마: { skills: [{ name: string, files: string[] }] }
const dirs = yield* Effect.forEach(
  list,
  (skill) => Effect.gen(function* () {
    const root = path.join(cache, skill.name)
    yield* Effect.forEach(
      skill.files,
      (file) => download(new URL(file, `${host}/${skill.name}/`).href, path.join(root, file)),
      { concurrency: fileConcurrency },
    )
    return (yield* fs.exists(md)) ? root : null
  }),
  { concurrency: skillConcurrency },
)
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>

const ensure = () => {
  if (state.task) return state.task  // 이미 로딩 중이면 같은 Promise 반환
  state.task = load().catch((err) => {
    state.task = undefined           // 실패 시 재시도 가능
    throw err
  })
  return state.task
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts — skills()
export async function skills(agent: Agent.Info) {
  if (Permission.disabled(["skill"], agent.permission).has("skill")) return
  const list = await Skill.available(agent)
  return [
    "Skills provide specialized instructions and workflows for specific tasks.",
    "Use the skill tool to load a skill when a task matches its description.",
    Skill.fmt(list, { verbose: true }),
  ].join("\n")
}
</code></pre>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>OpenCode skill system analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — skill plugin surface.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode's skill system is much simpler than Codex (Rust), but even within its simplicity, it has a clear hierarchical structure. It is a four-step pipeline that finds and parses the <code>SKILL.md</code> file on disk, exposes it as a tool, injects a catalog into the system prompt, and controls access with agent-specific permissions.</p>
<p>At its core, this system consists of two source files:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>file</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>skill/index.ts</code></td>
<td>Skill loading, caching, lookup, formatting, effect service layer</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>skill/discovery.ts</code></td>
<td>Fetch skill index from remote URL → Download file → Save local cache</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Unlike Codex, which is divided into several modules such as <code>SkillsManager</code>, <code>loader</code>, <code>model</code>, <code>injection</code>, <code>render</code>, and <code>invocation_utils</code>, OpenCode condenses all these responsibilities into one file called <code>index.ts</code>. This is because complex paths such as “implicit invocation” do not exist at all.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Overall architecture flow</h2>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph 로딩 단계
        A1["~/.claude/skills/**"] -->|external| SCAN
        A2["~/.agents/skills/**"] -->|external| SCAN
        A3["프로젝트/.claude/skills/**"] -->|project external| SCAN
        A4["Config directories"] -->|opencode pattern| SCAN
        A5["config.skills.paths"] -->|custom paths| SCAN
        A6["config.skills.urls"] -->|remote| DISCOVERY
        DISCOVERY["Discovery.pull()"] -->|download + cache| SCAN
        SCAN["Glob.scan() → ConfigMarkdown.parse()"]
    end

    subgraph 캐시
        SCAN --> CACHE["State { skills, dirs }"]
    end

    subgraph 소비 경로
        CACHE --> TOOL["SkillTool (tool/skill.ts)"]
        CACHE --> SYSTEM["SystemPrompt.skills()"]
        CACHE --> CMD["Command 등록 (source: 'skill')"]
        CACHE --> AGENT["Agent 디렉터리 화이트리스팅"]
        CACHE --> API["GET /skill 엔드포인트"]
        CACHE --> CLI["debug skill CLI"]
    end

    TOOL -->|"permission ask"| PERM["Permission.evaluate('skill', name)"]
    SYSTEM -->|"Permission.disabled check"| PERM
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Skill Definition (Skill.Info)</h2>
<p>The runtime representation of a skill is defined in the Zod schema:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts
export const Info = z.object({
  name: z.string(),         // frontmatter에서 추출
  description: z.string(),  // frontmatter에서 추출
  location: z.string(),     // SKILL.md 절대 경로
  content: z.string(),      // 본문 (frontmatter 제외)
})
</code></pre>
<p>While Codex's <code>SkillMetadata</code> was a "small plugin declaration" containing <code>SkillPolicy</code>, <code>SkillInterface</code> (icon/color), and <code>SkillDependencies</code> (MCP server), OpenCode only has four fields: <code>name + description + location + content</code>. Concepts such as MCP dependency declaration, UI metadata, and implicit invocation policy are completely missing. This is an intentional simplification.</p>
<p>Only <code>name</code> and <code>description</code> are extracted from the frontmatter of <code>SKILL.md</code>, and the remaining text is preserved as is in <code>content</code>. Parsing uses the <code>gray-matter</code> library, and when YAML parsing fails, <code>fallbackSanitization()</code> performs idiomatic processing to convert values ​​containing colons to block scalar.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// config/markdown.ts — 파싱 진입점
export async function parse(filePath: string) {
  const template = await Filesystem.readText(filePath)
  try {
    return matter(template)
  } catch {
    return matter(fallbackSanitization(template))
  }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Skill loading pipeline</h2>
<h3>Step 1: Determine the scan route</h3>
<p>The loading order is determined in the <code>create()</code> function. Unlike Codex's 4-scope system (repo, user, system, admin), OpenCode scans <strong>five sources</strong> sequentially:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>order</th>
<th>Source</th>
<th>pattern</th>
<th>Conditions</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><code>~/.claude/</code>, <code>~/.agents/</code></td>
<td><code>skills/**/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td><code>OPENCODE_DISABLE_EXTERNAL_SKILLS</code> not set</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Project→worktree parent <code>.claude/</code>, <code>.agents/</code></td>
<td><code>skills/**/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td>Same flag not set</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>OpenCode config directory</td>
<td><code>{skill,skills}/**/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td>Always</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><code>config.skills.paths</code></td>
<td><code>**/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td>Specified in paths array</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><code>config.skills.urls</code></td>
<td><code>**/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td>Specified in urls array (via Discovery)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>What is noteworthy is that numbers 1–2 <strong>directly reference the skill directory of an external agent (Claude Code, etc.)</strong>. Because <code>.claude/skills/</code> and <code>.agents/skills/</code> are scanned, SKILL.md written for Claude Code is automatically loaded in OpenCode. This interoperability can be turned off with the <code>OPENCODE_DISABLE_EXTERNAL_SKILLS</code> flag.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts — 외부 스킬 로딩
const EXTERNAL_DIRS = [".claude", ".agents"]
const EXTERNAL_SKILL_PATTERN = "skills/**/SKILL.md"

if (!Flag.OPENCODE_DISABLE_EXTERNAL_SKILLS) {
  for (const dir of EXTERNAL_DIRS) {
    const root = path.join(Global.Path.home, dir)
    if (!(await Filesystem.isDir(root))) continue
    await scan(state, root, EXTERNAL_SKILL_PATTERN, { dot: true, scope: "global" })
  }
  // 프로젝트 디렉터리에서 worktree까지 상위 탐색
  for await (const root of Filesystem.up({
    targets: EXTERNAL_DIRS,
    start: directory,
    stop: worktree,
  })) {
    await scan(state, root, EXTERNAL_SKILL_PATTERN, { dot: true, scope: "project" })
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Step 2: Parse and duplicate handling</h3>
<p>For each matched <code>SKILL.md</code> the <code>add()</code> function is called:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts — add()
const parsed = Info.pick({ name: true, description: true }).safeParse(md.data)
if (!parsed.success) return  // frontmatter 검증 실패 → 무시

if (state.skills[parsed.data.name]) {
  log.warn("duplicate skill name", { ... })  // 경고만, 덮어쓰기
}

state.dirs.add(path.dirname(match))
state.skills[parsed.data.name] = {
  name: parsed.data.name,
  description: parsed.data.description,
  location: match,
  content: md.content,
}
</code></pre>
<p>Duplicate names will cause a warning log, but <strong>later loads will overwrite previous ones</strong>. Since the scan order is global → project → config → custom paths → urls, skills in custom paths override global skills.</p>
<h3>Step 3: Remote Skill Discovery</h3>
<p>If a URL is specified in <code>config.skills.urls</code>, <code>Discovery.pull()</code> is called:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/discovery.ts — pull() 핵심 로직
const index = new URL("index.json", base).href
const data = yield* HttpClientRequest.get(index).pipe(
  HttpClientRequest.acceptJson,
  http.execute,
  Effect.flatMap(HttpClientResponse.schemaBodyJson(Index)),
)

// Index 스키마: { skills: [{ name: string, files: string[] }] }
const dirs = yield* Effect.forEach(
  list,
  (skill) => Effect.gen(function* () {
    const root = path.join(cache, skill.name)
    yield* Effect.forEach(
      skill.files,
      (file) => download(new URL(file, `${host}/${skill.name}/`).href, path.join(root, file)),
      { concurrency: fileConcurrency },
    )
    return (yield* fs.exists(md)) ? root : null
  }),
  { concurrency: skillConcurrency },
)
</code></pre>
<p>Remote skills are downloaded under <code>{cache}/skills/{name}/</code>, and if they already exist, they are not re-downloaded. Parallel download with <code>skillConcurrency: 4</code>, <code>fileConcurrency: 8</code>. This is a different approach from installing Codex's <code>codex_skills</code> package, allowing skills to be distributed using only HTTP without a separate package manager.</p>
<h3>Step 4: Cache and Lazy Loading</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts — ensure() 패턴
const ensure = () => {
  if (state.task) return state.task  // 이미 로딩 중이면 같은 Promise 반환
  state.task = load().catch((err) => {
    state.task = undefined           // 실패 시 재시도 가능
    throw err
  })
  return state.task
}
</code></pre>
<p>It is loaded only once when first accessed with the <code>ensure()</code> pattern, and cached results are returned thereafter. Combined with <code>InstanceState</code>, it is isolated on a project instance basis.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Skill consumption path</h2>
<h3>Consumption Path 1: SkillTool — a tool that LLM calls directly</h3>
<p>It is the most core consumption channel. <code>SkillTool</code> is defined in <code>tool/skill.ts</code>, and when LLM calls the <code>skill</code> tool, it returns the skill body as tool output.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant LLM
    participant SkillTool as tool/skill.ts
    participant SkillSvc as Skill Service
    participant Permission as Permission

    LLM->>SkillTool: tool_call("skill", { name: "dev" })
    SkillTool->>SkillSvc: Skill.get("dev")
    SkillSvc-->>SkillTool: Skill.Info
    SkillTool->>Permission: ctx.ask({ permission: "skill", patterns: ["dev"] })
    Permission-->>SkillTool: 허용
    SkillTool->>SkillTool: Ripgrep.files()로 스킬 디렉터리 파일 목록 수집 (최대 10개)
    SkillTool-->>LLM: &#x3C;skill_content name="dev">...본문...&#x3C;/skill_content>
</code></pre>
<p>While Codex handles explicit triggers with the <code>$skill-name</code> text pattern or <code>UserInput::Skill</code> structure, OpenCode calls the tool based on <strong>LLM's judgment</strong>. This difference is big:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Compare</th>
<th>Codex</th>
<th>OpenCode</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Skill input method</td>
<td><code>build_skill_injections()</code> → Direct injection of user fragment</td>
<td>LLM calls <code>skill</code> tool → returns tool output</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>trigger subject</td>
<td>User input parsing (<code>$name</code>, structured input)</td>
<td>LLM Self-Judgment</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>implicit invocation</td>
<td>Yes (telemetry centered)</td>
<td>None</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Permission point</td>
<td>Check before injection</td>
<td>When running tool, <code>ctx.ask()</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>SkillTool's output also includes a list of files in the skill directory. Up to 10 files are collected with <code>Ripgrep.files()</code> and placed in the <code>&#x3C;skill_files></code> block, so LLM can recognize scripts or reference files included in the skill bundle and read them with the <code>read</code> tool.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/skill.ts — output 구성
return {
  title: `Loaded skill: ${skill.name}`,
  output: [
    `&#x3C;skill_content name="${skill.name}">`,
    `# Skill: ${skill.name}`,
    skill.content.trim(),
    `Base directory for this skill: ${base}`,
    "&#x3C;skill_files>",
    files,      // &#x3C;file>/abs/path&#x3C;/file> 형태
    "&#x3C;/skill_files>",
    "&#x3C;/skill_content>",
  ].join("\n"),
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Consumption Path 2: System Prompt Catalog</h3>
<p>Inject a list of skills into the agent's system prompt in <code>session/system.ts</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts — skills()
export async function skills(agent: Agent.Info) {
  if (Permission.disabled(["skill"], agent.permission).has("skill")) return
  const list = await Skill.available(agent)
  return [
    "Skills provide specialized instructions and workflows for specific tasks.",
    "Use the skill tool to load a skill when a task matches its description.",
    Skill.fmt(list, { verbose: true }),
  ].join("\n")
}
</code></pre>
<p>The <code>verbose: true</code> mode renders the skill list in XML format:</p>
<pre><code class="language-xml">&#x3C;available_skills>
  &#x3C;skill>
    &#x3C;name>dev&#x3C;/name>
    &#x3C;description>Common development guidelines...&#x3C;/description>
    &#x3C;location>file:///path/to/SKILL.md&#x3C;/location>
  &#x3C;/skill>
&#x3C;/available_skills>
</code></pre>
<p>On the other hand, SkillTool's description uses a Markdown list with <code>verbose: false</code>. The reason is stated in the code comments as "agents seem to ingest the information about skills a bit better if we present a more verbose version of them here."</p>
<h3>Consumption path 3: Command registration</h3>
<p>Skills are also automatically registered with the slash command:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// command/index.ts
for (const skill of yield* Effect.promise(() => Skill.all())) {
  if (commands[skill.name]) continue
  commands[skill.name] = {
    name: skill.name,
    description: skill.description,
    source: "skill",
    get template() { return skill.content },
    hints: [],
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>When the user enters the <code>/skill-name</code> command, the skill body is injected as a user message. Unlike SkillTool, this path inserts the text directly without checking permissions.</p>
<h3>Consumption Path 4: Agent Directory Whitelisting</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// agent/agent.ts — 스킬 디렉터리를 external_directory 허용 목록에 추가
const skillDirs = yield* Effect.promise(() => Skill.dirs())
const whitelistedDirs = [Truncate.GLOB, ...skillDirs.map((dir) => path.join(dir, "*"))]

// external_directory 퍼미션에 자동 추가
external_directory: {
  "*": "ask",
  ...Object.fromEntries(whitelistedDirs.map((dir) => [dir, "allow"])),
}
</code></pre>
<p>With this logic, files in the skill directory are automatically allowed to access external directories without asking permission questions. This is a device that allows LLM to read freely when a skill includes a bundled script or reference file.</p>
<h3>Consumption Path 5: REST API and CLI</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// server/server.ts — GET /skill 엔드포인트
.get("/skill", async (c) => {
  const skills = await Skill.all()
  return c.json(skills)
})

// cli/cmd/debug/skill.ts — debug skill 명령
const skills = await Skill.all()
process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(skills, null, 2) + EOL)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Integration with permission system</h2>
<p>Skill permissions operate at two levels:</p>
<p><strong>1. Filter the list — <code>Skill.available(agent)</code></strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">return list.filter(
  (skill) => Permission.evaluate("skill", skill.name, agent.permission).action !== "deny"
)
</code></pre>
<p>The name is evaluated against the <code>skill</code> category in the agent's permission ruleset. If it is not <code>deny</code>, it is included in the list.</p>
<p><strong>2. Full disable — <code>Permission.disabled()</code></strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">if (Permission.disabled(["skill"], agent.permission).has("skill")) return
</code></pre>
<p>Remove the skill catalog itself from the system prompt. In this case, SkillTool also returns an empty list.</p>
<p><strong>3. Check at run time — <code>ctx.ask()</code></strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">await ctx.ask({
  permission: "skill",
  patterns: [params.name],
  always: [params.name],
  metadata: {},
})
</code></pre>
<p>When running SkillTool, confirmation can be requested from the user according to the permission policy. If you set <code>skill: "allow"</code> in config, it will be automatically approved.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Effect service layer structure</h2>
<p>OpenCode's skill system follows Effect-TS' <code>ServiceMap</code> pattern:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph Layer 의존성
        DISCOVERY["Discovery.Service"] --> SKILL["Skill.Service"]
        HTTP["HttpClient"] --> DISCOVERY
        FS["AppFileSystem"] --> DISCOVERY
        PATH["Path"] --> DISCOVERY
    end

    subgraph 외부 소비
        SKILL --> TOOL["SkillTool"]
        SKILL --> SYSTEM["SystemPrompt"]
        SKILL --> AGENT["Agent"]
        SKILL --> CMD["Command"]
        SKILL --> SERVER["Server"]
    end
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts — 서비스 정의
export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Skill") {}

export const layer: Layer.Layer&#x3C;Service, never, Discovery.Service> = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const discovery = yield* Discovery.Service
    // ...
    return Service.of({ get, all, dirs, available })
  }),
)

export const defaultLayer: Layer.Layer&#x3C;Service> = layer.pipe(
  Layer.provide(Discovery.defaultLayer)
)
</code></pre>
<p>Combined with <code>InstanceState</code>, the state is isolated on a project instance basis. With <code>Effect.fn()</code>, all operations are named and can be traced.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Main differences from Codex</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>perspective</th>
<th>Codex (Rust)</th>
<th>OpenCode (TypeScript/Effect)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Skill metadata</td>
<td>policy, interface(icon/color), dependencies</td>
<td>name, description only</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>implicit invocation</td>
<td>command associated telemetry path</td>
<td>None</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>MCP dependency declaration</td>
<td>Automatically install MCP server with <code>SkillToolDependency</code></td>
<td>None</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>System Skills</td>
<td>Install <code>codex_skills</code> package</td>
<td>remote URL fetch + cache</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Skill Input</td>
<td>Direct injection into user fragment</td>
<td>LLM calls this tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>scope classification</td>
<td>repo, user, system, admin</td>
<td>Sequential scan by source (no explicit scope)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>external compatibility</td>
<td>own format</td>
<td><code>.claude/skills/</code> compatible</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Implementation scale</td>
<td>~7 modules (manager, loader, model, injection, render, …)</td>
<td>2 files (index.ts, discovery.ts)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>

<h3>Config schema</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// config/config.ts
export const Skills = z.object({
  paths: z.array(z.string()).optional(),  // 추가 스킬 폴더 경로
  urls: z.array(z.string()).optional(),   // 원격 스킬 URL
})

// 퍼미션 내 skill 카테고리
skill: PermissionRule.optional()  // allow | ask | deny + glob 패턴
</code></pre>
<h3>Summary of skill life cycle</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>steps</th>
<th>Description</th>
<th>code</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Route Determination</td>
<td>external dirs → config dirs → custom paths → remote urls</td>
<td><code>skill/index.ts</code> <code>load()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>scan</td>
<td>Matching <code>SKILL.md</code> pattern with <code>Glob.scan()</code></td>
<td><code>skill/index.ts</code> <code>scan()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>parsing</td>
<td>Separate frontmatter with <code>gray-matter</code></td>
<td><code>config/markdown.ts</code> <code>parse()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>verification</td>
<td><code>name</code>, <code>description</code> required fields Zod verification</td>
<td><code>skill/index.ts</code> <code>add()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Caching</td>
<td>Save <code>State.skills</code> Record with name key</td>
<td><code>skill/index.ts</code> <code>add()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Permission Filter</td>
<td><code>Permission.evaluate()</code> per agent</td>
<td><code>skill/index.ts</code> <code>available()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Tool Exposure</td>
<td>LLM can be called with <code>SkillTool</code></td>
<td><code>tool/skill.ts</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>prompt injection</td>
<td>At the system prompt, select XML Catalog</td>
<td><code>session/system.ts</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>register command</td>
<td>Inject text directly with slash command</td>
<td><code>command/index.ts</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Discovery Protocol</h3>
<p>The interfaces the remote skill server must provide:</p>
<pre><code>GET {base_url}/index.json
→ {
    "skills": [
      { "name": "skill-a", "files": ["SKILL.md", "scripts/run.sh"] },
      { "name": "skill-b", "files": ["SKILL.md", "reference/guide.md"] }
    ]
  }

GET {base_url}/{skill_name}/{file}
→ 파일 바이너리
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Fork Checklist</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Skill definition is minimized to name + description + content</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Loading scans 5 sources sequentially, with later loading overwriting previous ones.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Compatible with <code>.claude/skills/</code>, you can use Claude Code skills as is.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> This is a pull model in which LLM directly calls the <code>skill</code> tool (compared to Codex's push model)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Remote skills are distributed using the HTTP index.json protocol.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Permission checking is a two-step process: list filtering + confirmation upon execution.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Skill directories are automatically added to the external directory whitelist.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> No cache invalidation strategy for Discovery — once downloaded, cache permanently</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Duplicate name handling is warning + overwrite, so there is a possibility of unintentional override.</li>
<li>Skill input in the [ ] Command path does not go through a permission check.</li>
</ul>

Next article: [[05_oc_subagent]]</p>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>004_skill-system/04_oc_skill.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>

<h1>OpenCode 스킬 시스템 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — skill plugin surface.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode의 skill 시스템은 Codex(Rust)에 비해 훨씬 단순하지만, 그 단순함 안에서도 명확한 계층 구조를 갖추고 있다. <code>SKILL.md</code> 파일을 디스크에서 찾아 파싱하고, 도구(tool)로 노출하며, 시스템 프롬프트에 카탈로그를 주입하고, 에이전트별 퍼미션으로 접근을 제어하는 4단계 파이프라인이다.</p>
<p>핵심적으로 이 시스템은 두 개의 소스 파일로 구성된다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>파일</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>skill/index.ts</code></td>
<td>스킬 로딩, 캐싱, 조회, 포매팅, Effect 서비스 레이어</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>skill/discovery.ts</code></td>
<td>원격 URL에서 스킬 인덱스 fetch → 파일 다운로드 → 로컬 캐시 저장</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Codex가 <code>SkillsManager</code>, <code>loader</code>, <code>model</code>, <code>injection</code>, <code>render</code>, <code>invocation_utils</code> 등 여러 모듈로 나뉜 것과 달리, OpenCode는 이 모든 책임을 <code>index.ts</code> 한 파일에 응축했다. 이는 "implicit invocation" 같은 복잡한 경로가 아예 존재하지 않기 때문이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>아키텍처 전체 흐름</h2>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph 로딩 단계
        A1["~/.claude/skills/**"] -->|external| SCAN
        A2["~/.agents/skills/**"] -->|external| SCAN
        A3["프로젝트/.claude/skills/**"] -->|project external| SCAN
        A4["Config directories"] -->|opencode pattern| SCAN
        A5["config.skills.paths"] -->|custom paths| SCAN
        A6["config.skills.urls"] -->|remote| DISCOVERY
        DISCOVERY["Discovery.pull()"] -->|download + cache| SCAN
        SCAN["Glob.scan() → ConfigMarkdown.parse()"]
    end

    subgraph 캐시
        SCAN --> CACHE["State { skills, dirs }"]
    end

    subgraph 소비 경로
        CACHE --> TOOL["SkillTool (tool/skill.ts)"]
        CACHE --> SYSTEM["SystemPrompt.skills()"]
        CACHE --> CMD["Command 등록 (source: 'skill')"]
        CACHE --> AGENT["Agent 디렉터리 화이트리스팅"]
        CACHE --> API["GET /skill 엔드포인트"]
        CACHE --> CLI["debug skill CLI"]
    end

    TOOL -->|"permission ask"| PERM["Permission.evaluate('skill', name)"]
    SYSTEM -->|"Permission.disabled check"| PERM
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>스킬 정의 (Skill.Info)</h2>
<p>스킬 하나의 런타임 표현은 Zod 스키마로 정의된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts
export const Info = z.object({
  name: z.string(),         // frontmatter에서 추출
  description: z.string(),  // frontmatter에서 추출
  location: z.string(),     // SKILL.md 절대 경로
  content: z.string(),      // 본문 (frontmatter 제외)
})
</code></pre>
<p>Codex의 <code>SkillMetadata</code>가 <code>SkillPolicy</code>, <code>SkillInterface</code>(아이콘·색상), <code>SkillDependencies</code>(MCP 서버)를 포함하는 "작은 플러그인 선언서"였다면, OpenCode는 <code>name + description + location + content</code> 네 필드만 갖는다. MCP 의존성 선언, UI 메타데이터, implicit invocation 정책 같은 개념이 통째로 빠져 있다. 이건 의도적 단순화다.</p>
<p><code>SKILL.md</code>의 frontmatter에서 <code>name</code>과 <code>description</code>만 추출하고, 나머지 본문은 <code>content</code>에 그대로 보존된다. 파싱은 <code>gray-matter</code> 라이브러리를 사용하며, YAML 파싱 실패 시 <code>fallbackSanitization()</code>으로 콜론이 포함된 값을 block scalar로 변환하는 관용적 처리를 한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// config/markdown.ts — 파싱 진입점
export async function parse(filePath: string) {
  const template = await Filesystem.readText(filePath)
  try {
    return matter(template)
  } catch {
    return matter(fallbackSanitization(template))
  }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>스킬 로딩 파이프라인</h2>
<h3>1단계: 스캔 루트 결정</h3>
<p><code>create()</code> 함수에서 로딩 순서가 결정된다. Codex의 4-scope 시스템(repo, user, system, admin)과 달리 OpenCode는 <strong>5가지 소스</strong>를 순차적으로 스캔한다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>순서</th>
<th>소스</th>
<th>패턴</th>
<th>조건</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><code>~/.claude/</code>, <code>~/.agents/</code></td>
<td><code>skills/**/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td><code>OPENCODE_DISABLE_EXTERNAL_SKILLS</code> 미설정</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>프로젝트→worktree 상위 <code>.claude/</code>, <code>.agents/</code></td>
<td><code>skills/**/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td>동일 플래그 미설정</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>OpenCode config 디렉터리</td>
<td><code>{skill,skills}/**/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td>항상</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><code>config.skills.paths</code></td>
<td><code>**/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td>paths 배열에 명시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><code>config.skills.urls</code></td>
<td><code>**/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td>urls 배열에 명시 (Discovery 경유)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>주목할 점은 1–2번이 <strong>외부 에이전트(Claude Code 등)의 스킬 디렉터리를 직접 참조</strong>한다는 것이다. <code>.claude/skills/</code>와 <code>.agents/skills/</code>를 스캔하기 때문에 Claude Code용으로 작성된 SKILL.md가 OpenCode에서도 자동 로딩된다. 이 상호운용은 <code>OPENCODE_DISABLE_EXTERNAL_SKILLS</code> 플래그로 끌 수 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts — 외부 스킬 로딩
const EXTERNAL_DIRS = [".claude", ".agents"]
const EXTERNAL_SKILL_PATTERN = "skills/**/SKILL.md"

if (!Flag.OPENCODE_DISABLE_EXTERNAL_SKILLS) {
  for (const dir of EXTERNAL_DIRS) {
    const root = path.join(Global.Path.home, dir)
    if (!(await Filesystem.isDir(root))) continue
    await scan(state, root, EXTERNAL_SKILL_PATTERN, { dot: true, scope: "global" })
  }
  // 프로젝트 디렉터리에서 worktree까지 상위 탐색
  for await (const root of Filesystem.up({
    targets: EXTERNAL_DIRS,
    start: directory,
    stop: worktree,
  })) {
    await scan(state, root, EXTERNAL_SKILL_PATTERN, { dot: true, scope: "project" })
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2단계: 파싱과 중복 처리</h3>
<p>각 매치된 <code>SKILL.md</code>에 대해 <code>add()</code> 함수가 호출된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts — add()
const parsed = Info.pick({ name: true, description: true }).safeParse(md.data)
if (!parsed.success) return  // frontmatter 검증 실패 → 무시

if (state.skills[parsed.data.name]) {
  log.warn("duplicate skill name", { ... })  // 경고만, 덮어쓰기
}

state.dirs.add(path.dirname(match))
state.skills[parsed.data.name] = {
  name: parsed.data.name,
  description: parsed.data.description,
  location: match,
  content: md.content,
}
</code></pre>
<p>중복 이름은 경고 로그를 남기되 <strong>나중에 로딩된 것이 이전 것을 덮어쓴다</strong>. 스캔 순서가 global → project → config → custom paths → urls이므로, 사용자 지정 경로의 스킬이 글로벌 스킬을 오버라이드한다.</p>
<h3>3단계: 원격 스킬 Discovery</h3>
<p><code>config.skills.urls</code>에 URL이 지정되면 <code>Discovery.pull()</code>이 호출된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/discovery.ts — pull() 핵심 로직
const index = new URL("index.json", base).href
const data = yield* HttpClientRequest.get(index).pipe(
  HttpClientRequest.acceptJson,
  http.execute,
  Effect.flatMap(HttpClientResponse.schemaBodyJson(Index)),
)

// Index 스키마: { skills: [{ name: string, files: string[] }] }
const dirs = yield* Effect.forEach(
  list,
  (skill) => Effect.gen(function* () {
    const root = path.join(cache, skill.name)
    yield* Effect.forEach(
      skill.files,
      (file) => download(new URL(file, `${host}/${skill.name}/`).href, path.join(root, file)),
      { concurrency: fileConcurrency },
    )
    return (yield* fs.exists(md)) ? root : null
  }),
  { concurrency: skillConcurrency },
)
</code></pre>
<p>원격 스킬은 <code>{cache}/skills/{name}/</code> 하위에 다운로드되며, 이미 존재하면 재다운로드하지 않는다. <code>skillConcurrency: 4</code>, <code>fileConcurrency: 8</code>로 병렬 다운로드한다. 이는 Codex의 <code>codex_skills</code> 패키지 설치와는 다른 접근으로, 별도 패키지 매니저 없이 HTTP만으로 스킬을 배포할 수 있다.</p>
<h3>4단계: 캐시와 지연 로딩</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts — ensure() 패턴
const ensure = () => {
  if (state.task) return state.task  // 이미 로딩 중이면 같은 Promise 반환
  state.task = load().catch((err) => {
    state.task = undefined           // 실패 시 재시도 가능
    throw err
  })
  return state.task
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>ensure()</code> 패턴으로 최초 접근 시 한 번만 로딩하고, 이후에는 캐시된 결과를 반환한다. <code>InstanceState</code>와 결합되어 프로젝트 인스턴스 단위로 격리된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>스킬 소비 경로</h2>
<h3>소비 경로 1: SkillTool — LLM이 직접 호출하는 도구</h3>
<p>가장 핵심적인 소비 경로다. <code>SkillTool</code>은 <code>tool/skill.ts</code>에 정의되며, LLM이 <code>skill</code> 도구를 호출하면 스킬 본문을 tool output으로 반환한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant LLM
    participant SkillTool as tool/skill.ts
    participant SkillSvc as Skill Service
    participant Permission as Permission

    LLM->>SkillTool: tool_call("skill", { name: "dev" })
    SkillTool->>SkillSvc: Skill.get("dev")
    SkillSvc-->>SkillTool: Skill.Info
    SkillTool->>Permission: ctx.ask({ permission: "skill", patterns: ["dev"] })
    Permission-->>SkillTool: 허용
    SkillTool->>SkillTool: Ripgrep.files()로 스킬 디렉터리 파일 목록 수집 (최대 10개)
    SkillTool-->>LLM: &#x3C;skill_content name="dev">...본문...&#x3C;/skill_content>
</code></pre>
<p>Codex에서는 <code>$skill-name</code> 텍스트 패턴이나 <code>UserInput::Skill</code> 구조체로 명시적 trigger를 처리하는 반면, OpenCode는 <strong>LLM이 판단하여 도구를 호출</strong>하는 방식이다. 이 차이가 크다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>비교</th>
<th>Codex</th>
<th>OpenCode</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>스킬 투입 방식</td>
<td><code>build_skill_injections()</code> → user fragment 직접 주입</td>
<td>LLM이 <code>skill</code> tool 호출 → tool output 반환</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>trigger 주체</td>
<td>사용자 입력 파싱 (<code>$name</code>, structured input)</td>
<td>LLM 자율 판단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>implicit invocation</td>
<td>있음 (telemetry 중심)</td>
<td>없음</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>퍼미션 시점</td>
<td>주입 전 체크</td>
<td>tool 실행 시 <code>ctx.ask()</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>SkillTool의 output에는 스킬 디렉터리의 파일 목록도 포함된다. <code>Ripgrep.files()</code>로 최대 10개 파일을 수집해 <code>&#x3C;skill_files></code> 블록에 넣어주므로, LLM이 스킬 번들에 포함된 스크립트나 참조 파일을 인지하고 <code>read</code> 도구로 읽을 수 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/skill.ts — output 구성
return {
  title: `Loaded skill: ${skill.name}`,
  output: [
    `&#x3C;skill_content name="${skill.name}">`,
    `# Skill: ${skill.name}`,
    skill.content.trim(),
    `Base directory for this skill: ${base}`,
    "&#x3C;skill_files>",
    files,      // &#x3C;file>/abs/path&#x3C;/file> 형태
    "&#x3C;/skill_files>",
    "&#x3C;/skill_content>",
  ].join("\n"),
}
</code></pre>
<h3>소비 경로 2: 시스템 프롬프트 카탈로그</h3>
<p><code>session/system.ts</code>에서 에이전트의 시스템 프롬프트에 스킬 목록을 주입한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts — skills()
export async function skills(agent: Agent.Info) {
  if (Permission.disabled(["skill"], agent.permission).has("skill")) return
  const list = await Skill.available(agent)
  return [
    "Skills provide specialized instructions and workflows for specific tasks.",
    "Use the skill tool to load a skill when a task matches its description.",
    Skill.fmt(list, { verbose: true }),
  ].join("\n")
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>verbose: true</code> 모드는 XML 형식으로 스킬 목록을 렌더링한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-xml">&#x3C;available_skills>
  &#x3C;skill>
    &#x3C;name>dev&#x3C;/name>
    &#x3C;description>Common development guidelines...&#x3C;/description>
    &#x3C;location>file:///path/to/SKILL.md&#x3C;/location>
  &#x3C;/skill>
&#x3C;/available_skills>
</code></pre>
<p>반면 SkillTool의 description에서는 <code>verbose: false</code>로 Markdown 목록을 사용한다. 코드 주석에 "agents seem to ingest the information about skills a bit better if we present a more verbose version of them here"라고 그 이유를 밝히고 있다.</p>
<h3>소비 경로 3: Command 등록</h3>
<p>스킬은 slash command로도 자동 등록된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// command/index.ts
for (const skill of yield* Effect.promise(() => Skill.all())) {
  if (commands[skill.name]) continue
  commands[skill.name] = {
    name: skill.name,
    description: skill.description,
    source: "skill",
    get template() { return skill.content },
    hints: [],
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>사용자가 <code>/skill-name</code> 명령을 입력하면 스킬 본문이 사용자 메시지로 주입된다. 이 경로는 SkillTool과 달리 퍼미션 체크 없이 직접 본문을 넣어준다.</p>
<h3>소비 경로 4: 에이전트 디렉터리 화이트리스팅</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// agent/agent.ts — 스킬 디렉터리를 external_directory 허용 목록에 추가
const skillDirs = yield* Effect.promise(() => Skill.dirs())
const whitelistedDirs = [Truncate.GLOB, ...skillDirs.map((dir) => path.join(dir, "*"))]

// external_directory 퍼미션에 자동 추가
external_directory: {
  "*": "ask",
  ...Object.fromEntries(whitelistedDirs.map((dir) => [dir, "allow"])),
}
</code></pre>
<p>이 로직으로 스킬 디렉터리 내의 파일은 외부 디렉터리 접근 퍼미션 질문 없이 자동 허용된다. 스킬이 번들된 스크립트나 참조 파일을 포함할 때 LLM이 자유롭게 읽을 수 있게 하는 장치다.</p>
<h3>소비 경로 5: REST API와 CLI</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// server/server.ts — GET /skill 엔드포인트
.get("/skill", async (c) => {
  const skills = await Skill.all()
  return c.json(skills)
})

// cli/cmd/debug/skill.ts — debug skill 명령
const skills = await Skill.all()
process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(skills, null, 2) + EOL)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>퍼미션 시스템과의 연동</h2>
<p>스킬 퍼미션은 두 레벨에서 작동한다:</p>
<p><strong>1. 목록 필터링 — <code>Skill.available(agent)</code></strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">return list.filter(
  (skill) => Permission.evaluate("skill", skill.name, agent.permission).action !== "deny"
)
</code></pre>
<p>에이전트의 퍼미션 룰셋에서 <code>skill</code> 카테고리로 이름을 평가한다. <code>deny</code>가 아니면 목록에 포함된다.</p>
<p><strong>2. 전체 비활성화 — <code>Permission.disabled()</code></strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">if (Permission.disabled(["skill"], agent.permission).has("skill")) return
</code></pre>
<p>시스템 프롬프트에서 스킬 카탈로그 자체를 제거한다. 이 경우 SkillTool도 빈 목록을 반환하게 된다.</p>
<p><strong>3. 실행 시 확인 — <code>ctx.ask()</code></strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">await ctx.ask({
  permission: "skill",
  patterns: [params.name],
  always: [params.name],
  metadata: {},
})
</code></pre>
<p>SkillTool 실행 시 퍼미션 정책에 따라 사용자에게 확인을 요청할 수 있다. config에서 <code>skill: "allow"</code>로 설정하면 자동 승인된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Effect 서비스 레이어 구조</h2>
<p>OpenCode의 skill 시스템은 Effect-TS의 <code>ServiceMap</code> 패턴을 따른다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph Layer 의존성
        DISCOVERY["Discovery.Service"] --> SKILL["Skill.Service"]
        HTTP["HttpClient"] --> DISCOVERY
        FS["AppFileSystem"] --> DISCOVERY
        PATH["Path"] --> DISCOVERY
    end

    subgraph 외부 소비
        SKILL --> TOOL["SkillTool"]
        SKILL --> SYSTEM["SystemPrompt"]
        SKILL --> AGENT["Agent"]
        SKILL --> CMD["Command"]
        SKILL --> SERVER["Server"]
    end
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// skill/index.ts — 서비스 정의
export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Skill") {}

export const layer: Layer.Layer&#x3C;Service, never, Discovery.Service> = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const discovery = yield* Discovery.Service
    // ...
    return Service.of({ get, all, dirs, available })
  }),
)

export const defaultLayer: Layer.Layer&#x3C;Service> = layer.pipe(
  Layer.provide(Discovery.defaultLayer)
)
</code></pre>
<p><code>InstanceState</code>와 결합되어 프로젝트 인스턴스 단위로 상태가 격리된다. <code>Effect.fn()</code>으로 모든 연산에 이름이 붙어 있어 트레이싱이 가능하다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Codex와의 주요 차이</h2>

export const Skills = z.object({
  paths: z.array(z.string()).optional(),  // 추가 스킬 폴더 경로
  urls: z.array(z.string()).optional(),   // 원격 스킬 URL
})

// 퍼미션 내 skill 카테고리
skill: PermissionRule.optional()  // allow | ask | deny + glob 패턴

<h3>Discovery 프로토콜</h3>
<p>원격 스킬 서버가 제공해야 하는 인터페이스:</p>
<pre><code>GET {base_url}/index.json
→ {
    "skills": [
      { "name": "skill-a", "files": ["SKILL.md", "scripts/run.sh"] },
      { "name": "skill-b", "files": ["SKILL.md", "reference/guide.md"] }
    ]
  }

GET {base_url}/{skill_name}/{file}
→ 파일 바이너리
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>포크 체크리스트</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 스킬 정의는 name + description + content로 최소화되어 있다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 로딩은 5개 소스를 순차 스캔하며, 나중 로딩이 이전을 덮어쓴다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>.claude/skills/</code> 호환으로 Claude Code 스킬을 그대로 사용할 수 있다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> LLM이 직접 <code>skill</code> 도구를 호출하는 pull 모델이다 (Codex의 push 모델과 대비)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 원격 스킬은 HTTP index.json 프로토콜로 배포한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 퍼미션 체크는 목록 필터링 + 실행 시 확인 2단계다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 스킬 디렉터리는 자동으로 외부 디렉터리 화이트리스트에 추가된다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Discovery의 캐시 무효화 전략이 없다 — 한번 다운로드하면 영구 캐시</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 중복 이름 처리가 경고 + 덮어쓰기로, 의도치 않은 오버라이드 가능성이 있다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Command 경로의 스킬 투입은 퍼미션 체크를 거치지 않는다</li>
</ul>
<p>이전 문서: [[03_oc_tool]]
다음 문서: [[05_oc_subagent]]</p>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: 초기 작성. skill/index.ts, skill/discovery.ts, tool/skill.ts, session/system.ts, agent/agent.ts, command/index.ts 분석을 통합했다.</li>

20:["$","$L2f","20-axis-04-skill",{"id":"20-axis-04-skill","order":28,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 04: Skill system","description":"004_skill-system/04_oc_skill.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$4b"}}]}]
4c:Tf4a1,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 05: Subagents</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — subagent/collaboration dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OpenCode의 에이전트 시스템은 Codex(Rust)와 달리 <strong>TypeScript + Effect-TS</strong> 위에서 동작하며, 서브에이전트를 별도 프로세스가 아닌 <strong>child session</strong> 으로 구현한다. 핵심 아이디어는 간단하다: 에이전트는 <code>Agent.Info</code> 레코드로 정의되고, 서브에이전트 호출은 <code>TaskTool</code>이 새 <code>Session</code>을 만들어 <code>SessionPrompt.prompt()</code>를 재귀적으로 실행하</li>
<li>Codex가 <code>spawn_agent</code> / <code>send_input</code> / <code>wait_agent</code> / <code>close_agent</code>라는 다섯 개 핸들러로 런타임 제어를 노출한 것과 비교하면, OpenCode는 <strong>task tool 하나</strong>로 전체 서브에이전트 수명주기를 감싼다. 별도의 메시징 프로토콜이 없는 대신 session의 <code>parentID</code> 관계와 permission 상속으로 계층을 표현한다.</li>
<li>
<ol>
<li><strong>에이전트 정의가 config 수준이다.</strong> <code>Agent.Info</code>는 이름, 모드(<code>primary</code> / <code>subagent</code>), permission ruleset, system prompt, model override, temperature 등을 담는 Zod 스키마일 뿐이고, 런타임 로직은 공유한다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="2">
<li><strong>Permission이 에이전트의 역할을 결정한다.</strong> <code>explore</code> 에이전트가 읽기 전용인 이유는 <code>edit: deny</code>, <code>write: deny</code>가 아니라 <code>*: deny</code> 뒤에 <code>grep: allow</code>, <code>glob: allow</code> 등 허용 목록만 열었기 때문이다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="3">
<li><strong>Effect-TS <code>ServiceMap</code> 패턴</strong>으로 <code>Agent.Service</code>를 의존성 주입하므로, 테스트와 교체가 용이하다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>subgraph "Primary Agents"</li>
<li>BUILD["build(기본 에이전트)"]</li>
<li>PLAN["plan(읽기 전용 계획)"]</li>
<li>end</li>
<li>subgraph "Subagents"</li>
</ul>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/agent/agent.ts — 네이티브 에이전트 정의 패턴
const agents: Record&#x3C;string, Info> = {
  build: {
    name: "build",
    description: "The default agent. Executes tools based on configured permissions.",
    mode: "primary",
    native: true,
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, Permission.fromConfig({
      question: "allow",
      plan_enter: "allow",
    }), user),
    options: {},
  },
  explore: {
    name: "explore",
    mode: "subagent",
    native: true,
    prompt: PROMPT_EXPLORE,              // 전용 system prompt
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, Permission.fromConfig({
      "*": "deny",                        // 모든 도구 차단 후
      grep: "allow", glob: "allow",       // 읽기 도구만 허용
      list: "allow", bash: "allow",
      read: "allow",
    }), user),
    options: {},
  },
  // ... general, plan, compaction, title, summary
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Parent as 부모 세션 (build)
    participant Task as TaskTool.execute()
    participant Child as 자식 세션
    participant Prompt as SessionPrompt.prompt()

    Parent->>Task: task({ subagent_type: "explore", prompt: "..." })
    Task->>Task: Permission 체크 (ask)
    Task->>Child: Session.create({ parentID })
    Task->>Prompt: SessionPrompt.prompt({ sessionID: child, agent: "explore" })
    Prompt->>Prompt: 루프 (LLM 호출 + 도구 실행)
    Prompt-->>Task: 결과 반환
    Task-->>Parent: output + task_id
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/tool/task.ts — TaskTool의 execute 핵심
async execute(params, ctx) {
  // 1. permission 확인
  await ctx.ask({
    permission: "task",
    patterns: [params.subagent_type],
    always: ["*"],
  })

  // 2. 에이전트 조회
  const agent = await Agent.get(params.subagent_type)

  // 3. 자식 세션 생성 (또는 task_id로 기존 세션 재개)
  const session = params.task_id
    ? await Session.get(SessionID.make(params.task_id))
    : await Session.create({
        parentID: ctx.sessionID,
        title: params.description + ` (@${agent.name} subagent)`,
        permission: [
          { permission: "todowrite", pattern: "*", action: "deny" },
          { permission: "todoread",  pattern: "*", action: "deny" },
          // task 권한이 없으면 재귀 호출 차단
          ...(!hasTaskPermission ? [{ permission: "task", pattern: "*", action: "deny" }] : []),
        ],
      })

  // 4. 자식 세션에서 프롬프트 실행
  const result = await SessionPrompt.prompt({
    sessionID: session.id,
    model: agent.model ?? parentModel,
    agent: agent.name,
    tools: { todowrite: false, todoread: false },
    parts: promptParts,
  })

  return { output: result.text, title: params.description }
}
</code></pre>

export const SessionTable = sqliteTable("session", {
  id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>().primaryKey(),
  parent_id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>(),    // 부모 세션 참조
  permission: text({ mode: "json" }).$type&#x3C;Permission.Ruleset>(),
  // ...

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/permission/index.ts — Permission 평가 흐름
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Ruleset[]): Rule {
  return evalRule(permission, pattern, ...rulesets)
}

// src/session/prompt.ts — 도구 실행 시 permission 체크
async ask(req) {
  await Permission.ask({
    ...req,
    sessionID: input.session.id,
    ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),
  })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-text">최종 ruleset = Permission.merge(agent.permission, session.permission)
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["agent.prompt&#x3C;br/>또는&#x3C;br/>SystemPrompt.provider(model)"] --> SYSTEM
    B["SystemPrompt.environment(model)"] --> SYSTEM
    C["SystemPrompt.skills(agent)"] --> SYSTEM
    D["InstructionPrompt.system()&#x3C;br/>(AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md)"] --> SYSTEM
    E["user.system&#x3C;br/>(커스텀 시스템 프롬프트)"] --> SYSTEM

    SYSTEM["최종 system prompt&#x3C;br/>(LLM.stream에 전달)"]
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/llm.ts — system prompt 조립
const system: string[] = []
system.push([
  // 에이전트 전용 prompt가 있으면 사용, 없으면 모델별 기본 prompt
  ...(input.agent.prompt ? [input.agent.prompt] : SystemPrompt.provider(input.model)),
  ...input.system,
  ...(input.user.system ? [input.user.system] : []),
].filter((x) => x).join("\n"))
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/config.ts — Agent 설정 스키마
export const Agent = z.object({
  model: ModelId.optional(),
  prompt: z.string().optional(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]).optional(),
  description: z.string().optional(),
  steps: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
  permission: Permission.optional(),
  disable: z.boolean().optional(),
  // ...
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/agent/agent.ts — Agent.generate
generate: Effect.fn("Agent.generate")(function* (input) {
  // PROMPT_GENERATE 시스템 프롬프트로 LLM 호출
  const result = await generateObject({
    messages: [{ role: "user", content: `Create an agent: "${input.description}"` }],
    schema: z.object({
      identifier: z.string(),
      whenToUse: z.string(),
      systemPrompt: z.string(),
    }),
  })
  return result
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/message-v2.ts — SubtaskPart 스키마
export const SubtaskPart = PartBase.extend({
  type: z.literal("subtask"),
  prompt: z.string(),          // 서브에이전트에 전달할 프롬프트
  description: z.string(),     // 표시용 설명
  agent: z.string(),           // 대상 에이전트 이름
  model: z.object({            // 선택적 모델 오버라이드
    providerID: ProviderID.zod,
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
  }).optional(),
  command: z.string().optional(),
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/prompt.ts — subtask 처리 (loop 내부)
if (task?.type === "subtask") {
  const taskTool = await TaskTool.init()
  const taskCtx = { /* ... bypassAgentCheck: true ... */ }
  const result = await taskTool.execute({
    prompt: task.prompt,
    description: task.description,
    subagent_type: task.agent,
    command: task.command,
  }, taskCtx)
  continue  // 루프 계속
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/agent/agent.ts — Effect-TS 서비스 패턴
export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(Service, Effect.gen(function* () {
  const state = yield* InstanceState.make&#x3C;State>(
    Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
      // 에이전트 레지스트리 빌드
      return { get, list, defaultAgent }
    }),
  )
  return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent, generate })
}))
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>OpenCode agent/subagent system analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — subagent/collaboration dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode's agent system, unlike Codex (Rust), operates on <strong>TypeScript + Effect-TS</strong> and implements subagents as <strong>child sessions</strong> rather than separate processes. The core idea is simple: agents are defined with <code>Agent.Info</code> records, and subagent calls are structured in such a way that <code>TaskTool</code> creates a new <code>Session</code> and recursively executes <code>SessionPrompt.prompt()</code>.</p>
<p>Compared to Codex, which exposes runtime control with five handlers: <code>spawn_agent</code> / <code>send_input</code> / <code>wait_agent</code> / <code>close_agent</code>, OpenCode wraps the entire subagent life cycle with a <strong>task tool</strong>. There is no separate messaging protocol, but instead the hierarchy is expressed through the session's <code>parentID</code> relationship and permission inheritance.</p>
<p>There are three reasons why this design is interesting:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Agent definition is at the config level.</strong> <code>Agent.Info</code> is only a Zod schema containing name, mode (<code>primary</code> / <code>subagent</code>), permission ruleset, system prompt, model override, temperature, etc., and the runtime logic is shared.</li>
<li><strong>Permission determines the role of the agent.</strong> The reason the <code>explore</code> agent is read-only is because it only opens the allow list such as <code>grep: allow</code>, <code>glob: allow</code> after <code>*: deny</code>, not <code>edit: deny</code>, <code>write: deny</code>.</li>
<li>Since <code>Agent.Service</code> is dependency injected with <strong>Effect-TS <code>ServiceMap</code> pattern</strong>, testing and replacement are easy.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph "Primary Agents"
        BUILD["build&#x3C;br/>(기본 에이전트)"]
        PLAN["plan&#x3C;br/>(읽기 전용 계획)"]
    end

    subgraph "Subagents"
        GENERAL["general&#x3C;br/>(범용 하위 에이전트)"]
        EXPLORE["explore&#x3C;br/>(코드 탐색 전용)"]
    end

    subgraph "Hidden / Internal"
        COMPACT["compaction&#x3C;br/>(컨텍스트 요약)"]
        TITLE["title&#x3C;br/>(세션 제목 생성)"]
        SUMMARY["summary&#x3C;br/>(대화 요약)"]
    end

    BUILD -->|"TaskTool"| GENERAL
    BUILD -->|"TaskTool"| EXPLORE
    PLAN -->|"TaskTool"| EXPLORE
    GENERAL -->|"TaskTool"| EXPLORE
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Agent registry — <code>Agent.Service</code></h2>
<p>Agent definitions are built inside the <code>layer</code> of <code>agent.ts</code>. Six types of native agents are hardcoded, and custom agents can be added or existing agents can be disabled (<code>disable: true</code>) through user settings (<code>Config.agent</code>).</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/agent/agent.ts — 네이티브 에이전트 정의 패턴
const agents: Record&#x3C;string, Info> = {
  build: {
    name: "build",
    description: "The default agent. Executes tools based on configured permissions.",
    mode: "primary",
    native: true,
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, Permission.fromConfig({
      question: "allow",
      plan_enter: "allow",
    }), user),
    options: {},
  },
  explore: {
    name: "explore",
    mode: "subagent",
    native: true,
    prompt: PROMPT_EXPLORE,              // 전용 system prompt
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, Permission.fromConfig({
      "*": "deny",                        // 모든 도구 차단 후
      grep: "allow", glob: "allow",       // 읽기 도구만 허용
      list: "allow", bash: "allow",
      read: "allow",
    }), user),
    options: {},
  },
  // ... general, plan, compaction, title, summary
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Mode classification:</strong></p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>mode</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
<th>Representative Agent</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>primary</code></td>
<td>Agent selected by the user to communicate with</td>
<td><code>build</code>, <code>plan</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>subagent</code></td>
<td>Subagent called by other agents as <code>TaskTool</code></td>
<td><code>general</code>, <code>explore</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>all</code></td>
<td>Both purposes possible (custom agent default)</td>
<td>Custom</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Hidden agents (<code>compaction</code>, <code>title</code>, <code>summary</code>) are not exposed to the UI and are used only inside the system.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Subagent call — <code>TaskTool</code></h2>
<p>The entire life cycle of a subagent is concentrated in one <code>TaskTool</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Parent as 부모 세션 (build)
    participant Task as TaskTool.execute()
    participant Child as 자식 세션
    participant Prompt as SessionPrompt.prompt()

    Parent->>Task: task({ subagent_type: "explore", prompt: "..." })
    Task->>Task: Permission 체크 (ask)
    Task->>Child: Session.create({ parentID })
    Task->>Prompt: SessionPrompt.prompt({ sessionID: child, agent: "explore" })
    Prompt->>Prompt: 루프 (LLM 호출 + 도구 실행)
    Prompt-->>Task: 결과 반환
    Task-->>Parent: output + task_id
</code></pre>
<h3>Core execution flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/tool/task.ts — TaskTool의 execute 핵심
async execute(params, ctx) {
  // 1. permission 확인
  await ctx.ask({
    permission: "task",
    patterns: [params.subagent_type],
    always: ["*"],
  })

  // 2. 에이전트 조회
  const agent = await Agent.get(params.subagent_type)

  // 3. 자식 세션 생성 (또는 task_id로 기존 세션 재개)
  const session = params.task_id
    ? await Session.get(SessionID.make(params.task_id))
    : await Session.create({
        parentID: ctx.sessionID,
        title: params.description + ` (@${agent.name} subagent)`,
        permission: [
          { permission: "todowrite", pattern: "*", action: "deny" },
          { permission: "todoread",  pattern: "*", action: "deny" },
          // task 권한이 없으면 재귀 호출 차단
          ...(!hasTaskPermission ? [{ permission: "task", pattern: "*", action: "deny" }] : []),
        ],
      })

  // 4. 자식 세션에서 프롬프트 실행
  const result = await SessionPrompt.prompt({
    sessionID: session.id,
    model: agent.model ?? parentModel,
    agent: agent.name,
    tools: { todowrite: false, todoread: false },
    parts: promptParts,
  })

  return { output: result.text, title: params.description }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Things to note:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Session Resumption</strong>: If <code>task_id</code> is passed, the previous child session is continued. This allows the parent to talk to the same subagent over multiple turns.</li>
<li><strong>Block recursion</strong>: If <code>hasTaskPermission</code> is false, give <code>task: deny</code> to the child to prevent the subagent from calling another subagent (however, <code>general</code> has <code>task</code> permission, so recursion is possible).</li>
<li><strong>Block TODO tools</strong>: Forces disabling <code>todowrite</code> / <code>todoread</code> in child sessions to avoid polluting the parent's to-do list.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>3. Sharing state with the session layer</h2>
<h3>Parent-child relationship</h3>
<pre><code>┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  parent session (build)                  │
│  id: "session_abc123"                    │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │ child session (explore)             │ │
│  │ id: "session_def456"                │ │
│  │ parentID: "session_abc123"          │ │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────┘ │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │ child session (general)             │ │
│  │ id: "session_ghi789"                │ │
│  │ parentID: "session_abc123"          │ │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
</code></pre>
<p>There is a <code>parent_id</code> column in the session table (<code>SessionTable</code>), and the list of children is searched with <code>Session.children(parentID)</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/session.sql.ts
export const SessionTable = sqliteTable("session", {
  id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>().primaryKey(),
  parent_id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>(),    // 부모 세션 참조
  permission: text({ mode: "json" }).$type&#x3C;Permission.Ruleset>(),
  // ...
})
</code></pre>
<h3>What is inherited and what is not inherited</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Item</th>
<th>Inheritance</th>
<th>Evidence</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>model (provider + modelID)</td>
<td><strong>Inheritance</strong> (can be overridden by agent settings)</td>
<td><code>agent.model ?? parentModel</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>permission (default)</td>
<td><strong>Partial Inheritance</strong> — Apply separate ruleset to child sessions</td>
<td><code>Session.create({ permission: [...] })</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>system prompt</td>
<td><strong>Override</strong> — Use the agent's <code>prompt</code> field</td>
<td><code>agent.prompt ?? SystemPrompt.provider(model)</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>developer instructions (AGENTS.md)</td>
<td><strong>Inheritance</strong> — Share <code>InstructionPrompt.system()</code></td>
<td>same project instance</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>conversation history</td>
<td><strong>Isolation</strong> — Child has only its own messages</td>
<td>Since it is a separate session, <code>messages</code> is independent</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>file system (cwd/worktree)</td>
<td><strong>Shared</strong> — Same <code>Instance</code></td>
<td>In-process sharing</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tool registry</td>
<td><strong>Share</strong> (filter by permission)</td>
<td><code>ToolRegistry</code> is a singleton</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>temperature / topP</td>
<td><strong>Override</strong> — Agent-specific settings</td>
<td><code>agent.temperature</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Key difference from Codex: Codex copies <code>developer_instructions</code> explicitly, but OpenCode shares the <code>InstructionPrompt</code> module within the same process, so it is inherited naturally. On the other hand, conversation history is completely isolated.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. Permission system and agent role</h2>
<p>Permission is a key mechanism that defines an agent's "capabilities." When executing the tool, <code>Permission.evaluate(toolName, pattern, ruleset)</code> is called to determine <code>allow</code> / <code>deny</code> / <code>ask</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/permission/index.ts — Permission 평가 흐름
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Ruleset[]): Rule {
  return evalRule(permission, pattern, ...rulesets)
}

// src/session/prompt.ts — 도구 실행 시 permission 체크
async ask(req) {
  await Permission.ask({
    ...req,
    sessionID: input.session.id,
    ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),
  })
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Permission profile for each agent:</strong></p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>agent</th>
<th>Core permission</th>
<th>effect</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>build</code></td>
<td><code>question: allow</code>, <code>plan_enter: allow</code>, remaining defaults</td>
<td>All tools available, editable</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>plan</code></td>
<td><code>edit: deny</code> (except for plan files only), <code>plan_exit: allow</code></td>
<td>Read Only + Edit Plan File Only</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>explore</code></td>
<td><code>*: deny</code>, <code>grep/glob/read/bash: allow</code></td>
<td>pure read agent</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>general</code></td>
<td><code>todoread: deny</code>, <code>todowrite: deny</code></td>
<td>Universal but not TODO accessible</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>compaction</code></td>
<td><code>*: deny</code></td>
<td>Just summarize without tools</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Session level permissions (<code>session.permission</code>) are <code>merged</code> with agent level to form the final ruleset:</p>
<pre><code>최종 ruleset = Permission.merge(agent.permission, session.permission)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. System Prompt Assembly</h2>
<p>The agent's system prompt is composed of several layers:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["agent.prompt&#x3C;br/>또는&#x3C;br/>SystemPrompt.provider(model)"] --> SYSTEM
    B["SystemPrompt.environment(model)"] --> SYSTEM
    C["SystemPrompt.skills(agent)"] --> SYSTEM
    D["InstructionPrompt.system()&#x3C;br/>(AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md)"] --> SYSTEM
    E["user.system&#x3C;br/>(커스텀 시스템 프롬프트)"] --> SYSTEM

    SYSTEM["최종 system prompt&#x3C;br/>(LLM.stream에 전달)"]
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/llm.ts — system prompt 조립
const system: string[] = []
system.push([
  // 에이전트 전용 prompt가 있으면 사용, 없으면 모델별 기본 prompt
  ...(input.agent.prompt ? [input.agent.prompt] : SystemPrompt.provider(input.model)),
  ...input.system,
  ...(input.user.system ? [input.user.system] : []),
].filter((x) => x).join("\n"))
</code></pre>
<p>The <code>explore</code> agent has the <code>PROMPT_EXPLORE</code> text set in <code>agent.prompt</code>, so it uses the "file exploration expert" prompt instead of the regular provider prompt.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. Custom Agent — Configuration and Dynamic Creation</h2>
<h3>Configuration-based custom agent</h3>
<p>Define custom agents in <code>opencode.json</code> or <code>.opencode/agents/*.md</code> files:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/config.ts — Agent 설정 스키마
export const Agent = z.object({
  model: ModelId.optional(),
  prompt: z.string().optional(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]).optional(),
  description: z.string().optional(),
  steps: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
  permission: Permission.optional(),
  disable: z.boolean().optional(),
  // ...
})
</code></pre>
<h3>AI-based dynamic generation</h3>
<p><code>Agent.generate()</code> automatically generates agent configuration using LLM:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/agent/agent.ts — Agent.generate
generate: Effect.fn("Agent.generate")(function* (input) {
  // PROMPT_GENERATE 시스템 프롬프트로 LLM 호출
  const result = await generateObject({
    messages: [{ role: "user", content: `Create an agent: "${input.description}"` }],
    schema: z.object({
      identifier: z.string(),
      whenToUse: z.string(),
      systemPrompt: z.string(),
    }),
  })
  return result
})
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>7. Subtask Part — Subagent execution through commands</h2>
<p>In addition to <code>TaskTool</code>, there is a path to execute subagents through <strong>slash command</strong> (<code>/check</code>, <code>/review</code>, etc.). In this case, <code>SubtaskPart</code> is inserted into the message, and <code>SessionPrompt.loop</code> detects it and calls <code>TaskTool.execute()</code> directly.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/message-v2.ts — SubtaskPart 스키마
export const SubtaskPart = PartBase.extend({
  type: z.literal("subtask"),
  prompt: z.string(),          // 서브에이전트에 전달할 프롬프트
  description: z.string(),     // 표시용 설명
  agent: z.string(),           // 대상 에이전트 이름
  model: z.object({            // 선택적 모델 오버라이드
    providerID: ProviderID.zod,
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
  }).optional(),
  command: z.string().optional(),
})
</code></pre>
<p>This path is processed inside <code>SessionPrompt.loop</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/prompt.ts — subtask 처리 (loop 내부)
if (task?.type === "subtask") {
  const taskTool = await TaskTool.init()
  const taskCtx = { /* ... bypassAgentCheck: true ... */ }
  const result = await taskTool.execute({
    prompt: task.prompt,
    description: task.description,
    subagent_type: task.agent,
    command: task.command,
  }, taskCtx)
  continue  // 루프 계속
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>8. Effect-TS pattern</h2>
<p>OpenCode consistently uses Effect-TS' <code>ServiceMap</code> pattern. <code>Agent.Service</code> also follows this pattern:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/agent/agent.ts — Effect-TS 서비스 패턴
export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(Service, Effect.gen(function* () {
  const state = yield* InstanceState.make&#x3C;State>(
    Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
      // 에이전트 레지스트리 빌드
      return { get, list, defaultAgent }
    }),
  )
  return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent, generate })
}))
</code></pre>
<p><code>InstanceState</code> manages the cache on a project directory basis. Since the agent list may vary from project to project (due to different <code>.opencode/agents/</code> files), this cache is properly isolated.</p>
<hr>
<h2>9. Comparison with Codex subagent</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>side</th>
<th>Codex (Rust)</th>
<th>OpenCode (TypeScript)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Subagent Implementation</strong></td>
<td>5 tool handlers (<code>spawn_agent</code>, <code>send_input</code>, etc.)</td>
<td><code>TaskTool</code> one</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Life Cycle</strong></td>
<td>explicit (<code>spawn</code> → <code>send</code> → <code>wait</code> → <code>close</code>)</td>
<td>implicit (call → complete → return result)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Status</strong></td>
<td>Real-time two-way communication between parent and child thread</td>
<td>One-way (parent calls and only receives result)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Settings Inheritance</strong></td>
<td>Explicit copy with <code>build_agent_shared_config()</code></td>
<td>Limited to natural sharing + permission within the same process</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>approval routing</strong></td>
<td><code>codex_delegate</code> relays from child → parent</td>
<td>sharing the same <code>Permission.Service</code> instance</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Resume</strong></td>
<td>Resume child terminated with <code>resume_agent</code></td>
<td>Continue using existing session with <code>task_id</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Role System</strong></td>
<td><code>.toml</code> file based role config</td>
<td>combination of permission ruleset + prompt</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Metadata</strong></td>
<td><code>parent_thread_id</code>, <code>depth</code>, <code>agent_path</code></td>
<td><code>parentID</code> (session relation only)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>OpenCode's approach is simpler, but makes real-time interaction (child asking parent questions, streaming intermediate results) more difficult. This is because there is no event relay layer like Codex's <code>codex_delegate</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Technical Reference</h2>

<h2>Change history</h2>
