<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>005_subagents-collab/05_oc_subagent.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>OpenCode 에이전트/서브에이전트 시스템 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — subagent/collaboration dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode의 에이전트 시스템은 Codex(Rust)와 달리 <strong>TypeScript + Effect-TS</strong> 위에서 동작하며, 서브에이전트를 별도 프로세스가 아닌 <strong>child session</strong> 으로 구현한다. 핵심 아이디어는 간단하다: 에이전트는 <code>Agent.Info</code> 레코드로 정의되고, 서브에이전트 호출은 <code>TaskTool</code>이 새 <code>Session</code>을 만들어 <code>SessionPrompt.prompt()</code>를 재귀적으로 실행하는 구조다.</p>
<p>Codex가 <code>spawn_agent</code> / <code>send_input</code> / <code>wait_agent</code> / <code>close_agent</code>라는 다섯 개 핸들러로 런타임 제어를 노출한 것과 비교하면, OpenCode는 <strong>task tool 하나</strong>로 전체 서브에이전트 수명주기를 감싼다. 별도의 메시징 프로토콜이 없는 대신 session의 <code>parentID</code> 관계와 permission 상속으로 계층을 표현한다.</p>
<p>이 설계가 흥미로운 이유는 세 가지다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>에이전트 정의가 config 수준이다.</strong> <code>Agent.Info</code>는 이름, 모드(<code>primary</code> / <code>subagent</code>), permission ruleset, system prompt, model override, temperature 등을 담는 Zod 스키마일 뿐이고, 런타임 로직은 공유한다.</li>
<li><strong>Permission이 에이전트의 역할을 결정한다.</strong> <code>explore</code> 에이전트가 읽기 전용인 이유는 <code>edit: deny</code>, <code>write: deny</code>가 아니라 <code>*: deny</code> 뒤에 <code>grep: allow</code>, <code>glob: allow</code> 등 허용 목록만 열었기 때문이다.</li>
<li><strong>Effect-TS <code>ServiceMap</code> 패턴</strong>으로 <code>Agent.Service</code>를 의존성 주입하므로, 테스트와 교체가 용이하다.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph "Primary Agents"
        BUILD["build&#x3C;br/>(기본 에이전트)"]
        PLAN["plan&#x3C;br/>(읽기 전용 계획)"]
    end

    subgraph "Subagents"
        GENERAL["general&#x3C;br/>(범용 하위 에이전트)"]
        EXPLORE["explore&#x3C;br/>(코드 탐색 전용)"]
    end

    subgraph "Hidden / Internal"
        COMPACT["compaction&#x3C;br/>(컨텍스트 요약)"]
        TITLE["title&#x3C;br/>(세션 제목 생성)"]
        SUMMARY["summary&#x3C;br/>(대화 요약)"]
    end

    BUILD -->|"TaskTool"| GENERAL
    BUILD -->|"TaskTool"| EXPLORE
    PLAN -->|"TaskTool"| EXPLORE
    GENERAL -->|"TaskTool"| EXPLORE
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. 에이전트 레지스트리 — <code>Agent.Service</code></h2>
<p>에이전트 정의는 <code>agent.ts</code>의 <code>layer</code> 내부에서 빌드된다. 네이티브 에이전트 6종이 하드코딩되어 있고, 사용자 설정(<code>Config.agent</code>)으로 커스텀 에이전트를 추가하거나 기존 에이전트를 비활성화(<code>disable: true</code>)할 수 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/agent/agent.ts — 네이티브 에이전트 정의 패턴
const agents: Record&#x3C;string, Info> = {
  build: {
    name: "build",
    description: "The default agent. Executes tools based on configured permissions.",
    mode: "primary",
    native: true,
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, Permission.fromConfig({
      question: "allow",
      plan_enter: "allow",
    }), user),
    options: {},
  },
  explore: {
    name: "explore",
    mode: "subagent",
    native: true,
    prompt: PROMPT_EXPLORE,              // 전용 system prompt
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, Permission.fromConfig({
      "*": "deny",                        // 모든 도구 차단 후
      grep: "allow", glob: "allow",       // 읽기 도구만 허용
      list: "allow", bash: "allow",
      read: "allow",
    }), user),
    options: {},
  },
  // ... general, plan, compaction, title, summary
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>모드 분류:</strong></p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>모드</th>
<th>의미</th>
<th>대표 에이전트</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>primary</code></td>
<td>사용자가 직접 선택하여 대화하는 에이전트</td>
<td><code>build</code>, <code>plan</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>subagent</code></td>
<td>다른 에이전트가 <code>TaskTool</code>로 호출하는 하위 에이전트</td>
<td><code>general</code>, <code>explore</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>all</code></td>
<td>두 용도 모두 가능 (커스텀 에이전트 기본값)</td>
<td>사용자 정의</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>히든 에이전트(<code>compaction</code>, <code>title</code>, <code>summary</code>)는 UI에 노출되지 않고 시스템 내부에서만 사용된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. 서브에이전트 호출 — <code>TaskTool</code></h2>
<p>서브에이전트의 전체 수명주기는 <code>TaskTool</code> 하나에 집약된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Parent as 부모 세션 (build)
    participant Task as TaskTool.execute()
    participant Child as 자식 세션
    participant Prompt as SessionPrompt.prompt()

    Parent->>Task: task({ subagent_type: "explore", prompt: "..." })
    Task->>Task: Permission 체크 (ask)
    Task->>Child: Session.create({ parentID })
    Task->>Prompt: SessionPrompt.prompt({ sessionID: child, agent: "explore" })
    Prompt->>Prompt: 루프 (LLM 호출 + 도구 실행)
    Prompt-->>Task: 결과 반환
    Task-->>Parent: output + task_id
</code></pre>
<h3>핵심 실행 흐름</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/tool/task.ts — TaskTool의 execute 핵심
async execute(params, ctx) {
  // 1. permission 확인
  await ctx.ask({
    permission: "task",
    patterns: [params.subagent_type],
    always: ["*"],
  })

  // 2. 에이전트 조회
  const agent = await Agent.get(params.subagent_type)

  // 3. 자식 세션 생성 (또는 task_id로 기존 세션 재개)
  const session = params.task_id
    ? await Session.get(SessionID.make(params.task_id))
    : await Session.create({
        parentID: ctx.sessionID,
        title: params.description + ` (@${agent.name} subagent)`,
        permission: [
          { permission: "todowrite", pattern: "*", action: "deny" },
          { permission: "todoread",  pattern: "*", action: "deny" },
          // task 권한이 없으면 재귀 호출 차단
          ...(!hasTaskPermission ? [{ permission: "task", pattern: "*", action: "deny" }] : []),
        ],
      })

  // 4. 자식 세션에서 프롬프트 실행
  const result = await SessionPrompt.prompt({
    sessionID: session.id,
    model: agent.model ?? parentModel,
    agent: agent.name,
    tools: { todowrite: false, todoread: false },
    parts: promptParts,
  })

  return { output: result.text, title: params.description }
}
</code></pre>
<p>주목할 점:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>세션 재개</strong>: <code>task_id</code>를 넘기면 이전 자식 세션을 이어서 사용한다. 이는 부모가 여러 턴에 걸쳐 같은 서브에이전트와 대화할 수 있게 한다.</li>
<li><strong>재귀 차단</strong>: <code>hasTaskPermission</code>이 false면 자식에게 <code>task: deny</code>를 주어 서브에이전트가 또 서브에이전트를 부르는 것을 막는다 (단, <code>general</code>은 <code>task</code> 권한이 있어 재귀 가능).</li>
<li><strong>TODO 도구 차단</strong>: 자식 세션에서는 <code>todowrite</code> / <code>todoread</code>를 강제 비활성화하여 부모의 할 일 목록을 오염시키지 않는다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>3. 세션 계층과 상태 공유</h2>
<h3>부모-자식 관계</h3>
<pre><code>┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  parent session (build)                  │
│  id: "session_abc123"                    │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │ child session (explore)             │ │
│  │ id: "session_def456"                │ │
│  │ parentID: "session_abc123"          │ │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────┘ │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │ child session (general)             │ │
│  │ id: "session_ghi789"                │ │
│  │ parentID: "session_abc123"          │ │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
</code></pre>
<p>세션 테이블(<code>SessionTable</code>)에 <code>parent_id</code> 컬럼이 있고, <code>Session.children(parentID)</code>로 자식 목록을 조회한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/session.sql.ts
export const SessionTable = sqliteTable("session", {
  id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>().primaryKey(),
  parent_id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>(),    // 부모 세션 참조
  permission: text({ mode: "json" }).$type&#x3C;Permission.Ruleset>(),
  // ...
})
</code></pre>
<h3>상속되는 것과 상속되지 않는 것</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>항목</th>
<th>상속 여부</th>
<th>근거</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>model (provider + modelID)</td>
<td><strong>상속</strong> (agent 설정으로 재정의 가능)</td>
<td><code>agent.model ?? parentModel</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>permission (기본값)</td>
<td><strong>부분 상속</strong> — 자식 세션에 별도 ruleset 적용</td>
<td><code>Session.create({ permission: [...] })</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>system prompt</td>
<td><strong>재정의</strong> — 에이전트의 <code>prompt</code> 필드 사용</td>
<td><code>agent.prompt ?? SystemPrompt.provider(model)</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>developer instructions (AGENTS.md)</td>
<td><strong>상속</strong> — <code>InstructionPrompt.system()</code> 공유</td>
<td>같은 프로젝트 인스턴스</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>대화 히스토리</td>
<td><strong>격리</strong> — 자식은 자체 메시지만 가짐</td>
<td>별도 세션이므로 <code>messages</code> 독립</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>파일 시스템 (cwd/worktree)</td>
<td><strong>공유</strong> — 같은 <code>Instance</code></td>
<td>프로세스 내 공유</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tool registry</td>
<td><strong>공유</strong> (permission으로 필터링)</td>
<td><code>ToolRegistry</code>는 싱글턴</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>temperature / topP</td>
<td><strong>재정의</strong> — 에이전트별 설정</td>
<td><code>agent.temperature</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Codex와의 핵심 차이: Codex는 <code>developer_instructions</code>를 명시적으로 복사하지만 OpenCode는 같은 프로세스 내에서 <code>InstructionPrompt</code> 모듈을 공유하므로 자연스럽게 상속된다. 반면 대화 히스토리는 완전히 격리된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. Permission 시스템과 에이전트 역할</h2>
<p>Permission은 에이전트의 "능력"을 정의하는 핵심 메커니즘이다. 도구 실행 시 <code>Permission.evaluate(toolName, pattern, ruleset)</code>을 호출하여 <code>allow</code> / <code>deny</code> / <code>ask</code>를 판단한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/permission/index.ts — Permission 평가 흐름
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Ruleset[]): Rule {
  return evalRule(permission, pattern, ...rulesets)
}

// src/session/prompt.ts — 도구 실행 시 permission 체크
async ask(req) {
  await Permission.ask({
    ...req,
    sessionID: input.session.id,
    ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),
  })
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>에이전트별 Permission 프로파일:</strong></p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>에이전트</th>
<th>핵심 permission</th>
<th>효과</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>build</code></td>
<td><code>question: allow</code>, <code>plan_enter: allow</code>, 나머지 기본값</td>
<td>모든 도구 사용 가능, 편집 가능</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>plan</code></td>
<td><code>edit: deny</code>(계획 파일만 예외), <code>plan_exit: allow</code></td>
<td>읽기 전용 + 계획 파일만 편집</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>explore</code></td>
<td><code>*: deny</code>, <code>grep/glob/read/bash: allow</code></td>
<td>순수 읽기 에이전트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>general</code></td>
<td><code>todoread: deny</code>, <code>todowrite: deny</code></td>
<td>범용이지만 TODO 접근 불가</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>compaction</code></td>
<td><code>*: deny</code></td>
<td>도구 없이 요약만 수행</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>세션 레벨 permission (<code>session.permission</code>)은 에이전트 레벨과 <code>merge</code>되어 최종 ruleset을 형성한다:</p>
<pre><code>최종 ruleset = Permission.merge(agent.permission, session.permission)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. System Prompt 조립</h2>
<p>에이전트의 system prompt는 여러 레이어가 합쳐져 구성된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["agent.prompt&#x3C;br/>또는&#x3C;br/>SystemPrompt.provider(model)"] --> SYSTEM
    B["SystemPrompt.environment(model)"] --> SYSTEM
    C["SystemPrompt.skills(agent)"] --> SYSTEM
    D["InstructionPrompt.system()&#x3C;br/>(AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md)"] --> SYSTEM
    E["user.system&#x3C;br/>(커스텀 시스템 프롬프트)"] --> SYSTEM

    SYSTEM["최종 system prompt&#x3C;br/>(LLM.stream에 전달)"]
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/llm.ts — system prompt 조립
const system: string[] = []
system.push([
  // 에이전트 전용 prompt가 있으면 사용, 없으면 모델별 기본 prompt
  ...(input.agent.prompt ? [input.agent.prompt] : SystemPrompt.provider(input.model)),
  ...input.system,
  ...(input.user.system ? [input.user.system] : []),
].filter((x) => x).join("\n"))
</code></pre>
<p><code>explore</code> 에이전트는 <code>PROMPT_EXPLORE</code> 텍스트가 <code>agent.prompt</code>에 설정되어 있어, 일반 provider prompt 대신 "파일 탐색 전문가" 프롬프트를 사용한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. 커스텀 에이전트 — 설정과 동적 생성</h2>
<h3>설정 기반 커스텀 에이전트</h3>
<p><code>opencode.json</code> 또는 <code>.opencode/agents/*.md</code> 파일로 커스텀 에이전트를 정의한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/config.ts — Agent 설정 스키마
export const Agent = z.object({
  model: ModelId.optional(),
  prompt: z.string().optional(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]).optional(),
  description: z.string().optional(),
  steps: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
  permission: Permission.optional(),
  disable: z.boolean().optional(),
  // ...
})
</code></pre>
<h3>AI 기반 동적 생성</h3>
<p><code>Agent.generate()</code>는 LLM을 사용해 에이전트 설정을 자동 생성한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/agent/agent.ts — Agent.generate
generate: Effect.fn("Agent.generate")(function* (input) {
  // PROMPT_GENERATE 시스템 프롬프트로 LLM 호출
  const result = await generateObject({
    messages: [{ role: "user", content: `Create an agent: "${input.description}"` }],
    schema: z.object({
      identifier: z.string(),
      whenToUse: z.string(),
      systemPrompt: z.string(),
    }),
  })
  return result
})
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>7. Subtask Part — 명령어를 통한 서브에이전트 실행</h2>
<p><code>TaskTool</code> 외에도, <strong>slash command</strong>(<code>/check</code>, <code>/review</code> 등)를 통해 서브에이전트를 실행하는 경로가 있다. 이 경우 <code>SubtaskPart</code>가 메시지에 삽입되고, <code>SessionPrompt.loop</code>가 이를 감지하여 <code>TaskTool.execute()</code>를 직접 호출한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/message-v2.ts — SubtaskPart 스키마
export const SubtaskPart = PartBase.extend({
  type: z.literal("subtask"),
  prompt: z.string(),          // 서브에이전트에 전달할 프롬프트
  description: z.string(),     // 표시용 설명
  agent: z.string(),           // 대상 에이전트 이름
  model: z.object({            // 선택적 모델 오버라이드
    providerID: ProviderID.zod,
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
  }).optional(),
  command: z.string().optional(),
})
</code></pre>
<p>이 경로는 <code>SessionPrompt.loop</code> 내부에서 처리된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/session/prompt.ts — subtask 처리 (loop 내부)
if (task?.type === "subtask") {
  const taskTool = await TaskTool.init()
  const taskCtx = { /* ... bypassAgentCheck: true ... */ }
  const result = await taskTool.execute({
    prompt: task.prompt,
    description: task.description,
    subagent_type: task.agent,
    command: task.command,
  }, taskCtx)
  continue  // 루프 계속
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>8. Effect-TS 패턴</h2>
<p>OpenCode는 Effect-TS의 <code>ServiceMap</code> 패턴을 일관되게 사용한다. <code>Agent.Service</code>도 이 패턴을 따른다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/agent/agent.ts — Effect-TS 서비스 패턴
export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(Service, Effect.gen(function* () {
  const state = yield* InstanceState.make&#x3C;State>(
    Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
      // 에이전트 레지스트리 빌드
      return { get, list, defaultAgent }
    }),
  )
  return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent, generate })
}))
</code></pre>
<p><code>InstanceState</code>는 프로젝트 디렉토리 단위로 캐시를 관리한다. 에이전트 목록은 프로젝트마다 다를 수 있으므로 (<code>.opencode/agents/</code> 파일이 다르므로) 이 캐시가 올바르게 격리된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>9. Codex 서브에이전트와의 비교</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>측면</th>
<th>Codex (Rust)</th>
<th>OpenCode (TypeScript)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>서브에이전트 구현</strong></td>
<td>5개 tool handler (<code>spawn_agent</code>, <code>send_input</code> 등)</td>
<td><code>TaskTool</code> 하나</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>수명주기</strong></td>
<td>명시적 (<code>spawn</code> → <code>send</code> → <code>wait</code> → <code>close</code>)</td>
<td>암묵적 (호출 → 완료 → 결과 반환)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>상태</strong></td>
<td>부모와 child thread 사이 실시간 양방향 통신</td>
<td>단방향 (부모가 호출하고 결과만 받음)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>설정 상속</strong></td>
<td><code>build_agent_shared_config()</code>로 명시적 복사</td>
<td>같은 프로세스 내 자연 공유 + permission으로 제한</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>approval 라우팅</strong></td>
<td><code>codex_delegate</code>가 child → parent로 중계</td>
<td>같은 <code>Permission.Service</code> 인스턴스 공유</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>재개</strong></td>
<td><code>resume_agent</code>로 종료된 child 재개</td>
<td><code>task_id</code>로 기존 세션 이어서 사용</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>역할 시스템</strong></td>
<td><code>.toml</code> 파일 기반 role config</td>
<td>permission ruleset + prompt 조합</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>메타데이터</strong></td>
<td><code>parent_thread_id</code>, <code>depth</code>, <code>agent_path</code></td>
<td><code>parentID</code> (세션 관계만)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>OpenCode의 접근은 더 단순하지만, 그만큼 실시간 상호작용(child가 부모에게 질문하기, 중간 결과 스트리밍)이 어렵다. Codex의 <code>codex_delegate</code> 같은 이벤트 중계 계층이 없기 때문이다.</p>
<hr>

<h3>포크 체크리스트</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 에이전트가 config 레벨 정의임을 확인했다 (런타임 로직 공유)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> TaskTool 하나로 서브에이전트 수명주기를 관리하는 구조를 파악했다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Permission이 에이전트의 능력 범위를 결정하는 메커니즘을 정리했다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> session <code>parentID</code>로 계층 관계를 표현하는 방식을 확인했다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Effect-TS <code>ServiceMap</code> 패턴이 에이전트 서비스에 적용된 방식을 기록했다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 실시간 양방향 통신이 필요한 경우 Codex 방식의 delegate 계층을 추가할지 결정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 커스텀 에이전트의 <code>.opencode/agents/</code> 파일 형식을 우리 포크에서 그대로 가져갈지 정해야 한다</li>
</ul>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2025-07-18: OpenCode 에이전트 시스템의 정의 구조, TaskTool 기반 서브에이전트 호출, Permission 메커니즘, Effect-TS 패턴을 분석·정리했다.</li>
</ul>
21:["$","$L2f","20-axis-05-subagent",{"id":"20-axis-05-subagent","order":29,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 05: Subagents","description":"005_subagents-collab/05_oc_subagent.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$4c"}}]}]
4d:Tdaa4,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 06: App surfaces</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — app/server/client surfaces.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OpenCode의 client surface는 <strong>단일 HTTP 서버 + 다중 클라이언트</strong> 구조다. 코어 패키지 <code>opencode</code>가 Hono 기반 REST+SSE 서버를 올리면, SDK(<code>@opencode-ai/sdk</code>)가 OpenAPI 코드생성 클라이언트를 제공하고, 그 위에 TUI·데스크톱·웹 UI가 동일한 HTTP 경계를 통해 붙는다. Codex의 <code>app-server-protocol</code>처럼 별도 wire schema</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["opencode core (Bun + Hono)"] --> B["REST API + SSE"]</li>
<li>B --> C["@opencode-ai/sdk (코드생성)"]</li>
<li>C --> D["TUI (Ink)"]</li>
<li>C --> E["desktop — Tauri"]</li>
<li>C --> F["desktop — Electron"]</li>
<li>C --> G["web app (SolidJS)"]</li>
<li>B --> H["app.opencode.ai (reverse proxy)"]</li>
<li>A --> I["OpenAPI 3.1 spec"]</li>
<li>I --> C</li>
</ul>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
export function listen(opts: {
  port: number
  hostname: string
  mdns?: boolean
  mdnsDomain?: string
  cors?: string[]
}) {
  const app = createApp(opts)
  const server = Bun.serve({ hostname: opts.hostname, port, fetch: app.fetch, websocket })
  if (opts.mdns) MDNS.publish(server.port!, opts.mdnsDomain)
  return server
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-text">OPTIONS bypass → Basic Auth → request logger → CORS
  → workspace context binding → WorkspaceRouterMiddleware → routes
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/routes/session.ts
// 동기: 응답을 stream으로 반환
.post("/:sessionID/message", ..., async (c) => {
  return stream(c, async (stream) => {
    const msg = await SessionPrompt.prompt({ ...body, sessionID })
    stream.write(JSON.stringify(msg))
  })
})

// 비동기: 즉시 204 반환, 결과는 SSE로 전달
.post("/:sessionID/prompt_async", ..., async (c) => {
  c.status(204)
  return stream(c, async () => {
    SessionPrompt.prompt({ ...body, sessionID }).catch(...)
  })
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/routes/pty.ts
.get("/:ptyID/connect", upgradeWebSocket(async (c) => {
  // Bun WebSocket upgrade → bidirectional PTY I/O
  return {
    async onOpen(_event, ws) {
      handler = await Pty.connect(id, ws.raw, cursor)
    },
    onMessage(event) { handler?.onMessage(event.data) },
    onClose()       { handler?.onClose() },
  }
}))
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts
export function define&#x3C;Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
  type: Type, properties: Properties
) {
  const result = { type, properties }
  registry.set(type, result)
  return result
}
</code></pre>

</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts
export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config &#x26; { directory?: string }) {
  if (config?.directory) {
    config.headers = {
      ...config.headers,
      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),
    }
  }
  const client = createClient(config)
  return new OpencodeClient({ client })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts
export async function createOpencodeServer(options?: ServerOptions) {
  const proc = spawn("opencode", ["serve", `--hostname=${hostname}`, `--port=${port}`], {
    env: { ...process.env, OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(config ?? {}) },
  })
  // stdout에서 "opencode server listening on http://..." 파싱
  return { url, close() { proc.kill() } }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/sdk/js/src/index.ts
export async function createOpencode(options?: ServerOptions) {
  const server = await createOpencodeServer(options)
  const client = createOpencodeClient({ baseUrl: server.url })
  return { client, server }
}
</code></pre>

  const proc = spawn("opencode", args, { stdio: "inherit", ... })
  return { close() { proc.kill() } }
}
</code></pre>

.all("/*", async (c) => {
  const response = await proxy(`https://app.opencode.ai${path}`, { ... })
  response.headers.set("Content-Security-Policy", csp(hash))
  return response
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 140_opencode/packages/desktop/src-tauri/src/server.rs
pub fn spawn_local_server(
    app: AppHandle, hostname: String, port: u32, password: String,
) -> (CommandChild, HealthCheck) {
    let (child, exit) = cli::serve(&#x26;app, &#x26;hostname, port, &#x26;password);
    let health_check = HealthCheck(tokio::spawn(async move {
        loop {
            tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(100)).await;
            if check_health(&#x26;url, Some(&#x26;password)).await { return Ok(()); }
        }
    }));
    (child, health_check)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph "packages"
        APP["@opencode-ai/app&#x3C;br/>(SolidJS UI)"]
        UI["@opencode-ai/ui&#x3C;br/>(테마·컴포넌트)"]
        SDK["@opencode-ai/sdk"]
    end
    subgraph "shells"
        TAURI["desktop (Tauri v2)"]
        ELECTRON["desktop-electron"]
    end
    TAURI --> APP
    ELECTRON --> APP
    APP --> UI
    APP --> SDK
    SDK -->|HTTP| SERVER["opencode serve"]
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>App Server · Client Surface — OpenCode</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — app/server/client surfaces.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>1. Architecture overview</h2>
<p>OpenCode's client surface is a <strong>single HTTP server + multiple clients</strong> structure. When the core package <code>opencode</code> installs a Hono-based REST+SSE server, the SDK (<code>@opencode-ai/sdk</code>) provides an OpenAPI code generation client, and TUI, desktop, and web UI attach to it through the same HTTP boundary. Like Codex's <code>app-server-protocol</code>, a separate wire schema layer is not extracted. Instead, when the Zod schema is declared in the Hono route, <code>hono-openapi</code> automatically generates the OpenAPI 3.1 specification, and <code>@hey-api/openapi-ts</code> is a one-stop pipeline that extracts a type-safe SDK.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["opencode core (Bun + Hono)"] --> B["REST API + SSE"]
    B --> C["@opencode-ai/sdk (코드생성)"]
    C --> D["TUI (Ink)"]
    C --> E["desktop — Tauri"]
    C --> F["desktop — Electron"]
    C --> G["web app (SolidJS)"]
    B --> H["app.opencode.ai (reverse proxy)"]
    A --> I["OpenAPI 3.1 spec"]
    I --> C
</code></pre>
<p>Here's a summary of the key differences:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Comparison Items</th>
<th>Codex (Rust)</th>
<th>OpenCode (TypeScript)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Protocol Layer</td>
<td>Separate <code>app-server-protocol</code> crate</td>
<td>Inlining Zod schema into Hono route</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>transport</td>
<td>stdio + WebSocket</td>
<td>HTTP + SSE (+ WebSocket for PTY)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Create Client</td>
<td>Manual Rust facade</td>
<td>OpenAPI → <code>@hey-api/openapi-ts</code> code generation</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Desktop</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Tauri + Electron double wrapper</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK version management</td>
<td>v1 only</td>
<td>v1 + v2 (workspace support)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>2. Server runtime</h2>
<h3>2.1 Hono app creation and bootstrapping</h3>
<p>The server entry point is <code>Server.createApp</code>, opens HTTP with <code>Bun.serve</code> and optionally publishes mDNS.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
export function listen(opts: {
  port: number
  hostname: string
  mdns?: boolean
  mdnsDomain?: string
  cors?: string[]
}) {
  const app = createApp(opts)
  const server = Bun.serve({ hostname: opts.hostname, port, fetch: app.fetch, websocket })
  if (opts.mdns) MDNS.publish(server.port!, opts.mdnsDomain)
  return server
}
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><strong>CORS</strong>: Automatically allow <code>localhost</code>, <code>127.0.0.1</code>, <code>tauri://localhost</code>, <code>*.opencode.ai</code></li>
<li><strong>Authentication</strong>: Basic Auth is applied if the <code>OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD</code> environment variable is present.</li>
<li><strong>Workspace Routing</strong>: In every request, determine the project directory with <code>x-opencode-directory</code> or <code>?directory=</code> and wrap it in <code>Instance.provide</code> context.</li>
</ul>
<h3>2.2 Middleware Pipeline</h3>
<pre><code>OPTIONS bypass → Basic Auth → request logger → CORS
  → workspace context binding → WorkspaceRouterMiddleware → routes
</code></pre>
<p><code>Instance.provide</code> creates a per-project isolated context for each request. This pattern allows <strong>one server process to serve multiple projects simultaneously</strong>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. API Surface Map</h2>
<h3>3.1 Route Group</h3>

<h3>3.2 Endpoints to note</h3>
<p><strong>Session Prompt — Synchronous and Asynchronous Dual Path</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/routes/session.ts
// 동기: 응답을 stream으로 반환
.post("/:sessionID/message", ..., async (c) => {
  return stream(c, async (stream) => {
    const msg = await SessionPrompt.prompt({ ...body, sessionID })
    stream.write(JSON.stringify(msg))
  })
})

// 비동기: 즉시 204 반환, 결과는 SSE로 전달
.post("/:sessionID/prompt_async", ..., async (c) => {
  c.status(204)
  return stream(c, async () => {
    SessionPrompt.prompt({ ...body, sessionID }).catch(...)
  })
})
</code></pre>
<p>The synchronous method is used when waiting for results directly from CLI or SDK, and the asynchronous method is used when receiving real-time updates through SSE events from TUI/Web.</p>
<p><strong>PTY WebSocket</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/routes/pty.ts
.get("/:ptyID/connect", upgradeWebSocket(async (c) => {
  // Bun WebSocket upgrade → bidirectional PTY I/O
  return {
    async onOpen(_event, ws) {
      handler = await Pty.connect(id, ws.raw, cursor)
    },
    onMessage(event) { handler?.onMessage(event.data) },
    onClose()       { handler?.onClose() },
  }
}))
</code></pre>
<p>It is the only surface that uses WebSockets. All remaining real-time communications are SSE.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. SSE event system</h2>
<h3>4.1 Event Bus Architecture</h3>
<p>OpenCode declares type-safe events with <code>BusEvent.define</code> and subscribes globally with <code>Bus.subscribeAll</code>. The SSE endpoint bridges this bus and passes it to the client.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts
export function define&#x3C;Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
  type: Type, properties: Properties
) {
  const result = { type, properties }
  registry.set(type, result)
  return result
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 3 types of SSE channels</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Channel</th>
<th>path</th>
<th>scope</th>
<th>Use</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>instance event</td>
<td><code>GET /event</code></td>
<td>Current Project</td>
<td>Session, message, file change, etc.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Global Events</td>
<td><code>GET /global/event</code></td>
<td>full server</td>
<td>Instance creation/termination, upgrade</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Global Sync Event</td>
<td><code>GET /global/sync-event</code></td>
<td>full server</td>
<td>Versioned synchronization events</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>4.3 Main event types</h3>
<pre><code>session.updated          session.error           session.diff
session.status.updated   session.status.idle     session.compacted
message.part.delta       permission.asked        permission.replied
question.asked           question.replied        question.rejected
pty.created              pty.updated             pty.exited         pty.deleted
mcp.tools_changed        project.updated         lsp.updated
file.edited              file.watcher.updated
todo.updated             vcs.branch.updated
server.connected         server.heartbeat        global.disposed
installation.updated     installation.update_available
worktree.ready           worktree.failed
workspace.ready          workspace.failed
command.executed
</code></pre>
<p>Heartbeats are sent every 10 seconds to prevent proxy stream stalls.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/routes/event.ts
const heartbeat = setInterval(() => {
  q.push(JSON.stringify({ type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} }))
}, 10_000)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. SDK package (<code>@opencode-ai/sdk</code>)</h2>
<h3>5.1 Structure</h3>
<p>The SDK is a type-safe client whose code is generated from the OpenAPI specification. Both versions v1 and v2 coexist.</p>
<pre><code>packages/sdk/js/
├── src/
│   ├── index.ts          # createOpencode (server + client 한 번에)
│   ├── client.ts         # createOpencodeClient
│   ├── server.ts         # createOpencodeServer, createOpencodeTui
│   ├── gen/              # 코드생성 결과물
│   │   ├── sdk.gen.ts    # OpencodeClient 클래스
│   │   ├── types.gen.ts  # 요청/응답 타입
│   │   └── client/       # HTTP 클라이언트 기반
│   └── v2/               # 워크스페이스 지원 추가된 v2
│       ├── client.ts
│       ├── server.ts
│       └── gen/
└── package.json          # exports: ".", "./client", "./server", "./v2", "./v2/client"
</code></pre>
<h3>5.2 Creating a client</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts
export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config &#x26; { directory?: string }) {
  if (config?.directory) {
    config.headers = {
      ...config.headers,
      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),
    }
  }
  const client = createClient(config)
  return new OpencodeClient({ client })
}
</code></pre>
<p>If you pass the <code>directory</code> option, the <code>x-opencode-directory</code> header is automatically attached. The v2 client additionally receives <code>experimental_workspaceID</code> and sets the <code>x-opencode-workspace</code> header.</p>
<h3>5.3 Server Launcher</h3>
<p>The SDK includes a server launcher that <code>spawn</code>s the <code>opencode serve</code> CLI.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts
export async function createOpencodeServer(options?: ServerOptions) {
  const proc = spawn("opencode", ["serve", `--hostname=${hostname}`, `--port=${port}`], {
    env: { ...process.env, OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(config ?? {}) },
  })
  // stdout에서 "opencode server listening on http://..." 파싱
  return { url, close() { proc.kill() } }
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>createOpencode</code>는 server + client를 한 번에 만드는 편의 함수다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/sdk/js/src/index.ts
export async function createOpencode(options?: ServerOptions) {
  const server = await createOpencodeServer(options)
  const client = createOpencodeClient({ baseUrl: server.url })
  return { client, server }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>5.4 TUI Launcher</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">export function createOpencodeTui(options?: TuiOptions) {
  const proc = spawn("opencode", args, { stdio: "inherit", ... })
  return { close() { proc.kill() } }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6. Web package (<code>@opencode-ai/web</code>)</h2>
<h3>6.1 역할과 스택</h3>
<p><code>packages/web</code> is a <strong>documentation site</strong>. It is a combination of Astro + Starlight + SolidJS and is distributed on Cloudflare. Supports i18n in 18 languages.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 140_opencode/packages/web/astro.config.mjs
export default defineConfig({
  site: config.url,
  base: "/docs",
  output: "server",
  adapter: cloudflare({ imageService: "passthrough" }),
  integrations: [solidJs(), starlight({ title: "OpenCode", ... })],
})
</code></pre>
<p>When building, the config schema is extracted from <code>packages/opencode</code> as JSON and included in the document.</p>
<h3>6.2 Proxy structure</h3>
<p>Reverse proxy routes that do not match the server's last <code>all("/*")</code> route to <code>app.opencode.ai</code>. This allows desktop apps to access the web UI through the local server.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
.all("/*", async (c) => {
  const response = await proxy(`https://app.opencode.ai${path}`, { ... })
  response.headers.set("Content-Security-Policy", csp(hash))
  return response
})
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>7. Desktop Wrapper</h2>
<h3>7.1 Tauri Desktop (<code>packages/desktop</code>)</h3>
<p>It is based on Tauri v2. Run <code>opencode serve</code> with the Rust sidecar, wait for the health check, and then launch the SolidJS app in WebView.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 140_opencode/packages/desktop/src-tauri/src/server.rs
pub fn spawn_local_server(
    app: AppHandle, hostname: String, port: u32, password: String,
) -> (CommandChild, HealthCheck) {
    let (child, exit) = cli::serve(&#x26;app, &#x26;hostname, port, &#x26;password);
    let health_check = HealthCheck(tokio::spawn(async move {
        loop {
            tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(100)).await;
            if check_health(&#x26;url, Some(&#x26;password)).await { return Ok(()); }
        }
    }));
    (child, health_check)
}
</code></pre>
<p>Tauri plugins: clipboard, deep-link, dialog, opener, os, notification, process, shell, store, updater, http, window-state</p>
<h3>7.2 Electron Desktop (<code>packages/desktop-electron</code>)</h3>
<p>It is based on Electron + electron-vite. It shares the same <code>@opencode-ai/app</code> UI package as the Tauri version and is packaged with electron-builder. Connect to the local server through the same SDK client.</p>
<h3>7.3 Shared App UI (<code>packages/app</code>)</h3>
<p>It is a common UI library based on SolidJS. Both Tauri desktop and Electron desktop depend on this package. Playwright-based E2E testing is included.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph "packages"
        APP["@opencode-ai/app&#x3C;br/>(SolidJS UI)"]
        UI["@opencode-ai/ui&#x3C;br/>(테마·컴포넌트)"]
        SDK["@opencode-ai/sdk"]
    end
    subgraph "shells"
        TAURI["desktop (Tauri v2)"]
        ELECTRON["desktop-electron"]
    end
    TAURI --> APP
    ELECTRON --> APP
    APP --> UI
    APP --> SDK
    SDK -->|HTTP| SERVER["opencode serve"]
</code></pre>
<hr>

<hr>
<h2>9. Reuse seam</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>seam</th>
<th>Reason</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Automatic generation of OpenAPI specifications</td>
<td>Just create a Zod schema and document, SDK, and type come out at once</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>BusEvent</code> type system</td>
<td>If you register an event with discriminated union, SSE payload schema is automatically</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Instance.provide</code> context</td>
<td>Project isolation per request is guaranteed at the server level</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>@opencode-ai/app</code> shared UI</td>
<td>No need to rewrite UI code when changing desktop shell</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK server launcher</td>
<td>Server process management is encapsulated in one <code>createOpencodeServer</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>reverse proxy pattern</td>
<td>Local server provides web UI transparently</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>10. Combined Risk</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>risk</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Bun-only runtime</td>
<td>It is tightly coupled to the Bun API, including <code>Bun.serve</code>, <code>bun:ffi</code>, and <code>websocket</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Absence of protocol layer</td>
<td>Since the Hono route is a wire schema, if you change the server framework, you have to rewrite the contract layer</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SSE one-way</td>
<td>The client → server direction requires a separate HTTP call. WebSocket redundancy burden</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Maintaining Dual Desktops</td>
<td>Tauri + Electron must maintain both shells simultaneously</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>app.opencode.ai</code> proxy dependency</td>
<td>The server's catch-all proxies to an external host, causing the web UI to break in offline environments.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK v1/v2 coexistence</td>
<td>There is a cost of maintaining both versions of the generated code</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>006_app-server-client-surfaces/06_oc_surface.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>App Server · Client Surface — OpenCode</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — app/server/client surfaces.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>1. 아키텍처 총론</h2>
<p>OpenCode의 client surface는 <strong>단일 HTTP 서버 + 다중 클라이언트</strong> 구조다. 코어 패키지 <code>opencode</code>가 Hono 기반 REST+SSE 서버를 올리면, SDK(<code>@opencode-ai/sdk</code>)가 OpenAPI 코드생성 클라이언트를 제공하고, 그 위에 TUI·데스크톱·웹 UI가 동일한 HTTP 경계를 통해 붙는다. Codex의 <code>app-server-protocol</code>처럼 별도 wire schema 계층을 뽑아내지 않았고, 대신 Hono 라우트에 Zod 스키마를 선언하면 <code>hono-openapi</code>가 OpenAPI 3.1 스펙을 자동 생성하고, <code>@hey-api/openapi-ts</code>가 타입 안전 SDK를 뽑아내는 원스톱 파이프라인이다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["opencode core (Bun + Hono)"] --> B["REST API + SSE"]
    B --> C["@opencode-ai/sdk (코드생성)"]
    C --> D["TUI (Ink)"]
    C --> E["desktop — Tauri"]
    C --> F["desktop — Electron"]
    C --> G["web app (SolidJS)"]
    B --> H["app.opencode.ai (reverse proxy)"]
    A --> I["OpenAPI 3.1 spec"]
    I --> C
</code></pre>
<p>핵심 차이점을 정리하면 이렇다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>비교 항목</th>
<th>Codex (Rust)</th>
<th>OpenCode (TypeScript)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>프로토콜 계층</td>
<td>별도 <code>app-server-protocol</code> crate</td>
<td>Hono 라우트에 Zod 스키마 인라인</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>transport</td>
<td>stdio + WebSocket</td>
<td>HTTP + SSE (+ PTY용 WebSocket)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>클라이언트 생성</td>
<td>수동 Rust facade</td>
<td>OpenAPI → <code>@hey-api/openapi-ts</code> 코드생성</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>데스크톱</td>
<td>없음</td>
<td>Tauri + Electron 이중 래퍼</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK 버전 관리</td>
<td>v1 only</td>
<td>v1 + v2 (workspace 지원)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>2. 서버 런타임</h2>
<h3>2.1 Hono 앱 생성과 부트스트랩</h3>
<p>서버 진입점은 <code>Server.createApp</code>이고, <code>Bun.serve</code>로 HTTP를 열고 선택적으로 mDNS를 publish한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
export function listen(opts: {
  port: number
  hostname: string
  mdns?: boolean
  mdnsDomain?: string
  cors?: string[]
}) {
  const app = createApp(opts)
  const server = Bun.serve({ hostname: opts.hostname, port, fetch: app.fetch, websocket })
  if (opts.mdns) MDNS.publish(server.port!, opts.mdnsDomain)
  return server
}
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><strong>CORS</strong>: <code>localhost</code>, <code>127.0.0.1</code>, <code>tauri://localhost</code>, <code>*.opencode.ai</code> 자동 허용</li>
<li><strong>인증</strong>: <code>OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD</code> 환경변수가 있으면 Basic Auth 적용</li>
<li><strong>워크스페이스 라우팅</strong>: 모든 요청에서 <code>x-opencode-directory</code> 또는 <code>?directory=</code> 로 프로젝트 디렉터리를 결정하고, <code>Instance.provide</code> 컨텍스트로 감싼다</li>
</ul>
<h3>2.2 미들웨어 파이프라인</h3>
<pre><code>OPTIONS bypass → Basic Auth → request logger → CORS
  → workspace context binding → WorkspaceRouterMiddleware → routes
</code></pre>
<p><code>Instance.provide</code>가 요청마다 프로젝트별 격리 컨텍스트를 만든다. 이 패턴 덕분에 <strong>하나의 서버 프로세스가 여러 프로젝트를 동시에 서빙</strong>할 수 있다.</p>
<hr>

<h3>3.2 주목할 엔드포인트</h3>
<p><strong>세션 프롬프트 — 동기와 비동기 이중 경로</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/routes/session.ts
// 동기: 응답을 stream으로 반환
.post("/:sessionID/message", ..., async (c) => {
  return stream(c, async (stream) => {
    const msg = await SessionPrompt.prompt({ ...body, sessionID })
    stream.write(JSON.stringify(msg))
  })
})

// 비동기: 즉시 204 반환, 결과는 SSE로 전달
.post("/:sessionID/prompt_async", ..., async (c) => {
  c.status(204)
  return stream(c, async () => {
    SessionPrompt.prompt({ ...body, sessionID }).catch(...)
  })
})
</code></pre>
<p>동기 방식은 CLI나 SDK 에서 결과를 직접 기다릴 때, 비동기 방식은 TUI/웹에서 SSE 이벤트로 실시간 업데이트를 받을 때 사용한다.</p>
<p><strong>PTY WebSocket</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/routes/pty.ts
.get("/:ptyID/connect", upgradeWebSocket(async (c) => {
  // Bun WebSocket upgrade → bidirectional PTY I/O
  return {
    async onOpen(_event, ws) {
      handler = await Pty.connect(id, ws.raw, cursor)
    },
    onMessage(event) { handler?.onMessage(event.data) },
    onClose()       { handler?.onClose() },
  }
}))
</code></pre>
<p>유일하게 WebSocket을 쓰는 표면이다. 나머지 실시간 통신은 모두 SSE다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. SSE 이벤트 시스템</h2>
<h3>4.1 이벤트 버스 아키텍처</h3>
<p>OpenCode는 <code>BusEvent.define</code>으로 타입 안전 이벤트를 선언하고, <code>Bus.subscribeAll</code>로 전역 구독한다. SSE 엔드포인트가 이 버스를 브릿지해 클라이언트에 전달한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts
export function define&#x3C;Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
  type: Type, properties: Properties
) {
  const result = { type, properties }
  registry.set(type, result)
  return result
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 SSE 채널 3종</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>채널</th>
<th>경로</th>
<th>스코프</th>
<th>용도</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>인스턴스 이벤트</td>
<td><code>GET /event</code></td>
<td>현재 프로젝트</td>
<td>세션·메시지·파일 변경 등</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>글로벌 이벤트</td>
<td><code>GET /global/event</code></td>
<td>전체 서버</td>
<td>인스턴스 생성/종료, 업그레이드</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>글로벌 싱크 이벤트</td>
<td><code>GET /global/sync-event</code></td>
<td>전체 서버</td>
<td>버전 관리된 동기화 이벤트</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>4.3 주요 이벤트 타입</h3>
<pre><code>session.updated          session.error           session.diff
session.status.updated   session.status.idle     session.compacted
message.part.delta       permission.asked        permission.replied
question.asked           question.replied        question.rejected
pty.created              pty.updated             pty.exited         pty.deleted
mcp.tools_changed        project.updated         lsp.updated
file.edited              file.watcher.updated
todo.updated             vcs.branch.updated
server.connected         server.heartbeat        global.disposed
installation.updated     installation.update_available
worktree.ready           worktree.failed
workspace.ready          workspace.failed
command.executed
</code></pre>
<p>heartbeat은 10초 간격으로 전송되어 프록시 스트림 스톨을 방지한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/routes/event.ts
const heartbeat = setInterval(() => {
  q.push(JSON.stringify({ type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} }))
}, 10_000)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. SDK 패키지 (<code>@opencode-ai/sdk</code>)</h2>
<h3>5.1 구조</h3>
<p>SDK는 OpenAPI 스펙에서 코드생성된 타입 안전 클라이언트다. v1과 v2 두 버전이 공존한다.</p>
<pre><code>packages/sdk/js/
├── src/
│   ├── index.ts          # createOpencode (server + client 한 번에)
│   ├── client.ts         # createOpencodeClient
│   ├── server.ts         # createOpencodeServer, createOpencodeTui
│   ├── gen/              # 코드생성 결과물
│   │   ├── sdk.gen.ts    # OpencodeClient 클래스
│   │   ├── types.gen.ts  # 요청/응답 타입
│   │   └── client/       # HTTP 클라이언트 기반
│   └── v2/               # 워크스페이스 지원 추가된 v2
│       ├── client.ts
│       ├── server.ts
│       └── gen/
└── package.json          # exports: ".", "./client", "./server", "./v2", "./v2/client"
</code></pre>
<h3>5.2 클라이언트 생성</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts
export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config &#x26; { directory?: string }) {
  if (config?.directory) {
    config.headers = {
      ...config.headers,
      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),
    }
  }
  const client = createClient(config)
  return new OpencodeClient({ client })
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>directory</code> 옵션을 넘기면 자동으로 <code>x-opencode-directory</code> 헤더가 붙는다. v2 클라이언트는 추가로 <code>experimental_workspaceID</code>를 받아 <code>x-opencode-workspace</code> 헤더를 세팅한다.</p>
<h3>5.3 서버 런처</h3>
<p>SDK에는 <code>opencode serve</code> CLI를 <code>spawn</code>하는 서버 런처가 포함돼 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts
export async function createOpencodeServer(options?: ServerOptions) {
  const proc = spawn("opencode", ["serve", `--hostname=${hostname}`, `--port=${port}`], {
    env: { ...process.env, OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(config ?? {}) },
  })
  // stdout에서 "opencode server listening on http://..." 파싱
  return { url, close() { proc.kill() } }
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>createOpencode</code>는 server + client를 한 번에 만드는 편의 함수다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/sdk/js/src/index.ts
export async function createOpencode(options?: ServerOptions) {
  const server = await createOpencodeServer(options)
  const client = createOpencodeClient({ baseUrl: server.url })
  return { client, server }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>5.4 TUI 런처</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">export function createOpencodeTui(options?: TuiOptions) {
  const proc = spawn("opencode", args, { stdio: "inherit", ... })
  return { close() { proc.kill() } }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6. 웹 패키지 (<code>@opencode-ai/web</code>)</h2>
<h3>6.1 역할과 스택</h3>
<p><code>packages/web</code>은 <strong>문서 사이트</strong>다. Astro + Starlight + SolidJS 조합이며, Cloudflare에 배포된다. 18개 언어의 i18n을 지원한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 140_opencode/packages/web/astro.config.mjs
export default defineConfig({
  site: config.url,
  base: "/docs",
  output: "server",
  adapter: cloudflare({ imageService: "passthrough" }),
  integrations: [solidJs(), starlight({ title: "OpenCode", ... })],
})
</code></pre>
<p>빌드 시 <code>packages/opencode</code>에서 config 스키마를 JSON으로 추출해 문서에 포함한다.</p>
<h3>6.2 프록시 구조</h3>
<p>서버의 마지막 <code>all("/*")</code> 라우트가 매치되지 않는 경로를 <code>app.opencode.ai</code>로 역방향 프록시한다. 이를 통해 데스크톱 앱이 로컬 서버를 거쳐 웹 UI에 접근할 수 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
.all("/*", async (c) => {
  const response = await proxy(`https://app.opencode.ai${path}`, { ... })
  response.headers.set("Content-Security-Policy", csp(hash))
  return response
})
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>7. 데스크톱 래퍼</h2>
<h3>7.1 Tauri 데스크톱 (<code>packages/desktop</code>)</h3>
<p>Tauri v2 기반이다. Rust 사이드카로 <code>opencode serve</code>를 실행하고 health check를 기다린 뒤, WebView에 SolidJS 앱을 띄운다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 140_opencode/packages/desktop/src-tauri/src/server.rs
pub fn spawn_local_server(
    app: AppHandle, hostname: String, port: u32, password: String,
) -> (CommandChild, HealthCheck) {
    let (child, exit) = cli::serve(&#x26;app, &#x26;hostname, port, &#x26;password);
    let health_check = HealthCheck(tokio::spawn(async move {
        loop {
            tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(100)).await;
            if check_health(&#x26;url, Some(&#x26;password)).await { return Ok(()); }
        }
    }));
    (child, health_check)
}
</code></pre>
<p>Tauri 플러그인: clipboard, deep-link, dialog, opener, os, notification, process, shell, store, updater, http, window-state</p>
<h3>7.2 Electron 데스크톱 (<code>packages/desktop-electron</code>)</h3>
<p>Electron + electron-vite 기반이다. Tauri 버전과 동일한 <code>@opencode-ai/app</code> UI 패키지를 공유하고, electron-builder로 패키징한다. 같은 SDK 클라이언트를 통해 로컬 서버에 접속한다.</p>
<h3>7.3 공유 앱 UI (<code>packages/app</code>)</h3>
<p>SolidJS 기반의 공통 UI 라이브러리다. Tauri 데스크톱과 Electron 데스크톱이 모두 이 패키지를 의존한다. Playwright 기반 E2E 테스트가 포함돼 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph "packages"
        APP["@opencode-ai/app&#x3C;br/>(SolidJS UI)"]
        UI["@opencode-ai/ui&#x3C;br/>(테마·컴포넌트)"]
        SDK["@opencode-ai/sdk"]
    end
    subgraph "shells"
        TAURI["desktop (Tauri v2)"]
        ELECTRON["desktop-electron"]
    end
    TAURI --> APP
    ELECTRON --> APP
    APP --> UI
    APP --> SDK
    SDK -->|HTTP| SERVER["opencode serve"]
</code></pre>
<hr>

<h2>9. 재사용 seam</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>seam</th>
<th>이유</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>OpenAPI 스펙 자동 생성</td>
<td>Zod 스키마만 작성하면 문서·SDK·타입이 한 번에 나온다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>BusEvent</code> 타입 시스템</td>
<td>discriminated union으로 이벤트를 등록하면 SSE 페이로드 스키마까지 자동</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Instance.provide</code> 컨텍스트</td>
<td>요청별 프로젝트 격리가 서버 레벨에서 보장된다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>@opencode-ai/app</code> 공유 UI</td>
<td>데스크톱 셸을 바꿔도 UI 코드를 재작성할 필요 없다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK server launcher</td>
<td><code>createOpencodeServer</code> 하나로 서버 프로세스 관리가 캡슐화돼 있다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>역방향 프록시 패턴</td>
<td>로컬 서버가 웹 UI를 투명하게 제공한다</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>10. 결합 리스크</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>리스크</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Bun 전용 런타임</td>
<td><code>Bun.serve</code>, <code>bun:ffi</code>, <code>websocket</code> 등 Bun API에 강하게 결합돼 있다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>프로토콜 계층 부재</td>
<td>Hono 라우트가 곧 wire schema라서, 서버 프레임워크를 바꾸면 계약층을 다시 짜야 한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SSE 단방향</td>
<td>클라이언트→서버 방향은 별도 HTTP 호출이 필요하다. WebSocket 이중화 부담</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>이중 데스크톱 유지</td>
<td>Tauri + Electron 두 셸을 동시에 유지해야 한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>app.opencode.ai</code> 프록시 의존</td>
<td>서버의 catch-all이 외부 호스트로 프록시하므로, 오프라인 환경에서 웹 UI가 깨진다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK v1/v2 공존</td>
<td>두 버전의 생성 코드를 모두 유지하는 비용이 있다</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: OpenCode의 서버/클라이언트 표면을 분석했다. Hono REST+SSE 서버, OpenAPI 코드생성 SDK, 이중 데스크톱 래퍼(Tauri+Electron), 웹 문서 사이트 구조를 정리했다.</li>
</ul>
22:["$","$L2f","20-axis-06-surface",{"id":"20-axis-06-surface","order":30,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 06: App surfaces","description":"006_app-server-client-surfaces/06_oc_surface.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$4d"}}]}]
4e:Te47a,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 07: Sandbox &#x26; policy</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — sandbox and execution policy.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OpenCode에는 전용 <code>sandbox/</code> 디렉토리가 없다. 실행 격리는 세 모듈에 분산돼 있다: <strong>Project</strong>(프로젝트 경계와 sandbox 디렉토리 관리), <strong>Permission</strong>(룰셋 기반 실행 허가 엔진), <strong>Pty</strong>(PTY 프로세스 실행). 거기에 <strong>Worktree</strong>(git worktree 격리)와 <strong>Instance</strong>(경로 경계 판정)가 보조 레이어로 작동한다. Codex의 OS-레벨 격리(se</li>
<li>핵심 설계 원칙: OS sandbox 없이도, <strong>모든 도구 호출이 Permission.ask()를 거쳐야</strong> 실행된다. 도구가 프로젝트 경계 밖 경로에 접근하면 <code>external_directory</code> 권한이 추가로 요구된다. Worktree는 git 레벨에서 작업 공간을 물리적으로 분리한다.</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["model tool call(bash, edit, write …)"] --> B["Instance.containsPath경로 경계 판정"]</li>
<li>B -->|경계 밖| C["external_directorypermission ask"]</li>
<li>B -->|경계 안| D["tool-specificpermission ask"]</li>
<li>C -->|denied| X["DeniedError"]</li>
<li>C -->|ask| E["Permission.ask()"]</li>
<li>D -->|denied| X</li>
<li>D -->|allow| G["프로세스 실행"]</li>
<li>D -->|ask| E</li>
</ul>

<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["model tool call&#x3C;br/>(bash, edit, write …)"] --> B["Instance.containsPath&#x3C;br/>경로 경계 판정"]
    B -->|경계 밖| C["external_directory&#x3C;br/>permission ask"]
    B -->|경계 안| D["tool-specific&#x3C;br/>permission ask"]
    C -->|denied| X["DeniedError"]
    C -->|ask| E["Permission.ask()"]
    D -->|denied| X
    D -->|allow| G["프로세스 실행"]
    D -->|ask| E
    E -->|user approves&#x3C;br/>'once'| G
    E -->|user approves&#x3C;br/>'always'| F["ruleset에 추가"]
    F --> G
    E -->|reject| Y["RejectedError"]
    G --> H["child_process.spawn&#x3C;br/>또는 bun-pty"]
    H --> I["Instance 컨텍스트&#x3C;br/>안에서 실행"]

    style X fill:#f66,color:#fff
    style Y fill:#f66,color:#fff
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// project/instance.ts
containsPath(filepath: string) {
  if (Filesystem.contains(Instance.directory, filepath)) return true
  // Non-git projects set worktree to "/" which would match ANY absolute path.
  if (Instance.worktree === "/") return false
  return Filesystem.contains(Instance.worktree, filepath)
},
</code></pre>

export function contains(parent: string, child: string) {
  return !relative(parent, child).startsWith("..")
}

if (data.sandbox !== result.worktree &#x26;&#x26; !result.sandboxes.includes(data.sandbox))
  result.sandboxes.push(data.sandbox)

// 존재하지 않는 sandbox 디렉토리는 자동 정리

  result.sandboxes,
  (s) => fsys.exists(s).pipe(Effect.orDie, Effect.map((exists) => (exists ? s : undefined))),

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts
export const Rule = z.object({
  permission: z.string(),   // "bash", "edit", "external_directory" 등
  pattern: z.string(),       // wildcard 패턴
  action: z.enum(["allow", "deny", "ask"]),
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission) &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// util/wildcard.ts — match()
let escaped = pattern
  .replace(/[.+^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&#x26;")
  .replace(/\*/g, ".*")
  .replace(/\?/g, ".")
// "ls *" → "ls" and "ls -la" 모두 매치 (trailing " *" → optional)
if (escaped.endsWith(" .*")) {
  escaped = escaped.slice(0, -3) + "( .*)?"
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts — ask()
const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input) {
  const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)
  for (const pattern of request.patterns) {
    const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)
    if (rule.action === "deny")
      return yield* new DeniedError({ ruleset: ... })
    if (rule.action === "allow") continue
    needsAsk = true
  }
  if (!needsAsk) return

  const deferred = yield* Deferred.make&#x3C;void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()
  pending.set(id, { info, deferred })
  void Bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)
  return yield* Deferred.await(deferred)  // ← 사용자 응답까지 블로킹
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts — reply()
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  const ok = item.info.patterns.every(
    (pattern) => evaluate(item.info.permission, pattern, approved).action === "allow",
  )
  if (!ok) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.succeed(item.deferred, undefined)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["defaults&#x3C;br/>(read: allow, .env: ask)"] --> B["agent-specific&#x3C;br/>(explore: edit deny)"]
    B --> C["user config&#x3C;br/>(permission in config.json)"]
    C --> D["runtime approved&#x3C;br/>(always 응답 누적)"]
    D --> E["evaluate()&#x3C;br/>findLast 매칭"]
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// agent/agent.ts
explore: {
  permission: Permission.merge(
    defaults,
    Permission.fromConfig({
      "*": "deny",
      grep: "allow", glob: "allow", list: "allow",
      bash: "allow", read: "allow",
      // edit는 deny — 탐색 전용
    }),
    user,
  ),
},
plan: {
  permission: Permission.merge(
    defaults,
    Permission.fromConfig({
      edit: { "*": "deny", ".opencode/plans/*.md": "allow" },
    }),
    user,
  ),
},
</code></pre>

    participant M as Model
    participant B as BashTool
    participant P as Permission
    participant S as child_process

    M->>B: execute({ command, workdir })
    B->>B: tree-sitter parse(command)
    B->>B: extract commands + paths
    
    alt cwd 또는 path가 경계 밖
        B->>P: ask(external_directory, [glob patterns])
        P-->>B: allow / reject
    end
    
    alt 명령 패턴 존재
        B->>P: ask(bash, [command patterns])
        P-->>B: allow / reject
    end

    S-->>B: stdout + stderr + exitCode
    B-->>M: { output, metadata }
</code></pre>

<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/arity.ts
export function prefix(tokens: string[]) {
  for (let len = tokens.length; len > 0; len--) {
    const prefix = tokens.slice(0, len).join(" ")
    const arity = ARITY[prefix]
    if (arity !== undefined) return tokens.slice(0, arity)
  }
  if (tokens.length === 0) return []
  return tokens.slice(0, 1)
}

// bash.ts에서 사용
always.add(BashArity.prefix(command).join(" ") + " *")
</code></pre>

  shell,           // Shell.acceptable() — fish/nu 제외
  cwd,             // workdir 파라미터 또는 Instance.directory
  env: { ...process.env, ...shellEnv.env },
  stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "pipe"],
  detached: process.platform !== "win32",
})

    ...shellEnv.env,
    TERM: "xterm-256color",
    OPENCODE_TERMINAL: "1",

  Effect.sync(() => {
    for (const session of state.sessions.values()) {

    }
  }),
)

const setup = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (info: Info) {
  // 1. git worktree add
  yield* git(["worktree", "add", "--no-checkout", "-b", info.branch, info.directory], {
    cwd: Instance.worktree,
  })
  // 2. Project sandbox 목록에 등록
  yield* Effect.promise(() =>
    Project.addSandbox(Instance.project.id, info.directory)
  )
})

</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/external-directory.ts
export async function assertExternalDirectory(ctx, target, options) {
  if (Instance.containsPath(target)) return  // 경계 안이면 통과
  const parentDir = kind === "directory" ? target : path.dirname(target)
  const glob = path.join(parentDir, "*")
  await ctx.ask({
    permission: "external_directory",
    patterns: [glob],
    always: [glob],
    metadata: { filepath: target, parentDir },
  })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/bash.ts
if (["cd", "rm", "cp", "mv", "mkdir", ...].includes(command[0])) {
  for (const arg of command.slice(1)) {
    const resolved = await fs.realpath(path.resolve(cwd, arg))
    if (!Instance.containsPath(normalized)) {
      directories.add(dir)
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>OpenCode sandbox and execution policy — distributed implementation analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — sandbox and execution policy.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode does not have a dedicated <code>sandbox/</code> directory. Execution isolation is distributed across three modules: <strong>Project</strong> (manages project boundaries and sandbox directories), <strong>Permission</strong> (ruleset-based execution permission engine), and <strong>Pty</strong> (executes PTY processes). In addition, <strong>Worktree</strong> (git worktree isolation) and <strong>Instance</strong> (path boundary determination) act as auxiliary layers. Unlike Codex's OS-level isolation (seatbelt/landlock), OpenCode controls execution with <strong>application-level permission gates</strong>.</p>
<p>Core design principle: Even without an OS sandbox, <strong>all tool calls must go through Permission.ask()</strong> to be executed. If a tool accesses a path outside the project boundary, additional <code>external_directory</code> permission is required. Worktree physically separates workspaces at the git level.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["model tool call&#x3C;br/>(bash, edit, write …)"] --> B["Instance.containsPath&#x3C;br/>경로 경계 판정"]
    B -->|경계 밖| C["external_directory&#x3C;br/>permission ask"]
    B -->|경계 안| D["tool-specific&#x3C;br/>permission ask"]
    C -->|denied| X["DeniedError"]
    C -->|ask| E["Permission.ask()"]
    D -->|denied| X
    D -->|allow| G["프로세스 실행"]
    D -->|ask| E
    E -->|user approves&#x3C;br/>'once'| G
    E -->|user approves&#x3C;br/>'always'| F["ruleset에 추가"]
    F --> G
    E -->|reject| Y["RejectedError"]
    G --> H["child_process.spawn&#x3C;br/>또는 bun-pty"]
    H --> I["Instance 컨텍스트&#x3C;br/>안에서 실행"]

    style X fill:#f66,color:#fff
    style Y fill:#f66,color:#fff
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Project boundary — Project + Instance</h2>
<p>Unlike Codex's OS sandbox, which blocks the file system at the kernel level, OpenCode determines boundaries through <strong>path comparison</strong>.</p>
<h3>1.1 Instance.containsPath — The key to boundary determination</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// project/instance.ts
containsPath(filepath: string) {
  if (Filesystem.contains(Instance.directory, filepath)) return true
  // Non-git projects set worktree to "/" which would match ANY absolute path.
  if (Instance.worktree === "/") return false
  return Filesystem.contains(Instance.worktree, filepath)
},
</code></pre>
<p><code>Filesystem.contains</code> only checks for the presence of the <code>..</code> prefix in <code>path.relative()</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// util/filesystem.ts
export function contains(parent: string, child: string) {
  return !relative(parent, child).startsWith("..")
}
</code></pre>
<p>This decision acts as the gatekeeper to <strong>all file manipulation tools</strong>, including BashTool, WriteTool, and EditTool.</p>
<h3>1.2 Project.sandboxes — Multiple sandbox directories</h3>
<p>The Project entity has a field <code>sandboxes: string[]</code>. This is added every time the worktree is created:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// project/project.ts — fromDirectory
if (data.sandbox !== result.worktree &#x26;&#x26; !result.sandboxes.includes(data.sandbox))
  result.sandboxes.push(data.sandbox)

// 존재하지 않는 sandbox 디렉토리는 자동 정리
result.sandboxes = yield* Effect.forEach(
  result.sandboxes,
  (s) => fsys.exists(s).pipe(Effect.orDie, Effect.map((exists) => (exists ? s : undefined))),
  { concurrency: "unbounded" },
).pipe(Effect.map((arr) => arr.filter((x): x is string => x !== undefined)))
</code></pre>
<p>In the DB schema, sandboxes are stored as a JSON array:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// project/project.sql.ts
sandboxes: text({ mode: "json" }).notNull().$type&#x3C;string[]>(),
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>concept</th>
<th>Codex</th>
<th>OpenCode</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Boundary decision</td>
<td>OS kernel (seatbelt/landlock)</td>
<td><code>Filesystem.contains()</code> path comparison</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>sandbox directory</td>
<td>single (process working directory)</td>
<td>multiple (<code>Project.sandboxes[]</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>network isolation</td>
<td><code>CODEX_SANDBOX_NETWORK_DISABLED</code> environment variable</td>
<td>None</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>2. Permission system — execution gate</h2>
<p>It is the core of OpenCode's execution control. It corresponds to Codex's Starlark exec-policy engine, but the implementation is completely different.</p>
<h3>2.1 Ruleset structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts
export const Rule = z.object({
  permission: z.string(),   // "bash", "edit", "external_directory" 등
  pattern: z.string(),       // wildcard 패턴
  action: z.enum(["allow", "deny", "ask"]),
})
</code></pre>
<p>Permission categories defined in Config:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Category</th>
<th>target</th>
<th>default</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>bash</code></td>
<td>Run shell command</td>
<td><code>ask</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>edit</code></td>
<td>Write/Edit File</td>
<td><code>ask</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>read</code></td>
<td>Read file</td>
<td><code>allow</code> (except <code>.env*</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>external_directory</code></td>
<td>Access outside project boundaries</td>
<td><code>ask</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>task</code></td>
<td>Run subagent</td>
<td><code>ask</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>glob</code>, <code>grep</code>, <code>list</code></td>
<td>Navigation Tools</td>
<td><code>allow</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>webfetch</code>, <code>websearch</code></td>
<td>Web Access</td>
<td>Varies by agent</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>skill</code></td>
<td>Skill Execution</td>
<td><code>ask</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>2.2 evaluate — Rule matching engine</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission) &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong><code>findLast</code> semantics</strong>: Rules added later override previous rules. This means that in the structure of building rules using <code>Permission.merge()</code> → <code>flat()</code>, <strong>those merged later take precedence</strong>.</p>
<p>Wildcard matching is based on regular expressions that convert <code>*</code> → <code>.*</code>, <code>?</code> → <code>.</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// util/wildcard.ts — match()
let escaped = pattern
  .replace(/[.+^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&#x26;")
  .replace(/\*/g, ".*")
  .replace(/\?/g, ".")
// "ls *" → "ls" and "ls -la" 모두 매치 (trailing " *" → optional)
if (escaped.endsWith(" .*")) {
  escaped = escaped.slice(0, -3) + "( .*)?"
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.3 Permission.ask — Deferred-based asynchronous permission flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts — ask()
const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input) {
  const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)
  for (const pattern of request.patterns) {
    const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)
    if (rule.action === "deny")
      return yield* new DeniedError({ ruleset: ... })
    if (rule.action === "allow") continue
    needsAsk = true
  }
  if (!needsAsk) return

  const deferred = yield* Deferred.make&#x3C;void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()
  pending.set(id, { info, deferred })
  void Bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)
  return yield* Deferred.await(deferred)  // ← 사용자 응답까지 블로킹
})
</code></pre>
<p><strong>cooperative blocking</strong> implemented as <code>Deferred</code> in Effect: Tool execution stops and waits until the user responds with <code>once</code>/<code>always</code>/<code>reject</code> in the UI.</p>
<p>When responding with <code>always</code>, other pending requests for the same session are automatically resolved:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts — reply()
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  const ok = item.info.patterns.every(
    (pattern) => evaluate(item.info.permission, pattern, approved).action === "allow",
  )
  if (!ok) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.succeed(item.deferred, undefined)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.4 Permission layering by agent</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["defaults&#x3C;br/>(read: allow, .env: ask)"] --> B["agent-specific&#x3C;br/>(explore: edit deny)"]
    B --> C["user config&#x3C;br/>(permission in config.json)"]
    C --> D["runtime approved&#x3C;br/>(always 응답 누적)"]
    D --> E["evaluate()&#x3C;br/>findLast 매칭"]
</code></pre>
<p>Each agent has a different rights profile:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// agent/agent.ts
explore: {
  permission: Permission.merge(
    defaults,
    Permission.fromConfig({
      "*": "deny",
      grep: "allow", glob: "allow", list: "allow",
      bash: "allow", read: "allow",
      // edit는 deny — 탐색 전용
    }),
    user,
  ),
},
plan: {
  permission: Permission.merge(
    defaults,
    Permission.fromConfig({
      edit: { "*": "deny", ".opencode/plans/*.md": "allow" },
    }),
    user,
  ),
},
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. BashTool — Unifies shell command execution and permissions</h2>
<p>BashTool has the most complex execution path in OpenCode. Parse the command with tree-sitter, and perform a separate permission check for each path and command pattern.</p>
<h3>3.1 Execution flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant M as Model
    participant B as BashTool
    participant P as Permission
    participant S as child_process

    M->>B: execute({ command, workdir })
    B->>B: tree-sitter parse(command)
    B->>B: extract commands + paths
    
    alt cwd 또는 path가 경계 밖
        B->>P: ask(external_directory, [glob patterns])
        P-->>B: allow / reject
    end
    
    alt 명령 패턴 존재
        B->>P: ask(bash, [command patterns])
        P-->>B: allow / reject
    end
    
    B->>S: spawn(command, { shell, cwd, env })
    S-->>B: stdout + stderr + exitCode
    B-->>M: { output, metadata }
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 BashArity — Command prefix normalization</h3>
<p>Normalize commands for permission pattern matching. Convert <code>npm run dev</code> to <code>npm run dev *</code> and <code>git checkout main</code> to <code>git checkout *</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/arity.ts
export function prefix(tokens: string[]) {
  for (let len = tokens.length; len > 0; len--) {
    const prefix = tokens.slice(0, len).join(" ")
    const arity = ARITY[prefix]
    if (arity !== undefined) return tokens.slice(0, arity)
  }
  if (tokens.length === 0) return []
  return tokens.slice(0, 1)
}

// bash.ts에서 사용
always.add(BashArity.prefix(command).join(" ") + " *")
</code></pre>
<p>There are 160+ command prefixes defined in the ARITY dictionary. Examples: <code>git: 2</code>, <code>npm run: 3</code>, <code>docker compose: 3</code>.</p>
<h3>3.3 Environmental isolation</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/bash.ts
const shellEnv = await Plugin.trigger("shell.env", { cwd, sessionID, callID }, { env: {} })
const proc = spawn(params.command, {
  shell,           // Shell.acceptable() — fish/nu 제외
  cwd,             // workdir 파라미터 또는 Instance.directory
  env: { ...process.env, ...shellEnv.env },
  stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "pipe"],
  detached: process.platform !== "win32",
})
</code></pre>
<p>In Unix, separate process groups with <code>detached: true</code> and kill each process group with <code>Shell.killTree()</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// shell/shell.ts
process.kill(-pid, "SIGTERM")  // 프로세스 그룹에 SIGTERM
await sleep(200)
if (!exited()) process.kill(-pid, "SIGKILL")
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>4. Run PTY — Isolate terminal session</h2>
<p>The Pty module manages interactive terminal sessions. Unlike BashTool, it is a terminal controlled directly by the user without permission check.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// pty/index.ts — create()
const spawn = await pty()  // bun-pty
const proc = spawn(command, args, {
  name: "xterm-256color",
  cwd,         // state.dir — Instance 디렉토리
  env: {
    ...process.env,
    ...shellEnv.env,
    TERM: "xterm-256color",
    OPENCODE_TERMINAL: "1",
  },
})
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Characteristics</th>
<th>BashTool</th>
<th>Pty</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>How it runs</td>
<td><code>child_process.spawn</code></td>
<td><code>bun-pty</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Permission check</td>
<td>Yes (bash + external_directory)</td>
<td>None (direct user control)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>output control</td>
<td>stdout/stderr pipe → buffering</td>
<td>WebSocket Streaming</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>life cycle</td>
<td>command unit</td>
<td>Per-session (InstanceState management)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>buffer</td>
<td>MAX_METADATA_LENGTH (30KB)</td>
<td>BUFFER_LIMIT (2MB)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>A PTY session is bound to an instance with <code>InstanceState</code>. When an instance is terminated, all PTY processes are also killed:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() =>
  Effect.sync(() => {
    for (const session of state.sessions.values()) {
      teardown(session)  // session.process.kill()
    }
  }),
)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. Worktree — Git level task isolation</h2>
<p>Worktree is OpenCode's unique isolation mechanism. Create an <strong>independent working directory</strong> using git worktree and register it in the project's sandbox list.</p>
<h3>5.1 Creation flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// worktree/index.ts
const setup = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (info: Info) {
  // 1. git worktree add
  yield* git(["worktree", "add", "--no-checkout", "-b", info.branch, info.directory], {
    cwd: Instance.worktree,
  })
  // 2. Project sandbox 목록에 등록
  yield* Effect.promise(() =>
    Project.addSandbox(Instance.project.id, info.directory)
  )
})
</code></pre>
<p>The Worktree branch follows the naming <code>140_opencode/{slug}</code> and is created after checking for duplicates:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">const branch = `140_opencode/${name}`
const directory = pathSvc.join(root, name)
// 디렉토리 존재 + 브랜치 존재 모두 확인
if (yield* fsys.exists(directory)) continue
const branchCheck = yield* git(["show-ref", "--verify", "--quiet", ref])
if (branchCheck.code === 0) continue
</code></pre>
<h3>5.2 Cleanup and reset</h3>
<p>When removing a worktree, stop the fsmonitor daemon → delete the worktree → delete the branch.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">yield* stopFsmonitor(entry.path)
yield* git(["worktree", "remove", "--force", entry.path])
yield* cleanDirectory(entry.path)
yield* git(["branch", "-D", branch])
</code></pre>
<p>Reset to the default branch with <code>--hard</code> and then clean with <code>git clean -ffdx</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">yield* git(["reset", "--hard", base.ref], { cwd: worktreePath })
yield* sweep(worktreePath)  // git clean -ffdx + failed removes 재시도
yield* git(["submodule", "update", "--init", "--recursive", "--force"])
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6. External Directory — Out-of-bounds access control</h2>
<p>When accessing files outside the project boundary, a separate permission layer operates:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/external-directory.ts
export async function assertExternalDirectory(ctx, target, options) {
  if (Instance.containsPath(target)) return  // 경계 안이면 통과
  const parentDir = kind === "directory" ? target : path.dirname(target)
  const glob = path.join(parentDir, "*")
  await ctx.ask({
    permission: "external_directory",
    patterns: [glob],
    always: [glob],
    metadata: { filepath: target, parentDir },
  })
}
</code></pre>
<p>BashTool additionally parses arguments such as <code>cd</code>, <code>rm</code>, and <code>cp</code> to interpret the path:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/bash.ts
if (["cd", "rm", "cp", "mv", "mkdir", ...].includes(command[0])) {
  for (const arg of command.slice(1)) {
    const resolved = await fs.realpath(path.resolve(cwd, arg))
    if (!Instance.containsPath(normalized)) {
      directories.add(dir)
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>

<h3>Fork Perspective</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The Permission system is neatly isolated with Effect ServiceMap, making it easy to reuse.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>BashArity</code> dictionary (160+ commands) can be retrieved independently</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The combination <code>evaluate()</code> + <code>Wildcard.match()</code> is simple and predictable.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Worktree isolation provides strong separation of tasks in git-based projects.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> There is no OS-level isolation, so defenses against malicious commands are weak.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> No network isolation — additional layers are needed in sensitive environments</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>Filesystem.contains()</code> may be vulnerable to symlink traversal (realpath not used)</li>
</ul>
