<h3>설정 스키마 요약</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// config/config.ts
export const McpLocal = z.object({
  type: z.literal("local"),
  command: z.string().array(),
  environment: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
  enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
  timeout: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
})

export const McpRemote = z.object({
  type: z.literal("remote"),
  url: z.string(),
  headers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
  oauth: z.union([McpOAuth, z.literal(false)]).optional(),
  enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
  timeout: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
})
</code></pre>
<h3>상태 모델</h3>
<p><code>MCP.Status</code>는 다음 다섯 상태를 제공한다.</p>
<ul>
<li><code>connected</code></li>
<li><code>disabled</code></li>
<li><code>failed</code></li>
<li><code>needs_auth</code></li>
<li><code>needs_client_registration</code></li>
</ul>
<p>이 중 <code>needs_client_registration</code>은 서버가 동적 client registration을 지원하지 않을 때 뜬다. OpenCode는 이 경우 config에 <code>oauth.clientId</code>를 넣으라고 명시적으로 유도한다.</p>
<h2>판정 또는 포크 관점</h2>
<p>OpenCode의 MCP는 "작은 코드 면적에 기능을 밀집시킨 실용적 구현"이다. <code>mcp/</code> 디렉터리 파일 수는 적지만, 원격 연결, 로컬 stdio, OAuth, tool 변환, prompt/resource 노출까지 모두 담는다. 포크에서 빠르게 재사용하기 좋다.</p>
<p>재사용 가치가 높은 모듈은 세 가지다.</p>
<ul>
<li><code>McpAuth</code>: URL 바인딩까지 포함한 간단한 credential store이다.</li>
<li><code>McpOAuthProvider</code>: SDK OAuth 계약을 로컬 상태와 이어주는 어댑터이다.</li>
<li><code>MCP.tools()</code> 주변 흐름: MCP 서버 도구를 기존 AI SDK tool loop에 끼워 넣는 최소 통합 예제로 좋다.</li>
</ul>
<p>반대로 바로 손봐야 할 부분도 있다.</p>
<ul>
<li>resource 읽기는 tool permission 체계 밖에 있다. 보안 모델이 강한 포크라면 <code>MCP.readResource()</code> 앞에 별도 승인 계층을 추가해야 한다.</li>
<li>tool permission granularity가 <code>"*"</code> 고정이다. 인자 기반 정책이나 path-aware 정책이 필요하면 <code>session/prompt.ts</code>의 MCP 래퍼를 확장해야 한다.</li>
<li><code>mcp.tools.changed</code> 이벤트는 발행되지만 현재 트리 기준 소비자가 보이지 않는다. 도구 캐시 자동 갱신은 미완성에 가깝다.</li>
<li><code>McpOAuthCallback.cancelPending(mcpName)</code>는 <code>pendingAuths</code>가 <code>oauthState</code>를 키로 쓰는 구조와 맞지 않는다. <code>removeAuth()</code>가 이 함수를 <code>mcpName</code>으로 호출하므로 취소 경로가 의도대로 동작하지 않을 가능성이 높다. 포크 시 즉시 점검할 가치가 있다.</li>
</ul>
<p>정리하면 OpenCode의 MCP는 완전한 분산형이 아니다. <code>MCP</code> 네임스페이스 하나가 실질적 중앙 조정자이다. 다만 그 중앙화 범위가 프로세스 전체가 아니라 workspace instance마다 하나씩이라는 점에서, "인스턴스 스코프 중앙 매니저"라고 부르는 것이 가장 정확하다.</p>
<p>이전 문서: [[08_oc_config]]<br>
다음 문서: [[10_oc_memory]]</p>

51:T10d35,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 10: Memory pipeline</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — memory pipeline.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>소스 기반</strong>: <code>session/compaction.ts</code> (337줄), <code>snapshot/index.ts</code>, <code>session/index.ts</code>, <code>session/projectors.ts</code>, <code>session/revert.ts</code>, <code>session/system.ts</code>, <code>session/instruction.ts</code>, <code>storage/db.ts</code>, <code>storage/json-migration.ts</code>에 기반한다.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OpenCode의 메모리 시스템은 <strong>SQLite 기반 세션 영속화 + Git 기반 스냅샷 + 2단계 컴팩션(prune → LLM 요약) 파이프라인</strong>으로 구성된다. Codex의 2-phase extraction/consolidation과 달리, OpenCode는 세션 자체를 1급 객체로 관리하며 대화 내역을 DB에 직접 저장하고 파일 변경을 별도 Git 저장소로 추적한다.</li>
<li><strong>핵심 설계 원칙</strong>: Effect-TS 기반 서비스 레이어 + Drizzle ORM + SyncEvent(이벤트 소싱) 패턴으로, 모든 상태 변경이 이벤트를 통해 DB에 프로젝션된다.</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["사용자 입력"] --> B["Session.create / Session.prompt"]</li>
<li>B --> C["Snapshot.track()"]</li>
<li>C --> D["LLM.stream()"]</li>
<li>D --> E["SessionProcessor"]</li>
<li>E --> F{"토큰 초과?"}</li>
<li>F -->|Yes| G["SessionCompaction"]</li>
<li>F -->|No| H["MessageV2 파트 저장"]</li>
</ul>

db.run("PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL")
db.run("PRAGMA synchronous = NORMAL")
db.run("PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000")

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/session.sql.ts
export const SessionTable = sqliteTable("session", {
  id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>().primaryKey(),
  project_id: text().$type&#x3C;ProjectID>().notNull()
    .references(() => ProjectTable.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
  workspace_id: text().$type&#x3C;WorkspaceID>(),
  parent_id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>(),
  slug: text().notNull(),
  title: text().notNull(),
  revert: text({ mode: "json" }).$type&#x3C;{
    messageID: MessageID; partID?: PartID;
    snapshot?: string; diff?: string
  }>(),
  // ...Timestamps, summary fields, permission
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/schema.ts
export const SessionID = Schema.String.pipe(
  Schema.brand("SessionID"),
  withStatics((s) => ({
    descending: (id?: string) =>
      s.makeUnsafe(Identifier.descending("session", id)),
  })),
)
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/index.ts — 세션 생성
SyncEvent.run(Event.Created, { sessionID: result.id, info: result })

// session/projectors.ts — DB 프로젝션
SyncEvent.project(Session.Event.Created, (db, data) => {
  db.insert(SessionTable).values(Session.toRow(data.info)).run()
})

SyncEvent.project(MessageV2.Event.PartUpdated, (db, data) => {
  const { id, messageID, sessionID, ...rest } = data.part
  db.insert(PartTable)
    .values({ id, message_id: messageID, session_id: sessionID, data: rest })
    .onConflictDoUpdate({ target: PartTable.id, set: { data: rest } })
    .run()
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// storage/db.ts
export function transaction&#x3C;T>(callback: (tx: TxOrDb) => NotPromise&#x3C;T>) {
  try {
    return callback(ctx.use().tx) // 기존 트랜잭션 재사용
  } catch (err) {
    if (err instanceof Context.NotFound) {
      // 새 트랜잭션 시작 + side-effect 큐
      const effects: (() => void | Promise&#x3C;void>)[] = []
      const result = Client().transaction((tx) =>
        ctx.provide({ tx, effects }, () => callback(tx)),
      )
      for (const effect of effects) effect()
      return result
    }
    throw err
  }
}
</code></pre>

  vcs: ctx.project.vcs,

  "@opencode/Snapshot"
) {}

export interface Interface {
  readonly track: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string | undefined>
  readonly patch: (hash: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Snapshot.Patch>
  readonly restore: (snapshot: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;void>
  readonly revert: (patches: Snapshot.Patch[]) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;void>
  readonly diff: (hash: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string>
  readonly diffFull: (from: string, to: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;FileDiff[]>
}
</code></pre>

const large = (yield* Effect.all(
  all.map((item) =>
    fs.stat(path.join(state.directory, item)).pipe(
      Effect.map((stat) =>
        stat.type === "File" &#x26;&#x26; Number(stat.size) > limit ? item : undefined
      ),
    ),
  ),
  { concurrency: 8 },
)).filter(Boolean)

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["revert 요청"] --> B["메시지 순회: revert 지점 탐색"]
    B --> C["패치 수집 (revert 이후 변경)"]
    C --> D["Snapshot.track() → 현재 상태 저장"]
    D --> E["Snapshot.revert(patches) → 파일 복원"]
    E --> F["Snapshot.diff() → diff 계산"]
    F --> G["Session.setRevert() → DB 업데이트"]
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/revert.ts
export async function revert(input: RevertInput) {
  SessionPrompt.assertNotBusy(input.sessionID)
  const all = await Session.messages({ sessionID: input.sessionID })
  const patches: Snapshot.Patch[] = []
  
  for (const msg of all) {
    // revert 지점 이후의 patch 파트를 수집
    if (revert) {
      if (part.type === "patch") patches.push(part)
    }
  }
  
  revert.snapshot = session.revert?.snapshot ?? (await Snapshot.track())
  await Snapshot.revert(patches)      // 파일 시스템 복원
  revert.diff = await Snapshot.diff(revert.snapshot)
  return Session.setRevert({ sessionID, revert, summary })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:32-49
const COMPACTION_BUFFER = 20_000

export async function isOverflow(input: {
  tokens: MessageV2.Assistant["tokens"];
  model: Provider.Model;
}) {
  const config = await Config.get()
  if (config.compaction?.auto === false) return false   // 수동 비활성화
  const context = input.model.limit.context
  if (context === 0) return false                        // 무한 컨텍스트

  const count = input.tokens.total || 
    input.tokens.input + input.tokens.output + 
    input.tokens.cache.read + input.tokens.cache.write

  const reserved = config.compaction?.reserved ?? 
    Math.min(COMPACTION_BUFFER, ProviderTransform.maxOutputTokens(input.model))
  const usable = input.model.limit.input
    ? input.model.limit.input - reserved
    : context - ProviderTransform.maxOutputTokens(input.model)
  return count >= usable
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:60-105
export async function prune(input: { sessionID: SessionID }) {
  const config = await Config.get()
  if (config.compaction?.prune === false) return      // 수동 비활성화

  const msgs = await Session.messages({ sessionID: input.sessionID })
  let total = 0
  let pruned = 0
  let turns = 0

  // 역방향 순회: 최신 메시지부터
  for (let msgIndex = msgs.length - 1; msgIndex >= 0; msgIndex--) {
    const msg = msgs[msgIndex]
    if (msg.info.role === "user") turns++
    if (turns &#x3C; 2) continue                            // 최근 2턴은 건너뜀
    if (msg.info.role === "assistant" &#x26;&#x26; msg.info.summary) break  // 이전 요약 도달 시 중단

    for (let partIndex = msg.parts.length - 1; partIndex >= 0; partIndex--) {
      const part = msg.parts[partIndex]
      if (part.type === "tool" &#x26;&#x26; part.state.status === "completed") {
        if (PRUNE_PROTECTED_TOOLS.includes(part.tool)) continue  // skill 보호
        if (part.state.time.compacted) break                      // 이미 pruned

        const estimate = Token.estimate(part.state.output)
        total += estimate
        if (total > PRUNE_PROTECT) {                              // 40K 초과 시 가지치기
          pruned += estimate
          toPrune.push(part)
        }
      }
    }
  }

  if (pruned > PRUNE_MINIMUM) {                                   // 20K 이상 잘라야 실행
    for (const part of toPrune) {
      part.state.time.compacted = Date.now()                      // 타임스탬프 마킹
      await Session.updatePart(part)
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>

including what we did, what we're doing, which files we're working on, and

When constructing the summary, try to stick to this template:
---
## Goal
[What goal(s) is the user trying to accomplish?]

## Instructions
- [What important instructions did the user give you that are relevant]
- [If there is a plan or spec, include information about it]

## Discoveries
[What notable things were learned during this conversation]

## Accomplished
[What work has been completed, what is still in progress, and what is left?]

## Relevant files / directories
[Structured list of relevant files that have been read, edited, or created]
---`

<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts
export async function resolve(
  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[],
  filepath: string,
  messageID: string,
) {
  // filepath의 상위 디렉토리를 워크트리 루트까지 순회
  while (current.startsWith(root) &#x26;&#x26; current !== root) {
    const found = await find(current)
    if (found &#x26;&#x26; !system.has(found) &#x26;&#x26; !already.has(found) &#x26;&#x26; !isClaimed(messageID, found)) {
      claim(messageID, found)
      results.push({ filepath: found, content: "..." })
    }
    current = path.dirname(current)
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts
export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt-4") || model.api.id.includes("o1"))
    return [PROMPT_BEAST]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
  if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
  return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
}

export namespace Storage {
  export async function read&#x3C;T>(key: string[]) {
    const target = path.join(dir, ...key) + ".json"
    using _ = await Lock.read(target) // Disposable 기반 락
    return Filesystem.readJson&#x3C;T>(target)
  }

  export async function write&#x3C;T>(key: string[], content: T) {
    const target = path.join(dir, ...key) + ".json"
    using _ = await Lock.write(target)
    await Filesystem.writeJson(target, content)
  }
}
</code></pre>

  z.object({ type: z.literal("idle") }),
  z.object({ type: z.literal("retry"), attempt: z.number(),
             message: z.string(), next: z.number() }),
  z.object({ type: z.literal("busy") }),

    [*] --> idle
    idle --> busy : prompt 시작
    busy --> idle : 완료
    busy --> retry : API 에러 (retryable)

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>OpenCode memory/session system analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — memory pipeline.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>From source</strong>: <code>session/compaction.ts</code> (line 337), <code>snapshot/index.ts</code>, <code>session/index.ts</code>, <code>session/projectors.ts</code>, <code>session/revert.ts</code>, <code>session/system.ts</code>, <code>session/instruction.ts</code>, <code>storage/db.ts</code>, Based on <code>storage/json-migration.ts</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode's memory system consists of <strong>SQLite-based session persistence + Git-based snapshot + two-stage compaction (prune → LLM summary) pipeline</strong>. Unlike Codex's 2-phase extraction/consolidation, OpenCode manages the session itself as a first-class object, stores conversation history directly in the DB, and tracks file changes to a separate Git repository.</p>
<p><strong>Core design principle</strong>: Effect-TS based service layer + Drizzle ORM + SyncEvent (event sourcing) pattern, where all state changes are projected to the DB through events.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["사용자 입력"] --> B["Session.create / Session.prompt"]
    B --> C["Snapshot.track()"]
    C --> D["LLM.stream()"]
    D --> E["SessionProcessor"]
    E --> F{"토큰 초과?"}
    F -->|Yes| G["SessionCompaction"]
    F -->|No| H["MessageV2 파트 저장"]
    G --> I["요약 생성 → 컨텍스트 축소"]
    I --> H
    H --> J["SyncEvent → SQLite 프로젝션"]
    J --> K["Snapshot.patch()"]
    K --> L["SessionSummary.summarize()"]

    M["SessionRevert"] --> N["Snapshot.revert()"]
    N --> O["파일 복원 + DB 업데이트"]

    subgraph "Storage Layer"
        P["SQLite (Drizzle ORM)"]
        Q["JSON Storage (legacy)"]
        R["Git Snapshot Repo"]
    end

    J --> P
    L --> Q
    C --> R
    K --> R
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Session persistence: SQLite + Drizzle ORM</h2>
<h3>DB initialization</h3>
<p>SQLite DB is located in <code>Global.Path.data/opencode.db</code> and operates in WAL mode.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// storage/db.ts
const db = init(Path)
db.run("PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL")
db.run("PRAGMA synchronous = NORMAL")
db.run("PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000")
db.run("PRAGMA cache_size = -64000")
db.run("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON")
</code></pre>
<p>Drizzle ORM migrations run in bundling or development mode and can be skipped with the <code>OPENCODE_SKIP_MIGRATIONS</code> flag.</p>
<h3>Table schema</h3>
<p>Four core tables manage session data:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>table</th>
<th>PK</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>session</code></td>
<td><code>SessionID</code></td>
<td>Session metadata (project, directory, title, summary, revert status)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>message</code></td>
<td><code>MessageID</code></td>
<td>Message information (role, session reference, JSON data column)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>part</code></td>
<td><code>PartID</code></td>
<td>Message parts (text, tool call, snapshot, patch, etc.)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>todo</code></td>
<td><code>(session_id, position)</code></td>
<td>To-do list by session</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/session.sql.ts
export const SessionTable = sqliteTable("session", {
  id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>().primaryKey(),
  project_id: text().$type&#x3C;ProjectID>().notNull()
    .references(() => ProjectTable.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
  workspace_id: text().$type&#x3C;WorkspaceID>(),
  parent_id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>(),
  slug: text().notNull(),
  title: text().notNull(),
  revert: text({ mode: "json" }).$type&#x3C;{
    messageID: MessageID; partID?: PartID;
    snapshot?: string; diff?: string
  }>(),
  // ...Timestamps, summary fields, permission
})
</code></pre>
<h3>ID system</h3>
<p><code>Identifier</code> utility for sorting by brand type + chronological order:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/schema.ts
export const SessionID = Schema.String.pipe(
  Schema.brand("SessionID"),
  withStatics((s) => ({
    descending: (id?: string) =>
      s.makeUnsafe(Identifier.descending("session", id)),
  })),
)
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>SessionID</code>: <strong>descending</strong> (newest first)</li>
<li><code>MessageID</code>, <code>PartID</code>: <strong>Ascending</strong> (sorted by time)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Event Sourcing Pattern (SyncEvent)</h3>
<p>All session changes are issued through <code>SyncEvent</code> and reflected in the DB by projector:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/index.ts — 세션 생성
SyncEvent.run(Event.Created, { sessionID: result.id, info: result })

// session/projectors.ts — DB 프로젝션
SyncEvent.project(Session.Event.Created, (db, data) => {
  db.insert(SessionTable).values(Session.toRow(data.info)).run()
})

SyncEvent.project(MessageV2.Event.PartUpdated, (db, data) => {
  const { id, messageID, sessionID, ...rest } = data.part
  db.insert(PartTable)
    .values({ id, message_id: messageID, session_id: sessionID, data: rest })
    .onConflictDoUpdate({ target: PartTable.id, set: { data: rest } })
    .run()
})
</code></pre>
<p>Advantages of event sourcing: When a session is deleted, related event logs are collectively organized with <code>SyncEvent.remove(sessionID)</code>.</p>
<h3>Transaction Management</h3>
<p><code>Database.transaction()</code> supports implicit propagation based on <code>Context</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// storage/db.ts
export function transaction&#x3C;T>(callback: (tx: TxOrDb) => NotPromise&#x3C;T>) {
  try {
    return callback(ctx.use().tx) // 기존 트랜잭션 재사용
  } catch (err) {
    if (err instanceof Context.NotFound) {
      // 새 트랜잭션 시작 + side-effect 큐
      const effects: (() => void | Promise&#x3C;void>)[] = []
      const result = Client().transaction((tx) =>
        ctx.provide({ tx, effects }, () => callback(tx)),
      )
      for (const effect of effects) effect()
      return result
    }
    throw err
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Register side effects to be executed after transaction commit with <code>Database.effect(fn)</code> (event issuance, etc.).</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Git-based snapshot system</h2>
<h3>Architecture</h3>
<p>The project's main <code>.git</code> and <strong>separate snapshot Git repository</strong> (<code>Global.Path.data/snapshot/&#x3C;projectID></code>) are operated separately. Separating <code>--git-dir</code> / <code>--work-tree</code> does not pollute the main repository.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// snapshot/index.ts
const state = {
  directory: ctx.directory,
  worktree: ctx.worktree,
  gitdir: path.join(Global.Path.data, "snapshot", ctx.project.id),
  vcs: ctx.project.vcs,
}
const args = (cmd: string[]) => [
  "--git-dir", state.gitdir,
  "--work-tree", state.worktree,
  ...cmd,
]
</code></pre>
<h3>Effect-TS service layer</h3>
<p>Snapshot is implemented with Effect-TS's <code>ServiceMap</code> pattern:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// snapshot/index.ts
export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()(
  "@opencode/Snapshot"
) {}

export interface Interface {
  readonly track: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string | undefined>
  readonly patch: (hash: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Snapshot.Patch>
  readonly restore: (snapshot: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;void>
  readonly revert: (patches: Snapshot.Patch[]) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;void>
  readonly diff: (hash: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string>
  readonly diffFull: (from: string, to: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;FileDiff[]>
}
</code></pre>
<p>Bridge the Effect runtime to the async/await world with <code>InstanceState</code> + <code>makeRunPromise</code>.</p>
<h3>Main workflow</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>function</th>
<th>Action</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>track()</code></td>
<td><code>git add</code> → <code>git write-tree</code> → return tree hash</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>patch(hash)</code></td>
<td>Compare current state and hash → List of changed files</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>restore(snapshot)</code></td>
<td><code>git read-tree</code> + <code>git checkout-index</code> → snapshot restore</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>revert(patches)</code></td>
<td>Restore the original state of each file by applying patches in reverse order</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>diffFull(from, to)</code></td>
<td>Full diff between two trees + file contents (before/after)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>cleanup()</code></td>
<td><code>git gc --prune=7.days</code> (1-hour cycle schedule)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Logic for excluding large files: Files exceeding 2MB are dynamically added to <code>.gitignore</code> and excluded from snapshots.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">const limit = 2 * 1024 * 1024 // 2MB
const large = (yield* Effect.all(
  all.map((item) =>
    fs.stat(path.join(state.directory, item)).pipe(
      Effect.map((stat) =>
        stat.type === "File" &#x26;&#x26; Number(stat.size) > limit ? item : undefined
      ),
    ),
  ),
  { concurrency: 8 },
)).filter(Boolean)
yield* sync(large) // 대용량 파일을 exclude에 추가
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. Session Revert System</h2>
<h3>revert flow</h3>
<p><code>SessionRevert.revert()</code> reverts the session to the point of a specific message/part:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["revert 요청"] --> B["메시지 순회: revert 지점 탐색"]
    B --> C["패치 수집 (revert 이후 변경)"]
    C --> D["Snapshot.track() → 현재 상태 저장"]
    D --> E["Snapshot.revert(patches) → 파일 복원"]
    E --> F["Snapshot.diff() → diff 계산"]
    F --> G["Session.setRevert() → DB 업데이트"]
</code></pre>
<p>Core logic:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/revert.ts
export async function revert(input: RevertInput) {
  SessionPrompt.assertNotBusy(input.sessionID)
  const all = await Session.messages({ sessionID: input.sessionID })
  const patches: Snapshot.Patch[] = []
  
  for (const msg of all) {
    // revert 지점 이후의 patch 파트를 수집
    if (revert) {
      if (part.type === "patch") patches.push(part)
    }
  }
  
  revert.snapshot = session.revert?.snapshot ?? (await Snapshot.track())
  await Snapshot.revert(patches)      // 파일 시스템 복원
  revert.diff = await Snapshot.diff(revert.snapshot)
  return Session.setRevert({ sessionID, revert, summary })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>unrevert</h3>
<p><code>unrevert()</code> restores it back to the state before revert with <code>Snapshot.restore(snapshot)</code>. Two-way time travel is possible.</p>
<h3>revert cleanup</h3>
<p>When confirming the actual revert, <code>cleanup()</code> is called to delete messages/parts after the revert point from the DB.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. Compaction (Context Window Management)</h2>
<h3>4.1 Overflow detection</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:32-49
const COMPACTION_BUFFER = 20_000

export async function isOverflow(input: {
  tokens: MessageV2.Assistant["tokens"];
  model: Provider.Model;
}) {
  const config = await Config.get()
  if (config.compaction?.auto === false) return false   // 수동 비활성화
  const context = input.model.limit.context
  if (context === 0) return false                        // 무한 컨텍스트

  const count = input.tokens.total || 
    input.tokens.input + input.tokens.output + 
    input.tokens.cache.read + input.tokens.cache.write

  const reserved = config.compaction?.reserved ?? 
    Math.min(COMPACTION_BUFFER, ProviderTransform.maxOutputTokens(input.model))
  const usable = input.model.limit.input
    ? input.model.limit.input - reserved
    : context - ProviderTransform.maxOutputTokens(input.model)
  return count >= usable
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 Prune — Prune tool output (backward traversal)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:60-105
export async function prune(input: { sessionID: SessionID }) {
  const config = await Config.get()
  if (config.compaction?.prune === false) return      // 수동 비활성화

  const msgs = await Session.messages({ sessionID: input.sessionID })
  let total = 0
  let pruned = 0
  let turns = 0

  // 역방향 순회: 최신 메시지부터
  for (let msgIndex = msgs.length - 1; msgIndex >= 0; msgIndex--) {
    const msg = msgs[msgIndex]
    if (msg.info.role === "user") turns++
    if (turns &#x3C; 2) continue                            // 최근 2턴은 건너뜀
    if (msg.info.role === "assistant" &#x26;&#x26; msg.info.summary) break  // 이전 요약 도달 시 중단

    for (let partIndex = msg.parts.length - 1; partIndex >= 0; partIndex--) {
      const part = msg.parts[partIndex]
      if (part.type === "tool" &#x26;&#x26; part.state.status === "completed") {
        if (PRUNE_PROTECTED_TOOLS.includes(part.tool)) continue  // skill 보호
        if (part.state.time.compacted) break                      // 이미 pruned

        const estimate = Token.estimate(part.state.output)
        total += estimate
        if (total > PRUNE_PROTECT) {                              // 40K 초과 시 가지치기
          pruned += estimate
          toPrune.push(part)
        }
      }
    }
  }

  if (pruned > PRUNE_MINIMUM) {                                   // 20K 이상 잘라야 실행
    for (const part of toPrune) {
      part.state.time.compacted = Date.now()                      // 타임스탬프 마킹
      await Session.updatePart(part)
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>constant</th>
<th>value</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>COMPACTION_BUFFER</code></td>
<td>20,000 tokens</td>
<td>Overflow detection reserve</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PRUNE_PROTECT</code></td>
<td>40,000 tokens</td>
<td>Preserving this much recent tool output</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PRUNE_MINIMUM</code></td>
<td>20,000 tokens</td>
<td>You need to cut at least this much to run</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PRUNE_PROTECTED_TOOLS</code></td>
<td><code>["skill"]</code></td>
<td>prune exclusion tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Number of protection turns</td>
<td>2</td>
<td>The last 2 turns are not subject to prune</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>Core Design</strong>: Track prune history with <code>compacted</code> timestamps → stop traversal when already pruned tool is reached (avoiding duplicate prunes)</p>
<h3>4.3 Compaction agent prompt</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:179-205 — 컴팩션 프롬프트 템플릿
const defaultPrompt = `Provide a detailed prompt for continuing our conversation above.
Focus on information that would be helpful for continuing the conversation,
including what we did, what we're doing, which files we're working on, and
what we're going to do next.

When constructing the summary, try to stick to this template:
---
## Goal
[What goal(s) is the user trying to accomplish?]

## Instructions
- [What important instructions did the user give you that are relevant]
- [If there is a plan or spec, include information about it]

## Discoveries
[What notable things were learned during this conversation]

## Accomplished
[What work has been completed, what is still in progress, and what is left?]

## Relevant files / directories
[Structured list of relevant files that have been read, edited, or created]
---`
</code></pre>
<h3>4.4 Plugin hooks (experimental.session.compacting)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:173-178
const compacting = await Plugin.trigger(
  "experimental.session.compacting",
  { sessionID: input.sessionID },
  { context: [], prompt: undefined },
)
const promptText = compacting.prompt ?? [defaultPrompt, ...compacting.context].join("\n\n")
</code></pre>
<p>Plugins can override <code>prompt</code> or inject additional information into the <code>context</code> array.</p>
<h3>4.5 Overflow Replay Logic</h3>
<p>When contextOverflow occurs, find the most recent user message, compact it, and automatically resend it:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:119-135
if (input.overflow) {
  // 마지막 user 메시지(compaction 파트 아닌)를 replay 대상으로 지정
  // 해당 메시지 이전까지만 컴팩션 → 이후 replay 메시지 재생성
  // 미디어 첨부는 placeholder 텍스트로 대체
  // e.g., "[Attached image/png: file.png]"
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.6 Compaction results</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Results</th>
<th>processing</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>"continue"</code> (auto)</td>
<td>replay message regeneration or "Continue" instruction</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>"compact"</code> (recursive overflow)</td>
<td>ContextOverflowError → Abort</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>error</td>
<td><code>processor.message.error</code> → abort</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>success</td>
<td><code>Bus.publish(Event.Compacted)</code> → Event publishing</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>5. Context Management: Instruction + System Prompt</h2>
<h3>Instruction loading path</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts
const FILES = ["AGENTS.md", "CLAUDE.md", "CONTEXT.md"]
</code></pre>
<p>Navigation Priority:</p>
<ol>
<li><code>findUp</code> in the project directory (to the worktree root)</li>
<li>Global path: <code>~/.config/140_opencode/AGENTS.md</code> or <code>~/.claude/CLAUDE.md</code></li>
<li>File/URL specified in <code>config.instructions</code></li>
</ol>
<h3>Dynamic Instruction injection</h3>
<p>When the file reading tool is run, it automatically finds <code>AGENTS.md</code> in that directory and injects it into the context:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts
export async function resolve(
  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[],
  filepath: string,
  messageID: string,
) {
  // filepath의 상위 디렉토리를 워크트리 루트까지 순회
  while (current.startsWith(root) &#x26;&#x26; current !== root) {
    const found = await find(current)
    if (found &#x26;&#x26; !system.has(found) &#x26;&#x26; !already.has(found) &#x26;&#x26; !isClaimed(messageID, found)) {
      claim(messageID, found)
      results.push({ filepath: found, content: "..." })
    }
    current = path.dirname(current)
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>The <code>claim</code> mechanism prevents duplicate loading within the same message.</p>
<h3>System Prompt Branch by model</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts
export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt-4") || model.api.id.includes("o1"))
    return [PROMPT_BEAST]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
  if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
  return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6. Legacy JSON Storage</h2>
<p>Pre-SQLite filesystem-based storage coexists with migration support:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// storage/storage.ts
export namespace Storage {
  export async function read&#x3C;T>(key: string[]) {
    const target = path.join(dir, ...key) + ".json"
    using _ = await Lock.read(target) // Disposable 기반 락
    return Filesystem.readJson&#x3C;T>(target)
  }

  export async function write&#x3C;T>(key: string[], content: T) {
    const target = path.join(dir, ...key) + ".json"
    using _ = await Lock.write(target)
    await Filesystem.writeJson(target, content)
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>File-level concurrency control with the <code>using</code> keyword + <code>Lock.read/write</code>. Session diff data (<code>session_diff</code>) still uses this legacy storage.</p>
<h3>JSON → SQLite migration</h3>
<p><code>JsonMigration.run()</code> batch migrates existing JSON files to SQLite:</p>
<ul>
<li>Comply with FK dependency in the following order: Project → Session → Message → Part → Todo → Permission → Sharing</li>
<li>Batch size 1,000, optimize bulk inserts with <code>PRAGMA synchronous = OFF</code></li>
<li>Detect and skip orphan records</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>7. Session State Machine</h2>
<h3>SessionStatus (Effect-TS service)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/status.ts
export const Info = z.union([
  z.object({ type: z.literal("idle") }),
  z.object({ type: z.literal("retry"), attempt: z.number(),
             message: z.string(), next: z.number() }),
  z.object({ type: z.literal("busy") }),
])
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> idle
    idle --> busy : prompt 시작
    busy --> idle : 완료
    busy --> retry : API 에러 (retryable)
    retry --> busy : 재시도
    retry --> idle : 최대 재시도 초과 / 중단
</code></pre>
<h3>Retry Strategy</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/retry.ts
export const RETRY_INITIAL_DELAY = 2000
export const RETRY_BACKOFF_FACTOR = 2
export const RETRY_MAX_DELAY_NO_HEADERS = 30_000
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>Use <code>retry-after-ms</code> and <code>retry-after</code> headers first</li>
<li>If not, 2 seconds × 2^(attempt-1) exponential backoff, up to 30 seconds</li>
<li><code>ContextOverflowError</code> cannot be retried → Switch to compaction</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<h3>Differences compared to Codex</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Item</th>
<th>Codex</th>
<th>OpenCode</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>memory extraction</td>
<td>2-phase pipeline (extraction → consolidation)</td>
<td>None (the session itself is recorded)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>storage</td>
<td>state DB (Rust) + file system artifact</td>
<td>SQLite (Drizzle ORM) + legacy JSON</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>snapshot</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Git separate repository (write-tree based)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Collapse context</td>
<td>None (memory pipeline instead)</td>
<td>Compaction (prune + LLM summary)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Learning Between Sessions</td>
<td>raw_memories → memory_summary.md</td>
<td>None (session isolation)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>runtime</td>
<td>Rust (Tokio)</td>
<td>TypeScript (Effect-TS + Bun)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Fork Perspective</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> SQLite + Drizzle ORM + event sourcing pattern is clean and highly scalable</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Git snapshot separate repositories are a clever approach to managing file history without polluting the main repo.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> prune of compaction → summarize Step 2 is token efficient</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>using</code> based file locking prevents resource leaks</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> There is no cross-session memory — no function corresponding to Codex’s memory pipeline</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Cost of maintaining dual storage as legacy JSON Storage (<code>session_diff</code>, etc.) still remains.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Dependency on Effect-TS is deep, making it difficult to independently reuse the snapshot service</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>COMPACTION_BUFFER</code> 20,000 tokens hardcoded — requires dynamic adjustment per model</li>
</ul>

Next article: [[11_oc_plugin]]</p>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>

<h1>OpenCode 메모리/세션 시스템 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — memory pipeline.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>소스 기반</strong>: <code>session/compaction.ts</code> (337줄), <code>snapshot/index.ts</code>, <code>session/index.ts</code>, <code>session/projectors.ts</code>, <code>session/revert.ts</code>, <code>session/system.ts</code>, <code>session/instruction.ts</code>, <code>storage/db.ts</code>, <code>storage/json-migration.ts</code>에 기반한다.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode의 메모리 시스템은 <strong>SQLite 기반 세션 영속화 + Git 기반 스냅샷 + 2단계 컴팩션(prune → LLM 요약) 파이프라인</strong>으로 구성된다. Codex의 2-phase extraction/consolidation과 달리, OpenCode는 세션 자체를 1급 객체로 관리하며 대화 내역을 DB에 직접 저장하고 파일 변경을 별도 Git 저장소로 추적한다.</p>
<p><strong>핵심 설계 원칙</strong>: Effect-TS 기반 서비스 레이어 + Drizzle ORM + SyncEvent(이벤트 소싱) 패턴으로, 모든 상태 변경이 이벤트를 통해 DB에 프로젝션된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["사용자 입력"] --> B["Session.create / Session.prompt"]
    B --> C["Snapshot.track()"]
    C --> D["LLM.stream()"]
    D --> E["SessionProcessor"]
    E --> F{"토큰 초과?"}
    F -->|Yes| G["SessionCompaction"]
    F -->|No| H["MessageV2 파트 저장"]
    G --> I["요약 생성 → 컨텍스트 축소"]
    I --> H
    H --> J["SyncEvent → SQLite 프로젝션"]
    J --> K["Snapshot.patch()"]
    K --> L["SessionSummary.summarize()"]

    M["SessionRevert"] --> N["Snapshot.revert()"]
    N --> O["파일 복원 + DB 업데이트"]

    subgraph "Storage Layer"
        P["SQLite (Drizzle ORM)"]
        Q["JSON Storage (legacy)"]
        R["Git Snapshot Repo"]
    end

    J --> P
    L --> Q
    C --> R
    K --> R
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. 세션 영속화: SQLite + Drizzle ORM</h2>
<h3>DB 초기화</h3>
<p>SQLite DB는 <code>Global.Path.data/opencode.db</code>에 위치하며 WAL 모드로 동작한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// storage/db.ts
const db = init(Path)
db.run("PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL")
db.run("PRAGMA synchronous = NORMAL")
db.run("PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000")
db.run("PRAGMA cache_size = -64000")
db.run("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON")
</code></pre>
<p>Drizzle ORM 마이그레이션을 번들링 또는 개발 모드에서 실행하며, <code>OPENCODE_SKIP_MIGRATIONS</code> 플래그로 건너뛸 수 있다.</p>
<h3>테이블 스키마</h3>
<p>4개 핵심 테이블이 세션 데이터를 관리한다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>테이블</th>
<th>PK</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>session</code></td>
<td><code>SessionID</code></td>
<td>세션 메타데이터 (프로젝트, 디렉토리, 타이틀, 요약, revert 상태)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>message</code></td>
<td><code>MessageID</code></td>
<td>메시지 정보 (역할, 세션 참조, JSON data 컬럼)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>part</code></td>
<td><code>PartID</code></td>
<td>메시지 파트 (텍스트, 도구호출, 스냅샷, 패치 등)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>todo</code></td>
<td><code>(session_id, position)</code></td>
<td>세션별 할일 목록</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/session.sql.ts
export const SessionTable = sqliteTable("session", {
  id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>().primaryKey(),
  project_id: text().$type&#x3C;ProjectID>().notNull()
    .references(() => ProjectTable.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
  workspace_id: text().$type&#x3C;WorkspaceID>(),
  parent_id: text().$type&#x3C;SessionID>(),
  slug: text().notNull(),
  title: text().notNull(),
  revert: text({ mode: "json" }).$type&#x3C;{
    messageID: MessageID; partID?: PartID;
    snapshot?: string; diff?: string
  }>(),
  // ...Timestamps, summary fields, permission
})
</code></pre>
<h3>ID 체계</h3>
<p>브랜드 타입 + 시간순 정렬을 위한 <code>Identifier</code> 유틸리티:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/schema.ts
export const SessionID = Schema.String.pipe(
  Schema.brand("SessionID"),
  withStatics((s) => ({
    descending: (id?: string) =>
      s.makeUnsafe(Identifier.descending("session", id)),
  })),
)
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>SessionID</code>: <strong>내림차순</strong> (최신이 먼저)</li>
<li><code>MessageID</code>, <code>PartID</code>: <strong>오름차순</strong> (시간순 정렬)</li>
</ul>
<h3>이벤트 소싱 패턴 (SyncEvent)</h3>
<p>모든 세션 변경은 <code>SyncEvent</code>를 통해 발행되고, projector가 DB에 반영한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/index.ts — 세션 생성
SyncEvent.run(Event.Created, { sessionID: result.id, info: result })

// session/projectors.ts — DB 프로젝션
SyncEvent.project(Session.Event.Created, (db, data) => {
  db.insert(SessionTable).values(Session.toRow(data.info)).run()
})

SyncEvent.project(MessageV2.Event.PartUpdated, (db, data) => {
  const { id, messageID, sessionID, ...rest } = data.part
  db.insert(PartTable)
    .values({ id, message_id: messageID, session_id: sessionID, data: rest })
    .onConflictDoUpdate({ target: PartTable.id, set: { data: rest } })
    .run()
})
</code></pre>
<p>이벤트 소싱의 장점: 세션 삭제 시 <code>SyncEvent.remove(sessionID)</code>로 관련 이벤트 로그 일괄 정리.</p>
<h3>트랜잭션 관리</h3>
<p><code>Database.transaction()</code>은 <code>Context</code> 기반 암묵 전파를 지원한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// storage/db.ts
export function transaction&#x3C;T>(callback: (tx: TxOrDb) => NotPromise&#x3C;T>) {
  try {
    return callback(ctx.use().tx) // 기존 트랜잭션 재사용
  } catch (err) {
    if (err instanceof Context.NotFound) {
      // 새 트랜잭션 시작 + side-effect 큐
      const effects: (() => void | Promise&#x3C;void>)[] = []
      const result = Client().transaction((tx) =>
        ctx.provide({ tx, effects }, () => callback(tx)),
      )
      for (const effect of effects) effect()
      return result
    }
    throw err
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>Database.effect(fn)</code>으로 트랜잭션 커밋 후 실행할 사이드이펙트를 등록한다 (이벤트 발행 등).</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Git 기반 스냅샷 시스템</h2>
<h3>아키텍처</h3>
<p>프로젝트의 메인 <code>.git</code>과 <strong>별도의 snapshot용 Git 저장소</strong>(<code>Global.Path.data/snapshot/&#x3C;projectID></code>)를 분리 운영한다. <code>--git-dir</code> / <code>--work-tree</code> 분리로 메인 저장소를 오염시키지 않는다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// snapshot/index.ts
const state = {
  directory: ctx.directory,
  worktree: ctx.worktree,
  gitdir: path.join(Global.Path.data, "snapshot", ctx.project.id),
  vcs: ctx.project.vcs,
}
const args = (cmd: string[]) => [
  "--git-dir", state.gitdir,
  "--work-tree", state.worktree,
  ...cmd,
]
</code></pre>
<h3>Effect-TS 서비스 레이어</h3>
<p>Snapshot은 Effect-TS의 <code>ServiceMap</code> 패턴으로 구현된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// snapshot/index.ts
export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()(
  "@opencode/Snapshot"
) {}

export interface Interface {
  readonly track: () => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string | undefined>
  readonly patch: (hash: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Snapshot.Patch>
  readonly restore: (snapshot: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;void>
  readonly revert: (patches: Snapshot.Patch[]) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;void>
  readonly diff: (hash: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string>
  readonly diffFull: (from: string, to: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;FileDiff[]>
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>InstanceState</code> + <code>makeRunPromise</code>로 Effect 런타임을 async/await 세계와 브릿지한다.</p>
<h3>주요 작업 흐름</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>함수</th>
<th>동작</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>track()</code></td>
<td><code>git add</code> → <code>git write-tree</code> → tree hash 반환</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>patch(hash)</code></td>
<td>현재 상태와 hash 비교 → 변경된 파일 목록</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>restore(snapshot)</code></td>
<td><code>git read-tree</code> + <code>git checkout-index</code> → 스냅샷 복원</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>revert(patches)</code></td>
<td>패치 역순 적용으로 파일별 원래 상태 복원</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>diffFull(from, to)</code></td>
<td>두 tree 간 전체 diff + 파일 내용(before/after)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>cleanup()</code></td>
<td><code>git gc --prune=7.days</code> (1시간 주기 스케줄)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>대용량 파일 제외 로직: 2MB 초과 파일은 <code>.gitignore</code>에 동적 추가하여 스냅샷에서 제외한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">const limit = 2 * 1024 * 1024 // 2MB
const large = (yield* Effect.all(
  all.map((item) =>
    fs.stat(path.join(state.directory, item)).pipe(
      Effect.map((stat) =>
        stat.type === "File" &#x26;&#x26; Number(stat.size) > limit ? item : undefined
      ),
    ),
  ),
  { concurrency: 8 },
)).filter(Boolean)
yield* sync(large) // 대용량 파일을 exclude에 추가
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. 세션 Revert 시스템</h2>
<h3>revert 흐름</h3>
<p><code>SessionRevert.revert()</code>는 특정 메시지/파트 시점으로 세션을 되돌린다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["revert 요청"] --> B["메시지 순회: revert 지점 탐색"]
    B --> C["패치 수집 (revert 이후 변경)"]
    C --> D["Snapshot.track() → 현재 상태 저장"]
    D --> E["Snapshot.revert(patches) → 파일 복원"]
    E --> F["Snapshot.diff() → diff 계산"]
    F --> G["Session.setRevert() → DB 업데이트"]
</code></pre>
<p>핵심 로직:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/revert.ts
export async function revert(input: RevertInput) {
  SessionPrompt.assertNotBusy(input.sessionID)
  const all = await Session.messages({ sessionID: input.sessionID })
  const patches: Snapshot.Patch[] = []
  
  for (const msg of all) {
    // revert 지점 이후의 patch 파트를 수집
    if (revert) {
      if (part.type === "patch") patches.push(part)
    }
  }
  
  revert.snapshot = session.revert?.snapshot ?? (await Snapshot.track())
  await Snapshot.revert(patches)      // 파일 시스템 복원
  revert.diff = await Snapshot.diff(revert.snapshot)
  return Session.setRevert({ sessionID, revert, summary })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>unrevert</h3>
<p><code>unrevert()</code>는 <code>Snapshot.restore(snapshot)</code>로 revert 이전 상태로 다시 복원한다. 양방향 시간여행이 가능하다.</p>
<h3>revert cleanup</h3>
<p>실제 revert를 확정할 때 <code>cleanup()</code>이 호출되어 revert 지점 이후의 메시지/파트를 DB에서 삭제한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. 컴팩션 (Context Window 관리)</h2>
<h3>4.1 오버플로우 감지</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:32-49
const COMPACTION_BUFFER = 20_000

export async function isOverflow(input: {
  tokens: MessageV2.Assistant["tokens"];
  model: Provider.Model;
}) {
  const config = await Config.get()
  if (config.compaction?.auto === false) return false   // 수동 비활성화
  const context = input.model.limit.context
  if (context === 0) return false                        // 무한 컨텍스트

  const count = input.tokens.total || 
    input.tokens.input + input.tokens.output + 
    input.tokens.cache.read + input.tokens.cache.write

  const reserved = config.compaction?.reserved ?? 
    Math.min(COMPACTION_BUFFER, ProviderTransform.maxOutputTokens(input.model))
  const usable = input.model.limit.input
    ? input.model.limit.input - reserved
    : context - ProviderTransform.maxOutputTokens(input.model)
  return count >= usable
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 Prune — 도구 출력 가지치기 (역방향 순회)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:60-105
export async function prune(input: { sessionID: SessionID }) {
  const config = await Config.get()
  if (config.compaction?.prune === false) return      // 수동 비활성화

  const msgs = await Session.messages({ sessionID: input.sessionID })
  let total = 0
  let pruned = 0
  let turns = 0

  // 역방향 순회: 최신 메시지부터
  for (let msgIndex = msgs.length - 1; msgIndex >= 0; msgIndex--) {
    const msg = msgs[msgIndex]
    if (msg.info.role === "user") turns++
    if (turns &#x3C; 2) continue                            // 최근 2턴은 건너뜀
    if (msg.info.role === "assistant" &#x26;&#x26; msg.info.summary) break  // 이전 요약 도달 시 중단

    for (let partIndex = msg.parts.length - 1; partIndex >= 0; partIndex--) {
      const part = msg.parts[partIndex]
      if (part.type === "tool" &#x26;&#x26; part.state.status === "completed") {
        if (PRUNE_PROTECTED_TOOLS.includes(part.tool)) continue  // skill 보호
        if (part.state.time.compacted) break                      // 이미 pruned

        const estimate = Token.estimate(part.state.output)
        total += estimate
        if (total > PRUNE_PROTECT) {                              // 40K 초과 시 가지치기
          pruned += estimate
          toPrune.push(part)
        }
      }
    }
  }

  if (pruned > PRUNE_MINIMUM) {                                   // 20K 이상 잘라야 실행
    for (const part of toPrune) {
      part.state.time.compacted = Date.now()                      // 타임스탬프 마킹
      await Session.updatePart(part)
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>상수</th>
<th>값</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>COMPACTION_BUFFER</code></td>
<td>20,000 토큰</td>
<td>오버플로우 감지 예비</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PRUNE_PROTECT</code></td>
<td>40,000 토큰</td>
<td>최근 이만큼의 도구 출력 보존</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PRUNE_MINIMUM</code></td>
<td>20,000 토큰</td>
<td>최소 이만큼 잘라야 실행</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PRUNE_PROTECTED_TOOLS</code></td>
<td><code>["skill"]</code></td>
<td>prune 제외 도구</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>보호 턴 수</td>
<td>2</td>
<td>최근 2턴은 prune 대상 아님</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>핵심 설계</strong>: <code>compacted</code> 타임스탬프로 prune 이력 추적 → 이미 pruned된 도구에 도달하면 순회 중단 (중복 prune 방지)</p>
<h3>4.3 컴팩션 에이전트 프롬프트</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:179-205 — 컴팩션 프롬프트 템플릿
const defaultPrompt = `Provide a detailed prompt for continuing our conversation above.
Focus on information that would be helpful for continuing the conversation,
including what we did, what we're doing, which files we're working on, and
what we're going to do next.

When constructing the summary, try to stick to this template:
---
## Goal
[What goal(s) is the user trying to accomplish?]

## Instructions
- [What important instructions did the user give you that are relevant]
- [If there is a plan or spec, include information about it]

## Discoveries
[What notable things were learned during this conversation]

## Accomplished
[What work has been completed, what is still in progress, and what is left?]

## Relevant files / directories
[Structured list of relevant files that have been read, edited, or created]
---`
</code></pre>
<h3>4.4 플러그인 훅 (experimental.session.compacting)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:173-178
const compacting = await Plugin.trigger(
  "experimental.session.compacting",
  { sessionID: input.sessionID },
  { context: [], prompt: undefined },
)
const promptText = compacting.prompt ?? [defaultPrompt, ...compacting.context].join("\n\n")
</code></pre>
<p>플러그인이 <code>prompt</code>를 오버라이드하거나 <code>context</code> 배열에 추가 정보를 주입 가능.</p>
<h3>4.5 Overflow Replay 로직</h3>
<p>contextOverflow 발생 시, 가장 최근 사용자 메시지를 찾아 컴팩션 후 자동 재전송:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/compaction.ts:119-135
if (input.overflow) {
  // 마지막 user 메시지(compaction 파트 아닌)를 replay 대상으로 지정
  // 해당 메시지 이전까지만 컴팩션 → 이후 replay 메시지 재생성
  // 미디어 첨부는 placeholder 텍스트로 대체
  // e.g., "[Attached image/png: file.png]"
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.6 컴팩션 결과</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>결과</th>
<th>처리</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>"continue"</code> (auto)</td>
<td>replay 메시지 재생성 or "Continue" 지시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>"compact"</code> (재귀 overflow)</td>
<td>ContextOverflowError → 중단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>에러</td>
<td><code>processor.message.error</code> → 중단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>성공</td>
<td><code>Bus.publish(Event.Compacted)</code> → 이벤트 발행</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>5. 컨텍스트 관리: Instruction + System Prompt</h2>
<h3>Instruction 로딩 경로</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts
const FILES = ["AGENTS.md", "CLAUDE.md", "CONTEXT.md"]
</code></pre>
<p>탐색 우선순위:</p>
<ol>
<li>프로젝트 디렉토리에서 <code>findUp</code> (워크트리 루트까지)</li>
<li>글로벌 경로: <code>~/.config/140_opencode/AGENTS.md</code> 또는 <code>~/.claude/CLAUDE.md</code></li>
<li><code>config.instructions</code>에 명시된 파일/URL</li>
</ol>
<h3>동적 Instruction 주입</h3>
<p>파일 읽기 도구가 실행될 때 해당 디렉토리의 <code>AGENTS.md</code>를 자동 발견하여 컨텍스트에 주입한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/instruction.ts
export async function resolve(
  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[],
  filepath: string,
  messageID: string,
) {
  // filepath의 상위 디렉토리를 워크트리 루트까지 순회
  while (current.startsWith(root) &#x26;&#x26; current !== root) {
    const found = await find(current)
    if (found &#x26;&#x26; !system.has(found) &#x26;&#x26; !already.has(found) &#x26;&#x26; !isClaimed(messageID, found)) {
      claim(messageID, found)
      results.push({ filepath: found, content: "..." })
    }
    current = path.dirname(current)
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>claim</code> 메커니즘으로 같은 메시지 내 중복 로딩을 방지한다.</p>
<h3>System Prompt 모델별 분기</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/system.ts
export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt-4") || model.api.id.includes("o1"))
    return [PROMPT_BEAST]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
  if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
  if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
  return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6. 레거시 JSON Storage</h2>
<p>SQLite 이전의 파일시스템 기반 저장소가 마이그레이션 지원과 함께 공존한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// storage/storage.ts
export namespace Storage {
  export async function read&#x3C;T>(key: string[]) {
    const target = path.join(dir, ...key) + ".json"
    using _ = await Lock.read(target) // Disposable 기반 락
    return Filesystem.readJson&#x3C;T>(target)
  }

  export async function write&#x3C;T>(key: string[], content: T) {
    const target = path.join(dir, ...key) + ".json"
    using _ = await Lock.write(target)
    await Filesystem.writeJson(target, content)
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>using</code> 키워드 + <code>Lock.read/write</code>로 파일 수준 동시성 제어. 세션 diff 데이터(<code>session_diff</code>)는 아직 이 레거시 저장소를 사용한다.</p>
<h3>JSON → SQLite 마이그레이션</h3>
<p><code>JsonMigration.run()</code>이 기존 JSON 파일을 일괄 SQLite 이관한다:</p>
<ul>
<li>프로젝트 → 세션 → 메시지 → 파트 → 투두 → 퍼미션 → 공유 순서로 FK 의존성 준수</li>
<li>배치 크기 1,000, <code>PRAGMA synchronous = OFF</code>로 벌크 삽입 최적화</li>
<li>고아 레코드(orphan) 감지 및 스킵</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>7. 세션 상태 머신</h2>
<h3>SessionStatus (Effect-TS 서비스)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/status.ts
export const Info = z.union([
  z.object({ type: z.literal("idle") }),
  z.object({ type: z.literal("retry"), attempt: z.number(),
             message: z.string(), next: z.number() }),
  z.object({ type: z.literal("busy") }),
])
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> idle
    idle --> busy : prompt 시작
    busy --> idle : 완료
    busy --> retry : API 에러 (retryable)
    retry --> busy : 재시도
    retry --> idle : 최대 재시도 초과 / 중단
</code></pre>
<h3>재시도 전략</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// session/retry.ts
export const RETRY_INITIAL_DELAY = 2000
export const RETRY_BACKOFF_FACTOR = 2
export const RETRY_MAX_DELAY_NO_HEADERS = 30_000
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>retry-after-ms</code>, <code>retry-after</code> 헤더 우선 사용</li>
<li>없으면 2초 × 2^(attempt-1) 지수 백오프, 최대 30초</li>
<li><code>ContextOverflowError</code>는 재시도 불가 → 컴팩션으로 전환</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>기술 참조</h2>
<h3>핵심 파일 목록</h3>
<table>

26:["$","$L2f","20-axis-10-memory",{"id":"20-axis-10-memory","order":34,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 10: Memory pipeline","description":"010_memory-pipeline/10_oc_memory.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$51"}}]}]
52:Tf8de,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 11: Plugin system</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — plugin system.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OpenCode의 플러그인은 <strong>Hook 기반 확장 모델</strong>이다. 플러그인은 <code>Hooks</code> 인터페이스를 구현한 순수 TypeScript 함수로, 초기화 시 <code>PluginInput</code>(SDK 클라이언트, 프로젝트 경로, Bun shell 등)을 받고 <code>Hooks</code> 객체를 반환한다. 이 Hook 객체가 채팅, 도구, 셸, 인증 등 런타임의 거의 모든 확장점에 끼어든다.</li>
<li>핵심은 <strong>trigger 패턴</strong>이다. <code>Plugin.trigger(hookName, input, output)</code> 호출 시 등록된 모든 플러그인의 해당 훅이 순차 실행되며, <code>output</code> 객체를 직접 변이(mutate)해서 결과를 조작한다. 이 패턴은 Effect-TS의 <code>Effect.fn</code> 래퍼로 감싸져 트레이싱과 의존성 주입이 자동으로 적용된다.</li>
<li>SDK 패키지(<code>@opencode-ai/plugin</code>, 1.3.2)는 세 파일로 구성된다: Hook 타입 정의(<code>index.ts</code>), 커스텀 도구 빌더(<code>tool.ts</code>), Bun 셸 타입(<code>shell.ts</code>). 런타임 코어(<code>packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts</code>)는 Effect-TS <code>ServiceMap</code> 패턴으로 <code>Plugin.Service</code>를 선언하고, <code>InstanceState</code>로</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["opencode.jsonplugin: [...]"] --> B["Config.loadPlugin()"]</li>
<li>B --> C["Plugin.Service (Effect-TS)"]</li>
<li>D["내장 플러그인Codex·Copilot·GitLab·Poe"] --> C</li>
<li>E[".opencode/plugins/*.ts로컬 플러그인"] --> B</li>
<li>F["npm 패키지BunProc.install()"] --> C</li>
<li>C --> G["InstanceState&#x3C;Hooks[]>"]</li>
<li>G --> H["Plugin.trigger()"]</li>
</ul>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:165-180
const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* &#x3C;
  Name extends TriggerName,
  Input = Parameters&#x3C;Required&#x3C;Hooks>[Name]>[0],
  Output = Parameters&#x3C;Required&#x3C;Hooks>[Name]>[1],
>(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {
  if (!name) return output
  const state = yield* InstanceState.get(cache)
  yield* Effect.promise(async () => {
    for (const hook of state.hooks) {
      const fn = hook[name] as any
      if (!fn) continue
      await fn(input, output)  // output을 직접 변이
    }
  })
  return output  // 변이된 output 반환
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts:497-508
async function loadPlugin(dir: string) {
  const plugins: string[] = []
  for (const item of await Glob.scan("{plugin,plugins}/*.{ts,js}", {
    cwd: dir, absolute: true, dot: true, symlink: true,
  })) {
    plugins.push(pathToFileURL(item).href)
  }
  return plugins
}
</code></pre>

for (const plugin of INTERNAL_PLUGINS) {
  log.info("loading internal plugin", { name: plugin.name })
  const init = await plugin(input).catch((err) => {
    log.error("failed to load internal plugin", { name: plugin.name, error: err })
  })
  if (init) hooks.push(init)
}
</code></pre>

yield* Effect.acquireRelease(
  Effect.sync(() =>
    Bus.subscribeAll(async (input) => {
      for (const hook of hooks) {
        hook["event"]?.({ event: input })
      }
    }),
  ),
  (unsub) => Effect.sync(unsub),
)

export const ExamplePlugin: Plugin = async (ctx) => {

        description: "This is a custom tool",

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:61-83
function fromPlugin(id: string, def: ToolDefinition): Tool.Info {
  return {
    id,
    init: async (initCtx) => ({
      parameters: z.object(def.args),
      description: def.description,
      execute: async (args, toolCtx) => {
        const pluginCtx = {
          ...toolCtx,
          directory: ctx.directory,
          worktree: ctx.worktree,
        } as unknown as PluginToolContext
        const result = await def.execute(args as any, pluginCtx)
        const out = await Truncate.output(result, {}, initCtx?.agent)
        return {
          title: "",
          output: out.truncated ? out.content : result,
          metadata: { truncated: out.truncated },
        }
      },
    }),
  }
}
</code></pre>

    U->>P: 인증 요청
    P->>A: auth.methods[0].authorize()
    A->>O: Device Code 요청
    O-->>A: verification_uri + user_code

    loop 폴링

yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() =>
  Effect.forEach(
    hooks,
    (hook) =>
      Effect.tryPromise({
        try: () => Promise.resolve(hook.dispose?.()),
        catch: (error) => {
          log.error("plugin dispose hook failed", { error })
        },
      }).pipe(Effect.ignore),
    { discard: true },
  ),
)
</code></pre>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>OpenCode plugin system analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — plugin system.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode's plugin is a <strong>Hook-based extension model</strong>. A plugin is a pure TypeScript function that implements the <code>Hooks</code> interface. Upon initialization, it receives <code>PluginInput</code> (SDK client, project path, Bun shell, etc.) and returns a <code>Hooks</code> object. This Hook object is inserted into almost all extension points of the runtime, including chat, tools, shell, and authentication.</p>
<p>The key is the <strong>trigger pattern</strong>. When calling <code>Plugin.trigger(hookName, input, output)</code>, the corresponding hooks of all registered plugins are executed sequentially, and the results are manipulated by directly mutating the <code>output</code> object. This pattern is wrapped in Effect-TS's <code>Effect.fn</code> wrapper, so tracing and dependency injection are applied automatically.</p>
<p>The SDK package (<code>@opencode-ai/plugin</code>, 1.3.2) consists of three files: Hook type definition (<code>index.ts</code>), custom tool builder (<code>tool.ts</code>), and Bun shell type (<code>shell.ts</code>). The runtime core (<code>packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts</code>) declares <code>Plugin.Service</code> with the Effect-TS <code>ServiceMap</code> pattern and manages the plugin state for each session with <code>InstanceState</code>. Built-in plugins (CodexAuth, CopilotAuth, GitlabAuth, PoeAuth) are imported directly, and external plugins are installed by npm or dynamically loaded to the <code>file://</code> local path.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["opencode.json&#x3C;br/>plugin: [...]"] --> B["Config.loadPlugin()"]
    B --> C["Plugin.Service (Effect-TS)"]
    D["내장 플러그인&#x3C;br/>Codex·Copilot·GitLab·Poe"] --> C
    E[".opencode/plugins/*.ts&#x3C;br/>로컬 플러그인"] --> B
    F["npm 패키지&#x3C;br/>BunProc.install()"] --> C

    C --> G["InstanceState&#x26;lt;Hooks[]&#x26;gt;"]
    G --> H["Plugin.trigger()"]
    H --> I["chat.message"]
    H --> J["chat.params / chat.headers"]
    H --> K["tool.execute.before / after"]
    H --> L["shell.env"]
    H --> M["permission.ask"]
    H --> N["experimental.*"]

    G --> O["Bus.subscribeAll()"]
    O --> P["hook.event()"]

    G --> Q["ToolRegistry"]
    Q --> R["hook.tool → 커스텀 도구"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Hook system details</h2>
<h3>Full list of Hooks interfaces</h3>
<p>The hooks defined by the <code>Hooks</code> interface (<code>packages/plugin/src/index.ts:162-248</code>) are:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>hook name</th>
<th>Signature pattern</th>
<th>call location</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>event</code></td>
<td><code>({event}) → void</code></td>
<td><code>Bus.subscribeAll</code></td>
<td>Receive all Bus events</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>config</code></td>
<td><code>(Config) → void</code></td>
<td>After initialization is complete</td>
<td>Current settings notification</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tool</code></td>
<td><code>{[id]: ToolDefinition}</code></td>
<td><code>ToolRegistry</code></td>
<td>Custom tool registration</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>auth</code></td>
<td><code>AuthHook</code> object</td>
<td>Authentication system</td>
<td>Provides OAuth/API authentication</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>chat.message</code></td>
<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>
<td><code>prompt.ts:1338</code></td>
<td>Convert when new message is received</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>chat.params</code></td>
<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>
<td><code>llm.ts:131</code></td>
<td>Modulation of LLM parameters (temperature, etc.)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>chat.headers</code></td>
<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>
<td><code>llm.ts:150</code></td>
<td>LLM request header injection</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>permission.ask</code></td>
<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>
<td>permission system</td>
<td>Automatically approve/deny permission requests</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>command.execute.before</code></td>
<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>
<td><code>prompt.ts:1946</code></td>
<td>Before executing the slash command</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tool.execute.before</code></td>
<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>
<td><code>prompt.ts:824</code></td>
<td>Modify args before executing tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tool.execute.after</code></td>
<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>
<td><code>prompt.ts:845</code></td>
<td>Tampering with the results after running the tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tool.definition</code></td>
<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>
<td><code>registry.ts:185</code></td>
<td>Tool Tips/Parameter Modulation</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>shell.env</code></td>
<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>
<td><code>prompt.ts:1699</code>, <code>bash.ts:162</code></td>
<td>Shell environment variable injection</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>experimental.chat.messages.transform</code></td>
<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>

<td>Convert entire message array</td>

<td><code>(input, output) → void</code></td>
<td><code>processor.ts:323</code></td>
<td>Post-processing after text creation is complete</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>There are a total of 17 hook slots, and since each key of the <code>tool</code> hook is an independent tool, there are more actual expansion points.</p>
<h3>How the trigger pattern works</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:165-180
const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* &#x3C;
  Name extends TriggerName,
  Input = Parameters&#x3C;Required&#x3C;Hooks>[Name]>[0],
  Output = Parameters&#x3C;Required&#x3C;Hooks>[Name]>[1],
>(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {
  if (!name) return output
  const state = yield* InstanceState.get(cache)
  yield* Effect.promise(async () => {
    for (const hook of state.hooks) {
      const fn = hook[name] as any
      if (!fn) continue
      await fn(input, output)  // output을 직접 변이
    }
  })
  return output  // 변이된 output 반환
})
</code></pre>
<p>Key design principles:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Output Mutation Pattern</strong>: Each hook directly modifies the <code>output</code> object. Rather than returning a new object, it overwrites the properties of the existing object. This allows multiple plug-ins to process the same output sequentially.</li>
<li><strong>TriggerName type filter</strong>: Only hooks with the signature <code>(input, output) => Promise&#x3C;void></code> can be called with <code>trigger()</code>. Non-standard signature hooks such as <code>event</code>, <code>config</code>, <code>tool</code>, and <code>auth</code> are called in a separate path.</li>
<li><strong>Effect-TS wrapping</strong>: OpenTelemetry tracing and dependency injection are automatically applied by wrapping with <code>Effect.fn</code>.</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<h2>Plugin life cycle</h2>
<h3>Step 1: Gather Settings</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts:497-508
async function loadPlugin(dir: string) {
  const plugins: string[] = []
  for (const item of await Glob.scan("{plugin,plugins}/*.{ts,js}", {
    cwd: dir, absolute: true, dot: true, symlink: true,
  })) {
    plugins.push(pathToFileURL(item).href)
  }
  return plugins
}
</code></pre>
<p>Plugin sources are collected from three places:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Source</th>
<th>Priority</th>
<th>Format</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>global <code>opencode.json</code></td>
<td>Lowest</td>
<td>npm package name or <code>file://</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>global <code>.opencode/plugins/</code></td>
<td>middle</td>
<td><code>*.ts</code>, <code>*.js</code> files</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>local <code>opencode.json</code></td>
<td>High</td>
<td>npm package name or <code>file://</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>local <code>.opencode/plugins/</code></td>
<td>Best</td>
<td><code>*.ts</code>, <code>*.js</code> files</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Deduplication (<code>deduplicatePlugins</code>) is based on canonical names, with higher priority winning.</p>
<h3>Step 2: Reset</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:84-90
for (const plugin of INTERNAL_PLUGINS) {
  log.info("loading internal plugin", { name: plugin.name })
  const init = await plugin(input).catch((err) => {
    log.error("failed to load internal plugin", { name: plugin.name, error: err })
  })
  if (init) hooks.push(init)
}
</code></pre>
<ol>
<li>Directly import and initialize <strong>4 built-in plugins</strong> (Codex, Copilot, GitLab, Poe)</li>
<li><strong>External plugin</strong>: npm package is dynamically imported after installation with <code>BunProc.install()</code>, <code>file://</code> is imported immediately</li>
<li><strong>Prevention of duplication</strong>: <code>default</code> export and named export can point to the same function, so dedup with <code>Set</code></li>
<li><strong>config notification</strong>: Call <code>hook.config?.(cfg)</code> after all hooks are finished loading.</li>
</ol>
<h3>Step 3: Subscribe to events</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:150-159
yield* Effect.acquireRelease(
  Effect.sync(() =>
    Bus.subscribeAll(async (input) => {
      for (const hook of hooks) {
        hook["event"]?.({ event: input })
      }
    }),
  ),
  (unsub) => Effect.sync(unsub),
)
</code></pre>
<p>Make a wildcard subscription with <code>Bus.subscribeAll</code> to deliver all Bus events to the plugin's <code>event</code> hook. It is automatically released when the scope ends with Effect-TS's <code>acquireRelease</code>.</p>
<h3>Step 4: Runtime triggers</h3>
<p>When the caller calls something like <code>Plugin.trigger("chat.params", input, output)</code>, all registered hooks are executed sequentially to mutate the output.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Custom Tool System</h2>
<h3><code>tool()</code> builder in the SDK</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/plugin/src/tool.ts
export function tool&#x3C;Args extends z.ZodRawShape>(input: {
  description: string
  args: Args
  execute(args: z.infer&#x3C;z.ZodObject&#x3C;Args>>, context: ToolContext): Promise&#x3C;string>
}) {
  return input
}
tool.schema = z  // Zod를 그대로 노출
</code></pre>
<p>Just declare parameters with the Zod schema and return a string from <code>execute</code>. <code>ToolContext</code> includes <code>sessionID</code>, <code>messageID</code>, <code>agent</code>, <code>directory</code>, <code>worktree</code>, <code>abort</code> signal, <code>metadata()</code> callback, and <code>ask()</code> permission request.</p>
<h3>Example plugin</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/plugin/src/example.ts
import { Plugin } from "./index.js"
import { tool } from "./tool.js"

export const ExamplePlugin: Plugin = async (ctx) => {
  return {
    tool: {
      mytool: tool({
        description: "This is a custom tool",
        args: { foo: tool.schema.string().describe("foo") },
        async execute(args) {
          return `Hello ${args.foo}!`
        },
      }),
    },
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Runtime registration path</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:61-83
function fromPlugin(id: string, def: ToolDefinition): Tool.Info {
  return {
    id,
    init: async (initCtx) => ({
      parameters: z.object(def.args),
      description: def.description,
      execute: async (args, toolCtx) => {
        const pluginCtx = {
          ...toolCtx,
          directory: ctx.directory,
          worktree: ctx.worktree,
        } as unknown as PluginToolContext
        const result = await def.execute(args as any, pluginCtx)
        const out = await Truncate.output(result, {}, initCtx?.agent)
        return {
          title: "",
          output: out.truncated ? out.content : result,
          metadata: { truncated: out.truncated },
        }
      },
    }),
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>ToolRegistry</code> collects custom tools through two paths:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>File-based</strong>: Automatically detects <code>ToolDefinition</code> exported from <code>.opencode/{tool,tools}/*.{js,ts}</code> files.</li>
<li><strong>Plugin-based</strong>: Tools registered in the <code>Hooks.tool</code> dictionary.</li>
</ol>
<p>All custom tools have a limited output length via <code>Truncate.output()</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Authentication plugin architecture</h2>
<p><code>AuthHook</code> is the most complex hook in the plugin system. Two authentication methods are supported:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>method</th>
<th>Description</th>
<th>Example</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>oauth</code></td>
<td>Device flow or PKCE OAuth</td>
<td>Codex (OpenAI), Copilot (GitHub)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>api</code></td>
<td>Enter API key directly</td>
<td>General Provider</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>loader</code> returns a custom <code>fetch</code> function and <code>baseURL</code> based on authentication information. The Copilot plugin (<code>copilot.ts</code>) distinguishes user/agent requests with the <code>x-initiator</code> header and displays vision requests with the <code>Copilot-Vision-Request</code> header. The Codex plugin (<code>codex.ts</code>) obtains tokens with OpenAI PKCE OAuth + local HTTP server (port 1455).</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant U as 사용자
    participant P as Plugin.Service
    participant A as AuthHook
    participant O as OAuth Provider

    U->>P: 인증 요청
    P->>A: auth.methods[0].authorize()
    A->>O: Device Code 요청
    O-->>A: verification_uri + user_code
    A-->>U: URL + 코드 표시
    U->>O: 브라우저에서 코드 입력
    loop 폴링
        A->>O: access_token 요청
        O-->>A: authorization_pending / success
    end
    A-->>P: {refresh, access, expires}
    P->>A: auth.loader(getAuth, provider)
    A-->>P: {baseURL, apiKey, fetch}
</code></pre>
<hr>

<h3>Effect-TS integration pattern</h3>
<p>The OpenCode plugin leverages the following patterns from Effect-TS:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>ServiceMap.Service</code></strong>: Dependency injection is possible by declaring <code>Plugin.Service</code> as an Effect service.</li>
<li><strong><code>Layer.effect</code></strong>: Wraps the service implementation in a layer and allows mock replacement during testing.</li>
<li><strong><code>InstanceState</code></strong>: Manage isolated plug-in state by session (instance)</li>
<li><strong><code>Effect.acquireRelease</code></strong>: Ensures automatic cleanup of Bus subscriptions.</li>
<li><strong><code>Effect.fn</code></strong>: Apply automatic tracing to trigger function</li>
</ul>
<h3>Comparison with Codex (Rust) plugin</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Item</th>
<th>OpenCode (TypeScript)</th>
<th>Codex (Rust)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>expansion unit</td>
<td><code>Hooks</code> object (set of functions)</td>
<td>manifest + MCP server + connector package</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Installation</td>
<td>npm install or local file</td>
<td>marketplace + git sync</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Certification</td>
<td>Integration with <code>AuthHook</code> in plugin</td>
<td>OAuth is a separate system</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Tool registration</td>
<td><code>Hooks.tool</code> + <code>tool()</code> builder</td>
<td>MCP Server Tool Exposure</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Runtime integration</td>
<td>trigger pattern (output mutation)</td>
<td>developer instructions injection</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>State Management</td>
<td>Effect-TS <code>InstanceState</code></td>
<td><code>PluginsManager</code> 67KB single manager</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Distribution</td>
<td>npm registry</td>
<td>OpenAI curated marketplace</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Fork Perspective</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li>The output mutation model of the [x] trigger pattern is simple yet powerful — it can be directly adopted in our extension design.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The Zod integration of the <code>tool()</code> builder is a good reference for type-safe tool definitions.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Effect-TS Automatic organization of subscriptions using <code>acquireRelease</code> is effective in preventing resource leaks</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Bun runtime dependencies (<code>BunProc.install</code>, <code>Bun.$</code>) need to be replaced in the Node.js environment.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Built-in authentication plugins (Codex, Copilot) are service-specific – can be abstracted into a general-purpose OAuth framework</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> There are as many as 6 <code>experimental.*</code> prefix hooks — risk of API change upon stabilization</li>
</ul>
