<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: In-depth reverse engineering enhancements — <code>reverse-engineering</code> tag added, document leaflet hook system classification tag expansion. The existing analysis is already based on source code, so the structure is maintained.</li>
<li>2025-07-15: Analyzed the OpenCode plugin system as SDK + Runtime + Hook + Custom Tool + Authentication structure.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Latest update (2026-05-30)</h2>
<p>Based on the previous commit 1522, the following changes were confirmed in the plugin system. SDK version is <code>1.15.12</code>.</p>
<h3>1. Add <code>dispose</code> hook — plugin cleanup lifecycle</h3>
<p>A new hook, <code>dispose?: () => Promise&#x3C;void></code>, has been added to the <code>Hooks</code> interface (<code>packages/plugin/src/index.ts:223</code>, commit <code>519d3444</code>). The runtime (<code>packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:258-269</code>) sequentially calls <code>dispose</code> of all plugins when the instance scope ends through <code>Effect.addFinalizer</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:258-269
yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() =>
  Effect.forEach(
    hooks,
    (hook) =>
      Effect.tryPromise({
        try: () => Promise.resolve(hook.dispose?.()),
        catch: (error) => {
          log.error("plugin dispose hook failed", { error })
        },
      }).pipe(Effect.ignore),
    { discard: true },
  ),
)
</code></pre>
<p>In the previous document, the only resource release was <code>acquireRelease</code> of <code>Bus.subscribeAll</code>, but now the plugin's own cleanup (termination of WebSocket connection, deletion of temporary files, etc.) can be handled by <code>dispose</code>.</p>
<h3>2. New <code>provider</code> hook type</h3>
<p>The <code>provider?: ProviderHook</code> field was added to the <code>Hooks</code> interface (<code>packages/plugin/src/index.ts:230</code>). <code>ProviderHook</code> consists of <code>id</code> and <code>models()</code> callbacks and dynamically injects a list of models for each provider.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/plugin/src/index.ts:214-217
export type ProviderHook = {
  id: string
  models?: (provider: ProviderV2, ctx: ProviderHookContext) => Promise&#x3C;Record&#x3C;string, ModelV2>>
}
</code></pre>
<p>At runtime, it iterates over the <code>hook.provider</code> of all plugins in <code>packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts:1268-1293</code>, and overwrites the returned model map with the provider's <code>provider.models</code>. Unlike the <code>trigger()</code> pattern, it is not an output mutation but a return value replacement method, so it is processed as a separate path.</p>
<h3>3. Session Switcher plugin</h3>
<p>The TUI built-in feature-plugin <code>session/</code> was added with commit <code>8f8b161c</code> (4 files, 819 lines). Conditionally loaded under the <code>Flag.OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_SESSION_SWITCHER</code> flag in <code>internal.ts</code>.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>file</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>feature-plugins/session/index.tsx</code></td>
<td>Keymap registration: <code>session.list</code> command, slash <code>/sessions</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>feature-plugins/session/dialog.tsx</code></td>
<td>Session list dialog (line 335)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>feature-plugins/session/preview-pane.tsx</code></td>
<td>Preview messages from selected session (line 382)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>feature-plugins/session/util.tsx</code></td>
<td>Time Format, Status Icon Utility</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>It can be accessed from both the command palette and slash commands (<code>/sessions</code>, <code>/resume</code>, <code>/continue</code>) using <code>TuiPluginApi.keymap.registerLayer()</code>.</p>
<h3>4. Fix dynamic MCP server disconnection</h3>
<p>In commit <code>c0bc020a</code>, the <code>state.config</code> map was added to <code>packages/140_opencode/src/mcp/index.ts</code>. Fixed a bug where disconnection was missed during refresh because the server dynamically added with <code>MCP.add()</code> was not in <code>config</code>. Now the dynamic server is also tracked with <code>s.config[clientName]</code> and disconnected normally.</p>
<h3>5. Built-in plugin expansion (4 → 9)</h3>
<p>Cloudflare Workers, Cloudflare AI Gateway, Azure, DigitalOcean, and xAI were added to the existing 4 (Codex, Copilot, GitLab, Poe), making a total of 9 built-in authentication plugins (<code>packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:67-82</code>).</p>
<h3>6. SDK structure changes</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Item</th>

<th>Current</th>
</tr>
</thead>

</tr>

<h3>7. <code>experimental.compaction.autocontinue</code> hook</h3>
<p>The plugin can control whether to insert an automatic continue message after compaction is completed (<code>packages/plugin/src/index.ts:315-325</code>). If you set <code>output.enabled</code> to <code>false</code>, synthetic user turn will be omitted. The calling location is <code>packages/140_opencode/src/session/compaction.ts:509-510</code>.</p>
<h3>8. TUI plugin API maturity</h3>
<p>The <code>TuiPluginApi</code> type (<code>packages/plugin/src/tui.ts</code>) has been significantly expanded: keymap system (<code>api.keymap</code>), attention/notification system (<code>api.attention</code>), theme API (<code>api.theme</code>), KV storage (<code>api.kv</code>), slot system (<code>api.ui.Slot</code>), Lifecycle (<code>api.lifecycle.onDispose</code>), plugin manager (<code>api.plugins.activate/deactivate/install</code>). There are a total of 13 built-in TUI feature-plugins: home(2), sidebar(5), system(5), and session(1).</p>
<h3>Add fork perspective</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The <code>dispose</code> hook is required when a plugin holds external resources — the same pattern is adopted in our design as well.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The pattern of dynamically injecting a list of models with the <code>provider</code> hook is useful for supporting custom providers.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> TUI plug-in API expands to 61 types — Risk of breaking change before stabilization</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> The three-step analysis (plan → resolve → load) of <code>PluginLoader</code> is robust, but complexity increases.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>011_plugin-system/11_oc_plugin.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>OpenCode 플러그인 시스템 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — plugin system.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode의 플러그인은 <strong>Hook 기반 확장 모델</strong>이다. 플러그인은 <code>Hooks</code> 인터페이스를 구현한 순수 TypeScript 함수로, 초기화 시 <code>PluginInput</code>(SDK 클라이언트, 프로젝트 경로, Bun shell 등)을 받고 <code>Hooks</code> 객체를 반환한다. 이 Hook 객체가 채팅, 도구, 셸, 인증 등 런타임의 거의 모든 확장점에 끼어든다.</p>
<p>핵심은 <strong>trigger 패턴</strong>이다. <code>Plugin.trigger(hookName, input, output)</code> 호출 시 등록된 모든 플러그인의 해당 훅이 순차 실행되며, <code>output</code> 객체를 직접 변이(mutate)해서 결과를 조작한다. 이 패턴은 Effect-TS의 <code>Effect.fn</code> 래퍼로 감싸져 트레이싱과 의존성 주입이 자동으로 적용된다.</p>
<p>SDK 패키지(<code>@opencode-ai/plugin</code>, 1.3.2)는 세 파일로 구성된다: Hook 타입 정의(<code>index.ts</code>), 커스텀 도구 빌더(<code>tool.ts</code>), Bun 셸 타입(<code>shell.ts</code>). 런타임 코어(<code>packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts</code>)는 Effect-TS <code>ServiceMap</code> 패턴으로 <code>Plugin.Service</code>를 선언하고, <code>InstanceState</code>로 세션별 플러그인 상태를 관리한다. 내장 플러그인(CodexAuth, CopilotAuth, GitlabAuth, PoeAuth)은 직접 import하고, 외부 플러그인은 npm 설치 또는 <code>file://</code> 로컬 경로로 동적 로딩한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["opencode.json&#x3C;br/>plugin: [...]"] --> B["Config.loadPlugin()"]
    B --> C["Plugin.Service (Effect-TS)"]
    D["내장 플러그인&#x3C;br/>Codex·Copilot·GitLab·Poe"] --> C
    E[".opencode/plugins/*.ts&#x3C;br/>로컬 플러그인"] --> B
    F["npm 패키지&#x3C;br/>BunProc.install()"] --> C

    C --> G["InstanceState&#x26;lt;Hooks[]&#x26;gt;"]
    G --> H["Plugin.trigger()"]
    H --> I["chat.message"]
    H --> J["chat.params / chat.headers"]
    H --> K["tool.execute.before / after"]
    H --> L["shell.env"]
    H --> M["permission.ask"]
    H --> N["experimental.*"]

    G --> O["Bus.subscribeAll()"]
    O --> P["hook.event()"]

    G --> Q["ToolRegistry"]
    Q --> R["hook.tool → 커스텀 도구"]
</code></pre>
<hr>

<p>총 17개 훅 슬롯이며, <code>tool</code> 훅의 각 키가 독립 도구이므로 실질적 확장점은 이보다 많다.</p>
<h3>trigger 패턴의 동작 원리</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:165-180
const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* &#x3C;
  Name extends TriggerName,
  Input = Parameters&#x3C;Required&#x3C;Hooks>[Name]>[0],
  Output = Parameters&#x3C;Required&#x3C;Hooks>[Name]>[1],
>(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {
  if (!name) return output
  const state = yield* InstanceState.get(cache)
  yield* Effect.promise(async () => {
    for (const hook of state.hooks) {
      const fn = hook[name] as any
      if (!fn) continue
      await fn(input, output)  // output을 직접 변이
    }
  })
  return output  // 변이된 output 반환
})
</code></pre>
<p>핵심 설계 원칙:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Output 변이(Mutation) 패턴</strong>: 각 훅은 <code>output</code> 객체를 직접 수정한다. 새 객체를 반환하는 게 아니라 기존 객체의 프로퍼티를 덮어쓴다. 이로써 여러 플러그인이 같은 output을 순차적으로 가공할 수 있다.</li>
<li><strong>TriggerName 타입 필터</strong>: <code>(input, output) => Promise&#x3C;void></code> 시그니처를 가진 훅만 <code>trigger()</code>로 호출 가능하다. <code>event</code>, <code>config</code>, <code>tool</code>, <code>auth</code> 같은 비표준 시그니처 훅은 별도 경로로 호출된다.</li>
<li><strong>Effect-TS 래핑</strong>: <code>Effect.fn</code>으로 감싸 OpenTelemetry 트레이싱과 의존성 주입이 자동 적용된다.</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<h2>플러그인 라이프사이클</h2>
<h3>1단계: 설정 수집</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts:497-508
async function loadPlugin(dir: string) {
  const plugins: string[] = []
  for (const item of await Glob.scan("{plugin,plugins}/*.{ts,js}", {
    cwd: dir, absolute: true, dot: true, symlink: true,
  })) {
    plugins.push(pathToFileURL(item).href)
  }
  return plugins
}
</code></pre>
<p>플러그인 소스는 세 곳에서 수집된다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>소스</th>
<th>우선순위</th>
<th>형식</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>글로벌 <code>opencode.json</code></td>
<td>최저</td>
<td>npm 패키지명 또는 <code>file://</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>글로벌 <code>.opencode/plugins/</code></td>
<td>중간</td>
<td><code>*.ts</code>, <code>*.js</code> 파일</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>로컬 <code>opencode.json</code></td>
<td>높음</td>
<td>npm 패키지명 또는 <code>file://</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>로컬 <code>.opencode/plugins/</code></td>
<td>최고</td>
<td><code>*.ts</code>, <code>*.js</code> 파일</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>중복 제거(<code>deduplicatePlugins</code>)는 canonical 이름 기준으로, 높은 우선순위가 이긴다.</p>
<h3>2단계: 초기화</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:84-90
for (const plugin of INTERNAL_PLUGINS) {
  log.info("loading internal plugin", { name: plugin.name })
  const init = await plugin(input).catch((err) => {
    log.error("failed to load internal plugin", { name: plugin.name, error: err })
  })
  if (init) hooks.push(init)
}
</code></pre>
<ol>
<li><strong>내장 플러그인 4개</strong>(Codex, Copilot, GitLab, Poe) 직접 import 후 초기화</li>
<li><strong>외부 플러그인</strong>: npm 패키지는 <code>BunProc.install()</code>로 설치 후 동적 import, <code>file://</code>은 바로 import</li>
<li><strong>중복 방지</strong>: <code>default</code> export와 named export가 같은 함수를 가리킬 수 있으므로 <code>Set</code>으로 dedup</li>
<li><strong>config 통지</strong>: 모든 훅 로딩 완료 후 <code>hook.config?.(cfg)</code> 호출</li>
</ol>
<h3>3단계: 이벤트 구독</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:150-159
yield* Effect.acquireRelease(
  Effect.sync(() =>
    Bus.subscribeAll(async (input) => {
      for (const hook of hooks) {
        hook["event"]?.({ event: input })
      }
    }),
  ),
  (unsub) => Effect.sync(unsub),
)
</code></pre>
<p><code>Bus.subscribeAll</code>로 와일드카드 구독을 걸어 모든 Bus 이벤트를 플러그인의 <code>event</code> 훅으로 전달한다. Effect-TS의 <code>acquireRelease</code>로 scope 종료 시 자동 해제된다.</p>
<h3>4단계: 런타임 트리거</h3>
<p>호출자가 <code>Plugin.trigger("chat.params", input, output)</code>처럼 호출하면, 등록된 모든 훅이 순차 실행되어 output을 변이한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>커스텀 도구 시스템</h2>
<h3>SDK의 <code>tool()</code> 빌더</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/plugin/src/tool.ts
export function tool&#x3C;Args extends z.ZodRawShape>(input: {
  description: string
  args: Args
  execute(args: z.infer&#x3C;z.ZodObject&#x3C;Args>>, context: ToolContext): Promise&#x3C;string>
}) {
  return input
}
tool.schema = z  // Zod를 그대로 노출
</code></pre>
<p>Zod 스키마로 파라미터를 선언하고, <code>execute</code>에서 문자열을 반환하면 된다. <code>ToolContext</code>에는 <code>sessionID</code>, <code>messageID</code>, <code>agent</code>, <code>directory</code>, <code>worktree</code>, <code>abort</code> 시그널, <code>metadata()</code> 콜백, <code>ask()</code> 권한 요청이 포함된다.</p>
<h3>예제 플러그인</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/plugin/src/example.ts
import { Plugin } from "./index.js"
import { tool } from "./tool.js"

export const ExamplePlugin: Plugin = async (ctx) => {
  return {
    tool: {
      mytool: tool({
        description: "This is a custom tool",
        args: { foo: tool.schema.string().describe("foo") },
        async execute(args) {
          return `Hello ${args.foo}!`
        },
      }),
    },
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>런타임 등록 경로</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:61-83
function fromPlugin(id: string, def: ToolDefinition): Tool.Info {
  return {
    id,
    init: async (initCtx) => ({
      parameters: z.object(def.args),
      description: def.description,
      execute: async (args, toolCtx) => {
        const pluginCtx = {
          ...toolCtx,
          directory: ctx.directory,
          worktree: ctx.worktree,
        } as unknown as PluginToolContext
        const result = await def.execute(args as any, pluginCtx)
        const out = await Truncate.output(result, {}, initCtx?.agent)
        return {
          title: "",
          output: out.truncated ? out.content : result,
          metadata: { truncated: out.truncated },
        }
      },
    }),
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>ToolRegistry</code>는 두 경로로 커스텀 도구를 수집한다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>파일 기반</strong>: <code>.opencode/{tool,tools}/*.{js,ts}</code> 파일에서 export된 <code>ToolDefinition</code> 자동 발견</li>
<li><strong>플러그인 기반</strong>: <code>Hooks.tool</code> 딕셔너리에서 등록된 도구</li>
</ol>
<p>모든 커스텀 도구는 <code>Truncate.output()</code>을 거쳐 출력 길이가 제한된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>인증 플러그인 아키텍처</h2>
<p><code>AuthHook</code>은 플러그인 시스템에서 가장 복잡한 훅이다. 두 가지 인증 방식을 지원한다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>방식</th>
<th>설명</th>
<th>예시</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>oauth</code></td>
<td>Device flow 또는 PKCE OAuth</td>
<td>Codex(OpenAI), Copilot(GitHub)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>api</code></td>
<td>API 키 직접 입력</td>
<td>일반 프로바이더</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>loader</code>는 인증 정보를 기반으로 커스텀 <code>fetch</code> 함수와 <code>baseURL</code>을 반환한다. Copilot 플러그인(<code>copilot.ts</code>)은 <code>x-initiator</code> 헤더로 사용자/에이전트 요청을 구분하고, <code>Copilot-Vision-Request</code> 헤더로 비전 요청을 표시한다. Codex 플러그인(<code>codex.ts</code>)은 OpenAI PKCE OAuth + 로컬 HTTP 서버(포트 1455)로 토큰을 획득한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant U as 사용자
    participant P as Plugin.Service
    participant A as AuthHook
    participant O as OAuth Provider

    U->>P: 인증 요청
    P->>A: auth.methods[0].authorize()
    A->>O: Device Code 요청
    O-->>A: verification_uri + user_code
    A-->>U: URL + 코드 표시
    U->>O: 브라우저에서 코드 입력
    loop 폴링
        A->>O: access_token 요청
        O-->>A: authorization_pending / success
    end
    A-->>P: {refresh, access, expires}
    P->>A: auth.loader(getAuth, provider)
    A-->>P: {baseURL, apiKey, fetch}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>기술 참조</h2>
<h3>모듈 구조</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>파일</th>
<th>크기</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>packages/plugin/src/index.ts</code></td>
<td>6.7KB</td>
<td>SDK: <code>Plugin</code>, <code>Hooks</code>, <code>AuthHook</code>, <code>PluginInput</code> 타입 정의</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>packages/plugin/src/tool.ts</code></td>
<td>1KB</td>
<td>SDK: <code>tool()</code> 빌더 + <code>ToolContext</code> + Zod 노출</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>packages/plugin/src/shell.ts</code></td>

<h3>Effect-TS 통합 패턴</h3>
<p>OpenCode 플러그인은 Effect-TS의 다음 패턴을 활용한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>ServiceMap.Service</code></strong>: <code>Plugin.Service</code>를 Effect 서비스로 선언해 의존성 주입 가능</li>
<li><strong><code>Layer.effect</code></strong>: 서비스 구현을 Layer로 래핑해 테스트 시 mock 교체 가능</li>
<li><strong><code>InstanceState</code></strong>: 세션(인스턴스)별 격리된 플러그인 상태 관리</li>
<li><strong><code>Effect.acquireRelease</code></strong>: Bus 구독의 자동 정리(cleanup) 보장</li>
<li><strong><code>Effect.fn</code></strong>: trigger 함수에 자동 트레이싱 적용</li>
</ul>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: 역공학 심화 보강 — <code>reverse-engineering</code> 태그 추가, 문서 전단 훅 시스템 분류 태그 확장. 기존 분석은 이미 소스코드 기반이므로 구조 유지.</li>
<li>2025-07-15: OpenCode 플러그인 시스템을 SDK + 런타임 + Hook + 커스텀 도구 + 인증 구조로 분석했다.</li>
</ul>
<h2>최신 갱신 (2026-05-30)</h2>
<p>직전 1522 커밋 기준으로 플러그인 시스템에 다음 변경이 확인되었다. SDK 버전은 <code>1.15.12</code>.</p>
<h3>1. <code>dispose</code> 훅 추가 — 플러그인 정리 라이프사이클</h3>
<p><code>Hooks</code> 인터페이스에 <code>dispose?: () => Promise&#x3C;void></code> 훅이 신설되었다 (<code>packages/plugin/src/index.ts:223</code>, 커밋 <code>519d3444</code>). 런타임(<code>packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:258-269</code>)은 <code>Effect.addFinalizer</code>를 통해 인스턴스 scope 종료 시 모든 플러그인의 <code>dispose</code>를 순차 호출한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:258-269
yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() =>
  Effect.forEach(
    hooks,
    (hook) =>
      Effect.tryPromise({
        try: () => Promise.resolve(hook.dispose?.()),
        catch: (error) => {
          log.error("plugin dispose hook failed", { error })
        },
      }).pipe(Effect.ignore),
    { discard: true },
  ),
)
</code></pre>
<p>이전 문서에서 리소스 해제는 <code>Bus.subscribeAll</code>의 <code>acquireRelease</code>뿐이었으나, 이제 플러그인 자체 정리(WebSocket 연결 종료, 임시 파일 삭제 등)를 <code>dispose</code>에서 처리할 수 있다.</p>
<h3>2. <code>provider</code> 훅 타입 신설</h3>
<p><code>Hooks</code> 인터페이스에 <code>provider?: ProviderHook</code> 필드가 추가되었다 (<code>packages/plugin/src/index.ts:230</code>). <code>ProviderHook</code>은 <code>id</code>와 <code>models()</code> 콜백으로 구성되며, 프로바이더별 모델 목록을 동적으로 주입한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// packages/plugin/src/index.ts:214-217
export type ProviderHook = {
  id: string
  models?: (provider: ProviderV2, ctx: ProviderHookContext) => Promise&#x3C;Record&#x3C;string, ModelV2>>
}
</code></pre>
<p>런타임에서는 <code>packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts:1268-1293</code>에서 모든 플러그인의 <code>hook.provider</code>를 순회하며, 반환된 모델 맵을 해당 프로바이더의 <code>provider.models</code>에 덮어쓴다. <code>trigger()</code> 패턴과 달리 output 변이가 아니라 반환값 교체 방식이므로 별도 경로로 처리된다.</p>
<h3>3. 세션 전환기 플러그인 (Session Switcher)</h3>
<p>커밋 <code>8f8b161c</code>로 TUI 내장 feature-plugin <code>session/</code>이 추가되었다 (4개 파일, 819줄). <code>internal.ts</code>에서 <code>Flag.OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_SESSION_SWITCHER</code> 플래그 하에 조건부 로딩된다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>파일</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>feature-plugins/session/index.tsx</code></td>
<td>keymap 등록: <code>session.list</code> 커맨드, slash <code>/sessions</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>feature-plugins/session/dialog.tsx</code></td>

<p><code>TuiPluginApi.keymap.registerLayer()</code>를 사용해 커맨드 팔레트와 slash 커맨드(<code>/sessions</code>, <code>/resume</code>, <code>/continue</code>) 양쪽에서 접근 가능하다.</p>
<h3>4. 동적 MCP 서버 연결 해제 수정</h3>
<p>커밋 <code>c0bc020a</code>에서 <code>packages/140_opencode/src/mcp/index.ts</code>에 <code>state.config</code> 맵이 추가되었다. <code>MCP.add()</code>로 동적 추가된 서버가 <code>config</code>에는 없어 리프레시 시 연결 해제가 누락되던 버그를 수정했다. 이제 동적 서버도 <code>s.config[clientName]</code>으로 추적되어 정상 disconnect된다.</p>
<h3>5. 내장 플러그인 확장 (4개 → 9개)</h3>
<p>기존 4개(Codex, Copilot, GitLab, Poe)에서 Cloudflare Workers, Cloudflare AI Gateway, Azure, DigitalOcean, xAI가 추가되어 총 9개 내장 인증 플러그인이 되었다 (<code>packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:67-82</code>).</p>

<h3>7. <code>experimental.compaction.autocontinue</code> 훅</h3>
<p>컴팩션 완료 후 자동 continue 메시지 삽입 여부를 플러그인이 제어할 수 있다 (<code>packages/plugin/src/index.ts:315-325</code>). <code>output.enabled</code>를 <code>false</code>로 설정하면 synthetic user turn이 생략된다. 호출 위치는 <code>packages/140_opencode/src/session/compaction.ts:509-510</code>.</p>
<h3>8. TUI 플러그인 API 성숙</h3>
<p><code>TuiPluginApi</code> 타입(<code>packages/plugin/src/tui.ts</code>)이 대폭 확장되었다: keymap 시스템(<code>api.keymap</code>), attention/notification 시스템(<code>api.attention</code>), 테마 API(<code>api.theme</code>), KV 스토리지(<code>api.kv</code>), 슬롯 시스템(<code>api.ui.Slot</code>), 라이프사이클(<code>api.lifecycle.onDispose</code>), 플러그인 매니저(<code>api.plugins.activate/deactivate/install</code>). 내장 TUI feature-plugin은 home(2), sidebar(5), system(5), session(1) 총 13개다.</p>
<h3>포크 관점 추가</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>dispose</code> 훅은 플러그인이 외부 리소스를 보유할 때 필수 — 우리 설계에도 동일 패턴 채택</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>provider</code> 훅으로 모델 목록을 동적 주입하는 패턴은 커스텀 프로바이더 지원에 유용</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> TUI 플러그인 API가 61개 타입으로 팽창 — 안정화 전 breaking change 위험</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>PluginLoader</code>의 3단계 해석(plan → resolve → load)은 견고하나 복잡도 상승</li>
</ul>
27:["$","$L2f","20-axis-11-plugin",{"id":"20-axis-11-plugin","order":35,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 11: Plugin system","description":"011_plugin-system/11_oc_plugin.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$52"}}]}]
53:Tb519,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 12: Guardian &#x26; approval</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — guardian and approval.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OpenCode의 permission 시스템은 Codex의 guardian과 완전히 다른 설계 철학을 갖는다. Codex가 별도 LLM 세션(gpt-5.4)으로 위험도를 자동 평가하는 반면, OpenCode는 <strong>규칙 기반 평가 엔진</strong>으로 동작한다. LLM 호출 없이 wildcard 패턴 매칭과 ruleset 우선순위만으로 allow/deny/ask를 결정하고, ask일 때 Effect.ts의 <code>Deferred</code>로 사용자 응</li>
<li>
<ol>
<li><strong>규칙 평가</strong>: tool call 발생 시 permission + pattern을 config/session/agent ruleset에 대해 <code>findLast</code> 매칭</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="2">
<li><strong>Deferred 대기</strong>: <code>ask</code> 결정이면 <code>Deferred</code>를 생성하고 Bus 이벤트로 TUI에 통지, 사용자 응답까지 블로킹</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="3">
<li><strong>일괄 해소</strong>: <code>always</code> 승인 시 동일 세션의 대기 중인 다른 요청도 자동 재평가해서 일괄 승인</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["tool call 발생"] --> B["evaluate(permission, pattern, rulesets)"]</li>
<li>B -->|findLast matching| C{action?}</li>
<li>C -->|allow| D["즉시 실행"]</li>
<li>C -->|deny| E["DeniedError"]</li>
<li>C -->|ask| F["Deferred 생성 + Bus.publish"]</li>
<li>F --> G["TUI에 승인 요청 표시"]</li>
</ul>
<h2>Topics covered</h2>
<ul>
<li>핵심 모듈 구조</li>
<li>규칙 스키마</li>
<li>Config.Permission — Configuration 레벨</li>
<li>Permission.Rule — Runtime 레벨</li>
<li>평가 엔진</li>
<li>evaluate() — 15줄의 핵심</li>
<li>Wildcard 매칭</li>
<li>BashArity — 명령어 정규화</li>
<li>Deferred Approval 흐름</li>
<li>ask() — 대기 생성</li>
<li>reply() — Approval 처리</li>
<li>일괄 Approval (batch-approve)</li>
<li>일괄 거부 (batch-reject)</li>
<li>에러 체계</li>
</ul>
<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["tool call 발생"] --> B["evaluate(permission, pattern, rulesets)"]
    B -->|findLast matching| C{action?}
    C -->|allow| D["즉시 실행"]
    C -->|deny| E["DeniedError"]
    C -->|ask| F["Deferred 생성 + Bus.publish"]
    F --> G["TUI에 승인 요청 표시"]
    G -->|once| H["Deferred.succeed → 실행"]
    G -->|always| I["ruleset에 추가 + 대기 중 요청 일괄 재평가"]
    G -->|reject| J["Deferred.fail → RejectedError"]
    J --> K["같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject"]
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// config/config.ts — Config.Permission 스키마
export const Permission = z.preprocess(
  permissionPreprocess,
  z.object({
    read: PermissionRule.optional(),    // "allow" | { "src/*": "allow", "secret/*": "deny" }
    edit: PermissionRule.optional(),
    bash: PermissionRule.optional(),
    task: PermissionRule.optional(),
    external_directory: PermissionRule.optional(),
    doom_loop: PermissionAction.optional(),
    // ... 16개 도구 카테고리
  })
  .catchall(PermissionRule)
  .or(PermissionAction),  // 단축: "allow" 하나로 전체 적용
)
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts
export const Rule = z.object({
  permission: z.string(),  // "bash", "edit", "read", "external_directory" 등
  pattern: z.string(),     // wildcard 패턴: "npm *", "src/**", "*"
  action: z.enum(["allow", "deny", "ask"]),
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
              &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// util/wildcard.ts
export function match(str: string, pattern: string) {
  let escaped = pattern
    .replace(/[.+^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&#x26;")
    .replace(/\*/g, ".*")
    .replace(/\?/g, ".")
  // "ls *" → "ls" 와 "ls -la" 모두 매칭
  if (escaped.endsWith(" .*")) {
    escaped = escaped.slice(0, -3) + "( .*)?"
  }
  return new RegExp("^" + escaped + "$", flags).test(str)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/arity.ts
export namespace BashArity {
  export function prefix(tokens: string[]) {
    for (let len = tokens.length; len > 0; len--) {
      const prefix = tokens.slice(0, len).join(" ")
      const arity = ARITY[prefix]
      if (arity !== undefined) return tokens.slice(0, arity)
    }
    if (tokens.length === 0) return []
    return tokens.slice(0, 1)
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts — ask 함수 (핵심 로직)
const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input) {
  const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)
  let needsAsk = false

  for (const pattern of request.patterns) {
    const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)
    if (rule.action === "deny") return yield* new DeniedError({ ruleset: ... })
    if (rule.action === "allow") continue
    needsAsk = true
  }

  if (!needsAsk) return

  const deferred = yield* Deferred.make&#x3C;void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()
  pending.set(id, { info, deferred })
  void Bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)
  return yield* Deferred.await(deferred)  // 사용자 응답까지 블로킹
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Tool as Tool (bash/edit/read)
    participant Perm as Permission.Service
    participant Bus as Bus (EventEmitter)
    participant TUI as TUI (Ink)

    Tool->>Perm: ctx.ask({ permission: "bash", patterns: ["npm run dev"] })
    Perm->>Perm: evaluate → action: "ask"
    Perm->>Perm: Deferred.make() + pending.set()
    Perm->>Bus: Bus.publish(Event.Asked, request)
    Bus->>TUI: permission.asked 이벤트
    TUI->>TUI: 승인 UI 표시

    alt once
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "once" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.succeed()
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else always
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "always" })
        Perm->>Perm: approved.push(rule)
        Perm->>Perm: 다른 pending 재평가 → 일괄 승인
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else reject
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "reject" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.fail(RejectedError)
        Perm->>Perm: 같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject
        Perm->>Tool: throw RejectedError
    end
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts — reply "always" 경로
for (const pattern of existing.info.always) {
  approved.push({
    permission: existing.info.permission,
    pattern,
    action: "allow",
  })
}

// 같은 세션의 다른 pending 요청을 재평가
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  const ok = item.info.patterns.every(
    (pattern) => evaluate(item.info.permission, pattern, approved).action === "allow",
  )
  if (!ok) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.succeed(item.deferred, undefined)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// reject 시 같은 세션의 모든 pending 일괄 거부
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.fail(item.deferred, new RejectedError())
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/bash.ts — bash 도구의 permission 요청
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "bash",
  patterns: Array.from(patterns),    // BashArity로 정규화된 명령어
  always: Array.from(always),        // "always" 승인 시 저장할 패턴
  metadata: {},
})

// tool/edit.ts — 편집 도구
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "edit",
  patterns: [relativePath],          // 파일 경로
  always: [relativeGlob],           // glob 패턴으로 확장
  metadata: {},
})
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts
export function disabled(tools: string[], ruleset: Ruleset): Set&#x3C;string> {
  const result = new Set&#x3C;string>()
  for (const tool of tools) {
    const permission = EDIT_TOOLS.includes(tool) ? "edit" : tool
    const rule = ruleset.findLast((rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission))
    if (!rule) continue
    if (rule.pattern === "*" &#x26;&#x26; rule.action === "deny") result.add(tool)
  }
  return result
}
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>OpenCode permission/approval system analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — guardian and approval.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode's permission system has a completely different design philosophy than Codex's guardian. While Codex automatically evaluates risk in a separate LLM session (gpt-5.4), OpenCode operates as a <strong>rule-based assessment engine</strong>. Allow/deny/ask is determined only by wildcard pattern matching and ruleset priority without calling LLM, and when asking, asynchronously waits for user response with <code>Deferred</code> in Effect.ts.</p>
<p>The structure has three steps:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Rule evaluation</strong>: When a tool call occurs, match permission + pattern to config/session/agent ruleset with <code>findLast</code></li>
<li><strong>Wait for Deferred</strong>: If <code>ask</code> is decided, <code>Deferred</code> is created and notified to TUI through Bus event, blocking until user response.</li>
<li><strong>Batch resolution</strong>: When <code>always</code> approved, other pending requests in the same session are automatically re-evaluated and approved in batches.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["tool call 발생"] --> B["evaluate(permission, pattern, rulesets)"]
    B -->|findLast matching| C{action?}
    C -->|allow| D["즉시 실행"]
    C -->|deny| E["DeniedError"]
    C -->|ask| F["Deferred 생성 + Bus.publish"]
    F --> G["TUI에 승인 요청 표시"]
    G -->|once| H["Deferred.succeed → 실행"]
    G -->|always| I["ruleset에 추가 + 대기 중 요청 일괄 재평가"]
    G -->|reject| J["Deferred.fail → RejectedError"]
    J --> K["같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Core module structure</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>file</th>
<th>size</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>schema.ts</code></td>
<td>Line 17</td>
<td><code>PermissionID</code> branded type (Effect.ts <code>Newtype</code> + <code>Identifier</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>evaluate.ts</code></td>
<td>Line 15</td>
<td>Pure function: matches ruleset array with <code>findLast</code>, default <code>ask</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>arity.ts</code></td>
<td>Line 163</td>
<td>Dictionary of "human-understandable units" of token counts for bash commands</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>index.ts</code></td>
<td>line 322</td>
<td><code>Permission</code> namespace: Service layer, Deferred management, Bus events, config transformation</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>Rule schema</h2>
<h3>Config.Permission — Configuration level</h3>
<p>In the configuration file, permissions are set to <code>allow | deny | Ask</code> or receive detailed objects for each pattern.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// config/config.ts — Config.Permission 스키마
export const Permission = z.preprocess(
  permissionPreprocess,
  z.object({
    read: PermissionRule.optional(),    // "allow" | { "src/*": "allow", "secret/*": "deny" }
    edit: PermissionRule.optional(),
    bash: PermissionRule.optional(),
    task: PermissionRule.optional(),
    external_directory: PermissionRule.optional(),
    doom_loop: PermissionAction.optional(),
    // ... 16개 도구 카테고리
  })
  .catchall(PermissionRule)
  .or(PermissionAction),  // 단축: "allow" 하나로 전체 적용
)
</code></pre>
<p>The shorthand notation <code>"allow"</code> is normalized to <code>{ "*": "allow" }</code> in <code>permissionTransform</code>. To preserve the original key order, we use the <code>__originalKeys</code> preprocess trick.</p>
<h3>Permission.Rule — Runtime level</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts
export const Rule = z.object({
  permission: z.string(),  // "bash", "edit", "read", "external_directory" 등
  pattern: z.string(),     // wildcard 패턴: "npm *", "src/**", "*"
  action: z.enum(["allow", "deny", "ask"]),
})
</code></pre>
<p><code>Config.Permission</code> → <code>Permission.Ruleset</code>(Rule[]) conversion is handled by <code>Permission.fromConfig()</code>. The <code>~/</code> path expands to <code>os.homedir()</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Evaluation Engine</h2>
<h3>evaluate() — the gist of line 15</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
              &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Design features:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>findLast</code> priority</strong>: Rules at the back of the array override the ones at the front. If you stack in the order config → agent → session, session has the highest priority.</li>
<li><strong>Double matching</strong>: Matches both permission name and pattern with wildcard. <code>Wildcard.match</code> tests regular expressions after converting <code>*</code>→<code>.*</code>, <code>?</code>→<code>.</code></li>
<li><strong>Default <code>ask</code></strong>: Ask user if no rule matches (fail-to-ask, not fail-open)</li>
<li><strong>ruleset merge</strong>: Merge agent and session rulesets with <code>Permission.merge(agent.permission, session.permission ?? [])</code> and then evaluate</li>
</ul>
<h3>Wildcard matching</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// util/wildcard.ts
export function match(str: string, pattern: string) {
  let escaped = pattern
    .replace(/[.+^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&#x26;")
    .replace(/\*/g, ".*")
    .replace(/\?/g, ".")
  // "ls *" → "ls" 와 "ls -la" 모두 매칭
  if (escaped.endsWith(" .*")) {
    escaped = escaped.slice(0, -3) + "( .*)?"
  }
  return new RegExp("^" + escaped + "$", flags).test(str)
}
</code></pre>
<p>The <code>"npm *"</code> pattern matches both <code>"npm"</code> alone and <code>"npm install react"</code>. Optional handling of trailing wildcards is key.</p>
<hr>
<h2>BashArity — Command normalization</h2>
<p>When the bash tool requests permission, it abbreviates it to “human-understandable units” instead of the full command.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/arity.ts
export namespace BashArity {
  export function prefix(tokens: string[]) {
    for (let len = tokens.length; len > 0; len--) {
      const prefix = tokens.slice(0, len).join(" ")
      const arity = ARITY[prefix]
      if (arity !== undefined) return tokens.slice(0, arity)
    }
    if (tokens.length === 0) return []
    return tokens.slice(0, 1)
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Action example:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>npm run dev</code> → arity dictionary <code>"npm run": 3</code> → <code>["npm", "run", "dev"]</code> (3 tokens)</li>
<li><code>git checkout main</code> → <code>"git": 2</code> → <code>["git", "checkout"]</code> (2 tokens)</li>
<li><code>docker compose up -d</code> → <code>"docker compose": 3</code> → <code>["docker", "compose", "up"]</code></li>
</ul>
<p>This normalized prefix is used for permission pattern matching. If you allow <code>"npm run *"</code>, both <code>npm run dev</code> and <code>npm run build</code> are allowed.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Deferred approval flow</h2>
<h3>ask() — create wait</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts — ask 함수 (핵심 로직)
const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input) {
  const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)
  let needsAsk = false

  for (const pattern of request.patterns) {
    const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)
    if (rule.action === "deny") return yield* new DeniedError({ ruleset: ... })
    if (rule.action === "allow") continue
    needsAsk = true
  }

  if (!needsAsk) return

  const deferred = yield* Deferred.make&#x3C;void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()
  pending.set(id, { info, deferred })
  void Bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)
  return yield* Deferred.await(deferred)  // 사용자 응답까지 블로킹
})
</code></pre>
<p><code>Deferred</code> is a one-time asynchronous value in Effect.ts. It is waiting with <code>await</code> and is immediately resolved when <code>succeed</code> or <code>fail</code> is called. When the session ends, the finalizer fails all pending Deferred with <code>RejectedError</code>.</p>
<h3>reply() — Approval processing</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Tool as Tool (bash/edit/read)
    participant Perm as Permission.Service
    participant Bus as Bus (EventEmitter)
    participant TUI as TUI (Ink)

    Tool->>Perm: ctx.ask({ permission: "bash", patterns: ["npm run dev"] })
    Perm->>Perm: evaluate → action: "ask"
    Perm->>Perm: Deferred.make() + pending.set()
    Perm->>Bus: Bus.publish(Event.Asked, request)
    Bus->>TUI: permission.asked 이벤트
    TUI->>TUI: 승인 UI 표시

    alt once
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "once" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.succeed()
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else always
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "always" })
        Perm->>Perm: approved.push(rule)
        Perm->>Perm: 다른 pending 재평가 → 일괄 승인
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else reject
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "reject" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.fail(RejectedError)
        Perm->>Perm: 같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject
        Perm->>Tool: throw RejectedError
    end
</code></pre>
<h3>batch-approve</h3>
<p>The most interesting behavior occurs in the <code>always</code> response:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts — reply "always" 경로
for (const pattern of existing.info.always) {
  approved.push({
    permission: existing.info.permission,
    pattern,
    action: "allow",
  })
}

// 같은 세션의 다른 pending 요청을 재평가
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  const ok = item.info.patterns.every(
    (pattern) => evaluate(item.info.permission, pattern, approved).action === "allow",
  )
  if (!ok) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.succeed(item.deferred, undefined)
}
</code></pre>
<p>With one <code>always</code> approval:</p>
<ol>
<li>Add new rule to <code>approved</code> array</li>
<li>Re-evaluate all pending requests in the same session</li>
<li>Automatically resolve requests allowed with new rules</li>
</ol>
<p>Example: <code>bash</code> + <code>"npm *"</code> always approved → All waiting <code>npm install</code> and <code>npm test</code> automatically pass.</p>
<h3>batch-reject</h3>
<p>There is a similar batch for reject:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// reject 시 같은 세션의 모든 pending 일괄 거부
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.fail(item.deferred, new RejectedError())
}
</code></pre>
<p>reject collectively rejects <strong>all</strong> pending requests for the session. If the user rejects one, everything waiting in the same session is rejected.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Error system</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>error class</th>
<th>trigger</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>DeniedError</code></td>
<td><code>evaluate → deny</code></td>
<td>Explicitly blocked by rule. contains ruleset information</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>RejectedError</code></td>
<td>user reject / end session</td>
<td>User declines or session ends</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>CorrectedError</code></td>
<td>reject + message</td>
<td>Provide feedback message when user rejects</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>All are defined as Effect.ts <code>TaggedErrorClass</code>, so branch processing is possible with <code>Effect.catchTag</code>. The feedback of <code>CorrectedError</code> is used to convey the instruction to the LLM, “Do this, not this.”</p>
<hr>
<h2>Tool integration</h2>
<p>Each tool accesses the permission system through <code>ctx.ask()</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/bash.ts — bash 도구의 permission 요청
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "bash",
  patterns: Array.from(patterns),    // BashArity로 정규화된 명령어
  always: Array.from(always),        // "always" 승인 시 저장할 패턴
  metadata: {},
})

// tool/edit.ts — 편집 도구
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "edit",
  patterns: [relativePath],          // 파일 경로
  always: [relativeGlob],           // glob 패턴으로 확장
  metadata: {},
})
</code></pre>
<p>The separation of <code>patterns</code> and <code>always</code> is important. <code>patterns</code> is a matching target for the current request, and <code>always</code> is a pattern that will be permanently added to the ruleset when "always" is approved. In the case of <code>edit</code>, <code>patterns</code> is the exact file name and <code>always</code> is a glob pattern, so "approve this file" expands to "approve this entire directory".</p>
<h3>disabled() — Disable tool</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts
export function disabled(tools: string[], ruleset: Ruleset): Set&#x3C;string> {
  const result = new Set&#x3C;string>()
  for (const tool of tools) {
    const permission = EDIT_TOOLS.includes(tool) ? "edit" : tool
    const rule = ruleset.findLast((rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission))
    if (!rule) continue
    if (rule.pattern === "*" &#x26;&#x26; rule.action === "deny") result.add(tool)
  }
  return result
}
</code></pre>
<p>Editing tools such as <code>write</code>, <code>apply_patch</code>, and <code>multiedit</code> are all integrated into the <code>"edit"</code> permission. <code>edit: "deny"</code> disables all editing tools.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Permanence</h2>
<p>Permission state is stored in two places:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>SessionTable.permission</strong>: Ruleset for each session, JSON column (<code>Permission.Ruleset</code> type)</li>
<li><strong>PermissionTable</strong>: Permanent permission per project, <code>project_id</code> PK + <code>data</code> JSON column</li>
</ol>
<p><code>always</code> permissions are only added to the <code>approved</code> array at runtime, and are persisted in the PermissionTable when the session ends. In the next session, initial approval is restored in PermissionTable.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Comparison with Codex guardian</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Item</th>
<th>Codex (guardian)</th>
<th>OpenCode (permission)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Judgment subject</td>
<td>LLM (gpt-5.4)</td>
<td>Rules engine (wildcard matching)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Judgment criteria</td>
<td>risk_score (0-100)</td>
<td>ruleset findLast</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Default policy</td>
<td>fail-closed (passed to user)</td>
<td>fail-to-ask (ask user)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Automatic approval conditions</td>
<td>risk_score &#x3C; 80</td>
<td>rule.action === "allow"</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>cost</td>
<td>LLM call (token consumption)</td>
<td>zero (local rule evaluation)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Context</td>
<td>transcript restoration required</td>
<td>Not necessary</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>batch processing</td>
<td>None (judgment per request)</td>
<td>always resolved in bulk upon approval</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Feedback</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Passing Feedback to LLM with CorrectedError</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>runtime</td>
<td>Rust (Codex-RS)</td>
<td>TypeScript + Effect.ts</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>Fork Perspective</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Rule-based + LLM call-free is cost-effective and predictable</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The <code>findLast</code> priority model naturally expresses the config → agent → session hierarchy.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Deferred-based asynchronous approval is a good use case for the Effect.ts ecosystem</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>always</code> batch approval and reject batch rejection are effective in improving UX</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> BashArity normalization allows "npm run dev" and "npm run build" to be treated as a single pattern.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>approved</code> array can grow infinitely — no pruning strategy</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> wildcard pattern supports only <code>*</code> and no negation(<code>!</code>)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> evaluate is an O(n) linear scan, so performance may deteriorate if the ruleset becomes large (not a realistic problem)</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2025-07-24: The OpenCode permission system was organized into a rule-based evaluation + Deferred asynchronous approval + batch processing structure.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>012_guardian-approval/12_oc_guardian.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>OpenCode 권한/승인 시스템 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>141_opencode-current/</code> — guardian and approval.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OpenCode의 permission 시스템은 Codex의 guardian과 완전히 다른 설계 철학을 갖는다. Codex가 별도 LLM 세션(gpt-5.4)으로 위험도를 자동 평가하는 반면, OpenCode는 <strong>규칙 기반 평가 엔진</strong>으로 동작한다. LLM 호출 없이 wildcard 패턴 매칭과 ruleset 우선순위만으로 allow/deny/ask를 결정하고, ask일 때 Effect.ts의 <code>Deferred</code>로 사용자 응답을 비동기 대기한다.</p>
<p>구조는 3단계다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>규칙 평가</strong>: tool call 발생 시 permission + pattern을 config/session/agent ruleset에 대해 <code>findLast</code> 매칭</li>
<li><strong>Deferred 대기</strong>: <code>ask</code> 결정이면 <code>Deferred</code>를 생성하고 Bus 이벤트로 TUI에 통지, 사용자 응답까지 블로킹</li>
<li><strong>일괄 해소</strong>: <code>always</code> 승인 시 동일 세션의 대기 중인 다른 요청도 자동 재평가해서 일괄 승인</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["tool call 발생"] --> B["evaluate(permission, pattern, rulesets)"]
    B -->|findLast matching| C{action?}
    C -->|allow| D["즉시 실행"]
    C -->|deny| E["DeniedError"]
    C -->|ask| F["Deferred 생성 + Bus.publish"]
    F --> G["TUI에 승인 요청 표시"]
    G -->|once| H["Deferred.succeed → 실행"]
    G -->|always| I["ruleset에 추가 + 대기 중 요청 일괄 재평가"]
    G -->|reject| J["Deferred.fail → RejectedError"]
    J --> K["같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>핵심 모듈 구조</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>파일</th>
<th>크기</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>

</tr>

</tr>

<td>163줄</td>

<hr>
<h2>규칙 스키마</h2>
<h3>Config.Permission — 설정 레벨</h3>
<p>설정 파일에서 permission은 도구별로 <code>allow | deny | ask</code> 또는 패턴별 상세 객체를 받는다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// config/config.ts — Config.Permission 스키마
export const Permission = z.preprocess(
  permissionPreprocess,
  z.object({
    read: PermissionRule.optional(),    // "allow" | { "src/*": "allow", "secret/*": "deny" }
    edit: PermissionRule.optional(),
    bash: PermissionRule.optional(),
    task: PermissionRule.optional(),
    external_directory: PermissionRule.optional(),
    doom_loop: PermissionAction.optional(),
    // ... 16개 도구 카테고리
  })
  .catchall(PermissionRule)
  .or(PermissionAction),  // 단축: "allow" 하나로 전체 적용
)
</code></pre>
<p>단축 표기 <code>"allow"</code>는 <code>permissionTransform</code>에서 <code>{ "*": "allow" }</code>로 정규화된다. 원래 키 순서를 보존하기 위해 <code>__originalKeys</code> preprocess 트릭을 쓴다.</p>
<h3>Permission.Rule — 런타임 레벨</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts
export const Rule = z.object({
  permission: z.string(),  // "bash", "edit", "read", "external_directory" 등
  pattern: z.string(),     // wildcard 패턴: "npm *", "src/**", "*"
  action: z.enum(["allow", "deny", "ask"]),
})
</code></pre>
<p><code>Config.Permission</code> → <code>Permission.Ruleset</code>(Rule[]) 변환은 <code>Permission.fromConfig()</code>가 담당한다. <code>~/</code> 경로는 <code>os.homedir()</code>으로 확장된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>평가 엔진</h2>
<h3>evaluate() — 15줄의 핵심</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
              &#x26;&#x26; Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}
</code></pre>
<p>설계 특징:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>findLast</code> 우선순위</strong>: 배열 뒤쪽 규칙이 앞쪽을 override한다. config → agent → session 순서로 쌓으면 session이 최우선</li>
<li><strong>이중 매칭</strong>: permission 이름과 pattern 모두 wildcard로 매칭. <code>Wildcard.match</code>는 <code>*</code>→<code>.*</code>, <code>?</code>→<code>.</code> 변환 후 정규식 테스트</li>
<li><strong>기본값 <code>ask</code></strong>: 일치하는 규칙이 없으면 사용자에게 묻는다 (fail-open이 아닌 fail-to-ask)</li>
<li><strong>ruleset 병합</strong>: <code>Permission.merge(agent.permission, session.permission ?? [])</code>로 agent와 session 룰셋을 합친 뒤 evaluate</li>
</ul>
<h3>Wildcard 매칭</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// util/wildcard.ts
export function match(str: string, pattern: string) {
  let escaped = pattern
    .replace(/[.+^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&#x26;")
    .replace(/\*/g, ".*")
    .replace(/\?/g, ".")
  // "ls *" → "ls" 와 "ls -la" 모두 매칭
  if (escaped.endsWith(" .*")) {
    escaped = escaped.slice(0, -3) + "( .*)?"
  }
  return new RegExp("^" + escaped + "$", flags).test(str)
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>"npm *"</code> 패턴은 <code>"npm"</code> 단독과 <code>"npm install react"</code> 모두에 매칭된다. trailing wildcard의 optional 처리가 핵심이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>BashArity — 명령어 정규화</h2>
<p>bash 도구가 permission을 요청할 때, 전체 명령어 대신 "사람이 이해할 수 있는 단위"로 축약한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/arity.ts
export namespace BashArity {
  export function prefix(tokens: string[]) {
    for (let len = tokens.length; len > 0; len--) {
      const prefix = tokens.slice(0, len).join(" ")
      const arity = ARITY[prefix]
      if (arity !== undefined) return tokens.slice(0, arity)
    }
    if (tokens.length === 0) return []
    return tokens.slice(0, 1)
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>동작 예시:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>npm run dev</code> → arity 사전에 <code>"npm run": 3</code> → <code>["npm", "run", "dev"]</code> (3토큰)</li>
<li><code>git checkout main</code> → <code>"git": 2</code> → <code>["git", "checkout"]</code> (2토큰)</li>
<li><code>docker compose up -d</code> → <code>"docker compose": 3</code> → <code>["docker", "compose", "up"]</code></li>
</ul>
<p>이렇게 정규화된 prefix가 permission pattern 매칭에 사용된다. <code>"npm run *"</code>을 allow하면 <code>npm run dev</code>, <code>npm run build</code> 모두 허용.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Deferred 승인 흐름</h2>
<h3>ask() — 대기 생성</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts — ask 함수 (핵심 로직)
const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input) {
  const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)
  let needsAsk = false

  for (const pattern of request.patterns) {
    const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)
    if (rule.action === "deny") return yield* new DeniedError({ ruleset: ... })
    if (rule.action === "allow") continue
    needsAsk = true
  }

  if (!needsAsk) return

  const deferred = yield* Deferred.make&#x3C;void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()
  pending.set(id, { info, deferred })
  void Bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)
  return yield* Deferred.await(deferred)  // 사용자 응답까지 블로킹
})
</code></pre>
<p><code>Deferred</code>는 Effect.ts의 일회성 비동기 값이다. <code>await</code>로 대기하고 있다가 <code>succeed</code> 또는 <code>fail</code>이 호출되면 즉시 해소된다. 세션 종료 시 finalizer가 모든 pending Deferred를 <code>RejectedError</code>로 fail한다.</p>
<h3>reply() — 승인 처리</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Tool as Tool (bash/edit/read)
    participant Perm as Permission.Service
    participant Bus as Bus (EventEmitter)
    participant TUI as TUI (Ink)

    Tool->>Perm: ctx.ask({ permission: "bash", patterns: ["npm run dev"] })
    Perm->>Perm: evaluate → action: "ask"
    Perm->>Perm: Deferred.make() + pending.set()
    Perm->>Bus: Bus.publish(Event.Asked, request)
    Bus->>TUI: permission.asked 이벤트
    TUI->>TUI: 승인 UI 표시

    alt once
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "once" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.succeed()
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else always
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "always" })
        Perm->>Perm: approved.push(rule)
        Perm->>Perm: 다른 pending 재평가 → 일괄 승인
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else reject
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "reject" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.fail(RejectedError)
        Perm->>Perm: 같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject
        Perm->>Tool: throw RejectedError
    end
</code></pre>
<h3>일괄 승인 (batch-approve)</h3>
<p><code>always</code> 응답 시 가장 흥미로운 동작이 발생한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts — reply "always" 경로
for (const pattern of existing.info.always) {
  approved.push({
    permission: existing.info.permission,
    pattern,
    action: "allow",
  })
}

// 같은 세션의 다른 pending 요청을 재평가
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  const ok = item.info.patterns.every(
    (pattern) => evaluate(item.info.permission, pattern, approved).action === "allow",
  )
  if (!ok) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.succeed(item.deferred, undefined)
}
</code></pre>
<p>한 번의 <code>always</code> 승인으로:</p>
<ol>
<li><code>approved</code> 배열에 새 규칙 추가</li>
<li>동일 세션의 모든 pending 요청을 재평가</li>
<li>새 규칙으로 allow되는 요청을 자동 해소</li>
</ol>
<p>예: <code>bash</code> + <code>"npm *"</code> always 승인 → 대기 중이던 <code>npm install</code>, <code>npm test</code> 모두 자동 통과.</p>
<h3>일괄 거부 (batch-reject)</h3>
<p>reject 시에도 비슷한 일괄 처리가 있다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// reject 시 같은 세션의 모든 pending 일괄 거부
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.fail(item.deferred, new RejectedError())
}
</code></pre>
<p>reject는 해당 세션의 <strong>모든</strong> pending 요청을 일괄 거부한다. 사용자가 하나를 거부하면 같은 세션에서 대기 중인 모든 것이 거부된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>에러 체계</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>에러 클래스</th>
<th>트리거</th>
<th>의미</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>DeniedError</code></td>
<td><code>evaluate → deny</code></td>
<td>규칙에 의해 명시적으로 차단. ruleset 정보 포함</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>RejectedError</code></td>
<td>사용자 reject / 세션 종료</td>
<td>사용자가 거부하거나 세션이 종료됨</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>CorrectedError</code></td>
<td>reject + message</td>
<td>사용자가 거부하면서 피드백 메시지 제공</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>모두 Effect.ts <code>TaggedErrorClass</code>로 정의되어 있어 <code>Effect.catchTag</code>로 분기 처리 가능하다. <code>CorrectedError</code>의 feedback은 LLM에게 "이렇게 하지 말고 이렇게 해라"는 지시를 전달하는 데 사용된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>도구 통합</h2>
<p>각 도구는 <code>ctx.ask()</code>를 통해 permission 시스템에 접근한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// tool/bash.ts — bash 도구의 permission 요청
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "bash",
  patterns: Array.from(patterns),    // BashArity로 정규화된 명령어
  always: Array.from(always),        // "always" 승인 시 저장할 패턴
  metadata: {},
})

// tool/edit.ts — 편집 도구
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "edit",
  patterns: [relativePath],          // 파일 경로
  always: [relativeGlob],           // glob 패턴으로 확장
  metadata: {},
})
</code></pre>
<p><code>patterns</code>와 <code>always</code>의 분리가 중요하다. <code>patterns</code>는 현재 요청에 대한 매칭 대상이고, <code>always</code>는 "always" 승인 시 ruleset에 영구 추가될 패턴이다. <code>edit</code>의 경우 <code>patterns</code>는 정확한 파일명, <code>always</code>는 glob 패턴이어서 "이 파일 승인"이 "이 디렉토리 전체 승인"으로 확장된다.</p>
<h3>disabled() — 도구 비활성화</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission/index.ts
export function disabled(tools: string[], ruleset: Ruleset): Set&#x3C;string> {
  const result = new Set&#x3C;string>()
  for (const tool of tools) {
    const permission = EDIT_TOOLS.includes(tool) ? "edit" : tool
    const rule = ruleset.findLast((rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission))
    if (!rule) continue
    if (rule.pattern === "*" &#x26;&#x26; rule.action === "deny") result.add(tool)
  }
  return result
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>write</code>, <code>apply_patch</code>, <code>multiedit</code> 등 편집 도구는 모두 <code>"edit"</code> permission으로 통합된다. <code>edit: "deny"</code>면 모든 편집 도구가 비활성화.</p>
<hr>
<h2>영속성</h2>
<p>permission 상태는 두 곳에 저장된다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>SessionTable.permission</strong>: 세션별 룰셋, JSON 컬럼 (<code>Permission.Ruleset</code> 타입)</li>
<li><strong>PermissionTable</strong>: 프로젝트별 영구 승인, <code>project_id</code> PK + <code>data</code> JSON 컬럼</li>
</ol>
<p><code>always</code> 승인은 런타임 <code>approved</code> 배열에만 추가되고, 세션이 끝나면 PermissionTable에 영속화되는 구조다. 다음 세션에서는 PermissionTable에서 초기 approved를 복원한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Codex guardian과의 비교</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>항목</th>
<th>Codex (guardian)</th>
<th>OpenCode (permission)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>판단 주체</td>
<td>LLM (gpt-5.4)</td>
<td>규칙 엔진 (wildcard 매칭)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>판단 기준</td>
<td>risk_score (0-100)</td>
<td>ruleset findLast</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>기본 정책</td>
<td>fail-closed (사용자에게 넘김)</td>
<td>fail-to-ask (사용자에게 묻기)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>자동 승인 조건</td>
<td>risk_score &#x3C; 80</td>
<td>rule.action === "allow"</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>비용</td>
<td>LLM 호출 (토큰 소모)</td>
<td>제로 (로컬 규칙 평가)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>컨텍스트</td>
<td>transcript 복원 필요</td>
<td>불필요</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>배치 처리</td>
<td>없음 (요청별 판단)</td>
<td>always 승인 시 일괄 해소</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>피드백</td>
<td>없음</td>
<td>CorrectedError로 LLM에 피드백 전달</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>런타임</td>
<td>Rust (Codex-RS)</td>
<td>TypeScript + Effect.ts</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>포크 관점</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 규칙 기반 + LLM 무호출은 비용 효율적이고 예측 가능하다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>findLast</code> 우선순위 모델은 config → agent → session 계층을 자연스럽게 표현한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Deferred 기반 비동기 승인은 Effect.ts 생태계의 좋은 활용 사례</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>always</code> 일괄 승인과 reject 일괄 거부는 UX 개선에 효과적</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> BashArity 정규화는 "npm run dev"와 "npm run build"를 하나의 패턴으로 처리할 수 있게 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>approved</code> 배열이 무한 성장할 수 있다 — 정리 전략이 없음</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> wildcard 패턴이 <code>*</code>만 지원하고 negation(<code>!</code>)이 없다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> evaluate가 O(n) 선형 스캔이라 ruleset이 커지면 성능 저하 가능 (현실적 문제는 아님)</li>
</ul>

54:T20ae4,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 13: Cross-cutting</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>이 문서는 OpenCode 코딩 에이전트에서 1~12차원(TUI, Prompt, Tool, Skill, Subagent, Surface, Sandbox, Config, MCP, Memory, Plugin, Guardian)에 포함되지 않는 **잔여 교차 관심사(cross-cutting concerns)**를 분석한다. OpenCode는 <code>packages/140_opencode/src/</code> 아래에 40개 이상의 하위 디렉터리를 갖</li>
<li>packages/140_opencode/src/</li>
<li>acp/          -- Agent Client Protocol (접근 제어)</li>
<li>auth/         -- 인증/크리덴셜 관리</li>
<li>bun/          -- Bun 런타임 추상화</li>
<li>bus/          -- 이벤트 버스 (핵심 고유 기능)</li>
<li>effect/       -- Effect-TS 인프라 계층</li>
<li>env/          -- 환경변수 격리</li>
<li>flag/         -- 피처 플래그 시스템</li>
<li>git/          -- Git VCS 통합</li>
<li>ide/          -- IDE 통합</li>
<li>lsp/          -- Language Server Protocol 클라이언트</li>
</ul>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// Effect.catch: 포괄적 에러 캐치 (git 프로세스 실패 등)
Effect.catch((err) => Effect.succeed(fail(err)))

// Effect.catchCause: Cause 기반 에러 처리
Effect.catchCause((cause) => {
  log.error("cleanup loop failed", { cause: Cause.pretty(cause) })
  return Effect.void
})

// Scope 기반 포크된 에러 처리
yield* boot(info, input?.startCommand).pipe(
  Effect.catchCause((cause) => Effect.sync(() => log.error(...))),
  Effect.forkIn(scope),  // 스코프 내에서 백그라운드 실행
)
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// provider.ts - SSE 읽기 타임아웃 보호
function wrapSSE(res: Response, ms: number, ctl: AbortController) {
  const reader = res.body.getReader()
  const body = new ReadableStream&#x3C;Uint8Array>({
    async pull(ctrl) {
      const part = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const id = setTimeout(() => {
          const err = new Error("SSE read timed out")
          ctl.abort(err)
          void reader.cancel(err)
          reject(err)
        }, ms)
        reader.read().then(
          (part) => { clearTimeout(id); resolve(part) },
          (err) => { clearTimeout(id); reject(err) },
        )
      })
    },
  })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">export function parseStreamError(input: unknown): ParsedStreamError | undefined {
  switch (body?.error?.code) {
    case "context_length_exceeded":     // 컨텍스트 초과
    case "insufficient_quota":          // 쿼터 초과
    case "usage_not_included":          // 플랜 업그레이드 필요
    case "invalid_prompt":              // 잘못된 프롬프트
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">export namespace Log {
  export const Level = z.enum(["DEBUG", "INFO", "WARN", "ERROR"])

  // 출력 형식: "LEVEL ISO8601 +deltaMs key=value ... message"
  // 예: "INFO  2026-03-26T10:30:00 +42ms service=git branch"

  export function create(tags?: Record&#x3C;string, any>): Logger {
    // 서비스별 싱글턴 캐싱
    const service = tags["service"]
    if (service) {
      const cached = loggers.get(service)
      if (cached) return cached
    }
    // ...
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// time() 메서드: using 문과 결합 가능
time(message: string, extra?: Record&#x3C;string, any>) {
  const now = Date.now()
  result.info(message, { status: "started", ...extra })
  return {
    stop() {
      result.info(message, { status: "completed", duration: Date.now() - now, ...extra })
    },
    [Symbol.dispose]() { this.stop() },
  }
}
</code></pre>

<pre><code class="language-typescript">export function ide() {
  if (process.env["TERM_PROGRAM"] === "vscode") {
    const v = process.env["GIT_ASKPASS"]
    for (const ide of SUPPORTED_IDES) {
      if (v?.includes(ide.name)) return ide.name
    }
  }
  return "unknown"
}

afterAll(async () => {
  Database.close()
  const rm = async (left: number): Promise&#x3C;void> => {
    Bun.gc(true)
    await sleep(100)
    return fs.rm(dir, { recursive: true, force: true }).catch(...)
  }
  await rm(30)  // 최대 30회 재시도
})

<pre><code class="language-typescript">// bus-event.ts
export namespace BusEvent {
  const registry = new Map&#x3C;string, Definition>()

  export function define&#x3C;Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
    type: Type,
    properties: Properties,
  ) {
    const result = { type, properties }
    registry.set(type, result)
    return result
  }

  // discriminatedUnion으로 전체 이벤트 스키마 생성
  export function payloads() {
    return z.discriminatedUnion("type",
      registry.entries().map(([type, def]) =>
        z.object({ type: z.literal(type), properties: def.properties })
      ).toArray()
    )
  }
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// bus/index.ts
export async function publish(def, properties) {
  const payload = { type: def.type, properties }
  const pending = []
  for (const key of [def.type, "*"]) {      // 타입 매칭 + 와일드카드
    const match = state().subscriptions.get(key)
    for (const sub of match) {
      pending.push(sub(payload))
    }
  }
  GlobalBus.emit("event", {                 // 글로벌 버스로 전파
    directory: Instance.directory,
    payload,
  })
  return Promise.all(pending)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// bus/global.ts
export const GlobalBus = new EventEmitter&#x3C;{
  event: [{ directory?: string; payload: any }]
}>()
</code></pre>

  () => ({
    subscriptions: new Map&#x3C;any, Subscription[]>(),
  }),
  async (entry) => {
    // 인스턴스 종료 시 InstanceDisposed 이벤트 발행
    const wildcard = entry.subscriptions.get("*")
    for (const sub of wildcard) {
      sub({ type: InstanceDisposed.type, properties: { directory: Instance.directory } })
    }
  },
)
</code></pre>

  if (!(yield* enabled())) return
  // 1. Git 저장소 초기화 (최초 1회)
  if (!existed) {
    yield* git(["init"], { env: { GIT_DIR: state.gitdir, GIT_WORK_TREE: state.worktree } })
  }
  // 2. 변경된 파일 + 새 파일 수집
  yield* add()
  // 3. 트리 객체 작성 (커밋 없이 트리만)
  const result = yield* git(args(["write-tree"]))
  return result.text.trim()  // 트리 해시 반환
})

const large = (yield* Effect.all(
  all.map((item) =>
    fs.stat(path.join(state.directory, item)).pipe(
      Effect.map((stat) => stat.type === "File" &#x26;&#x26; stat.size > limit ? item : undefined),
    ),
  ),
  { concurrency: 8 },

    participant Agent
    participant Snapshot
    participant GitRepo as 별도 Git 저장소

    Agent->>Snapshot: track()
    Snapshot->>GitRepo: diff-files + ls-files
    Snapshot->>GitRepo: add --sparse .
    Snapshot->>GitRepo: write-tree
    GitRepo-->>Snapshot: tree hash
    Snapshot-->>Agent: hash

    Agent->>Snapshot: patch(hash)
    Snapshot->>GitRepo: diff --cached --name-only hash
    GitRepo-->>Snapshot: 변경 파일 목록
    Snapshot-->>Agent: Patch { hash, files }

    Agent->>Snapshot: restore(hash)
    Snapshot->>GitRepo: read-tree + checkout-index -a -f
</code></pre>

<pre><code class="language-typescript">async function getClients(file: string) {
  const extension = path.parse(file).ext
  for (const server of Object.values(s.servers)) {
    if (server.extensions.length &#x26;&#x26; !server.extensions.includes(extension)) continue
    const root = await server.root(file)
    // 이미 생성된 클라이언트 재사용
    const match = s.clients.find((x) => x.root === root &#x26;&#x26; x.serverID === server.id)
    if (match) { result.push(match); continue }
    // inflight 대기 (중복 스폰 방지)
    const inflight = s.spawning.get(root + server.id)
    if (inflight) { const client = await inflight; ... }
    // 새 클라이언트 스폰
    const task = schedule(server, root, key)
    s.spawning.set(root + server.id, task)
  }
}
</code></pre>

connection.onNotification("textDocument/publishDiagnostics", (params) => {
  diagnostics.set(filePath, params.diagnostics)
  Bus.publish(Event.Diagnostics, { path: filePath, serverID: input.serverID })
})

// 클라이언트 진단 대기 (Bus 구독 기반)
async waitForDiagnostics(input: { path: string }) {
  return await withTimeout(
    new Promise&#x3C;void>((resolve) => {
      unsub = Bus.subscribe(Event.Diagnostics, (event) => {
        if (event.properties.path === normalizedPath) {
          debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => { unsub(); resolve() }, DIAGNOSTICS_DEBOUNCE_MS)
        }
      })
    }),
    3000,
  )
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 1. 서비스 정의 (ServiceMap 기반)
export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service&#x3C;Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Git") {}

// 2. Layer 구현
export const layer = Layer.effect(Service, Effect.gen(function* () {
  const deps = yield* SomeDependency
  return Service.of({ method1, method2, ... })
}))

// 3. runPromise 래퍼 (싱글턴 ManagedRuntime)
const runPromise = makeRunPromise(Service, defaultLayer)
export function method1(...) {
  return runPromise((svc) => svc.method1(...))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/effect/run-service.ts
export const memoMap = Layer.makeMemoMapUnsafe()

export function makeRunPromise&#x3C;I, S, E>(service, layer) {
  let rt: ManagedRuntime&#x3C;I, E> | undefined
  return &#x3C;A, Err>(fn: (svc: S) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;A, Err, I>) => {
    rt ??= ManagedRuntime.make(layer, { memoMap })  // 지연 초기화 + 공유 메모맵
    return rt.runPromise(service.use(fn))
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/effect/instance-state.ts
export const make = &#x3C;A>(init) => Effect.gen(function* () {
  const cache = yield* ScopedCache.make&#x3C;string, A>({
    capacity: Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY,
    lookup: () => init(Instance.current),
  })
  // 인스턴스 종료 시 캐시 무효화
  const off = registerDisposer((dir) => Effect.runPromise(ScopedCache.invalidate(cache, dir)))
  yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.sync(off))
  return { cache }
})
</code></pre>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>OpenCode residual cross-interest analysis</h1>
<h2>Overview</h2>
<p>This document analyzes <strong>remaining cross-cutting concerns</strong> that are not included in dimensions 1 to 12 (TUI, Prompt, Tool, Skill, Subagent, Surface, Sandbox, Config, MCP, Memory, Plugin, Guardian) in the OpenCode coding agent. OpenCode has more than 40 subdirectories under <code>packages/140_opencode/src/</code>, among which <code>bus/</code>, <code>acp/</code>, <code>flag/</code>, <code>lsp/</code>, <code>snapshot/</code>, <code>worktree/</code>, and <code>ide/</code> have their own architectural significance.</p>
<h3>Directory map to be analyzed</h3>
<pre><code>packages/140_opencode/src/
  acp/          -- Agent Client Protocol (접근 제어)
  auth/         -- 인증/크리덴셜 관리
  bun/          -- Bun 런타임 추상화
  bus/          -- 이벤트 버스 (핵심 고유 기능)
  effect/       -- Effect-TS 인프라 계층
  env/          -- 환경변수 격리
  flag/         -- 피처 플래그 시스템
  git/          -- Git VCS 통합
  ide/          -- IDE 통합
  lsp/          -- Language Server Protocol 클라이언트
  provider/     -- 21+ 모델 프로바이더 추상화
  snapshot/     -- 스냅샷/타임트래블 시스템
  worktree/     -- Git Worktree 관리
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Git/VCS integration</h2>
<h3>1.1 Core files</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>file</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>src/git/index.ts</code></td>
<td>Git CLI wrapper (Effect-TS service)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>src/worktree/index.ts</code></td>
<td>Create/Delete/Reset Git Worktree</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>src/snapshot/index.ts</code></td>
<td>Separate Git repository-based snapshots</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>src/project/vcs.ts</code></td>
<td>VCS detection and branch events</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>1.2 Git service architecture</h3>
<p><code>Git.Service</code> is implemented with the <code>ServiceMap.Service</code> pattern of Effect-TS. All git commands are executed through <code>ChildProcessSpawner</code>, forcing a deterministic configuration:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/git/index.ts
const cfg = [
  "--no-optional-locks",
  "-c", "core.autocrlf=false",
  "-c", "core.fsmonitor=false",   // fsmonitor 비활성화 (성능)
  "-c", "core.longpaths=true",
  "-c", "core.symlinks=true",
  "-c", "core.quotepath=false",
] as const
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Design decision</strong>: <code>--no-optional-locks</code> and <code>core.fsmonitor=false</code> are to prevent git lock conflicts in concurrent environments.</p>
<h3>1.3 Git interface</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">export interface Interface {
  readonly run: (args: string[], opts: Options) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Result>
  readonly branch: (cwd: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string | undefined>
  readonly defaultBranch: (cwd: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Base | undefined>
  readonly hasHead: (cwd: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;boolean>
  readonly mergeBase: (cwd: string, base: string, head?: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string | undefined>
  readonly show: (cwd: string, ref: string, file: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;string>
  readonly status: (cwd: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Item[]>
  readonly diff: (cwd: string, ref: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Item[]>
  readonly stats: (cwd: string, ref: string) => Effect.Effect&#x3C;Stat[]>
}
</code></pre>
<h3>1.4 Worktree system</h3>
<p><code>Worktree</code> provides an isolated work environment using Git worktree. It is a fairly complex module, spanning 600 lines:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Create</strong>: Create a worktree with the <code>140_opencode/&#x3C;slug></code> branch, <code>--no-checkout</code> and then <code>reset --hard</code></li>
<li><strong>Bootstrap</strong>: Run project initialization script through <code>InstanceBootstrap</code></li>
<li><strong>Reset</strong>: hard reset to default branch + <code>clean -ffdx</code> + reinitialization of submodules</li>
<li><strong>delete</strong>: stop fsmonitor -> worktree remove -> delete branch -> clean directory</li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// 이름 충돌 방지: 최대 26회 시도
const MAX_NAME_ATTEMPTS = 26
const candidate = Effect.fn("Worktree.candidate")(function* (root, base?) {
  for (const attempt of Array.from({ length: MAX_NAME_ATTEMPTS }, (_, i) => i)) {
    const name = base ? (attempt === 0 ? base : `${base}-${Slug.create()}`) : Slug.create()
    // ... 존재 확인 및 브랜치 참조 확인
  }
})
</code></pre>
<h3>1.5 Diff Strategy</h3>
<p>Three diff levels are supported:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Git status</strong> (<code>--porcelain=v1</code>): List of working directory changes.</li>
<li><strong>Git diff</strong> (<code>--name-status -z</code>): file-level changes between references</li>
<li><strong>Git stats</strong> (<code>--numstat -z</code>): Add/delete line count</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A[Git.Service] --> B[status: 워킹 디렉터리]
    A --> C[diff: 참조 간 비교]
    A --> D[stats: 라인 통계]
    E[Worktree.Service] -->|생성| F[git worktree add]
    E -->|리셋| G[git reset --hard + clean]
    E -->|삭제| H[git worktree remove]
    I[Snapshot.Service] -->|추적| J[git write-tree]
    I -->|복원| K[git checkout-index]
</code></pre>

<h3>2.3 Custom loader system</h3>
<p>Certain providers have special initialization logic via <code>CUSTOM_LOADERS</code>:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>anthropic</strong>: Added <code>interleaved-thinking</code> beta header.</li>
<li><strong>opencode</strong>: Free model filtering, without key <code>apiKey: "public"</code></li>
<li><strong>openai/xai</strong>: Use <code>sdk.responses()</code> API</li>
<li><strong>github-copilot</strong>: GPT-5+ model is Responses API, other Chat APIs</li>
<li><strong>azure</strong>: <code>AZURE_RESOURCE_NAME</code> resource-based endpoint</li>
<li><strong>amazon-bedrock</strong>: Automatic processing of cross-region inference profile prefix (us., eu., global.)</li>
</ul>
<h3>2.4 Model Catalog (models.dev)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/provider/models.ts
export const Data = lazy(async () => {
  const result = await Filesystem.readJson(filepath).catch(() => {})
  if (result) return result
  const snapshot = await import("./models-snapshot.js")  // 빌드 타임 스냅샷
  if (snapshot) return snapshot
  const json = await fetch(`${url()}/api.json`)          // 런타임 페치
  return JSON.parse(json)
})
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Step 3 Fallback</strong>: Local cache -> build time snapshot -> remote fetch. Auto refresh every 60 minutes.</p>
<h3>2.5 Model metadata schema</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">export const Model = z.object({
  id: z.string(),
  name: z.string(),
  reasoning: z.boolean(),        // 추론 모드 지원
  tool_call: z.boolean(),        // 도구 호출 지원
  interleaved: z.union([...]),   // 인터리브드 사고
  cost: z.object({               // 토큰당 비용
    input: z.number(),
    output: z.number(),
    cache_read: z.number().optional(),
  }),
  limit: z.object({
    context: z.number(),         // 컨텍스트 윈도우
    output: z.number(),          // 최대 출력 토큰
  }),
  modalities: z.object({         // 입출력 모달리티
    input: z.array(z.enum(["text", "audio", "image", "video", "pdf"])),
    output: z.array(z.enum(["text", "audio", "image", "video", "pdf"])),
  }),
})
</code></pre>

const providerIdSchema = Schema.String.pipe(Schema.brand("ProviderID"))
export const ProviderID = providerIdSchema.pipe(

    make: (id: string) => schema.makeUnsafe(id),
